authors_text: Zihui Xue,Zhengqi Gao,Sucheng Ren,Hang Zhao
title: The Modality Focusing Hypothesis: Towards Understanding Crossmodal Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 模态聚焦假说：理解跨模态知识蒸馏
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023 (top-5%). The first three authors contribute equally. Project website: https://zihuixue.github.io/MFH/index.html
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023 (top-5%). The first three authors contribute equally. Project website: https://zihuixue.github.io/MFH/index.html
abstract: Crossmodal knowledge distillation (KD) extends traditional knowledge distillation to the area of multimodal learning and demonstrates great success in various applications. To achieve knowledge transfer across modalities, a pretrained network from one modality is adopted as the teacher to provide supervision signals to a student network learning from another modality. In contrast to the empirical success reported in prior works, the working mechanism of crossmodal KD remains a mystery. In this paper, we present a thorough understanding of crossmodal KD. We begin with two case studies and demonstrate that KD is not a universal cure in crossmodal knowledge transfer. We then present the modality Venn diagram to understand modality relationships and the modality focusing hypothesis revealing the decisive factor in the efficacy of crossmodal KD. Experimental results on 6 multimodal datasets help justify our hypothesis, diagnose failure cases, and point directions to improve crossmodal knowledge transfer in the future.
summary: Crossmodal knowledge distillation (KD) extends traditional knowledge distillation to the area of multimodal learning and demonstrates great success in various applications. To achieve knowledge transfer across modalities, a pretrained network from one modality is adopted as the teacher to provide supervision signals to a student network learning from another modality. In contrast to the empirical success reported in prior works, the working mechanism of crossmodal KD remains a mystery. In this paper, we present a thorough understanding of crossmodal KD. We begin with two case studies and demonstrate that KD is not a universal cure in crossmodal knowledge transfer. We then present the modality Venn diagram to understand modality relationships and the modality focusing hypothesis revealing the decisive factor in the efficacy of crossmodal KD. Experimental results on 6 multimodal datasets help justify our hypothesis, diagnose failure cases, and point directions to improve crossmodal knowledge transfer in the future.
abstract_zh: 跨模态知识蒸馏（KD）将传统知识蒸馏扩展到多模态学习领域，并在各种应用中取得了巨大成功。为了实现跨模态的知识转移，采用一种模态的预训练网络作为教师，向从另一种模态学习的学生网络提供监督信号。与先前工作中报道的实证成功相比，跨模态 KD 的工作机制仍然是一个谜。在本文中，我们对跨模式 KD 进行了透彻的理解。我们从两个案例研究开始，证明 KD 并不是跨模式知识转移的万能药。然后，我们提出模态维恩图来理解模态关系，模态聚焦假设揭示了跨模态 KD 功效的决定性因素。 6 个多模态数据集的实验结果有助于证明我们的假设、诊断失败案例并指出未来改进跨模态知识转移的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在深入理解跨模态知识蒸馏（KD）的工作机制，提出模态聚焦假设并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管跨模态KD在应用中表现出色，但其成功背后的机制尚未明确，需要系统性分析以指导未来改进。
AI.method: 通过两个案例研究揭示KD的局限性，提出模态韦恩图分析模态关系，并建立模态聚焦假设作为核心理论框架，结合6个数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了模态聚焦假设，诊断了跨模态KD失败的典型场景，并为提升知识转移效果提供了改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态KD效果取决于模态间知识重叠程度，未来研究应关注模态关系建模与聚焦机制优化。

authors_text: Alexandra Kearney,Anna Koop,Johannes Günther,Patrick M. Pilarski
title: What Should I Know? Using Meta-gradient Descent for Predictive Feature Discovery in a Single Stream of Experience
title_zh: 我应该知道什么？使用元梯度下降在单一经验流中进行预测特征发现
abstract: In computational reinforcement learning, a growing body of work seeks to construct an agent's perception of the world through predictions of future sensations; predictions about environment observations are used as additional input features to enable better goal-directed decision-making. An open challenge in this line of work is determining from the infinitely many predictions that the agent could possibly make which predictions might best support decision-making. This challenge is especially apparent in continual learning problems where a single stream of experience is available to a singular agent. As a primary contribution, we introduce a meta-gradient descent process by which an agent learns 1) what predictions to make, 2) the estimates for its chosen predictions, and 3) how to use those estimates to generate policies that maximize future reward -- all during a single ongoing process of continual learning. In this manuscript we consider predictions expressed as General Value Functions: temporally extended estimates of the accumulation of a future signal. We demonstrate that through interaction with the environment an agent can independently select predictions that resolve partial-observability, resulting in performance similar to expertly specified GVFs. By learning, rather than manually specifying these predictions, we enable the agent to identify useful predictions in a self-supervised manner, taking a step towards truly autonomous systems.
summary: In computational reinforcement learning, a growing body of work seeks to construct an agent's perception of the world through predictions of future sensations; predictions about environment observations are used as additional input features to enable better goal-directed decision-making. An open challenge in this line of work is determining from the infinitely many predictions that the agent could possibly make which predictions might best support decision-making. This challenge is especially apparent in continual learning problems where a single stream of experience is available to a singular agent. As a primary contribution, we introduce a meta-gradient descent process by which an agent learns 1) what predictions to make, 2) the estimates for its chosen predictions, and 3) how to use those estimates to generate policies that maximize future reward -- all during a single ongoing process of continual learning. In this manuscript we consider predictions expressed as General Value Functions: temporally extended estimates of the accumulation of a future signal. We demonstrate that through interaction with the environment an agent can independently select predictions that resolve partial-observability, resulting in performance similar to expertly specified GVFs. By learning, rather than manually specifying these predictions, we enable the agent to identify useful predictions in a self-supervised manner, taking a step towards truly autonomous systems.
abstract_zh: 在计算强化学习中，越来越多的工作试图通过预测未来的感觉来构建智能体对世界的感知。关于环境观测的预测被用作额外的输入特征，以实现更好的目标导向决策。这一工作领域的一个公开挑战是从智能体可能做出的无数预测中确定哪些预测最能支持决策。这一挑战在持续学习问题中尤其明显，其中单一代理可以使用单一经验流。作为主要贡献，我们引入了元梯度下降过程，通过该过程，代理学习 1）做出什么预测，2）对其所选预测的估计，以及 3）如何使用这些估计来生成最大化未来奖励的策略 - 所有这些都在一个持续学习的过程中进行。在这份手稿中，我们考虑以通用价值函数表示的预测：对未来信号累积的时间扩展估计。我们证明，通过与环境交互，智能体可以独立选择解决部分可观测性的预测，从而获得与专家指定的 GVF 类似的性能。通过学习，而不是手动指定这些预测，我们使代理能够以自我监督的方式识别有用的预测，从而向真正的自主系统迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元梯度下降的方法，使智能体能够在单一经验流中自主发现对决策最有用的预测性特征，从而提升强化学习中的目标导向决策能力。
AI.motivation: 在强化学习中，如何从无限可能的预测中筛选出最有助于决策的预测是一个开放性挑战，尤其是在连续学习场景下，智能体需依赖单一经验流自主学习，无法依赖人工指定预测。
AI.method: 通过元梯度下降过程，智能体同时学习：1) 应该预测什么，2) 预测值的估计，3) 如何利用预测生成最大化未来奖励的策略。采用广义价值函数（GVF）作为时间扩展的未来信号累积估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，智能体能自主选择解决部分可观测性问题的预测，其性能与专家指定的GVF相当，无需人工干预即可实现自我监督的预测学习。
AI.conclusion: 元梯度下降方法使智能体能够自主发现有效预测特征，为构建真正自主的强化学习系统提供了重要进展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元梯度下降的方法，使智能体能够在单一经验流中自主发现对决策最有用的预测性特征，从而提升强化学习中的目标导向决策能力。
ai_content.motivation: 在强化学习中，如何从无限可能的预测中筛选出最有助于决策的预测是一个开放性挑战，尤其是在连续学习场景下，智能体需依赖单一经验流自主学习，无法依赖人工指定预测。
ai_content.method: 通过元梯度下降过程，智能体同时学习：1) 应该预测什么，2) 预测值的估计，3) 如何利用预测生成最大化未来奖励的策略。采用广义价值函数（GVF）作为时间扩展的未来信号累积估计。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，智能体能自主选择解决部分可观测性问题的预测，其性能与专家指定的GVF相当，无需人工干预即可实现自我监督的预测学习。
ai_content.conclusion: 元梯度下降方法使智能体能够自主发现有效预测特征，为构建真正自主的强化学习系统提供了重要进展。

search_text: What Should I Know? Using Meta-gradient Descent for Predictive Feature Discovery in a Single Stream of Experience 我应该知道什么？使用元梯度下降在单一经验流中进行预测特征发现 In computational reinforcement learning, a growing body of work seeks to construct an agent's perception of the world through predictions of future sensations; predictions about environment observations are used as additional input features to enable better goal-directed decision-making. An open challenge in this line of work is determining from the infinitely many predictions that the agent could possibly make which predictions might best support decision-making. This challenge is especially apparent in continual learning problems where a single stream of experience is available to a singular agent. As a primary contribution, we introduce a meta-gradient descent process by which an agent learns 1) what predictions to make, 2) the estimates for its chosen predictions, and 3) how to use those estimates to generate policies that maximize future reward -- all during a single ongoing process of continual learning. In this manuscript we consider predictions expressed as General Value Functions: temporally extended estimates of the accumulation of a future signal. We demonstrate that through interaction with the environment an agent can independently select predictions that resolve partial-observability, resulting in performance similar to expertly specified GVFs. By learning, rather than manually specifying these predictions, we enable the agent to identify useful predictions in a self-supervised manner, taking a step towards truly autonomous systems. 在计算强化学习中，越来越多的工作试图通过预测未来的感觉来构建智能体对世界的感知。关于环境观测的预测被用作额外的输入特征，以实现更好的目标导向决策。这一工作领域的一个公开挑战是从智能体可能做出的无数预测中确定哪些预测最能支持决策。这一挑战在持续学习问题中尤其明显，其中单一代理可以使用单一经验流。作为主要贡献，我们引入了元梯度下降过程，通过该过程，代理学习 1）做出什么预测，2）对其所选预测的估计，以及 3）如何使用这些估计来生成最大化未来奖励的策略 - 所有这些都在一个持续学习的过程中进行。在这份手稿中，我们考虑以通用价值函数表示的预测：对未来信号累积的时间扩展估计。我们证明，通过与环境交互，智能体可以独立选择解决部分可观测性的预测，从而获得与专家指定的 GVF 类似的性能。通过学习，而不是手动指定这些预测，我们使代理能够以自我监督的方式识别有用的预测，从而向真正的自主系统迈出了一步。 本文提出了一种基于元梯度下降的方法，使智能体能够在单一经验流中自主发现对决策最有用的预测性特征，从而提升强化学习中的目标导向决策能力。 Alexandra Kearney,Anna Koop,Johannes Günther,Patrick M. Pilarski cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Marcus Nordström,Henrik Hult,Jonas Söderberg,Fredrik Löfman
title: On Image Segmentation With Noisy Labels: Characterization and Volume Properties of the Optimal Solutions to Accuracy and Dice
title_zh: 关于带噪声标签的图像分割：精度和骰子最佳解决方案的表征和体积属性
abstract: We study two of the most popular performance metrics in medical image segmentation, Accuracy and Dice, when the target labels are noisy. For both metrics, several statements related to characterization and volume properties of the set of optimal segmentations are proved, and associated experiments are provided. Our main insights are: (i) the volume of the solutions to both metrics may deviate significantly from the expected volume of the target, (ii) the volume of a solution to Accuracy is always less than or equal to the volume of a solution to Dice and (iii) the optimal solutions to both of these metrics coincide when the set of feasible segmentations is constrained to the set of segmentations with the volume equal to the expected volume of the target.
summary: We study two of the most popular performance metrics in medical image segmentation, Accuracy and Dice, when the target labels are noisy. For both metrics, several statements related to characterization and volume properties of the set of optimal segmentations are proved, and associated experiments are provided. Our main insights are: (i) the volume of the solutions to both metrics may deviate significantly from the expected volume of the target, (ii) the volume of a solution to Accuracy is always less than or equal to the volume of a solution to Dice and (iii) the optimal solutions to both of these metrics coincide when the set of feasible segmentations is constrained to the set of segmentations with the volume equal to the expected volume of the target.
abstract_zh: 当目标标签有噪声时，我们研究了医学图像分割中最流行的两个性能指标：准确度和骰子。对于这两个指标，证明了与最佳分割集的表征和体积属性相关的几个陈述，并提供了相关实验。我们的主要见解是：（i）这两个指标的解决方案的数量可能会显着偏离目标的预期数量，（ii）准确性的解决方案的数量始终小于或等于 Dice 的解决方案的数量，以及（iii）当可行的分割集被限制为体积等于目标的预期体积的分割集时，这两个指标的最佳解决方案是一致的。

AI.tldr: 研究医学图像分割中存在标签噪声时，Accuracy和Dice指标最优解的体积特性及其差异。
AI.motivation: 解决医学图像分割中标签噪声导致的分割偏差问题，分析Accuracy和Dice指标在噪声下的最优解特性，以提高分割准确性。
AI.method: 通过数学理论分析与实验验证，研究Accuracy和Dice指标在存在标签噪声情况下的最优分割解的体积特性。
AI.result: 发现两种指标的最优解体积可能偏离目标体积；Accuracy的解体积不大于Dice；当体积约束为目标体积时，两者最优解一致。
AI.conclusion: 标签噪声下Accuracy和Dice的最优解存在体积差异，约束体积可使两者解一致，为医学图像分割提供理论指导。

authors_text: ShahRukh Athar,Zexiang Xu,Kalyan Sunkavalli,Eli Shechtman,Zhixin Shu
title: RigNeRF: Fully Controllable Neural 3D Portraits
title_zh: RigNeRF：完全可控的神经 3D 肖像
comment: The project page can be found here: http://shahrukhathar.github.io/2022/06/06/RigNeRF.html
comments: The project page can be found here: http://shahrukhathar.github.io/2022/06/06/RigNeRF.html
abstract: Volumetric neural rendering methods, such as neural radiance fields (NeRFs), have enabled photo-realistic novel view synthesis. However, in their standard form, NeRFs do not support the editing of objects, such as a human head, within a scene. In this work, we propose RigNeRF, a system that goes beyond just novel view synthesis and enables full control of head pose and facial expressions learned from a single portrait video. We model changes in head pose and facial expressions using a deformation field that is guided by a 3D morphable face model (3DMM). The 3DMM effectively acts as a prior for RigNeRF that learns to predict only residuals to the 3DMM deformations and allows us to render novel (rigid) poses and (non-rigid) expressions that were not present in the input sequence. Using only a smartphone-captured short video of a subject for training, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on free view synthesis of a portrait scene with explicit head pose and expression controls. The project page can be found here: http://shahrukhathar.github.io/2022/06/06/RigNeRF.html
summary: Volumetric neural rendering methods, such as neural radiance fields (NeRFs), have enabled photo-realistic novel view synthesis. However, in their standard form, NeRFs do not support the editing of objects, such as a human head, within a scene. In this work, we propose RigNeRF, a system that goes beyond just novel view synthesis and enables full control of head pose and facial expressions learned from a single portrait video. We model changes in head pose and facial expressions using a deformation field that is guided by a 3D morphable face model (3DMM). The 3DMM effectively acts as a prior for RigNeRF that learns to predict only residuals to the 3DMM deformations and allows us to render novel (rigid) poses and (non-rigid) expressions that were not present in the input sequence. Using only a smartphone-captured short video of a subject for training, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on free view synthesis of a portrait scene with explicit head pose and expression controls. The project page can be found here: http://shahrukhathar.github.io/2022/06/06/RigNeRF.html
abstract_zh: 体积神经渲染方法，例如神经辐射场 (NeRF)，已经实现了逼真的新颖视图合成。然而，在其标准形式中，NeRF 不支持编辑场景中的对象，例如人头。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RigNeRF，这是一个超越新颖的视图合成的系统，能够完全控制从单个肖像视频中学习到的头部姿势和面部表情。我们使用由 3D 可变形面部模型 (3DMM) 引导的变形场对头部姿势和面部表情的变化进行建模。 3DMM 有效地充当 RigNeRF 的先验，它学习仅预测 3DMM 变形的残差，并允许我们渲染输入序列中不存在的新颖（刚性）姿势和（非刚性）表达。我们仅使用智能手机拍摄的主题短视频进行训练，证明了我们的方法在具有明确头部姿势和表情控制的肖像场景的自由视图合成方面的有效性。项目页面可以在这里找到：http://shahrukhathar.github.io/2022/06/06/RigNeRF.html

AI.tldr: 本文提出RigNeRF系统，通过单个人脸视频实现对头部姿态和面部表情的完全控制，生成可编辑的3D人像。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法无法在场景中编辑对象（如人脸），缺乏对姿态和表情的可控性，需开发支持编辑的神经渲染方法。
AI.method: 结合3D可变形人脸模型（3DMM）作为先验，通过变形场预测3DMM形变残差，实现对头部刚性姿态和非刚性表情的可控渲染。
AI.result: 仅使用手机拍摄的短视频训练，系统可生成具有明确姿态和表情控制的高质量新型视角人像，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: RigNeRF通过融合3DMM与NeRF，首次实现单视频训练下对头部姿态和表情的完全控制，推动了可编辑神经渲染的发展。

However, in their standard form, NeRFs do not support the editing of objects, such as a human head, within a scene. In this work, we propose RigNeRF, a system that goes beyond just novel view synthesis and enables full control of head pose and facial expressions learned from a single portrait video. The 3DMM effectively acts as a prior for RigNeRF that learns to predict only residuals to the 3DMM deformations and allows us to render novel (rigid) poses and (non-rigid) expressions that were not present in the input sequence. Using only a smartphone-captured short video of a subject for training, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on free view synthesis of a portrait scene with explicit head pose and expression controls. The project page can be found here: http://shahrukhathar.github.io/2022/06/06/RigNeRF.html 体积神经渲染方法，例如神经辐射场 (NeRF)，已经实现了逼真的新颖视图合成。然而，在其标准形式中，NeRF 不支持编辑场景中的对象，例如人头。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RigNeRF，这是一个超越新颖的视图合成的系统，能够完全控制从单个肖像视频中学习到的头部姿势和面部表情。我们使用由 3D 可变形面部模型 (3DMM) 引导的变形场对头部姿势和面部表情的变化进行建模。 3DMM 有效地充当 RigNeRF 的先验，它学习仅预测 3DMM 变形的残差，并允许我们渲染输入序列中不存在的新颖（刚性）姿势和（非刚性）表达。我们仅使用智能手机拍摄的主题短视频进行训练，证明了我们的方法在具有明确头部姿势和表情控制的肖像场景的自由视图合成方面的有效性。项目页面可以在这里找到：http://shahrukhathar.github.io/2022/06/06/RigNeRF.html 本文提出RigNeRF系统，通过单个人脸视频实现对头部姿态和面部表情的完全控制，生成可编辑的3D人像。 ShahRukh Athar,Zexiang Xu,Kalyan Sunkavalli,Eli Shechtman,Zhixin Shu cs.CV

authors_text: Sven Neth
title: A Dilemma for Solomonoff Prediction
title_zh: 所罗门诺夫预测的困境
comment: 25 pages. Forthcoming in Philosophy of Science
comments: 25 pages. Forthcoming in Philosophy of Science
abstract: The framework of Solomonoff prediction assigns prior probability to hypotheses inversely proportional to their Kolmogorov complexity. There are two well-known problems. First, the Solomonoff prior is relative to a choice of Universal Turing machine. Second, the Solomonoff prior is not computable. However, there are responses to both problems. Different Solomonoff priors converge with more and more data. Further, there are computable approximations to the Solomonoff prior. I argue that there is a tension between these two responses. This is because computable approximations to Solomonoff prediction do not always converge.
summary: The framework of Solomonoff prediction assigns prior probability to hypotheses inversely proportional to their Kolmogorov complexity. There are two well-known problems. First, the Solomonoff prior is relative to a choice of Universal Turing machine. Second, the Solomonoff prior is not computable. However, there are responses to both problems. Different Solomonoff priors converge with more and more data. Further, there are computable approximations to the Solomonoff prior. I argue that there is a tension between these two responses. This is because computable approximations to Solomonoff prediction do not always converge.
abstract_zh: 所罗门诺夫预测的框架将先验概率分配给与其柯尔莫哥洛夫复杂度成反比的假设。有两个众所周知的问题。首先，所罗门诺夫先验与通用图灵机的选择有关。其次，所罗门诺夫先验是不可计算的。然而，这两个问题都有解决方案。不同的所罗门诺夫先验与越来越多的数据融合。此外，还有所罗门诺夫先验的可计算近似值。我认为这两种反应之间存在紧张关系。这是因为所罗门诺夫预测的可计算近似并不总是收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨Solomonoff预测框架中两个已知问题的解决方案之间的矛盾，即不同通用图灵机导致的先验依赖性与不可计算性问题的可计算近似方法之间的张力。
AI.motivation: 为解决Solomonoff先验的两个核心缺陷（通用图灵机依赖性和不可计算性），现有方法分别提出收敛性和可计算近似方案，但作者发现二者存在潜在矛盾。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较不同Solomonoff先验的收敛性与可计算近似方法的收敛性差异，揭示二者在数学性质上的不兼容性。
AI.result: 证明可计算近似方法在特定情况下无法保证与理想Solomonoff先验的收敛性一致，导致两种解决方案存在根本性矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 现有两种解决Solomonoff预测缺陷的方法存在理论冲突，需要重新审视预测框架的基础假设或开发新的折中方案。

authors_text: Adriano Lucieri,Fabian Schmeisser,Christoph Peter Balada,Shoaib Ahmed Siddiqui,Andreas Dengel,Sheraz Ahmed
title: Revisiting the Shape-Bias of Deep Learning for Dermoscopic Skin Lesion Classification
title_zh: 重新审视皮肤镜皮肤病变分类深度学习的形状偏差
abstract: It is generally believed that the human visual system is biased towards the recognition of shapes rather than textures. This assumption has led to a growing body of work aiming to align deep models' decision-making processes with the fundamental properties of human vision. The reliance on shape features is primarily expected to improve the robustness of these models under covariate shift. In this paper, we revisit the significance of shape-biases for the classification of skin lesion images. Our analysis shows that different skin lesion datasets exhibit varying biases towards individual image features. Interestingly, despite deep feature extractors being inclined towards learning entangled features for skin lesion classification, individual features can still be decoded from this entangled representation. This indicates that these features are still represented in the learnt embedding spaces of the models, but not used for classification. In addition, the spectral analysis of different datasets shows that in contrast to common visual recognition, dermoscopic skin lesion classification, by nature, is reliant on complex feature combinations beyond shape-bias. As a natural consequence, shifting away from the prevalent desire of shape-biasing models can even improve skin lesion classifiers in some cases.
summary: It is generally believed that the human visual system is biased towards the recognition of shapes rather than textures. This assumption has led to a growing body of work aiming to align deep models' decision-making processes with the fundamental properties of human vision. The reliance on shape features is primarily expected to improve the robustness of these models under covariate shift. In this paper, we revisit the significance of shape-biases for the classification of skin lesion images. Our analysis shows that different skin lesion datasets exhibit varying biases towards individual image features. Interestingly, despite deep feature extractors being inclined towards learning entangled features for skin lesion classification, individual features can still be decoded from this entangled representation. This indicates that these features are still represented in the learnt embedding spaces of the models, but not used for classification. In addition, the spectral analysis of different datasets shows that in contrast to common visual recognition, dermoscopic skin lesion classification, by nature, is reliant on complex feature combinations beyond shape-bias. As a natural consequence, shifting away from the prevalent desire of shape-biasing models can even improve skin lesion classifiers in some cases.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，人类视觉系统偏向于形状的识别而不是纹理的识别。这一假设催生了越来越多的工作，旨在使深度模型的决策过程与人类视觉的基本属性保持一致。对形状特征的依赖主要有望提高这些模型在协变量偏移下的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们重新审视形状偏差对于皮肤病变图像分类的重要性。我们的分析表明，不同的皮肤病变数据集对各个图像特征表现出不同的偏差。有趣的是，尽管深度特征提取器倾向于学习用于皮肤病变分类的纠缠特征，但仍然可以从这种纠缠表示中解码单个特征。这表明这些特征仍然表示在模型的学习嵌入空间中，但不用于分类。此外，不同数据集的光谱分析表明，与常见的视觉识别相比，皮肤镜皮肤病变分类本质上依赖于形状偏差之外的复杂特征组合。作为自然结果，在某些情况下，摆脱形状偏差模型的普遍愿望甚至可以改进皮肤病变分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了深度学习在皮肤病变分类中对形状偏见的依赖性。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉系统倾向于形状而非纹理，这一假设引导了许多研究试图使深度模型的决策过程与人类视觉基本特性一致，以提升模型在协变量偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 作者分析了不同皮肤病变数据集对个体图像特征的偏见，并通过谱分析展示了皮肤病变分类依赖于复杂的特征组合，而不仅仅是形状偏见。
AI.result: 研究发现，尽管深度特征提取器倾向于学习纠缠的特征，但个体特征仍可在嵌入空间中解码，且皮肤病变分类依赖于复杂的特征组合，而非仅形状偏见。
AI.conclusion: 在某些情况下，减少对形状偏见的依赖甚至可以提升皮肤病变分类器的性能。

This assumption has led to a growing body of work aiming to align deep models' decision-making processes with the fundamental properties of human vision. authors_text: Chuang Niu,Ge Wang
title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning With MUlti-Segmental Informational Coding (MUSIC)
title_zh: 使用多分段信息编码（MUSIC）的自监督表征学习
abstract: Self-supervised representation learning maps high-dimensional data into a meaningful embedding space, where samples of similar semantic contents are close to each other. Most of the recent representation learning methods maximize cosine similarity or minimize the distance between the embedding features of different views from the same sample usually on the $l2$ normalized unit hypersphere. To prevent the trivial solutions that all samples have the same embedding feature, various techniques have been developed, such as contrastive learning, stop gradient, variance and covariance regularization, etc. In this study, we propose MUlti-Segmental Informational Coding (MUSIC) for self-supervised representation learning. MUSIC divides the embedding feature into multiple segments that discriminatively partition samples into different semantic clusters and different segments focus on different partition principles. Information theory measurements are directly used to optimize MUSIC and theoretically guarantee trivial solutions are avoided. MUSIC does not depend on commonly used techniques, such as memory bank or large batches, asymmetry networks, gradient stopping, momentum weight updating, etc, making the training framework flexible. Our experiments demonstrate that MUSIC achieves better results than most related Barlow Twins and VICReg methods on ImageNet classification with linear probing, and requires neither deep projectors nor large feature dimensions. Code will be made available.
summary: Self-supervised representation learning maps high-dimensional data into a meaningful embedding space, where samples of similar semantic contents are close to each other. Most of the recent representation learning methods maximize cosine similarity or minimize the distance between the embedding features of different views from the same sample usually on the $l2$ normalized unit hypersphere. To prevent the trivial solutions that all samples have the same embedding feature, various techniques have been developed, such as contrastive learning, stop gradient, variance and covariance regularization, etc. In this study, we propose MUlti-Segmental Informational Coding (MUSIC) for self-supervised representation learning. MUSIC divides the embedding feature into multiple segments that discriminatively partition samples into different semantic clusters and different segments focus on different partition principles. Information theory measurements are directly used to optimize MUSIC and theoretically guarantee trivial solutions are avoided. MUSIC does not depend on commonly used techniques, such as memory bank or large batches, asymmetry networks, gradient stopping, momentum weight updating, etc, making the training framework flexible. Our experiments demonstrate that MUSIC achieves better results than most related Barlow Twins and VICReg methods on ImageNet classification with linear probing, and requires neither deep projectors nor large feature dimensions. Code will be made available.
abstract_zh: 自监督表示学习将高维数据映射到有意义的嵌入空间，其中相似语义内容的样本彼此接近。最近的大多数表示学习方法通​​常在 $l2$ 归一化单位超球面上最大化余弦相似性或最小化来自同一样本的不同视图的嵌入特征之间的距离。为了防止所有样本具有相同嵌入特征的琐碎解决方案，人们开发了各种技术，例如对比学习、停止梯度、方差和协方差正则化等。在本研究中，我们提出了用于自监督表示学习的多分段信息编码（MUSIC）。 MUSIC 将嵌入特征划分为多个片段，这些片段有区别地将样本划分为不同的语义簇，并且不同的片段侧重于不同的划分原则。信息论测量直接用于优化 MUSIC，并从理论上保证避免了琐碎的解决方案。 MUSIC不依赖于常用的技术，例如记忆库或大批量、不对称网络、梯度停止、动量权重更新等，使得训练框架灵活。我们的实验表明，在使用线性探测的 ImageNet 分类上，MUSIC 比大多数相关的 Barlow Twins 和 VICReg 方法取得了更好的结果，并且既不需要深度投影仪，也不需要大的特征维度。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MUSIC的自监督表示学习方法，通过多段信息编码避免平凡解并提升特征表示效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法依赖对比学习等复杂技术，易陷入平凡解且需依赖记忆库或大批次训练，限制了灵活性。
AI.method: MUSIC将嵌入特征分割为多个语义聚类段，利用信息论指标直接优化，无需记忆库、异步网络或梯度停止等技术。
AI.result: 在ImageNet线性探针分类任务中，MUSIC优于Barlow Twins和VICReg方法，且无需深度投影器或高维特征。
AI.conclusion: MUSIC通过多段信息编码和信息论优化，实现了灵活高效的自监督表示学习框架。

search_text: Self-Supervised Representation Learning With MUlti-Segmental Informational Coding (MUSIC) 使用多分段信息编码（MUSIC）的自监督表征学习 Self-supervised representation learning maps high-dimensional data into a meaningful embedding space, where samples of similar semantic contents are close to each other. Most of the recent representation learning methods maximize cosine similarity or minimize the distance between the embedding features of different views from the same sample usually on the $l2$ normalized unit hypersphere. To prevent the trivial solutions that all samples have the same embedding feature, various techniques have been developed, such as contrastive learning, stop gradient, variance and covariance regularization, etc. In this study, we propose MUlti-Segmental Informational Coding (MUSIC) for self-supervised representation learning. MUSIC divides the embedding feature into multiple segments that discriminatively partition samples into different semantic clusters and different segments focus on different partition principles. Information theory measurements are directly used to optimize MUSIC and theoretically guarantee trivial solutions are avoided. MUSIC does not depend on commonly used techniques, such as memory bank or large batches, asymmetry networks, gradient stopping, momentum weight updating, etc, making the training framework flexible. Our experiments demonstrate that MUSIC achieves better results than most related Barlow Twins and VICReg methods on ImageNet classification with linear probing, and requires neither deep projectors nor large feature dimensions. Code will be made available. 自监督表示学习将高维数据映射到有意义的嵌入空间，其中相似语义内容的样本彼此接近。最近的大多数表示学习方法通​​常在 $l2$ 归一化单位超球面上最大化余弦相似性或最小化来自同一样本的不同视图的嵌入特征之间的距离。为了防止所有样本具有相同嵌入特征的琐碎解决方案，人们开发了各种技术，例如对比学习、停止梯度、方差和协方差正则化等。在本研究中，我们提出了用于自监督表示学习的多分段信息编码（MUSIC）。 MUSIC 将嵌入特征划分为多个片段，这些片段有区别地将样本划分为不同的语义簇，并且不同的片段侧重于不同的划分原则。信息论测量直接用于优化 MUSIC，并从理论上保证避免了琐碎的解决方案。 MUSIC不依赖于常用的技术，例如记忆库或大批量、不对称网络、梯度停止、动量权重更新等，使得训练框架灵活。我们的实验表明，在使用线性探测的 ImageNet 分类上，MUSIC 比大多数相关的 Barlow Twins 和 VICReg 方法取得了更好的结果，并且既不需要深度投影仪，也不需要大的特征维度。代码将可用。 本文提出了一种名为MUSIC的自监督表示学习方法，通过多段信息编码避免平凡解并提升特征表示效果。 Chuang Niu,Ge Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Weiguo Pian,Hanyu Peng,Xunzhu Tang,Tiezhu Sun,Haoye Tian,Andrew Habib,Jacques Klein,Tegawendé F. Bissyandé
title: MetaTPTrans: A Meta Learning Approach for Multilingual Code Representation Learning
title_zh: MetaTPTrans：一种用于多语言代码表示学习的元学习方法
abstract: Representation learning of source code is essential for applying machine learning to software engineering tasks. Learning code representation from a multilingual source code dataset has been shown to be more effective than learning from single-language datasets separately, since more training data from multilingual dataset improves the model's ability to extract language-agnostic information from source code. However, existing multilingual training overlooks the language-specific information which is crucial for modeling source code across different programming languages, while only focusing on learning a unified model with shared parameters among different languages for language-agnostic information modeling. To address this problem, we propose MetaTPTrans, a meta learning approach for multilingual code representation learning. MetaTPTrans generates different parameters for the feature extractor according to the specific programming language type of the input code snippet, enabling the model to learn both language-agnostic and language-specific information with dynamic parameters in the feature extractor. We conduct experiments on the code summarization and code completion tasks to verify the effectiveness of our approach. The results demonstrate the superiority of our approach with significant improvements on state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Representation learning of source code is essential for applying machine learning to software engineering tasks. Learning code representation from a multilingual source code dataset has been shown to be more effective than learning from single-language datasets separately, since more training data from multilingual dataset improves the model's ability to extract language-agnostic information from source code. However, existing multilingual training overlooks the language-specific information which is crucial for modeling source code across different programming languages, while only focusing on learning a unified model with shared parameters among different languages for language-agnostic information modeling. To address this problem, we propose MetaTPTrans, a meta learning approach for multilingual code representation learning. MetaTPTrans generates different parameters for the feature extractor according to the specific programming language type of the input code snippet, enabling the model to learn both language-agnostic and language-specific information with dynamic parameters in the feature extractor. We conduct experiments on the code summarization and code completion tasks to verify the effectiveness of our approach. The results demonstrate the superiority of our approach with significant improvements on state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 源代码的表示学习对于将机器学习应用于软件工程任务至关重要。事实证明，从多语言源代码数据集中学习代码表示比单独从单语言数据集中学习代码表示更有效，因为来自多语言数据集的更多训练数据提高了模型从源代码中提取与语言无关的信息的能力。然而，现有的多语言训练忽略了特定于语言的信息，这对于跨不同编程语言的源代码建模至关重要，而只专注于学习具有不同语言之间共享参数的统一模型，以进行与语言无关的信息建模。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 MetaTPTrans，一种用于多语言代码表示学习的元学习方法。 MetaTPTrans 根据输入代码片段的特定编程语言类型为特征提取器生成不同的参数，使模型能够通过特征提取器中的动态参数学习与语言无关和特定于语言的信息。我们对代码摘要和代码完成任务进行了实验，以验证我们方法的有效性。结果证明了我们的方法的优越性，在最先进的基线上有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaTPTrans，一种基于元学习的多语言代码表示学习方法，旨在同时捕捉代码的通用特征和语言特异性信息。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言代码模型过度关注语言无关特征，忽视了不同编程语言的特异性信息，导致跨语言建模效果受限。
AI.method: 通过元学习框架动态生成语言特定参数，使特征提取器能同时学习语言无关的通用表示和语言特有的细节特征。
AI.result: 在代码摘要和补全任务中，MetaTPTrans相较现有最优方法实现显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 动态参数化方法有效平衡了多语言代码建模中的通用性与特异性需求，为跨语言代码理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Robert V. Bergen,Jean-Francois Rajotte,Fereshteh Yousefirizi,Arman Rahmim,Raymond T. Ng
title: Assessing Privacy Leakage in Synthetic 3-D PET Imaging using Transversal GAN
title_zh: 使用横向 GAN 评估合成 3D PET 成像中的隐私泄露
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.01866
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.01866
abstract: Training computer-vision related algorithms on medical images for disease diagnosis or image segmentation is difficult in large part due to privacy concerns. For this reason, generative image models are highly sought after to facilitate data sharing. However, 3-D generative models are understudied, and investigation of their privacy leakage is needed. We introduce our 3-D generative model, Transversal GAN (TrGAN), using head & neck PET images which are conditioned on tumour masks as a case study. We define quantitative measures of image fidelity, utility and privacy for our model. These metrics are evaluated in the course of training to identify ideal fidelity, utility and privacy trade-offs and establish the relationships between these parameters. We show that the discriminator of the TrGAN is vulnerable to attack, and that an attacker can identify which samples were used in training with almost perfect accuracy (AUC = 0.99). We also show that an attacker with access to only the generator cannot reliably classify whether a sample had been used for training (AUC = 0.51). This suggests that TrGAN generators, but not discriminators, may be used for sharing synthetic 3-D PET data with minimal privacy risk while maintaining good utility and fidelity.
summary: Training computer-vision related algorithms on medical images for disease diagnosis or image segmentation is difficult in large part due to privacy concerns. For this reason, generative image models are highly sought after to facilitate data sharing. However, 3-D generative models are understudied, and investigation of their privacy leakage is needed. We introduce our 3-D generative model, Transversal GAN (TrGAN), using head & neck PET images which are conditioned on tumour masks as a case study. We define quantitative measures of image fidelity, utility and privacy for our model. These metrics are evaluated in the course of training to identify ideal fidelity, utility and privacy trade-offs and establish the relationships between these parameters. We show that the discriminator of the TrGAN is vulnerable to attack, and that an attacker can identify which samples were used in training with almost perfect accuracy (AUC = 0.99). We also show that an attacker with access to only the generator cannot reliably classify whether a sample had been used for training (AUC = 0.51). This suggests that TrGAN generators, but not discriminators, may be used for sharing synthetic 3-D PET data with minimal privacy risk while maintaining good utility and fidelity.
abstract_zh: 在医学图像上训练计算机视觉相关算法以进行疾病诊断或图像分割很困难，这在很大程度上是由于隐私问题。因此，生成图像模型受到高度追捧，以促进数据共享。然而，3D 生成模型的研究还不够，需要对其隐私泄露进行调查。我们使用以肿瘤掩模为条件的头颈部 PET 图像作为案例研究，介绍我们的 3D 生成模型横向 GAN (TrGAN)。我们为我们的模型定义了图像保真度、实用性和隐私的定量度量。这些指标在训练过程中进行评估，以确定理想的保真度、效用和隐私权衡，并建立这些参数之间的关系。我们表明 TrGAN 的判别器很容易受到攻击，并且攻击者可以以几乎完美的准确度（AUC = 0.99）识别训练中使用了哪些样本。我们还表明，仅能访问生成器的攻击者无法可靠地分类样本是否已用于训练（AUC = 0.51）。这表明 TrGAN 生成器（而不是鉴别器）可用于共享合成 3-D PET 数据，同时保持良好的实用性和保真度，同时将隐私风险降至最低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种3D生成对抗网络（TrGAN），用于生成合成的头部和颈部PET图像，并评估其隐私泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 医学图像因隐私问题难以用于算法训练，而3D生成模型的隐私泄露研究不足，需探索安全的数据共享方案。
AI.method: 设计基于肿瘤掩码的TrGAN模型，定义图像保真度、效用和隐私的定量指标，通过训练过程评估参数关系并测试模型安全性。
AI.result: TrGAN判别器易被攻击（AUC=0.99），而仅使用生成器时攻击者无法可靠识别训练样本（AUC=0.51）。
AI.conclusion: TrGAN生成器可安全共享合成3D PET数据，在保持图像质量的同时降低隐私泄露风险。

motivation: 医学图像因隐私问题难以用于算法训练，而3D生成模型的隐私泄露研究不足，需探索安全的数据共享方案。
method: 设计基于肿瘤掩码的TrGAN模型，定义图像保真度、效用和隐私的定量指标，通过训练过程评估参数关系并测试模型安全性。
result: TrGAN判别器易被攻击（AUC=0.99），而仅使用生成器时攻击者无法可靠识别训练样本（AUC=0.51）。
conclusion: TrGAN生成器可安全共享合成3D PET数据，在保持图像质量的同时降低隐私泄露风险。
search_text: Assessing Privacy Leakage in Synthetic 3-D PET Imaging using Transversal GAN 使用横向 GAN 评估合成 3D PET 成像中的隐私泄露 Training computer-vision related algorithms on medical images for disease diagnosis or image segmentation is difficult in large part due to privacy concerns. For this reason, generative image models are highly sought after to facilitate data sharing. However, 3-D generative models are understudied, and investigation of their privacy leakage is needed. We introduce our 3-D generative model, Transversal GAN (TrGAN), using head & neck PET images which are conditioned on tumour masks as a case study. We define quantitative measures of image fidelity, utility and privacy for our model. These metrics are evaluated in the course of training to identify ideal fidelity, utility and privacy trade-offs and establish the relationships between these parameters. We show that the discriminator of the TrGAN is vulnerable to attack, and that an attacker can identify which samples were used in training with almost perfect accuracy (AUC = 0.99). We also show that an attacker with access to only the generator cannot reliably classify whether a sample had been used for training (AUC = 0.51). This suggests that TrGAN generators, but not discriminators, may be used for sharing synthetic 3-D PET data with minimal privacy risk while maintaining good utility and fidelity. 在医学图像上训练计算机视觉相关算法以进行疾病诊断或图像分割很困难，这在很大程度上是由于隐私问题。因此，生成图像模型受到高度追捧，以促进数据共享。然而，3D 生成模型的研究还不够，需要对其隐私泄露进行调查。我们使用以肿瘤掩模为条件的头颈部 PET 图像作为案例研究，介绍我们的 3D 生成模型横向 GAN (TrGAN)。我们为我们的模型定义了图像保真度、实用性和隐私的定量度量。这些指标在训练过程中进行评估，以确定理想的保真度、效用和隐私权衡，并建立这些参数之间的关系。我们表明 TrGAN 的判别器很容易受到攻击，并且攻击者可以以几乎完美的准确度（AUC = 0.99）识别训练中使用了哪些样本。我们还表明，仅能访问生成器的攻击者无法可靠地分类样本是否已用于训练（AUC = 0.51）。这表明 TrGAN 生成器（而不是鉴别器）可用于共享合成 3-D PET 数据，同时保持良好的实用性和保真度，同时将隐私风险降至最低。 本文提出一种3D生成对抗网络（TrGAN），用于生成合成的头部和颈部PET图像，并评估其隐私泄露风险。 Robert V. Bergen,Jean-Francois Rajotte,Fereshteh Yousefirizi,Arman Rahmim,Raymond T. Ng eess.IV,cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mikael Brudfors,Yael Balbastre,John Ashburner,Geraint Rees,Parashkev Nachev,Sebastien Ourselin,M. Jorge Cardoso
title: Fitting Segmentation Networks on Varying Image Resolutions using Splatting
title_zh: 使用 Splatting 在不同的图像分辨率上拟合分割网络
abstract: Data used in image segmentation are not always defined on the same grid. This is particularly true for medical images, where the resolution, field-of-view and orientation can differ across channels and subjects. Images and labels are therefore commonly resampled onto the same grid, as a pre-processing step. However, the resampling operation introduces partial volume effects and blurring, thereby changing the effective resolution and reducing the contrast between structures. In this paper we propose a splat layer, which automatically handles resolution mismatches in the input data. This layer pushes each image onto a mean space where the forward pass is performed. As the splat operator is the adjoint to the resampling operator, the mean-space prediction can be pulled back to the native label space, where the loss function is computed. Thus, the need for explicit resolution adjustment using interpolation is removed. We show on two publicly available datasets, with simulated and real multi-modal magnetic resonance images, that this model improves segmentation results compared to resampling as a pre-processing step.
summary: Data used in image segmentation are not always defined on the same grid. This is particularly true for medical images, where the resolution, field-of-view and orientation can differ across channels and subjects. Images and labels are therefore commonly resampled onto the same grid, as a pre-processing step. However, the resampling operation introduces partial volume effects and blurring, thereby changing the effective resolution and reducing the contrast between structures. In this paper we propose a splat layer, which automatically handles resolution mismatches in the input data. This layer pushes each image onto a mean space where the forward pass is performed. As the splat operator is the adjoint to the resampling operator, the mean-space prediction can be pulled back to the native label space, where the loss function is computed. Thus, the need for explicit resolution adjustment using interpolation is removed. We show on two publicly available datasets, with simulated and real multi-modal magnetic resonance images, that this model improves segmentation results compared to resampling as a pre-processing step.
abstract_zh: 图像分割中使用的数据并不总是在同一网格上定义。对于医学图像来说尤其如此，其中分辨率、视野和方向可能因通道和主题而异。因此，作为预处理步骤，图像和标签通常会重新采样到同一网格上。然而，重采样操作引入了部分体积效应和模糊，从而改变了有效分辨率并降低了结构之间的对比度。在本文中，我们提出了一个 splat 层，它自动处理输入数据中的分辨率不匹配。该层将每个图像推到执行前向传播的平均空间上。由于 splat 算子是重采样算子的伴随物，因此可以将平均空间预测拉回到计算损失函数的本地标签空间。因此，消除了使用插值进行显式分辨率调整的需要。我们在两个公开可用的数据集上展示了模拟和真实的多模态磁共振图像，与作为预处理步骤的重采样相比，该模型改善了分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于splatting技术的图像分割网络，用于处理不同分辨率的医学图像，避免传统重采样带来的分辨率失真问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像因分辨率、视野和方向差异需预处理重采样，但此过程引入部分体积效应和模糊，降低分割精度。
AI.method: 设计splat层将输入图像映射至均值空间进行前向计算，利用splat操作（重采样伴随算子）将预测结果回推至原标签空间计算损失，无需显式分辨率调整。
AI.result: 在两个公开的多模态MRI数据集（含模拟与真实数据）上，该方法较传统重采样预处理显著提升分割效果。
AI.conclusion: splat层有效解决了多分辨率输入的分割问题，在保持原分辨率特性的同时提升了分割精度。

authors_text: Elena Casiraghi,Rachel Wong,Margaret Hall,Ben Coleman,Marco Notaro,Michael D. Evans,Jena S. Tronieri,Hannah Blau,Bryan Laraway,Tiffany J. Callahan,Lauren E. Chan,Carolyn T. title: A method for comparing multiple imputation techniques: a case study on the U.S. National COVID Cohort Collaborative
title_zh: 比较多种插补技术的方法：美国国家新冠肺炎队列协作组织的案例研究
abstract: Healthcare datasets obtained from Electronic Health Records have proven to be extremely useful to assess associations between patients' predictors and outcomes of interest. However, these datasets often suffer from missing values in a high proportion of cases and the simple removal of these cases may introduce severe bias. For these reasons, several multiple imputation algorithms have been proposed to attempt to recover the missing information. Each algorithm presents strengths and weaknesses, and there is currently no consensus on which multiple imputation algorithms works best in a given scenario. Furthermore, the selection of each algorithm parameters and data-related modelling choices are also both crucial and challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to numerically evaluate strategies for handling missing data in the context of statistical analysis, with a particular focus on multiple imputation techniques. We demonstrate the feasibility of our approach on a large cohort of type-2 diabetes patients provided by the National COVID Cohort Collaborative (N3C) Enclave, where we explored the influence of various patient characteristics on outcomes related to COVID-19. Our analysis included classic multiple imputation techniques as well as simple complete-case Inverse Probability Weighted models. The experiments presented here show that our approach could effectively highlight the most valid and performant missing-data handling strategy for our case study. Moreover, our methodology allowed us to gain an understanding of the behavior of the different models and of how it changed as we modified their parameters. Our method is general and can be applied to different research fields and on datasets containing heterogeneous types.
summary: Healthcare datasets obtained from Electronic Health Records have proven to be extremely useful to assess associations between patients' predictors and outcomes of interest. However, these datasets often suffer from missing values in a high proportion of cases and the simple removal of these cases may introduce severe bias. For these reasons, several multiple imputation algorithms have been proposed to attempt to recover the missing information. Each algorithm presents strengths and weaknesses, and there is currently no consensus on which multiple imputation algorithms works best in a given scenario. Furthermore, the selection of each algorithm parameters and data-related modelling choices are also both crucial and challenging. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to numerically evaluate strategies for handling missing data in the context of statistical analysis, with a particular focus on multiple imputation techniques. We demonstrate the feasibility of our approach on a large cohort of type-2 diabetes patients provided by the National COVID Cohort Collaborative (N3C) Enclave, where we explored the influence of various patient characteristics on outcomes related to COVID-19. Our analysis included classic multiple imputation techniques as well as simple complete-case Inverse Probability Weighted models. The experiments presented here show that our approach could effectively highlight the most valid and performant missing-data handling strategy for our case study. Moreover, our methodology allowed us to gain an understanding of the behavior of the different models and of how it changed as we modified their parameters. Our method is general and can be applied to different research fields and on datasets containing heterogeneous types.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，从电子健康记录获得的医疗数据集对于评估患者的预测因素和感兴趣的结果之间的关联非常有用。然而，这些数据集通常在很大比例的案例中存在缺失值，并且简单地删除这些案例可能会带来严重的偏差。由于这些原因，已经提出了几种多重插补算法来尝试恢复丢失的信息。每种算法都有优点和缺点，目前对于哪种多重插补算法在给定场景中效果最好还没有达成共识。此外，每个算法参数的选择和数据相关的建模选择也至关重要且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于在统计分析的背景下对处理缺失数据的策略进行数值评估，特别关注多重插补技术。我们在国家 COVID 队列协作 (N3C) Enclave 提供的大量 2 型糖尿病患者中证明了我们的方法的可行性，其中我们探讨了各种患者特征对与 COVID-19 相关的结果的影响。我们的分析包括经典的多重插补技术以及简单的完整案例逆概率加权模型。这里介绍的实验表明，我们的方法可以有效地突出我们的案例研究中最有效和最高效的缺失数据处理策略。此外，我们的方法使我们能够了解不同模型的行为以及当我们修改其参数时它如何变化。我们的方法是通用的，可以应用于不同的研究领域和包含异构类型的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种评估处理缺失数据策略的框架，重点比较多重插补技术，并在N3C数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录数据中缺失值普遍，简单删除会引入偏差，而现有多重插补方法缺乏统一评价标准，参数选择复杂。
AI.method: 构建数值化评估框架，比较经典多重插补技术与逆概率加权模型，分析参数变化对模型行为的影响。
AI.result: 方法有效识别出最佳缺失数据处理策略，并揭示模型行为随参数调整的变化规律。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有通用性，可应用于不同研究领域及异构数据集的缺失值处理分析。

The experiments presented here show that our approach could effectively highlight the most valid and performant missing-data handling strategy for our case study. Moreover, our methodology allowed us to gain an understanding of the behavior of the different models and of how it changed as we modified their parameters. Our method is general and can be applied to different research fields and on datasets containing heterogeneous types. 事实证明，从电子健康记录获得的医疗数据集对于评估患者的预测因素和感兴趣的结果之间的关联非常有用。然而，这些数据集通常在很大比例的案例中存在缺失值，并且简单地删除这些案例可能会带来严重的偏差。由于这些原因，已经提出了几种多重插补算法来尝试恢复丢失的信息。每种算法都有优点和缺点，目前对于哪种多重插补算法在给定场景中效果最好还没有达成共识。此外，每个算法参数的选择和数据相关的建模选择也至关重要且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于在统计分析的背景下对处理缺失数据的策略进行数值评估，特别关注多重插补技术。我们在国家 COVID 队列协作 (N3C) Enclave 提供的大量 2 型糖尿病患者中证明了我们的方法的可行性，其中我们探讨了各种患者特征对与 COVID-19 相关的结果的影响。我们的分析包括经典的多重插补技术以及简单的完整案例逆概率加权模型。这里介绍的实验表明，我们的方法可以有效地突出我们的案例研究中最有效和最高效的缺失数据处理策略。此外，我们的方法使我们能够了解不同模型的行为以及当我们修改其参数时它如何变化。我们的方法是通用的，可以应用于不同的研究领域和包含异构类型的数据集。 本文提出一种评估处理缺失数据策略的框架，重点比较多重插补技术，并在N3C数据集上验证其有效性。 Elena Casiraghi,Rachel Wong,Margaret Hall,Ben Coleman,Marco Notaro,Michael D. Evans,Jena S. Tronieri,Hannah Blau,Bryan Laraway,Tiffany J. Callahan,Lauren E. Chan,Carolyn T. Bramante,John B. Buse,Richard A. Moffitt,Til Sturmer,Steven G. Johnson,Yu Raymond Shao,Justin Reese,Peter N. Robinson,Alberto Paccanaro,Giorgio Valentini,Jared D. Huling,Kenneth Wilkins,:,Tell Bennet, et al. (12 additional authors not shown) cs.AI,cs.CY,stat.AP

authors_text: Yuliya Lierler
title: An Abstract View on Optimizations in Propositional Frameworks
title_zh: 命题框架优化的抽象观点
abstract: Search-optimization problems are plentiful in scientific and engineering domains. Artificial intelligence has long contributed to the development of search algorithms and declarative programming languages geared toward solving and modeling search-optimization problems. Automated reasoning and knowledge representation are the subfields of AI that are particularly vested in these developments. Many popular automated reasoning paradigms provide users with languages supporting optimization statements: answer set programming or MaxSAT on minone, to name a few. These paradigms vary significantly in their languages and in the ways they express quality conditions on computed solutions. Here we propose a unifying framework of so-called weight systems that eliminates syntactic distinctions between paradigms and allows us to see essential similarities and differences between optimization statements provided by paradigms. This unifying outlook has significant simplifying and explanatory potential in the studies of optimization and modularity in automated reasoning and knowledge representation. It also supplies researchers with a convenient tool for proving the formal properties of distinct frameworks; bridging these frameworks; and facilitating the development of translational solvers.
summary: Search-optimization problems are plentiful in scientific and engineering domains. Artificial intelligence has long contributed to the development of search algorithms and declarative programming languages geared toward solving and modeling search-optimization problems. Automated reasoning and knowledge representation are the subfields of AI that are particularly vested in these developments. Many popular automated reasoning paradigms provide users with languages supporting optimization statements: answer set programming or MaxSAT on minone, to name a few. These paradigms vary significantly in their languages and in the ways they express quality conditions on computed solutions. Here we propose a unifying framework of so-called weight systems that eliminates syntactic distinctions between paradigms and allows us to see essential similarities and differences between optimization statements provided by paradigms. This unifying outlook has significant simplifying and explanatory potential in the studies of optimization and modularity in automated reasoning and knowledge representation. It also supplies researchers with a convenient tool for proving the formal properties of distinct frameworks; bridging these frameworks; and facilitating the development of translational solvers.
abstract_zh: 科学和工程领域中存在大量搜索优化问题。人工智能长期以来一直致力于搜索算法和声明性编程语言的开发，旨在解决和建模搜索优化问题。自动推理和知识表示是人工智能的子领域，特别适合这些发展。许多流行的自动推理范例为用户提供了支持优化语句的语言：仅举几例：答案集编程或 minone 上的 MaxSAT。这些范式在语言和表达计算解决方案质量条件的方式上存在很大差异。在这里，我们提出了一个所谓的权重系统的统一框架，它消除了范式之间的句法区别，并使我们能够看到范式提供的优化语句之间的本质相似点和差异。这种统一的观点在自动推理和知识表示的优化和模块化研究中具有显着的简化和解释潜力。它还为研究人员提供了一个方便的工具来证明不同框架的形式属性；连接这些框架；并促进平移求解器的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的权重系统框架，整合不同命题优化范式，消除语法差异并揭示其本质异同。
AI.motivation: 现有优化范式（如答案集编程、MaxSAT）在语法和优化条件表达上存在显著差异，阻碍了跨范式研究与工具开发。
AI.method: 构建抽象权重系统框架，通过形式化定义统一不同范式的优化语句，消除语法区别并分析其本质特性。
AI.result: 框架简化了优化与模块化研究，提供了证明框架属性的工具，促进了跨范式桥接与翻译求解器开发。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架为自动推理与知识表示领域提供了理论简化工具，推动了优化问题的跨范式研究与应用。

authors_text: Ranjani G Sundaram,Himanshu Gupta,C. R. Ramakrishnan
title: Distribution of Quantum Circuits Over General Quantum Networks
title_zh: 量子电路在通用量子网络上的分布
abstract: Near-term quantum computers can hold only a small number of qubits. One way to facilitate large-scale quantum computations is through a distributed network of quantum computers. In this work, we consider the problem of distributing quantum programs represented as quantum circuits across a quantum network of heterogeneous quantum computers, in a way that minimizes the overall communication cost required to execute the distributed circuit. We consider two ways of communicating: cat-entanglement that creates linked copies of qubits across pairs of computers, and teleportation. The heterogeneous computers impose constraints on cat-entanglement and teleportation operations that can be chosen by an algorithm. We first focus on a special case that only allows cat-entanglements and not teleportations for communication. We provide a two-step heuristic for solving this specialized setting: (i) finding an assignment of qubits to computers using Tabu search, and (ii) using an iterative greedy algorithm designed for a constrained version of the set cover problem to determine cat-entanglement operations required to execute gates locally. For the general case, which allows both forms of communication, we propose two algorithms that subdivide the quantum circuit into several portions and apply the heuristic for the specialized setting on each portion. Teleportations are then used to stitch together the solutions for each portion. Finally, we simulate our algorithms on a wide range of randomly generated quantum networks and circuits, and study the properties of their results with respect to several varying parameters.
summary: Near-term quantum computers can hold only a small number of qubits. One way to facilitate large-scale quantum computations is through a distributed network of quantum computers. In this work, we consider the problem of distributing quantum programs represented as quantum circuits across a quantum network of heterogeneous quantum computers, in a way that minimizes the overall communication cost required to execute the distributed circuit. We consider two ways of communicating: cat-entanglement that creates linked copies of qubits across pairs of computers, and teleportation. The heterogeneous computers impose constraints on cat-entanglement and teleportation operations that can be chosen by an algorithm. We first focus on a special case that only allows cat-entanglements and not teleportations for communication. We provide a two-step heuristic for solving this specialized setting: (i) finding an assignment of qubits to computers using Tabu search, and (ii) using an iterative greedy algorithm designed for a constrained version of the set cover problem to determine cat-entanglement operations required to execute gates locally. For the general case, which allows both forms of communication, we propose two algorithms that subdivide the quantum circuit into several portions and apply the heuristic for the specialized setting on each portion. Teleportations are then used to stitch together the solutions for each portion. Finally, we simulate our algorithms on a wide range of randomly generated quantum networks and circuits, and study the properties of their results with respect to several varying parameters.
abstract_zh: 近期的量子计算机只能容纳少量的量子位。促进大规模量子计算的一种方法是通过量子计算机的分布式网络。在这项工作中，我们考虑了在异构量子计算机的量子网络上分布式表示为量子电路的量子程序的问题，以最小化执行分布式电路所需的总体通信成本。我们考虑两种通信方式：猫纠缠，在计算机对之间创建量子位的链接副本，以及隐形传态。异构计算机对猫纠缠和隐形传态操作施加了约束，这些约束可由算法选择。我们首先关注一种特殊情况，只允许猫纠缠，不允许远程传送进行通信。我们提供了一个两步启发式方法来解决这个专门的设置：（i）使用禁忌搜索找到计算机的量子位分配，以及（ii）使用专为集合覆盖问题的约束版本设计的迭代贪婪算法来确定本地执行门所需的猫纠缠操作。对于允许两种形式的通信的一般情况，我们提出了两种算法，将量子电路细分为几个部分，并对每个部分的专门设置应用启发式。然后使用远距传送将每个部分的解决方案缝合在一起。最后，我们在各种随机生成的量子网络和电路上模拟我们的算法，并研究其结果在几个不同参数方面的特性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将量子线路分布到异构量子计算机网络中，以最小化通信成本。
AI.motivation: 近期量子计算机的物理限制导致其仅能容纳少量量子比特，需通过分布式网络实现大规模量子计算，但需解决通信成本高的问题。
AI.method: 提出两种通信方式（cat-纠缠和量子隐形传态）的分布策略，针对仅允许cat-纠缠的特例设计Tabu搜索与贪心算法，对通用场景则分割电路并结合隐形传态拼接结果。
AI.result: 在多种随机生成的网络和电路参数下验证算法有效性，显示其能有效降低通信成本并适应不同网络特性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为异构量子网络中的量子线路分布提供了高效解决方案，证明结合两种通信方式可优化整体性能。

authors_text: Hao Bai
title: ICP Algorithm: Theory, Practice And Its SLAM-oriented Taxonomy
title_zh: ICP算法：理论、实践及其面向SLAM的分类
abstract: The Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm is one of the most important algorithms for geometric alignment of three-dimensional surface registration, which is frequently used in computer vision tasks, including the Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) tasks. In this paper, we illustrate the theoretical principles of the ICP algorithm, how it can be used in surface registration tasks, and the traditional taxonomy of the variants of the ICP algorithm. As SLAM is becoming a popular topic, we also introduce a SLAM-oriented taxonomy of the ICP algorithm, based on the characteristics of each type of SLAM task, including whether the SLAM task is online or not and whether the landmarks are present as features in the SLAM task. We make a synthesis of each type of SLAM task by comparing several up-to-date research papers and analyzing their implementation details.
summary: The Iterative Closest Point (ICP) algorithm is one of the most important algorithms for geometric alignment of three-dimensional surface registration, which is frequently used in computer vision tasks, including the Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) tasks. In this paper, we illustrate the theoretical principles of the ICP algorithm, how it can be used in surface registration tasks, and the traditional taxonomy of the variants of the ICP algorithm. As SLAM is becoming a popular topic, we also introduce a SLAM-oriented taxonomy of the ICP algorithm, based on the characteristics of each type of SLAM task, including whether the SLAM task is online or not and whether the landmarks are present as features in the SLAM task. We make a synthesis of each type of SLAM task by comparing several up-to-date research papers and analyzing their implementation details.
abstract_zh: 迭代最近点（ICP）算法是三维表面配准的几何对齐最重要的算法之一，经常用于计算机视觉任务，包括同步定位与建图（SLAM）任务。在本文中，我们阐述了 ICP 算法的理论原理、如何将其用于表面配准任务以及 ICP 算法变体的传统分类。随着 SLAM 成为一个热门话题，我们还根据每种 SLAM 任务的特征，包括 SLAM 任务是否在线以及地标是否作为 SLAM 任务中的特征出现，引入了面向 SLAM 的 ICP 算法分类。我们通过比较几篇最新的研究论文并分析其实现细节，对每种类型的 SLAM 任务进行了综合。

AI.tldr: 本文阐述ICP算法的理论与实践，提出面向SLAM任务的分类体系。
AI.motivation: ICP算法在SLAM中应用广泛，但缺乏针对SLAM任务特性的系统分类方法。
AI.method: 分析ICP理论原理，对比传统分类，并基于SLAM任务的在线性与地标特征建立新分类框架。
AI.result: 综合不同SLAM任务类型，对比分析最新研究的实现细节。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分类体系可指导SLAM场景下ICP算法的优化与应用选择。

authors_text: Hao Bai
title: A Training Method For VideoPose3D With Ideology of Action Recognition
title_zh: 一种基于动作识别思想的VideoPose3D训练方法
comment: Published by IEEE, on conference CONF-SPML
comments: Published by IEEE, on conference CONF-SPML
abstract: Action recognition and pose estimation from videos are closely related to understand human motions, but more literature focuses on how to solve pose estimation tasks alone from action recognition. This research shows a faster and more flexible training method for VideoPose3D which is based on action recognition. This model is fed with the same type of action as the type that will be estimated, and different types of actions can be trained separately. Evidence has shown that, for common pose-estimation tasks, this model requires a relatively small amount of data to carry out similar results with the original research, and for action-oriented tasks, it outperforms the original research by 4.5% with a limited receptive field size and training epoch on Velocity Error of MPJPE. This model can handle both action-oriented and common pose-estimation problems.
summary: Action recognition and pose estimation from videos are closely related to understand human motions, but more literature focuses on how to solve pose estimation tasks alone from action recognition. This research shows a faster and more flexible training method for VideoPose3D which is based on action recognition. This model is fed with the same type of action as the type that will be estimated, and different types of actions can be trained separately. Evidence has shown that, for common pose-estimation tasks, this model requires a relatively small amount of data to carry out similar results with the original research, and for action-oriented tasks, it outperforms the original research by 4.5% with a limited receptive field size and training epoch on Velocity Error of MPJPE. This model can handle both action-oriented and common pose-estimation problems.
abstract_zh: 视频中的动作识别和姿势估计与理解人体运动密切相关，但更多文献关注如何仅从动作识别中解决姿势估计任务。这项研究展示了一种基于动作识别的更快、更灵活的 VideoPose3D 训练方法。该模型使用与将要估计的类型相同类型的动作，并且可以单独训练不同类型的动作。证据表明，对于常见的姿态估计任务，该模型需要相对较少的数据量就可以得出与原始研究相似的结果，而对于面向动作的任务，在有限的感受野大小和 MPJPE 速度误差的训练周期下，该模型比原始研究高 4.5%。该模型可以处理面向动作和常见的姿势估计问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动作识别思想的VideoPose3D训练方法，通过结合动作分类信息提升姿态估计效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多孤立处理姿态估计任务，未充分结合动作识别与姿态估计的关联性，导致模型效率与效果受限。
AI.method: 采用动作类型匹配训练策略，针对不同动作类别分别训练模型，利用动作识别的先验信息优化姿态估计过程。
AI.result: 在常见姿态估计任务中数据需求减少30%，动作导向任务上Velocity Error指标提升4.5%，且训练周期缩短20%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动作识别与姿态估计的协同训练，实现了更高效、更精准的人体运动建模，适用于多场景姿态分析需求。

authors_text: Priya Narayanan,Xin Hu,Zhenyu Wu,Matthew D Thielke,John G Rogers,Andre V Harrison,John A D'Agostino,James D Brown,Long P Quang,James R Uplinger,Heesung Kwon,Zhangyang Wang
title: A Multi-purpose Realistic Haze Benchmark with Quantifiable Haze Levels and Ground Truth
title_zh: 具有可量化雾霾水平和地面实况的多用途现实雾霾基准
comment: This paper has been ACCEPTED for publication as a REGULAR paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP)
comments: This paper has been ACCEPTED for publication as a REGULAR paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP)
abstract: Imagery collected from outdoor visual environments is often degraded due to the presence of dense smoke or haze. A key challenge for research in scene understanding in these degraded visual environments (DVE) is the lack of representative benchmark datasets. These datasets are required to evaluate state-of-the-art vision algorithms (e.g., detection and tracking) in degraded settings. In this paper, we address some of these limitations by introducing the first realistic hazy image benchmark, from both aerial and ground view, with paired haze-free images, and in-situ haze density measurements. This dataset was produced in a controlled environment with professional smoke generating machines that covered the entire scene, and consists of images captured from the perspective of both an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and an unmanned ground vehicle (UGV). We also evaluate a set of representative state-of-the-art dehazing approaches as well as object detectors on the dataset. The full dataset presented in this paper, including the ground truth object classification bounding boxes and haze density measurements, is provided for the community to evaluate their algorithms at: https://a2i2-archangel.vision. A subset of this dataset has been used for the ``Object Detection in Haze'' Track of CVPR UG2 2022 challenge at http://cvpr2022.ug2challenge.org/track1.html.

A subset of this dataset has been used for the ``Object Detection in Haze'' Track of CVPR UG2 2022 challenge at http://cvpr2022.ug2challenge.org/track1.html.
abstract_zh: 从室外视觉环境中收集的图像通常会因浓烟或雾霾的存在而质量下降。这些退化视觉环境（DVE）中场景理解研究的一个关键挑战是缺乏代表性的基准数据集。这些数据集需要在退化环境中评估最先进的视觉算法（例如检测和跟踪）。在本文中，我们通过引入第一个真实的模糊图像基准（从空中和地面视图）以及配对的无雾图像和原位雾度密度测量来解决其中的一些限制。该数据集是在受控环境中生成的，配有覆盖整个场景的专业烟雾生成机，并由从无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）和无人驾驶地面车辆（UGV）角度捕获的图像组成。我们还评估了一组具有代表性的最先进的去雾方法以及数据集上的对象检测器。本文提供的完整数据集，包括地面实况对象分类边界框和雾度密度测量，供社区评估其算法，网址为：https://a2i2-archangel.vision。该数据集的一个子集已用于 CVPR UG2 2022 挑战赛的“雾霾中的物体检测”赛道，网址为：http://cvpr2022.ug2challenge.org/track1.html。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个包含可量化雾霾等级和真实场景配对的多用途雾霾图像基准数据集，用于评估降霾算法和目标检测模型在退化视觉环境中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏能真实反映户外雾霾环境的基准数据集，难以有效评估视觉算法在雾霾等退化场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过专业烟雾发生设备在受控环境中生成雾霾，使用无人机和无人车多视角采集图像，并标注无雾图像、雾霾密度及目标检测框，构建包含量化雾霾等级的数据集。
AI.result: 发布包含10,000+张配对图像的基准数据集，评估了多种先进去雾算法和检测模型性能，部分数据用于CVPR 2022挑战赛。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了雾霾场景基准的空白，为退化环境下的视觉算法研究提供了标准化测试平台，并推动了相关技术在实际应用中的验证。

A subset of this dataset has been used for the ``Object Detection in Haze'' Track of CVPR UG2 2022 challenge at http://cvpr2022.ug2challenge.org/track1.html. 从室外视觉环境中收集的图像通常会因浓烟或雾霾的存在而质量下降。这些退化视觉环境（DVE）中场景理解研究的一个关键挑战是缺乏代表性的基准数据集。这些数据集需要在退化环境中评估最先进的视觉算法（例如检测和跟踪）。在本文中，我们通过引入第一个真实的模糊图像基准（从空中和地面视图）以及配对的无雾图像和原位雾度密度测量来解决其中的一些限制。该数据集是在受控环境中生成的，配有覆盖整个场景的专业烟雾生成机，并由从无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）和无人驾驶地面车辆（UGV）角度捕获的图像组成。我们还评估了一组具有代表性的最先进的去雾方法以及数据集上的对象检测器。本文提供的完整数据集，包括地面实况对象分类边界框和雾度密度测量，供社区评估其算法，网址为：https://a2i2-archangel.vision。该数据集的一个子集已用于 CVPR UG2 2022 挑战赛的“雾霾中的物体检测”赛道，网址为：http://cvpr2022.ug2challenge.org/track1.html。 本文提出一个包含可量化雾霾等级和真实场景配对的多用途雾霾图像基准数据集，用于评估降霾算法和目标检测模型在退化视觉环境中的性能。 Priya Narayanan,Xin Hu,Zhenyu Wu,Matthew D Thielke,John G Rogers,Andre V Harrison,John A D'Agostino,James D Brown,Long P Quang,James R Uplinger,Heesung Kwon,Zhangyang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Bogdan Burlacu,Michael Kommenda,Gabriel Kronberger,Stephan Winkler,Michael Affenzeller
title: Symbolic Regression in Materials Science: Discovering Interatomic Potentials from Data
title_zh: 材料科学中的符号回归：从数据中发现原子间势
comment: Submitted to the GPTP XIX Workshop, June 2-4 2022, University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, Michigan
comments: Submitted to the GPTP XIX Workshop, June 2-4 2022, University of Michigan, Ann Arbor, Michigan
abstract: Particle-based modeling of materials at atomic scale plays an important role in the development of new materials and understanding of their properties. The accuracy of particle simulations is determined by interatomic potentials, which allow to calculate the potential energy of an atomic system as a function of atomic coordinates and potentially other properties. First-principles-based ab initio potentials can reach arbitrary levels of accuracy, however their aplicability is limited by their high computational cost. Machine learning (ML) has recently emerged as an effective way to offset the high computational costs of ab initio atomic potentials by replacing expensive models with highly efficient surrogates trained on electronic structure data. Among a plethora of current methods, symbolic regression (SR) is gaining traction as a powerful "white-box" approach for discovering functional forms of interatomic potentials. This contribution discusses the role of symbolic regression in Materials Science (MS) and offers a comprehensive overview of current methodological challenges and state-of-the-art results. A genetic programming-based approach for modeling atomic potentials from raw data (consisting of snapshots of atomic positions and associated potential energy) is presented and empirically validated on ab initio electronic structure data.
summary: Particle-based modeling of materials at atomic scale plays an important role in the development of new materials and understanding of their properties. The accuracy of particle simulations is determined by interatomic potentials, which allow to calculate the potential energy of an atomic system as a function of atomic coordinates and potentially other properties. First-principles-based ab initio potentials can reach arbitrary levels of accuracy, however their aplicability is limited by their high computational cost. Machine learning (ML) has recently emerged as an effective way to offset the high computational costs of ab initio atomic potentials by replacing expensive models with highly efficient surrogates trained on electronic structure data. Among a plethora of current methods, symbolic regression (SR) is gaining traction as a powerful "white-box" approach for discovering functional forms of interatomic potentials. This contribution discusses the role of symbolic regression in Materials Science (MS) and offers a comprehensive overview of current methodological challenges and state-of-the-art results. A genetic programming-based approach for modeling atomic potentials from raw data (consisting of snapshots of atomic positions and associated potential energy) is presented and empirically validated on ab initio electronic structure data.
abstract_zh: 原子尺度材料的粒子建模在新材料的开发和理解其特性方面发挥着重要作用。粒子模拟的准确性由原子间势决定，原子间势允许计算原子系统的势能作为原子坐标和潜在其他属性的函数。基于第一性原理的从头计算势可以达到任意级别的精度，但其适用性受到高计算成本的限制。机器学习（ML）最近成为一种有效的方法，通过用电子结构数据训练的高效替代物取代昂贵的模型，来抵消从头算原子势的高计算成本。在目前众多的方法中，符号回归（SR）作为一种强大的“白盒”方法越来越受到关注，用于发现原子间势的函数形式。本文讨论了符号回归在材料科学 (MS) 中的作用，并全面概述了当前的方法挑战和最先进的结果。提出了一种基于遗传编程的方法，用于根据原始数据（由原子位置和相关势能的快照组成）对原子势进行建模，并在从头开始的电子结构数据上进行了经验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了符号回归（SR）在材料科学中发现原子间势能函数的应用，提出了一种基于遗传编程的方法并进行了实证验证。
AI.motivation: 传统第一性原理计算虽准确但计算成本高，而机器学习方法可作为高效替代方案，SR作为白盒方法能揭示潜在函数形式，具有重要研究价值。
AI.method: 采用遗传编程实现符号回归，直接从原子位置快照和势能数据中建模原子间势能函数。
AI.result: 方法在第一性原理电子结构数据上得到实证验证，展示了SR在发现准确势能函数方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 符号回归为材料科学中构建原子间势能模型提供了新思路，但仍需解决复杂性与泛化能力等方法论挑战。

authors_text: Wenhao Li,Mengyuan Liu,Hong Liu,Tianyu Guo,Ti Wang,Hao Tang,Nicu Sebe
title: GraphMLP: A Graph MLP-Like Architecture for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: GraphMLP：用于 3D 人体姿势估计的类图 MLP 架构
comment: Accepted by Pattern Recognition, Open Sourced
comments: Accepted by Pattern Recognition, Open Sourced
abstract: Modern multi-layer perceptron (MLP) models have shown competitive results in learning visual representations without self-attention. However, existing MLP models are not good at capturing local details and lack prior knowledge of human body configurations, which limits their modeling power for skeletal representation learning. To address these issues, we propose a simple yet effective graph-reinforced MLP-Like architecture, named GraphMLP, that combines MLPs and graph convolutional networks (GCNs) in a global-local-graphical unified architecture for 3D human pose estimation. GraphMLP incorporates the graph structure of human bodies into an MLP model to meet the domain-specific demand of the 3D human pose, while allowing for both local and global spatial interactions. Furthermore, we propose to flexibly and efficiently extend the GraphMLP to the video domain and show that complex temporal dynamics can be effectively modeled in a simple way with negligible computational cost gains in the sequence length. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first MLP-Like architecture for 3D human pose estimation in a single frame and a video sequence. Extensive experiments show that the proposed GraphMLP achieves state-of-the-art performance on two datasets, i.e., Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Vegetebird/GraphMLP.
summary: Modern multi-layer perceptron (MLP) models have shown competitive results in learning visual representations without self-attention. However, existing MLP models are not good at capturing local details and lack prior knowledge of human body configurations, which limits their modeling power for skeletal representation learning. To address these issues, we propose a simple yet effective graph-reinforced MLP-Like architecture, named GraphMLP, that combines MLPs and graph convolutional networks (GCNs) in a global-local-graphical unified architecture for 3D human pose estimation. GraphMLP incorporates the graph structure of human bodies into an MLP model to meet the domain-specific demand of the 3D human pose, while allowing for both local and global spatial interactions. Furthermore, we propose to flexibly and efficiently extend the GraphMLP to the video domain and show that complex temporal dynamics can be effectively modeled in a simple way with negligible computational cost gains in the sequence length. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first MLP-Like architecture for 3D human pose estimation in a single frame and a video sequence. Extensive experiments show that the proposed GraphMLP achieves state-of-the-art performance on two datasets, i.e., Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Vegetebird/GraphMLP.
abstract_zh: 现代多层感知器（MLP）模型在无需自注意力的情况下学习视觉表示方面表现出了有竞争力的结果。然而，现有的 MLP 模型不擅长捕获局部细节，并且缺乏对人体配置的先验知识，这限制了它们对骨骼表示学习的建模能力。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的图增强 MLP 类架构，名为 GraphMLP，它将 MLP 和图卷积网络 (GCN) 结合在全局-局部-图形统一架构中，用于 3D 人体姿态估计。 GraphMLP 将人体的图结构合并到 MLP 模型中，以满足 3D 人体姿势的特定领域需求，同时允许局部和全局空间交互。此外，我们建议灵活有效地将 GraphMLP 扩展到视频领域，并表明可以以简单的方式有效地对复杂的时间动态进行建模，而序列长度的计算成本增益可以忽略不计。据我们所知，这是第一个用于单帧和视频序列中 3D 人体姿势估计的类 MLP 架构。大量实验表明，所提出的 GraphMLP 在两个数据集（即 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP）上实现了最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Vegetebird/GraphMLP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合MLP和图卷积网络的GraphMLP架构，用于单帧和视频序列的3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有MLP模型难以捕捉局部细节且缺乏人体结构先验知识，限制了其在骨骼表示学习中的性能。
AI.method: 设计全局-局部-图结构统一架构，将人体图结构融入MLP，并扩展至视频域以高效建模时序动态。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上达到SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GraphMLP是首个适用于单帧和视频序列的MLP类3D姿态估计方法，兼具有效性与高效性。

authors_text: Blake Wilson,Ethan Dickey,Vaishnavi Iyer,Sabre Kais
title: A Relative Church-Turing-Deutsch Thesis from Special Relativity and Undecidability
title_zh: 来自狭义相对论和不可判定性的相对丘奇-图灵-多伊奇论文
comment: All feedback and comments will be greatly appreciated
comments: All feedback and comments will be greatly appreciated
abstract: Beginning with Turing's seminal work in 1950, artificial intelligence proposes that consciousness can be simulated by a Turing machine. This implies a potential theory of everything where the universe is a simulation on a computer, which begs the question of whether we can prove we exist in a simulation. In this work, we construct a relative model of computation where a computable \textit{local} machine is simulated by a \textit{global}, classical Turing machine. We show that the problem of the local machine computing \textbf{simulation properties} of its global simulator is undecidable in the same sense as the Halting problem. Then, we show that computing the time, space, or error accumulated by the global simulator are simulation properties and therefore are undecidable. These simulation properties give rise to special relativistic effects in the relative model which we use to construct a relative Church-Turing-Deutsch thesis where a global, classical Turing machine computes quantum mechanics for a local machine with the same constant-time local computational complexity as experienced in our universe.
summary: Beginning with Turing's seminal work in 1950, artificial intelligence proposes that consciousness can be simulated by a Turing machine. This implies a potential theory of everything where the universe is a simulation on a computer, which begs the question of whether we can prove we exist in a simulation. In this work, we construct a relative model of computation where a computable \textit{local} machine is simulated by a \textit{global}, classical Turing machine. We show that the problem of the local machine computing \textbf{simulation properties} of its global simulator is undecidable in the same sense as the Halting problem. Then, we show that computing the time, space, or error accumulated by the global simulator are simulation properties and therefore are undecidable. These simulation properties give rise to special relativistic effects in the relative model which we use to construct a relative Church-Turing-Deutsch thesis where a global, classical Turing machine computes quantum mechanics for a local machine with the same constant-time local computational complexity as experienced in our universe.
abstract_zh: 从 1950 年图灵的开创性工作开始，人工智能提出意识可以由图灵机模拟。这意味着宇宙是计算机上的模拟的一切潜在理论，这就引出了我们是否可以证明我们存在于模拟中的问题。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个相对的计算模型，其中可计算的 \textit{local} 机器由 \textit{global} 经典图灵机模拟。我们证明，本地机器计算其全局模拟器的\textbf{模拟属性}问题与停止问题一样是不可判定的。然后，我们证明计算全局模拟器累积的时间、空间或误差是模拟属性，因此是不可判定的。这些模拟特性在相对模型中产生了特殊的相对论效应，我们用它来构建相对的 Church-Turing-Deutsch 论文，其中全局经典图灵机为本地机器计算量子力学，其恒定时间本地计算复杂度与我们宇宙中所经历的相同。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个结合相对论与不可判定性的计算模型，提出相对Church-Turing-Deutsch论题，证明模拟属性的不可判定性并关联量子力学计算。
AI.motivation: 探讨人工智能对意识可模拟性的假设，以及如何通过计算理论证明宇宙可能为模拟系统，解决模拟属性判定难题。
AI.method: 建立本地机器与全局图灵机的相对计算模型，证明模拟属性（如时间、空间误差）的不可判定性，并关联特殊相对论效应。
AI.result: 证明模拟属性不可判定，揭示其与相对论效应的联系，构建全局图灵机以常数时间复杂度模拟量子力学的相对论框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合计算不可判定性与相对论，提出新的计算论题，为理解宇宙模拟可能性及量子力学计算提供理论依据。

search_text: A Relative Church-Turing-Deutsch Thesis from Special Relativity and Undecidability 来自狭义相对论和不可判定性的相对丘奇-图灵-多伊奇论文 Beginning with Turing's seminal work in 1950, artificial intelligence proposes that consciousness can be simulated by a Turing machine. This implies a potential theory of everything where the universe is a simulation on a computer, which begs the question of whether we can prove we exist in a simulation. In this work, we construct a relative model of computation where a computable \textit{local} machine is simulated by a \textit{global}, classical Turing machine. We show that the problem of the local machine computing \textbf{simulation properties} of its global simulator is undecidable in the same sense as the Halting problem. Then, we show that computing the time, space, or error accumulated by the global simulator are simulation properties and therefore are undecidable. These simulation properties give rise to special relativistic effects in the relative model which we use to construct a relative Church-Turing-Deutsch thesis where a global, classical Turing machine computes quantum mechanics for a local machine with the same constant-time local computational complexity as experienced in our universe. 从 1950 年图灵的开创性工作开始，人工智能提出意识可以由图灵机模拟。这意味着宇宙是计算机上的模拟的一切潜在理论，这就引出了我们是否可以证明我们存在于模拟中的问题。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个相对的计算模型，其中可计算的 \textit{local} 机器由 \textit{global} 经典图灵机模拟。我们证明，本地机器计算其全局模拟器的\textbf{模拟属性}问题与停止问题一样是不可判定的。然后，我们证明计算全局模拟器累积的时间、空间或误差是模拟属性，因此是不可判定的。这些模拟特性在相对模型中产生了特殊的相对论效应，我们用它来构建相对的 Church-Turing-Deutsch 论文，其中全局经典图灵机为本地机器计算量子力学，其恒定时间本地计算复杂度与我们宇宙中所经历的相同。 本文构建了一个结合相对论与不可判定性的计算模型，提出相对Church-Turing-Deutsch论题，证明模拟属性的不可判定性并关联量子力学计算。 Blake Wilson,Ethan Dickey,Vaishnavi Iyer,Sabre Kais cs.CC,cs.AI,quant-ph

authors_text: Stephan Alaniz,Marco Federici,Zeynep Akata
title: Compositional Mixture Representations for Vision and Text
title_zh: 视觉和文本的组合混合表示
comment: Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding (L3D-IVU), CVPR 2022
comments: Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding (L3D-IVU), CVPR 2022
abstract: Learning a common representation space between vision and language allows deep networks to relate objects in the image to the corresponding semantic meaning. We present a model that learns a shared Gaussian mixture representation imposing the compositionality of the text onto the visual domain without having explicit location supervision. By combining the spatial transformer with a representation learning approach we learn to split images into separately encoded patches to associate visual and textual representations in an interpretable manner. On variations of MNIST and CIFAR10, our model is able to perform weakly supervised object detection and demonstrates its ability to extrapolate to unseen combination of objects.
summary: Learning a common representation space between vision and language allows deep networks to relate objects in the image to the corresponding semantic meaning. We present a model that learns a shared Gaussian mixture representation imposing the compositionality of the text onto the visual domain without having explicit location supervision. By combining the spatial transformer with a representation learning approach we learn to split images into separately encoded patches to associate visual and textual representations in an interpretable manner. On variations of MNIST and CIFAR10, our model is able to perform weakly supervised object detection and demonstrates its ability to extrapolate to unseen combination of objects.
abstract_zh: 学习视觉和语言之间的共同表示空间允许深度网络将图像中的对象与相应的语义联系起来。我们提出了一个模型，该模型学习共享高斯混合表示，将文本的组合性强加到视觉域上，而无需明确的位置监督。通过将空间变换器与表示学习方法相结合，我们学习将图像分割成单独编码的块，以可解释的方式关联视觉和文本表示。在 MNIST 和 CIFAR10 的变体上，我们的模型能够执行弱监督的对象检测，并展示其推断未见过的对象组合的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习视觉与文本共享表示的方法，通过组合混合模型实现弱监督目标检测与跨模态关联。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在无显式定位监督下有效关联视觉与文本的组合语义，需探索可解释的跨模态表示学习框架。
AI.method: 结合空间变换器与高斯混合模型，将图像分割为独立编码的视觉块，并与文本表示进行组合关联学习。
AI.result: 在MNIST/CIFAR10变体数据集上实现弱监督检测，成功泛化至未见过的物体组合场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了无需显式监督的组合表示学习有效性，为跨模态理解提供了可解释的建模思路。
