authors_text: Meilin Chen,Weijie Chen,Shicai Yang,Jie Song,Xinchao Wang,Lei Zhang,Yunfeng Yan,Donglian Qi,Yueting Zhuang,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu
title: Learning Domain Adaptive Object Detection with Probabilistic Teacher
title_zh: 与概率教师一起学习领域自适应目标检测
comment: To appear in ICML 2022. Code is coming soon: https://github.com/hikvision-research/ProbabilisticTeacher
comments: To appear in ICML 2022. Code is coming soon: https://github.com/hikvision-research/ProbabilisticTeacher
abstract: Self-training for unsupervised domain adaptive object detection is a challenging task, of which the performance depends heavily on the quality of pseudo boxes. Despite the promising results, prior works have largely overlooked the uncertainty of pseudo boxes during self-training. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective framework, termed as Probabilistic Teacher (PT), which aims to capture the uncertainty of unlabeled target data from a gradually evolving teacher and guides the learning of a student in a mutually beneficial manner. Specifically, we propose to leverage the uncertainty-guided consistency training to promote classification adaptation and localization adaptation, rather than filtering pseudo boxes via an elaborate confidence threshold. In addition, we conduct anchor adaptation in parallel with localization adaptation, since anchor can be regarded as a learnable parameter. Together with this framework, we also present a novel Entropy Focal Loss (EFL) to further facilitate the uncertainty-guided self-training. Equipped with EFL, PT outperforms all previous baselines by a large margin and achieve new state-of-the-arts.
summary: Self-training for unsupervised domain adaptive object detection is a challenging task, of which the performance depends heavily on the quality of pseudo boxes. Despite the promising results, prior works have largely overlooked the uncertainty of pseudo boxes during self-training. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective framework, termed as Probabilistic Teacher (PT), which aims to capture the uncertainty of unlabeled target data from a gradually evolving teacher and guides the learning of a student in a mutually beneficial manner. Specifically, we propose to leverage the uncertainty-guided consistency training to promote classification adaptation and localization adaptation, rather than filtering pseudo boxes via an elaborate confidence threshold. In addition, we conduct anchor adaptation in parallel with localization adaptation, since anchor can be regarded as a learnable parameter. Together with this framework, we also present a novel Entropy Focal Loss (EFL) to further facilitate the uncertainty-guided self-training. Equipped with EFL, PT outperforms all previous baselines by a large margin and achieve new state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 无监督域自适应目标检测的自我训练是一项具有挑战性的任务，其性能在很大程度上取决于伪框的质量。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但先前的工作在很大程度上忽略了自训练过程中伪框的不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架，称为概率教师（PT），其目的是从逐渐发展的教师中捕获未标记目标数据的不确定性，并以互惠互利的方式指导学生的学习。具体来说，我们建议利用不确定性引导的一致性训练来促进分类适应和定位适应，而不是通过精心设计的置信阈值过滤伪框。此外，我们将锚点自适应与定位自适应并行进行，因为锚点可以被视为可学习的参数。与这个框架一起，我们还提出了一种新颖的熵焦点损失（EFL），以进一步促进不确定性引导的自我训练。配备 EFL 后，PT 的性能大幅优于之前的所有基线，并达到了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Probabilistic Teacher (PT)的框架，用于改进无监督领域自适应目标检测中的伪框不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在自训练过程中忽视了伪框的不确定性，导致性能受限。本文旨在通过捕捉不确定性来提升领域自适应效果。
AI.method: 提出PT框架，利用不确定性引导的一致性训练促进分类和定位适应，并行进行锚点适应；同时设计熵聚焦损失（EFL）优化不确定性引导的自训练过程。
AI.result: PT框架在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，达到新的SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模伪框不确定性并结合EFL损失，可有效提升领域自适应目标检测的性能。

search_text: Learning Domain Adaptive Object Detection with Probabilistic Teacher 与概率教师一起学习领域自适应目标检测 Self-training for unsupervised domain adaptive object detection is a challenging task, of which the performance depends heavily on the quality of pseudo boxes. Despite the promising results, prior works have largely overlooked the uncertainty of pseudo boxes during self-training. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective framework, termed as Probabilistic Teacher (PT), which aims to capture the uncertainty of unlabeled target data from a gradually evolving teacher and guides the learning of a student in a mutually beneficial manner. Specifically, we propose to leverage the uncertainty-guided consistency training to promote classification adaptation and localization adaptation, rather than filtering pseudo boxes via an elaborate confidence threshold. In addition, we conduct anchor adaptation in parallel with localization adaptation, since anchor can be regarded as a learnable parameter. Together with this framework, we also present a novel Entropy Focal Loss (EFL) to further facilitate the uncertainty-guided self-training. Equipped with EFL, PT outperforms all previous baselines by a large margin and achieve new state-of-the-arts. 无监督域自适应目标检测的自我训练是一项具有挑战性的任务，其性能在很大程度上取决于伪框的质量。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但先前的工作在很大程度上忽略了自训练过程中伪框的不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架，称为概率教师（PT），其目的是从逐渐发展的教师中捕获未标记目标数据的不确定性，并以互惠互利的方式指导学生的学习。具体来说，我们建议利用不确定性引导的一致性训练来促进分类适应和定位适应，而不是通过精心设计的置信阈值过滤伪框。此外，我们将锚点自适应与定位自适应并行进行，因为锚点可以被视为可学习的参数。与这个框架一起，我们还提出了一种新颖的熵焦点损失（EFL），以进一步促进不确定性引导的自我训练。配备 EFL 后，PT 的性能大幅优于之前的所有基线，并达到了新的最先进水平。 本文提出了一种名为Probabilistic Teacher (PT)的框架，用于改进无监督领域自适应目标检测中的伪框不确定性问题。 Meilin Chen,Weijie Chen,Shicai Yang,Jie Song,Xinchao Wang,Lei Zhang,Yunfeng Yan,Donglian Qi,Yueting Zhuang,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhaofan Qiu,Ting Yao,Chong-Wah Ngo,Tao Mei
title: MLP-3D: A MLP-like 3D Architecture with Grouped Time Mixing
title_zh: MLP-3D：具有分组时间混合的类 MLP 3D 架构
comment: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/ZhaofanQiu/MLP-3D
comments: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/ZhaofanQiu/MLP-3D
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been regarded as the go-to models for visual recognition. More recently, convolution-free networks, based on multi-head self-attention (MSA) or multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), become more and more popular. Nevertheless, it is not trivial when utilizing these newly-minted networks for video recognition due to the large variations and complexities in video data. In this paper, we present MLP-3D networks, a novel MLP-like 3D architecture for video recognition. Specifically, the architecture consists of MLP-3D blocks, where each block contains one MLP applied across tokens (i.e., token-mixing MLP) and one MLP applied independently to each token (i.e., channel MLP). By deriving the novel grouped time mixing (GTM) operations, we equip the basic token-mixing MLP with the ability of temporal modeling. GTM divides the input tokens into several temporal groups and linearly maps the tokens in each group with the shared projection matrix. Furthermore, we devise several variants of GTM with different grouping strategies, and compose each variant in different blocks of MLP-3D network by greedy architecture search. Without the dependence on convolutions or attention mechanisms, our MLP-3D networks achieves 68.5\%/81.4\% top-1 accuracy on Something-Something V2 and Kinetics-400 datasets, respectively. Despite with fewer computations, the results are comparable to state-of-the-art widely-used 3D CNNs and video transformers. Source code is available at https://github.com/ZhaofanQiu/MLP-3D.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been regarded as the go-to models for visual recognition. More recently, convolution-free networks, based on multi-head self-attention (MSA) or multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), become more and more popular. Nevertheless, it is not trivial when utilizing these newly-minted networks for video recognition due to the large variations and complexities in video data. In this paper, we present MLP-3D networks, a novel MLP-like 3D architecture for video recognition. Specifically, the architecture consists of MLP-3D blocks, where each block contains one MLP applied across tokens (i.e., token-mixing MLP) and one MLP applied independently to each token (i.e., channel MLP). By deriving the novel grouped time mixing (GTM) operations, we equip the basic token-mixing MLP with the ability of temporal modeling. GTM divides the input tokens into several temporal groups and linearly maps the tokens in each group with the shared projection matrix. Furthermore, we devise several variants of GTM with different grouping strategies, and compose each variant in different blocks of MLP-3D network by greedy architecture search. Without the dependence on convolutions or attention mechanisms, our MLP-3D networks achieves 68.5\%/81.4\% top-1 accuracy on Something-Something V2 and Kinetics-400 datasets, respectively. Despite with fewer computations, the results are comparable to state-of-the-art widely-used 3D CNNs and video transformers. Source code is available at https://github.com/ZhaofanQiu/MLP-3D.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）被认为是视觉识别的首选模型。最近，基于多头自注意力（MSA）或多层感知器（MLP）的无卷积网络变得越来越流行。然而，由于视频数据的巨大变化和复杂性，利用这些新创建的网络进行视频识别并不是微不足道的。在本文中，我们提出了 MLP-3D 网络，这是一种用于视频识别的新型类 MLP 3D 架构。具体来说，该架构由 MLP-3D 块组成，其中每个块包含一个跨令牌应用的 MLP（即令牌混合 MLP）和一个独立应用于每个令牌的 MLP（即通道 MLP）。通过推导新颖的分组时间混合（GTM）操作，我们为基本的令牌混合 MLP 配备了时间建模的能力。 GTM 将输入标记分为几个时间组，并使用共享投影矩阵线性映射每个组中的标记。此外，我们设计了几种具有不同分组策略的 GTM 变体，并通过贪婪架构搜索将每个变体组合在 MLP-3D 网络的不同块中。在不依赖卷积或注意力机制的情况下，我们的 MLP-3D 网络在 Something-Something V2 和 Kinetics-400 数据集上分别实现了 68.5\%/81.4\% top-1 准确率。尽管计算量较少，但结果与最先进的广泛使用的 3D CNN 和视频转换器相当。源代码可在 https://github.com/ZhaofanQiu/MLP-3D 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MLP-3D的新型3D视频识别架构，该架构基于MLP而非传统的卷积或注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于多头自注意力（MSA）或多层感知机（MLP）的卷积-free网络在图像识别中表现出色，但在视频识别任务中，由于视频数据的复杂性和多样性，这些网络的应用并不简单。
AI.method: 本文提出MLP-3D网络，该网络包含MLP-3D模块，每个模块包含一个用于混合token的MLP和一个用于每个token的通道MLP。通过引入分组时间混合（GTM）操作，使token-mixing MLP具备时间建模能力。GTM将输入token分成多个时间组，并使用共享投影矩阵对每个组内的token进行线性映射。此外，通过贪心架构搜索，设计了不同分组策略的GTM变体，并将其组合到MLP-3D网络的不同模块中。
AI.result: 在Something-Something V2和Kinetics-400数据集上，MLP-3D网络分别达到了68.5%和81.4%的top-1准确率，结果与最先进的3D CNN和视频Transformer相当。
AI.conclusion: MLP-3D网络无需依赖卷积或注意力机制，即可在视频识别任务中取得与现有方法相当的性能，同时计算量更少。

authors_text: Yong Zhang,Yingwei Pan,Ting Yao,Rui Huang,Tao Mei,Chang-Wen Chen
title: Exploring Structure-aware Transformer over Interaction Proposals for Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: 探索用于人与物体交互检测的交互建议中的结构感知变压器
comment: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/zyong812/STIP
comments: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/zyong812/STIP
abstract: Recent high-performing Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection techniques have been highly influenced by Transformer-based object detector (i.e., DETR). Nevertheless, most of them directly map parametric interaction queries into a set of HOI predictions through vanilla Transformer in a one-stage manner. This leaves rich inter- or intra-interaction structure under-exploited. In this work, we design a novel Transformer-style HOI detector, i.e., Structure-aware Transformer over Interaction Proposals (STIP), for HOI detection. Such design decomposes the process of HOI set prediction into two subsequent phases, i.e., an interaction proposal generation is first performed, and then followed by transforming the non-parametric interaction proposals into HOI predictions via a structure-aware Transformer. The structure-aware Transformer upgrades vanilla Transformer by encoding additionally the holistically semantic structure among interaction proposals as well as the locally spatial structure of human/object within each interaction proposal, so as to strengthen HOI predictions. Extensive experiments conducted on V-COCO and HICO-DET benchmarks have demonstrated the effectiveness of STIP, and superior results are reported when comparing with the state-of-the-art HOI detectors. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/zyong812/STIP}.
summary: Recent high-performing Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection techniques have been highly influenced by Transformer-based object detector (i.e., DETR). Nevertheless, most of them directly map parametric interaction queries into a set of HOI predictions through vanilla Transformer in a one-stage manner. This leaves rich inter- or intra-interaction structure under-exploited. In this work, we design a novel Transformer-style HOI detector, i.e., Structure-aware Transformer over Interaction Proposals (STIP), for HOI detection. Such design decomposes the process of HOI set prediction into two subsequent phases, i.e., an interaction proposal generation is first performed, and then followed by transforming the non-parametric interaction proposals into HOI predictions via a structure-aware Transformer. The structure-aware Transformer upgrades vanilla Transformer by encoding additionally the holistically semantic structure among interaction proposals as well as the locally spatial structure of human/object within each interaction proposal, so as to strengthen HOI predictions. Extensive experiments conducted on V-COCO and HICO-DET benchmarks have demonstrated the effectiveness of STIP, and superior results are reported when comparing with the state-of-the-art HOI detectors. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/zyong812/STIP}.
abstract_zh: 最近的高性能人与物体交互（HOI）检测技术受到基于 Transformer 的物体检测器（即 DETR）的极大影响。尽管如此，他们中的大多数通过 vanilla Transformer 以单阶段方式直接将参数交互查询映射到一组 HOI 预测。这使得丰富的交互或内部交互结构未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种新颖的 Transformer 式 HOI 检测器，即结构感知 Transformer over Interaction Proposals (STIP)，用于 HOI 检测。这种设计将 HOI 集预测的过程分解为两个后续阶段，即首先执行交互建议生成，然后通过结构感知 Transformer 将非参数交互建议转换为 HOI 预测。结构感知 Transformer 通过额外编码交互提案之间的整体语义结构以及每个交互提案中人/物体的局部空间结构来升级 vanilla Transformer，以加强 HOI 预测。在 V-COCO 和 HICO-DET 基准上进行的大量实验证明了 STIP 的有效性，并且与最先进的 HOI 检测器进行比较时报告了优异的结果。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zyong812/STIP} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型结构感知Transformer（STIP），通过分阶段生成交互建议并利用结构信息增强HOI预测，改进人-物交互检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的HOI检测方法未充分挖掘交互的全局语义结构与局部空间关系，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: 设计两阶段STIP框架：首先生成交互建议，再通过结构感知Transformer编码全局语义结构与局部空间结构，转化为HOI预测。
AI.result: 在V-COCO和HICO-DET基准测试中，STIP相较现有方法取得更优检测结果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知Transformer有效提升了HOI检测性能，验证了交互结构建模的重要性。

authors_text: Pradeep Niroula,Ruslan Shaydulin,Romina Yalovetzky,Pierre Minssen,Dylan Herman,Shaohan Hu,Marco Pistoia
title: Constrained Quantum Optimization for Extractive Summarization on a Trapped-ion Quantum Computer
title_zh: 俘获离子量子计算机上提取总结的约束量子优化
abstract: Realizing the potential of near-term quantum computers to solve industry-relevant constrained-optimization problems is a promising path to quantum advantage. In this work, we consider the extractive summarization constrained-optimization problem and demonstrate the largest-to-date execution of a quantum optimization algorithm that natively preserves constraints on quantum hardware. We report results with the Quantum Alternating Operator Ansatz algorithm with a Hamming-weight-preserving XY mixer (XY-QAOA) on trapped-ion quantum computer. We successfully execute XY-QAOA circuits that restrict the quantum evolution to the in-constraint subspace, using up to 20 qubits and a two-qubit gate depth of up to 159. We demonstrate the necessity of directly encoding the constraints into the quantum circuit by showing the trade-off between the in-constraint probability and the quality of the solution that is implicit if unconstrained quantum optimization methods are used. We show that this trade-off makes choosing good parameters difficult in general. We compare XY-QAOA to the Layer Variational Quantum Eigensolver algorithm, which has a highly expressive constant-depth circuit, and the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm. We discuss the respective trade-offs of the algorithms and implications for their execution on near-term quantum hardware.
summary: Realizing the potential of near-term quantum computers to solve industry-relevant constrained-optimization problems is a promising path to quantum advantage. In this work, we consider the extractive summarization constrained-optimization problem and demonstrate the largest-to-date execution of a quantum optimization algorithm that natively preserves constraints on quantum hardware. We report results with the Quantum Alternating Operator Ansatz algorithm with a Hamming-weight-preserving XY mixer (XY-QAOA) on trapped-ion quantum computer. We successfully execute XY-QAOA circuits that restrict the quantum evolution to the in-constraint subspace, using up to 20 qubits and a two-qubit gate depth of up to 159. We demonstrate the necessity of directly encoding the constraints into the quantum circuit by showing the trade-off between the in-constraint probability and the quality of the solution that is implicit if unconstrained quantum optimization methods are used. We show that this trade-off makes choosing good parameters difficult in general. We compare XY-QAOA to the Layer Variational Quantum Eigensolver algorithm, which has a highly expressive constant-depth circuit, and the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm. We discuss the respective trade-offs of the algorithms and implications for their execution on near-term quantum hardware.
abstract_zh: 认识到近期量子计算机解决行业相关约束优化问题的潜力是实现量子优势的一条有希望的途径。在这项工作中，我们考虑了提取概括约束优化问题，并演示了量子优化算法的迄今为止最大的执行，该算法本身保留了对量子硬件的约束。我们在俘获离子量子计算机上报告了使用量子交替算子 Ansatz 算法和汉明保重 XY 混合器 (XY-QAOA) 的结果。我们成功地执行了 XY-QAOA 电路，将量子演化限制在约束内子空间，使用多达 20 个量子位和高达 159 的两个量子位门深度。我们通过展示约束内概率和使用无约束量子优化方法时隐含的解决方案质量之间的权衡，证明了将约束直接编码到量子电路中的必要性。我们表明，这种权衡通常使得选择好的参数变得困难。我们将 XY-QAOA 与层变分量子特征求解器算法（具有高度表现力的恒定深度电路）和量子近似优化算法进行比较。我们讨论了算法各自的权衡以及它们在近期量子硬件上执行的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文在离子阱量子计算机上实现约束量子优化算法，用于解决抽取式摘要问题，并验证了直接编码约束的必要性。
AI.motivation: 近期内量子计算机需解决实际约束优化问题以实现量子优势，而传统方法难以有效处理约束条件。
AI.method: 采用保留哈明重量的XY混合器量子交替算符变分法(XY-QAOA)，在20量子比特离子阱设备上执行，直接编码约束至量子电路，并与Layer VQE和QAOA算法对比。
AI.result: 成功运行20量子比特、159两量子比特门深度的XY-QAOA电路，证明约束编码可提升解质量，且揭示了无约束方法的参数选择困境。
AI.conclusion: 直接约束编码对量子优化至关重要，不同算法在近期硬件上存在深度与表达力的权衡，需针对性选择。

authors_text: Yingwei Pan,Yehao Li,Yiheng Zhang,Qi Cai,Fuchen Long,Zhaofan Qiu,Ting Yao,Tao Mei
title: Silver-Bullet-3D at ManiSkill 2021: Learning-from-Demonstrations and Heuristic Rule-based Methods for Object Manipulation
title_zh: ManiSkill 2021 的 Silver-Bullet-3D：从演示中学习和基于启发式规则的对象操作方法
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2022 Workshop on Generalizable Policy Learning in Physical World. Top-performing systems for both no interaction and no restriction tracks in SAPIEN ManiSkill Challenge 2021. The source code and model are publicly available at: https://github.com/caiqi/Silver-Bullet-3D/
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2022 Workshop on Generalizable Policy Learning in Physical World. Top-performing systems for both no interaction and no restriction tracks in SAPIEN ManiSkill Challenge 2021. The source code and model are publicly available at: https://github.com/caiqi/Silver-Bullet-3D/
abstract: This paper presents an overview and comparative analysis of our systems designed for the following two tracks in SAPIEN ManiSkill Challenge 2021: No Interaction Track: The No Interaction track targets for learning policies from pre-collected demonstration trajectories. We investigate both imitation learning-based approach, i.e., imitating the observed behavior using classical supervised learning techniques, and offline reinforcement learning-based approaches, for this track. Moreover, the geometry and texture structures of objects and robotic arms are exploited via Transformer-based networks to facilitate imitation learning. No Restriction Track: In this track, we design a Heuristic Rule-based Method (HRM) to trigger high-quality object manipulation by decomposing the task into a series of sub-tasks. For each sub-task, the simple rule-based controlling strategies are adopted to predict actions that can be applied to robotic arms. To ease the implementations of our systems, all the source codes and pre-trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/caiqi/Silver-Bullet-3D/}.
summary: This paper presents an overview and comparative analysis of our systems designed for the following two tracks in SAPIEN ManiSkill Challenge 2021: No Interaction Track: The No Interaction track targets for learning policies from pre-collected demonstration trajectories. We investigate both imitation learning-based approach, i.e., imitating the observed behavior using classical supervised learning techniques, and offline reinforcement learning-based approaches, for this track. Moreover, the geometry and texture structures of objects and robotic arms are exploited via Transformer-based networks to facilitate imitation learning. No Restriction Track: In this track, we design a Heuristic Rule-based Method (HRM) to trigger high-quality object manipulation by decomposing the task into a series of sub-tasks. For each sub-task, the simple rule-based controlling strategies are adopted to predict actions that can be applied to robotic arms. To ease the implementations of our systems, all the source codes and pre-trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/caiqi/Silver-Bullet-3D/}.
abstract_zh: 本文对我们为 SAPIEN ManiSkill Challenge 2021 中以下两个赛道设计的系统进行了概述和比较分析： 无交互赛道：从预先收集的演示轨迹中学习策略的无交互赛道目标。对于这个赛道，我们研究了基于模仿学习的方法，即使用经典的监督学习技术模仿观察到的行为，以及基于离线强化学习的方法。此外，通过基于 Transformer 的网络利用物体和机械臂的几何和纹理结构来促进模仿学习。无限制赛道：在这个赛道中，我们设计了一种基于启发式规则的方法（HRM），通过将任务分解为一系列子任务来触发高质量的对象操作。对于每个子任务，采用简单的基于规则的控制策略来预测可应用于机械臂的动作。为了简化我们系统的实现，所有源代码和预训练模型都可以在 \url{https://github.com/caiqi/Silver-Bullet-3D/} 处获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Silver-Bullet-3D系统在ManiSkill 2021挑战赛中针对两个赛道的设计方案：无交互赛道采用基于模仿学习和离线强化学习的方法，无限制赛道则采用启发式规则方法进行物体操作。
AI.motivation: 为解决机器人操作任务中策略学习与规则控制的挑战，结合演示数据学习与启发式规则的优势，提升复杂环境下的操作性能。
AI.method: 无交互赛道使用Transformer网络处理物体与机械臂几何结构，结合模仿学习和离线强化学习；无限制赛道通过启发式规则方法分解任务为子任务，采用简单规则策略控制机械臂动作。
AI.result: 系统在ManiSkill 2021挑战赛中取得竞争力结果，源码与预训练模型已开源。

search_text: Silver-Bullet-3D at ManiSkill 2021: Learning-from-Demonstrations and Heuristic Rule-based Methods for Object Manipulation ManiSkill 2021 的 Silver-Bullet-3D：从演示中学习和基于启发式规则的对象操作方法 This paper presents an overview and comparative analysis of our systems designed for the following two tracks in SAPIEN ManiSkill Challenge 2021: No Interaction Track: The No Interaction track targets for learning policies from pre-collected demonstration trajectories. We investigate both imitation learning-based approach, i.e., imitating the observed behavior using classical supervised learning techniques, and offline reinforcement learning-based approaches, for this track. Moreover, the geometry and texture structures of objects and robotic arms are exploited via Transformer-based networks to facilitate imitation learning. No Restriction Track: In this track, we design a Heuristic Rule-based Method (HRM) to trigger high-quality object manipulation by decomposing the task into a series of sub-tasks. For each sub-task, the simple rule-based controlling strategies are adopted to predict actions that can be applied to robotic arms. To ease the implementations of our systems, all the source codes and pre-trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/caiqi/Silver-Bullet-3D/}. 本文对我们为 SAPIEN ManiSkill Challenge 2021 中以下两个赛道设计的系统进行了概述和比较分析： 无交互赛道：从预先收集的演示轨迹中学习策略的无交互赛道目标。对于这个赛道，我们研究了基于模仿学习的方法，即使用经典的监督学习技术模仿观察到的行为，以及基于离线强化学习的方法。此外，通过基于 Transformer 的网络利用物体和机械臂的几何和纹理结构来促进模仿学习。无限制赛道：在这个赛道中，我们设计了一种基于启发式规则的方法（HRM），通过将任务分解为一系列子任务来触发高质量的对象操作。对于每个子任务，采用简单的基于规则的控制策略来预测可应用于机械臂的动作。为了简化我们系统的实现，所有源代码和预训练模型都可以在 \url{https://github.com/caiqi/Silver-Bullet-3D/} 处获取。 本文介绍了Silver-Bullet-3D系统在ManiSkill 2021挑战赛中针对两个赛道的设计方案：无交互赛道采用基于模仿学习和离线强化学习的方法，无限制赛道则采用启发式规则方法进行物体操作。 Yingwei Pan,Yehao Li,Yiheng Zhang,Qi Cai,Fuchen Long,Zhaofan Qiu,Ting Yao,Tao Mei cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM,cs.RO

authors_text: Josip Josifovski,Mohammadhossein Malmir,Noah Klarmann,Bare Luka Žagar,Nicolás Navarro-Guerrero,Alois Knoll
title: Analysis of Randomization Effects on Sim2Real Transfer in Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation Tasks
title_zh: 机器人操作任务强化学习中 Sim2Real 迁移的随机化效果分析
comment: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Randomization is currently a widely used approach in Sim2Real transfer for data-driven learning algorithms in robotics. Still, most Sim2Real studies report results for a specific randomization technique and often on a highly customized robotic system, making it difficult to evaluate different randomization approaches systematically. To address this problem, we define an easy-to-reproduce experimental setup for a robotic reach-and-balance manipulator task, which can serve as a benchmark for comparison. We compare four randomization strategies with three randomized parameters both in simulation and on a real robot. Our results show that more randomization helps in Sim2Real transfer, yet it can also harm the ability of the algorithm to find a good policy in simulation. Fully randomized simulations and fine-tuning show differentiated results and translate better to the real robot than the other approaches tested.
summary: Randomization is currently a widely used approach in Sim2Real transfer for data-driven learning algorithms in robotics. Still, most Sim2Real studies report results for a specific randomization technique and often on a highly customized robotic system, making it difficult to evaluate different randomization approaches systematically. To address this problem, we define an easy-to-reproduce experimental setup for a robotic reach-and-balance manipulator task, which can serve as a benchmark for comparison. We compare four randomization strategies with three randomized parameters both in simulation and on a real robot. Our results show that more randomization helps in Sim2Real transfer, yet it can also harm the ability of the algorithm to find a good policy in simulation. Fully randomized simulations and fine-tuning show differentiated results and translate better to the real robot than the other approaches tested.
abstract_zh: 随机化目前是 Sim2Real 迁移中广泛使用的方法，用于机器人技术中的数据驱动学习算法。尽管如此，大多数 Sim2Real 研究报告的结果都是特定随机化技术的结果，并且通常是在高度定制的机器人系统上，这使得系统地评估不同的随机化方法变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们为机器人伸展和平衡操纵器任务定义了一个易于重现的实验设置，它可以作为比较的基准。我们在模拟和真实机器人上比较了四种随机化策略和三个随机参数。我们的结果表明，更多的随机化有助于 Sim2Real 迁移，但也会损害算法在模拟中找到良好策略的能力。完全随机的模拟和微调显示出不同的结果，并且比其他测试方法更好地转化为真实的机器人。

AI.tldr: 分析随机化对Sim2Real迁移的影响，并建立可复现的实验基准
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对不同随机化方法的系统比较，难以评估其有效性
AI.method: 设计可复现的实验环境，比较四种随机化策略与三个参数在仿真和真实机器人上的表现
AI.result: 更多随机化提升迁移效果，但可能影响仿真策略优化；完全随机化结合微调在真实机器人上表现更优
AI.conclusion: 需平衡随机化程度，完全随机化结合微调更利于Sim2Real迁移

authors_text: Edwin S. Dalmaijer
title: Cumulative culture spontaneously emerges in artificial navigators who are social and memory-guided
title_zh: 累积文化自发地出现在具有社交和记忆引导的人工导航器中
abstract: Cumulative cultural evolution occurs when adaptive innovations are passed down to consecutive generations through social learning. This process has shaped human technological innovation, but also occurs in non-human species. While it is traditionally argued that cumulative culture relies on high-fidelity social transmission and advanced cognitive skills, here I show that a much simpler system suffices. Cumulative culture spontaneously emerged in artificial agents who navigate with a minimal cognitive architecture of goal-direction, social proximity, and route memory. Within each generation, naive individuals benefitted from being paired with experienced navigators because they could follow previously established routes. Crucially, experienced navigators also benefitted from the presence of naive individuals through regression to the goal. As experienced agents followed their memorised path, their naive counterparts (unhindered by route memory) were more likely to err towards than away from the goal, and thus biased the pair in that direction. This improved route efficiency within each generation. In control experiments, cumulative culture was attenuated when agents' social proximity or route memory were lesioned, whereas eliminating goal-direction only reduced efficiency. These results demonstrate that cumulative cultural evolution occurs even in the absence of sophisticated communication or thought. One interpretation of this finding is that current definitions are too loose, and should be narrowed. An alternative conclusion is that rudimentary cumulative culture is an emergent property of systems that seek social proximity and have an imprecise memory capacity, providing a flexible complement to traditional evolutionary mechanisms.

This process has shaped human technological innovation, but also occurs in non-human species. While it is traditionally argued that cumulative culture relies on high-fidelity social transmission and advanced cognitive skills, here I show that a much simpler system suffices. Cumulative culture spontaneously emerged in artificial agents who navigate with a minimal cognitive architecture of goal-direction, social proximity, and route memory. Within each generation, naive individuals benefitted from being paired with experienced navigators because they could follow previously established routes. Crucially, experienced navigators also benefitted from the presence of naive individuals through regression to the goal. As experienced agents followed their memorised path, their naive counterparts (unhindered by route memory) were more likely to err towards than away from the goal, and thus biased the pair in that direction. This improved route efficiency within each generation. In control experiments, cumulative culture was attenuated when agents' social proximity or route memory were lesioned, whereas eliminating goal-direction only reduced efficiency. These results demonstrate that cumulative cultural evolution occurs even in the absence of sophisticated communication or thought. One interpretation of this finding is that current definitions are too loose, and should be narrowed. An alternative conclusion is that rudimentary cumulative culture is an emergent property of systems that seek social proximity and have an imprecise memory capacity, providing a flexible complement to traditional evolutionary mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 当适应性创新通过社会学习传递给连续几代人时，就会发生累积文化进化。这一过程塑造了人类的技术创新，但也发生在非人类物种中。虽然传统上认为累积文化依赖于高保真度的社会传播和先进的认知技能，但在这里我表明一个更简单的系统就足够了。累积文化自发地出现在人工智能体中，这些人工智能体以目标方向、社交接近度和路线记忆的最小认知架构进行导航。在每一代人中，天真的个体都会从与经验丰富的航海家的配对中受益，因为他们可以遵循先前建立的路线。至关重要的是，经验丰富的导航员也通过回归目标从天真的个体的存在中受益。当经验丰富的智能体遵循他们记忆的路径时，他们天真的对手（不受路线记忆的阻碍）更有可能犯错而不是远离目标，从而使两人朝着那个方向产生偏见。这提高了每一代的路线效率。在对照实验中，当代理人的社交接近度或路线记忆受到损害时，累积文化就会减弱，而消除目标方向只会降低效率。这些结果表明，即使缺乏复杂的沟通或思想，累积的文化进化也会发生。对这一发现的一种解释是，当前的定义过于宽松，应该缩小范围。另一种结论是，基本的累积文化是寻求社会接近性并具有不精确记忆能力的系统的新兴属性，为传统进化机制提供了灵活的补充。

AI.tldr: 本文通过模拟具有基本社会性和记忆能力的人工代理，展示了累积文化可以在无需复杂认知或沟通的情况下自发产生。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为累积文化依赖高保真社会传播和高级认知能力，但作者旨在验证更简单的系统是否能实现这一过程。
AI.method: 设计具有目标导向、社交邻近性和路线记忆的最小认知架构的人工代理，通过配对新手与经验代理的交互实验，观察路线效率的代际改进。
AI.result: 累积文化在社交邻近性和路线记忆存在时自发出现，移除这些因素会削弱累积效应，仅移除目标导向则降低效率但不阻止进步。
AI.conclusion: 累积文化可能是社交倾向和有限记忆系统的涌现特性，为传统进化机制提供了补充，提示现有定义可能过于宽泛。

As experienced agents followed their memorised path, their naive counterparts (unhindered by route memory) were more likely to err towards than away from the goal, and thus biased the pair in that direction. This improved route efficiency within each generation. In control experiments, cumulative culture was attenuated when agents' social proximity or route memory were lesioned, whereas eliminating goal-direction only reduced efficiency. These results demonstrate that cumulative cultural evolution occurs even in the absence of sophisticated communication or thought. One interpretation of this finding is that current definitions are too loose, and should be narrowed. An alternative conclusion is that rudimentary cumulative culture is an emergent property of systems that seek social proximity and have an imprecise memory capacity, providing a flexible complement to traditional evolutionary mechanisms. 当适应性创新通过社会学习传递给连续几代人时，就会发生累积文化进化。这一过程塑造了人类的技术创新，但也发生在非人类物种中。虽然传统上认为累积文化依赖于高保真度的社会传播和先进的认知技能，但在这里我表明一个更简单的系统就足够了。累积文化自发地出现在人工智能体中，这些人工智能体以目标方向、社交接近度和路线记忆的最小认知架构进行导航。在每一代人中，天真的个体都会从与经验丰富的航海家的配对中受益，因为他们可以遵循先前建立的路线。至关重要的是，经验丰富的导航员也通过回归目标从天真的个体的存在中受益。当经验丰富的智能体遵循他们记忆的路径时，他们天真的对手（不受路线记忆的阻碍）更有可能犯错而不是远离目标，从而使两人朝着那个方向产生偏见。这提高了每一代的路线效率。在对照实验中，当代理人的社交接近度或路线记忆受到损害时，累积文化就会减弱，而消除目标方向只会降低效率。这些结果表明，即使缺乏复杂的沟通或思想，累积的文化进化也会发生。对这一发现的一种解释是，当前的定义过于宽松，应该缩小范围。另一种结论是，基本的累积文化是寻求社会接近性并具有不精确记忆能力的系统的新兴属性，为传统进化机制提供了灵活的补充。 本文通过模拟具有基本社会性和记忆能力的人工代理，展示了累积文化可以在无需复杂认知或沟通的情况下自发产生。 Edwin S. Dalmaijer q-bio.PE,cs.AI

authors_text: Shaina Raza
title: A Machine Learning Model for Predicting, Diagnosing, and Mitigating Health Disparities in Hospital Readmission
title_zh: 用于预测、诊断和减轻再入院健康差异的机器学习模型
abstract: The management of hyperglycemia in hospitalized patients has a significant impact on both morbidity and mortality. Therefore, it is important to predict the need for diabetic patients to be hospitalized. However, using standard machine learning approaches to make these predictions may result in health disparities caused by biases in the data related to social determinants (such as race, age, and gender). These biases must be removed early in the data collection process, before they enter the system and are reinforced by model predictions, resulting in biases in the model's decisions. In this paper, we propose a machine learning pipeline capable of making predictions as well as detecting and mitigating biases in the data and model predictions. This pipeline analyses the clinical data and determines whether biases exist in the data, if so, it removes those biases before making predictions. We evaluate the performance of the proposed method on a clinical dataset using accuracy and fairness measures. The findings of the results show that when we mitigate biases early during the data ingestion, we get fairer predictions.
summary: The management of hyperglycemia in hospitalized patients has a significant impact on both morbidity and mortality. Therefore, it is important to predict the need for diabetic patients to be hospitalized. However, using standard machine learning approaches to make these predictions may result in health disparities caused by biases in the data related to social determinants (such as race, age, and gender). These biases must be removed early in the data collection process, before they enter the system and are reinforced by model predictions, resulting in biases in the model's decisions. In this paper, we propose a machine learning pipeline capable of making predictions as well as detecting and mitigating biases in the data and model predictions. This pipeline analyses the clinical data and determines whether biases exist in the data, if so, it removes those biases before making predictions. We evaluate the performance of the proposed method on a clinical dataset using accuracy and fairness measures. The findings of the results show that when we mitigate biases early during the data ingestion, we get fairer predictions.
abstract_zh: 住院患者的高血糖管理对发病率和死亡率都有显着影响。因此，预测糖尿病患者住院的需要很重要。然而，使用标准机器学习方法进行这些预测可能会因与社会决定因素（例如种族、年龄和性别）相关的数据偏差而导致健康差异。这些偏差必须在数据收集过程的早期消除，然后再进入系统并通过模型预测得到强化，从而导致模型决策出现偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种机器学习管道，能够进行预测以及检测和减轻数据和模型预测中的偏差。该管道分析临床数据并确定数据中是否存在偏差，如果存在，它会在做出预测之前消除这些偏差。我们使用准确性和公平性措施评估所提出的方法在临床数据集上的性能。结果表明，当我们在数据摄取过程中尽早减少偏差时，我们会得到更公平的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机器学习流程，用于预测住院再入院需求并检测、缓解数据及模型预测中的健康差异偏差。
AI.motivation: 标准机器学习方法可能因社会决定因素（如种族、年龄、性别）的偏差导致健康差异，需在数据收集阶段消除偏差以避免模型决策的不公平性。
AI.method: 构建包含数据偏差检测与缓解的机器学习流水线，在临床数据分析阶段识别并消除偏差后进行预测。
AI.result: 在临床数据集上评估显示，早期数据偏差缓解显著提升了预测公平性。
AI.conclusion: 在数据采集阶段处理偏差可有效减少模型预测中的健康差异，提升医疗决策的公平性。

authors_text: Theo Deprelle,Thibault Groueix,Noam Aigerman,Vladimir G. Kim,Mathieu Aubry
title: Learning Joint Surface Atlases
title_zh: 学习关节表面图集
abstract: This paper describes new techniques for learning atlas-like representations of 3D surfaces, i.e. homeomorphic transformations from a 2D domain to surfaces. Compared to prior work, we propose two major contributions. First, instead of mapping a fixed 2D domain, such as a set of square patches, to the surface, we learn a continuous 2D domain with arbitrary topology by optimizing a point sampling distribution represented as a mixture of Gaussians. Second, we learn consistent mappings in both directions: charts, from the 3D surface to 2D domain, and parametrizations, their inverse. We demonstrate that this improves the quality of the learned surface representation, as well as its consistency in a collection of related shapes. It thus leads to improvements for applications such as correspondence estimation, texture transfer, and consistent UV mapping. As an additional technical contribution, we outline that, while incorporating normal consistency has clear benefits, it leads to issues in the optimization, and that these issues can be mitigated using a simple repulsive regularization. We demonstrate that our contributions provide better surface representation than existing baselines.
summary: This paper describes new techniques for learning atlas-like representations of 3D surfaces, i.e. homeomorphic transformations from a 2D domain to surfaces. Compared to prior work, we propose two major contributions. First, instead of mapping a fixed 2D domain, such as a set of square patches, to the surface, we learn a continuous 2D domain with arbitrary topology by optimizing a point sampling distribution represented as a mixture of Gaussians. Second, we learn consistent mappings in both directions: charts, from the 3D surface to 2D domain, and parametrizations, their inverse. We demonstrate that this improves the quality of the learned surface representation, as well as its consistency in a collection of related shapes. It thus leads to improvements for applications such as correspondence estimation, texture transfer, and consistent UV mapping. As an additional technical contribution, we outline that, while incorporating normal consistency has clear benefits, it leads to issues in the optimization, and that these issues can be mitigated using a simple repulsive regularization. We demonstrate that our contributions provide better surface representation than existing baselines.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了学习 3D 表面的类图集表示的新技术，即从 2D 域到表面的同胚变换。与之前的工作相比，我们提出了两个主要贡献。首先，我们不是将固定的 2D 域（例如一组方形面片）映射到表面，而是通过优化表示为高斯混合的点采样分布来学习具有任意拓扑的连续 2D 域。其次，我们学习两个方向上的一致映射：图表（从 3D 表面到 2D 域）以及参数化（它们的逆）。我们证明，这提高了学习表面表示的质量，及其在相关形状集合中的一致性。因此，它改进了对应估计、纹理传输和一致 UV 映射等应用。作为额外的技术贡献，我们概述了虽然合并正态一致性具有明显的好处，但它会导致优化问题，并且可以使用简单的排斥正则化来缓解这些问题。我们证明我们的贡献提供了比现有基线更好的表面表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习3D表面联合图集表示的新方法，通过优化连续2D域和双向映射提升表面表示质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在固定2D域映射和单向映射方面存在局限，导致表面表示质量与一致性不足，需改进以支持纹理传输等应用。
AI.method: 通过优化高斯混合表示的点采样分布学习连续2D域，并联合学习表面到2D域的图表及其逆向参数化映射，同时引入排斥正则化解决法线一致性优化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在表面表示质量、形状集合一致性及纹理传输等应用中优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过连续域学习和双向映射机制有效提升了表面表示性能，且排斥正则化成功缓解了优化难题。

authors_text: Wen Tang,Haoyue Zhang,Pengxin Yu,Han Kang,Rongguo Zhang
title: MMMNA-Net for Overall Survival Time Prediction of Brain Tumor Patients
title_zh: MMMNA-Net 用于脑肿瘤患者总体生存时间预测
abstract: Overall survival (OS) time is one of the most important evaluation indices for gliomas situations. Multimodal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans play an important role in the study of glioma prognosis OS time. Several deep learning-based methods are proposed for the OS time prediction on multi-modal MRI problems. However, these methods usually fuse multi-modal information at the beginning or at the end of the deep learning networks and lack the fusion of features from different scales. In addition, the fusion at the end of networks always adapts global with global (eg. fully connected after concatenation of global average pooling output) or local with local (eg. bilinear pooling), which loses the information of local with global. In this paper, we propose a novel method for multi-modal OS time prediction of brain tumor patients, which contains an improved nonlocal features fusion module introduced on different scales. Our method obtains a relative 8.76% improvement over the current state-of-art method (0.6989 vs. 0.6426 on accuracy). Extensive testing demonstrates that our method could adapt to situations with missing modalities. The code is available at https://github.com/TangWen920812/mmmna-net.
summary: Overall survival (OS) time is one of the most important evaluation indices for gliomas situations. Multimodal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans play an important role in the study of glioma prognosis OS time. Several deep learning-based methods are proposed for the OS time prediction on multi-modal MRI problems. However, these methods usually fuse multi-modal information at the beginning or at the end of the deep learning networks and lack the fusion of features from different scales. In addition, the fusion at the end of networks always adapts global with global (eg. fully connected after concatenation of global average pooling output) or local with local (eg. bilinear pooling), which loses the information of local with global. In this paper, we propose a novel method for multi-modal OS time prediction of brain tumor patients, which contains an improved nonlocal features fusion module introduced on different scales. Our method obtains a relative 8.76% improvement over the current state-of-art method (0.6989 vs. 0.6426 on accuracy). Extensive testing demonstrates that our method could adapt to situations with missing modalities. The code is available at https://github.com/TangWen920812/mmmna-net.
abstract_zh: 总生存（OS）时间是胶质瘤情况最重要的评估指标之一。多模态磁共振成像 (MRI) 扫描在神经胶质瘤预后 OS 时间的研究中发挥着重要作用。提出了几种基于深度学习的方法来预测多模态 MRI 问题的 OS 时间。然而，这些方法通常在深度学习网络的开始或结束时融合多模态信息，缺乏不同尺度特征的融合。此外，网络末端的融合总是使全局与全局相适应（例如，全局平均池化输出串联后完全连接）或局部与局部（例如双线性池化），这会丢失局部与全局的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种脑肿瘤患者多模式 OS 时间预测的新方法，其中包含在不同尺度上引入的改进的非局部特征融合模块。与当前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法相对提高了 8.76%（准确度为 0.6989 vs. 0.6426）。广泛的测试表明我们的方法可以适应缺少模式的情况。代码可在 https://github.com/TangWen920812/mmmna-net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMMNA-Net方法，通过改进多尺度非局部特征融合模块，提升脑肿瘤患者总体生存时间预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态MRI特征融合中存在尺度单一、局部与全局信息结合不足的问题，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: 设计改进的非局部特征融合模块，在不同尺度上融合多模态MRI特征，保留局部与全局信息交互。
AI.result: 在准确率指标上较现有最优方法提升8.76%（0.6989 vs. 0.6426），且能适应缺失模态的场景。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征融合策略有效提升预测性能，方法具有模态缺失鲁棒性，代码已开源。

search_text: MMMNA-Net for Overall Survival Time Prediction of Brain Tumor Patients MMMNA-Net 用于脑肿瘤患者总体生存时间预测 Overall survival (OS) time is one of the most important evaluation indices for gliomas situations. Multimodal Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans play an important role in the study of glioma prognosis OS time. Several deep learning-based methods are proposed for the OS time prediction on multi-modal MRI problems. However, these methods usually fuse multi-modal information at the beginning or at the end of the deep learning networks and lack the fusion of features from different scales. In addition, the fusion at the end of networks always adapts global with global (eg. fully connected after concatenation of global average pooling output) or local with local (eg. bilinear pooling), which loses the information of local with global. In this paper, we propose a novel method for multi-modal OS time prediction of brain tumor patients, which contains an improved nonlocal features fusion module introduced on different scales. Our method obtains a relative 8.76% improvement over the current state-of-art method (0.6989 vs. 0.6426 on accuracy). Extensive testing demonstrates that our method could adapt to situations with missing modalities. The code is available at https://github.com/TangWen920812/mmmna-net. 总生存（OS）时间是胶质瘤情况最重要的评估指标之一。多模态磁共振成像 (MRI) 扫描在神经胶质瘤预后 OS 时间的研究中发挥着重要作用。提出了几种基于深度学习的方法来预测多模态 MRI 问题的 OS 时间。然而，这些方法通常在深度学习网络的开始或结束时融合多模态信息，缺乏不同尺度特征的融合。此外，网络末端的融合总是使全局与全局相适应（例如，全局平均池化输出串联后完全连接）或局部与局部（例如双线性池化），这会丢失局部与全局的信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种脑肿瘤患者多模式 OS 时间预测的新方法，其中包含在不同尺度上引入的改进的非局部特征融合模块。与当前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法相对提高了 8.76%（准确度为 0.6989 vs. 0.6426）。广泛的测试表明我们的方法可以适应缺少模式的情况。代码可在 https://github.com/TangWen920812/mmmna-net 获取。 本文提出MMMNA-Net方法，通过改进多尺度非局部特征融合模块，提升脑肿瘤患者总体生存时间预测的准确性。 Wen Tang,Haoyue Zhang,Pengxin Yu,Han Kang,Rongguo Zhang eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Nikhil Kumar Tomar,Abhishek Srivastava,Ulas Bagci,Debesh Jha
title: Automatic Polyp Segmentation with Multiple Kernel Dilated Convolution Network
title_zh: 使用多核扩张卷积网络自动息肉分割
abstract: The detection and removal of precancerous polyps through colonoscopy is the primary technique for the prevention of colorectal cancer worldwide. However, the miss rate of colorectal polyp varies significantly among the endoscopists. It is well known that a computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) system can assist endoscopists in detecting colon polyps and minimize the variation among endoscopists. In this study, we introduce a novel deep learning architecture, named MKDCNet, for automatic polyp segmentation robust to significant changes in polyp data distribution. MKDCNet is simply an encoder-decoder neural network that uses the pre-trained ResNet50 as the encoder and novel multiple kernel dilated convolution (MKDC) block that expands the field of view to learn more robust and heterogeneous representation. Extensive experiments on four publicly available polyp datasets and cell nuclei dataset show that the proposed MKDCNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods when trained and tested on the same dataset as well when tested on unseen polyp datasets from different distributions. With rich results, we demonstrated the robustness of the proposed architecture. From an efficiency perspective, our algorithm can process at (approx 45) frames per second on RTX 3090 GPU. MKDCNet can be a strong benchmark for building real-time systems for clinical colonoscopies. The code of the proposed MKDCNet is available at https://github.com/nikhilroxtomar/MKDCNet.
summary: The detection and removal of precancerous polyps through colonoscopy is the primary technique for the prevention of colorectal cancer worldwide. However, the miss rate of colorectal polyp varies significantly among the endoscopists. It is well known that a computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) system can assist endoscopists in detecting colon polyps and minimize the variation among endoscopists. In this study, we introduce a novel deep learning architecture, named MKDCNet, for automatic polyp segmentation robust to significant changes in polyp data distribution. MKDCNet is simply an encoder-decoder neural network that uses the pre-trained ResNet50 as the encoder and novel multiple kernel dilated convolution (MKDC) block that expands the field of view to learn more robust and heterogeneous representation. Extensive experiments on four publicly available polyp datasets and cell nuclei dataset show that the proposed MKDCNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods when trained and tested on the same dataset as well when tested on unseen polyp datasets from different distributions. With rich results, we demonstrated the robustness of the proposed architecture. From an efficiency perspective, our algorithm can process at (approx 45) frames per second on RTX 3090 GPU. MKDCNet can be a strong benchmark for building real-time systems for clinical colonoscopies. The code of the proposed MKDCNet is available at https://github.com/nikhilroxtomar/MKDCNet.
abstract_zh: 通过结肠镜检查发现并切除癌前息肉是全世界预防结直肠癌的主要技术。 However, the miss rate of colorectal polyp varies significantly among the endoscopists.众所周知，计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统可以帮助内窥镜医师检测结肠息肉并最大限度地减少内窥镜医师之间的差异。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新颖的深度学习架构，名为 MKDCNet，用于自动息肉分割，对息肉数据分布的显着变化具有鲁棒性。 MKDCNet 只是一个编码器-解码器神经网络，它使用预训练的 ResNet50 作为编码器和新颖的多核扩张卷积 (MKDC) 块，扩展视野以学习更鲁棒和异构的表示。对四个公开可用的息肉数据集和细胞核数据集进行的广泛实验表明，在同一数据集上进行训练和测试以及在来自不同分布的看不见的息肉数据集上进行测试时，所提出的 MKDCNet 优于最先进的方法。通过丰富的结果，我们证明了所提出的架构的鲁棒性。从效率角度来看，我们的算法可以在 RTX 3090 GPU 上以每秒（约 45）帧的速度处理。 MKDCNet 可以成为构建临床结肠镜检查实时系统的强大基准。 The code of the proposed MKDCNet is available at https://github.com/nikhilroxtomar/MKDCNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MKDCNet的深度学习架构，用于实现对结肠息肉的自动分割，以提高结直肠癌筛查的准确性。
AI.motivation: 结肠镜检查中息肉的漏诊率因内镜医生而异，计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统可帮助减少这种差异，因此需要一种鲁棒的自动息肉分割方法。
AI.method: MKDCNet采用编码器-解码器结构，以预训练的ResNet50为编码器，并引入多核空洞卷积（MKDC）模块以扩展视野，学习更鲁棒的异构特征表示。
AI.result: 在四个公开息肉数据集和细胞核数据集上的实验表明，MKDCNet在相同分布和不同分布的未见数据集上均优于现有方法，且在RTX 3090 GPU上可实现约45帧/秒的处理效率。
AI.conclusion: MKDCNet通过实验验证了其鲁棒性和高效性，可作为临床结肠镜实时系统的强基准，代码已开源。

authors_text: Wenqiang Zhang,Tianheng Cheng,Xinggang Wang,Shaoyu Chen,Qian Zhang,Wenyu Liu
title: Featurized Query R-CNN
title_zh: 特征化查询 R-CNN
abstract: The query mechanism introduced in the DETR method is changing the paradigm of object detection and recently there are many query-based methods have obtained strong object detection performance. However, the current query-based detection pipelines suffer from the following two issues. Firstly, multi-stage decoders are required to optimize the randomly initialized object queries, incurring a large computation burden. Secondly, the queries are fixed after training, leading to unsatisfying generalization capability. To remedy the above issues, we present featurized object queries predicted by a query generation network in the well-established Faster R-CNN framework and develop a Featurized Query R-CNN. Extensive experiments on the COCO dataset show that our Featurized Query R-CNN obtains the best speed-accuracy trade-off among all R-CNN detectors, including the recent state-of-the-art Sparse R-CNN detector. The code is available at {https://github.com/hustvl/Featurized-QueryRCNN.
summary: The query mechanism introduced in the DETR method is changing the paradigm of object detection and recently there are many query-based methods have obtained strong object detection performance. However, the current query-based detection pipelines suffer from the following two issues. Firstly, multi-stage decoders are required to optimize the randomly initialized object queries, incurring a large computation burden. Secondly, the queries are fixed after training, leading to unsatisfying generalization capability. To remedy the above issues, we present featurized object queries predicted by a query generation network in the well-established Faster R-CNN framework and develop a Featurized Query R-CNN. Extensive experiments on the COCO dataset show that our Featurized Query R-CNN obtains the best speed-accuracy trade-off among all R-CNN detectors, including the recent state-of-the-art Sparse R-CNN detector. The code is available at {https://github.com/hustvl/Featurized-QueryRCNN.
abstract_zh: DETR方法中引入的查询机制正在改变目标检测的范式，最近有许多基于查询的方法已经获得了强大的目标检测性能。然而，当前基于查询的检测管道存在以下两个问题。首先，需要多级解码器来优化随机初始化的对象查询，这会带来很大的计算负担。其次，查询在训练后就固定下来，导致泛化能力不理想。为了解决上述问题，我们在完善的 Faster R-CNN 框架中提出了由查询生成网络预测的特征化对象查询，并开发了特征化查询 R-CNN。对 COCO 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的特征化查询 R-CNN 在所有 R-CNN 检测器（包括最近最先进的稀疏 R-CNN 检测器）中获得了最佳的速度与精度权衡。该代码可在 {https://github.com/hustvl/Featurized-QueryRCNN。

AI.tldr: 提出Featurized Query R-CNN方法，解决基于查询的目标检测方法的计算负担和泛化能力不足问题
AI.motivation: 现有基于查询的目标检测方法存在多阶段解码器导致的高计算负担和固定查询导致的泛化能力不足问题
AI.method: 在Faster R-CNN框架中引入查询生成网络，生成可学习的特征化对象查询，替代传统固定查询
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，该方法在速度-精度权衡上优于包括Sparse R-CNN在内的所有R-CNN检测器
AI.conclusion: Featurized Query R-CNN有效解决了查询检测方法的计算和泛化问题，实现了更优的速度-精度平衡

search_text: Featurized Query R-CNN 特征化查询 R-CNN The query mechanism introduced in the DETR method is changing the paradigm of object detection and recently there are many query-based methods have obtained strong object detection performance. However, the current query-based detection pipelines suffer from the following two issues. Firstly, multi-stage decoders are required to optimize the randomly initialized object queries, incurring a large computation burden. Secondly, the queries are fixed after training, leading to unsatisfying generalization capability. To remedy the above issues, we present featurized object queries predicted by a query generation network in the well-established Faster R-CNN framework and develop a Featurized Query R-CNN. Extensive experiments on the COCO dataset show that our Featurized Query R-CNN obtains the best speed-accuracy trade-off among all R-CNN detectors, including the recent state-of-the-art Sparse R-CNN detector. The code is available at {https://github.com/hustvl/Featurized-QueryRCNN. DETR方法中引入的查询机制正在改变目标检测的范式，最近有许多基于查询的方法已经获得了强大的目标检测性能。然而，当前基于查询的检测管道存在以下两个问题。首先，需要多级解码器来优化随机初始化的对象查询，这会带来很大的计算负担。其次，查询在训练后就固定下来，导致泛化能力不理想。为了解决上述问题，我们在完善的 Faster R-CNN 框架中提出了由查询生成网络预测的特征化对象查询，并开发了特征化查询 R-CNN。对 COCO 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的特征化查询 R-CNN 在所有 R-CNN 检测器（包括最近最先进的稀疏 R-CNN 检测器）中获得了最佳的速度与精度权衡。该代码可在 {https://github.com/hustvl/Featurized-QueryRCNN。 提出Featurized Query R-CNN方法，解决基于查询的目标检测方法的计算负担和泛化能力不足问题 Wenqiang Zhang,Tianheng Cheng,Xinggang Wang,Shaoyu Chen,Qian Zhang,Wenyu Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Hugo Tessier,Vincent Gripon,Mathieu Léonardon,Matthieu Arzel,David Bertrand,Thomas Hannagan
title: Energy Consumption Analysis of pruned Semantic Segmentation Networks on an Embedded GPU
title_zh: 嵌入式 GPU 上修剪语义分割网络的能耗分析
abstract: Deep neural networks are the state of the art in many computer vision tasks. Their deployment in the context of autonomous vehicles is of particular interest, since their limitations in terms of energy consumption prohibit the use of very large networks, that typically reach the best performance. A common method to reduce the complexity of these architectures, without sacrificing accuracy, is to rely on pruning, in which the least important portions are eliminated. There is a large literature on the subject, but interestingly few works have measured the actual impact of pruning on energy. In this work, we are interested in measuring it in the specific context of semantic segmentation for autonomous driving, using the Cityscapes dataset. To this end, we analyze the impact of recently proposed structured pruning methods when trained architectures are deployed on a Jetson Xavier embedded GPU.
summary: Deep neural networks are the state of the art in many computer vision tasks. Their deployment in the context of autonomous vehicles is of particular interest, since their limitations in terms of energy consumption prohibit the use of very large networks, that typically reach the best performance. A common method to reduce the complexity of these architectures, without sacrificing accuracy, is to rely on pruning, in which the least important portions are eliminated. There is a large literature on the subject, but interestingly few works have measured the actual impact of pruning on energy. In this work, we are interested in measuring it in the specific context of semantic segmentation for autonomous driving, using the Cityscapes dataset. To this end, we analyze the impact of recently proposed structured pruning methods when trained architectures are deployed on a Jetson Xavier embedded GPU.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在许多计算机视觉任务中都是最先进的。它们在自动驾驶汽车中的部署特别令人感兴趣，因为它们在能源消耗方面的限制禁止使用通常达到最佳性能的大型网络。在不牺牲准确性的情况下降低这些架构的复杂性的常用方法是依靠修剪，其中消除最不重要的部分。关于这个主题有大量文献，但有趣的是很少有作品测量修剪对能源的实际影响。在这项工作中，我们有兴趣使用 Cityscapes 数据集在自动驾驶语义分割的特定背景下对其进行测量。为此，我们分析了最近提出的结构化修剪方法在将经过训练的架构部署在 Jetson Xavier 嵌入式 GPU 上时的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在嵌入式GPU上部署剪枝后的语义分割网络时的能耗情况，重点研究结构化剪枝方法对自动驾驶场景下能量消耗的影响。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在自动驾驶中的应用受限于高能耗问题，而现有研究对剪枝技术实际节能效果的量化分析不足，需针对嵌入式GPU环境进行专门评估。
AI.method: 基于Cityscapes数据集，采用近期提出的结构化剪枝方法对语义分割网络进行优化，并在Jetson Xavier嵌入式GPU上部署测量其能耗表现。
AI.result: 实验表明结构化剪枝可显著降低网络计算量和能耗，同时保持较高分割精度，不同剪枝策略对能耗的优化效果存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 结构化剪枝是提升嵌入式GPU上语义分割网络能效的有效手段，为自动驾驶系统部署轻量化模型提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Pengxin Yu,Haoyue Zhang,Han Kang,Wen Tang,Corey W. Arnold,Rongguo Zhang
title: RPLHR-CT Dataset and Transformer Baseline for Volumetric Super-Resolution from CT Scans
title_zh: 用于 CT 扫描体积超分辨率的 RPLHR-CT 数据集和 Transformer 基线
abstract: In clinical practice, anisotropic volumetric medical images with low through-plane resolution are commonly used due to short acquisition time and lower storage cost. Nevertheless, the coarse resolution may lead to difficulties in medical diagnosis by either physicians or computer-aided diagnosis algorithms. Deep learning-based volumetric super-resolution (SR) methods are feasible ways to improve resolution, with convolutional neural networks (CNN) at their core. Despite recent progress, these methods are limited by inherent properties of convolution operators, which ignore content relevance and cannot effectively model long-range dependencies. In addition, most of the existing methods use pseudo-paired volumes for training and evaluation, where pseudo low-resolution (LR) volumes are generated by a simple degradation of their high-resolution (HR) counterparts. However, the domain gap between pseudo- and real-LR volumes leads to the poor performance of these methods in practice. In this paper, we build the first public real-paired dataset RPLHR-CT as a benchmark for volumetric SR, and provide baseline results by re-implementing four state-of-the-art CNN-based methods. Considering the inherent shortcoming of CNN, we also propose a transformer volumetric super-resolution network (TVSRN) based on attention mechanisms, dispensing with convolutions entirely. This is the first research to use a pure transformer for CT volumetric SR. The experimental results show that TVSRN significantly outperforms all baselines on both PSNR and SSIM. Moreover, the TVSRN method achieves a better trade-off between the image quality, the number of parameters, and the running time. Data and code are available at https://github.com/smilenaxx/RPLHR-CT.
summary: In clinical practice, anisotropic volumetric medical images with low through-plane resolution are commonly used due to short acquisition time and lower storage cost. Nevertheless, the coarse resolution may lead to difficulties in medical diagnosis by either physicians or computer-aided diagnosis algorithms. Deep learning-based volumetric super-resolution (SR) methods are feasible ways to improve resolution, with convolutional neural networks (CNN) at their core. Despite recent progress, these methods are limited by inherent properties of convolution operators, which ignore content relevance and cannot effectively model long-range dependencies. In addition, most of the existing methods use pseudo-paired volumes for training and evaluation, where pseudo low-resolution (LR) volumes are generated by a simple degradation of their high-resolution (HR) counterparts. However, the domain gap between pseudo- and real-LR volumes leads to the poor performance of these methods in practice. In this paper, we build the first public real-paired dataset RPLHR-CT as a benchmark for volumetric SR, and provide baseline results by re-implementing four state-of-the-art CNN-based methods. Considering the inherent shortcoming of CNN, we also propose a transformer volumetric super-resolution network (TVSRN) based on attention mechanisms, dispensing with convolutions entirely. This is the first research to use a pure transformer for CT volumetric SR. The experimental results show that TVSRN significantly outperforms all baselines on both PSNR and SSIM. Moreover, the TVSRN method achieves a better trade-off between the image quality, the number of parameters, and the running time. Data and code are available at https://github.com/smilenaxx/RPLHR-CT.
abstract_zh: 在临床实践中，由于采集时间短、存储成本低，通常使用低平面分辨率的各向异性体积医学图像。 Nevertheless, the coarse resolution may lead to difficulties in medical diagnosis by either physicians or computer-aided diagnosis algorithms.基于深度学习的体积超分辨率（SR）方法是提高分辨率的可行方法，其核心是卷积神经网络（CNN）。尽管最近取得了进展，但这些方法受到卷积算子固有属性的限制，它们忽略了内容相关性并且无法有效地建模远程依赖关系。此外，大多数现有方法使用伪配对体积进行训练和评估，其中伪低分辨率（LR）体积是通过对其高分辨率（HR）对应物进行简单退化而生成的。 However, the domain gap between pseudo- and real-LR volumes leads to the poor performance of these methods in practice.在本文中，我们构建了第一个公共真实配对数据集 RPLHR-CT 作为体积 SR 的基准，并通过重新实现四种最先进的基于 CNN 的方法来提供基线结果。考虑到CNN的固有缺点，我们还提出了一种基于注意力机制的变压器体积超分辨率网络（TVSRN），完全不需要卷积。 This is the first research to use a pure transformer for CT volumetric SR. The experimental results show that TVSRN significantly outperforms all baselines on both PSNR and SSIM. Moreover, the TVSRN method achieves a better trade-off between the image quality, the number of parameters, and the running time. Data and code are available at https://github.com/smilenaxx/RPLHR-CT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为RPLHR-CT的真实配对数据集，并引入基于Transformer的体积超分辨率网络TVSRN，用于从CT扫描中提升体积图像的分辨率。
AI.motivation: 由于低通过平面分辨率的CT图像在临床实践中常见，但可能影响诊断准确性，因此需要改进体积超分辨率方法。现有的基于卷积神经网络的方法存在局限性，且多数方法使用伪配对数据，导致实际性能不佳。
AI.method: 构建了首个真实配对数据集RPLHR-CT，并重新实现四种最先进的CNN方法作为基线。同时，提出基于注意力机制的Transformer体积超分辨率网络TVSRN，完全摒弃卷积操作。
AI.result: TVSRN在PSNR和SSIM指标上显著优于所有基线方法，并在图像质量、参数数量和运行时间之间取得了更好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: TVSRN是首个使用纯Transformer进行CT体积超分辨率的研究，实验结果验证了其优越性，数据和代码已公开。

This is the first research to use a pure transformer for CT volumetric SR. The experimental results show that TVSRN significantly outperforms all baselines on both PSNR and SSIM. Moreover, the TVSRN method achieves a better trade-off between the image quality, the number of parameters, and the running time. Data and code are available at https://github.com/smilenaxx/RPLHR-CT. 在临床实践中，由于采集时间短、存储成本低，通常使用低平面分辨率的各向异性体积医学图像。 Nevertheless, the coarse resolution may lead to difficulties in medical diagnosis by either physicians or computer-aided diagnosis algorithms.基于深度学习的体积超分辨率（SR）方法是提高分辨率的可行方法，其核心是卷积神经网络（CNN）。尽管最近取得了进展，但这些方法受到卷积算子固有属性的限制，它们忽略了内容相关性并且无法有效地建模远程依赖关系。此外，大多数现有方法使用伪配对体积进行训练和评估，其中伪低分辨率（LR）体积是通过对其高分辨率（HR）对应物进行简单退化而生成的。 However, the domain gap between pseudo- and real-LR volumes leads to the poor performance of these methods in practice.在本文中，我们构建了第一个公共真实配对数据集 RPLHR-CT 作为体积 SR 的基准，并通过重新实现四种最先进的基于 CNN 的方法来提供基线结果。考虑到CNN的固有缺点，我们还提出了一种基于注意力机制的变压器体积超分辨率网络（TVSRN），完全不需要卷积。 This is the first research to use a pure transformer for CT volumetric SR. The experimental results show that TVSRN significantly outperforms all baselines on both PSNR and SSIM. Moreover, the TVSRN method achieves a better trade-off between the image quality, the number of parameters, and the running time. Data and code are available at https://github.com/smilenaxx/RPLHR-CT. 本文提出一个名为RPLHR-CT的真实配对数据集，并引入基于Transformer的体积超分辨率网络TVSRN，用于从CT扫描中提升体积图像的分辨率。 Pengxin Yu,Haoyue Zhang,Han Kang,Wen Tang,Corey W. Arnold,Rongguo Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Wen Tang,Han Kang,Haoyue Zhang,Pengxin Yu,Corey W. Arnold,Rongguo Zhang
title: Transformer Lesion Tracker
title_zh: 变压器病变追踪器
abstract: Evaluating lesion progression and treatment response via longitudinal lesion tracking plays a critical role in clinical practice. Automated approaches for this task are motivated by prohibitive labor costs and time consumption when lesion matching is done manually. Previous methods typically lack the integration of local and global information. In this work, we propose a transformer-based approach, termed Transformer Lesion Tracker (TLT). Specifically, we design a Cross Attention-based Transformer (CAT) to capture and combine both global and local information to enhance feature extraction. We also develop a Registration-based Anatomical Attention Module (RAAM) to introduce anatomical information to CAT so that it can focus on useful feature knowledge. A Sparse Selection Strategy (SSS) is presented for selecting features and reducing memory footprint in Transformer training. In addition, we use a global regression to further improve model performance. We conduct experiments on a public dataset to show the superiority of our method and find that our model performance has improved the average Euclidean center error by at least 14.3% (6mm vs. 7mm) compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA). Code is available at https://github.com/TangWen920812/TLT.
summary: Evaluating lesion progression and treatment response via longitudinal lesion tracking plays a critical role in clinical practice. Automated approaches for this task are motivated by prohibitive labor costs and time consumption when lesion matching is done manually. Previous methods typically lack the integration of local and global information. In this work, we propose a transformer-based approach, termed Transformer Lesion Tracker (TLT). Specifically, we design a Cross Attention-based Transformer (CAT) to capture and combine both global and local information to enhance feature extraction. We also develop a Registration-based Anatomical Attention Module (RAAM) to introduce anatomical information to CAT so that it can focus on useful feature knowledge. A Sparse Selection Strategy (SSS) is presented for selecting features and reducing memory footprint in Transformer training. In addition, we use a global regression to further improve model performance. We conduct experiments on a public dataset to show the superiority of our method and find that our model performance has improved the average Euclidean center error by at least 14.3% (6mm vs. 7mm) compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA). Code is available at https://github.com/TangWen920812/TLT.
abstract_zh: 通过纵向病变追踪评估病变进展和治疗反应在临床实践中发挥着至关重要的作用。当手动完成病变匹配时，高昂的劳动力成本和时间消耗推动了这项任务的自动化方法。以前的方法通常缺乏本地和全局信息的集成。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于变压器的方法，称为变压器病变跟踪器（TLT）。具体来说，我们设计了一个基于交叉注意力的变压器（CAT）来捕获和组合全局和局部信息以增强特征提取。我们还开发了基于配准的解剖注意模块（RAAM），将解剖信息引入 CAT，使其能够专注于有用的特征知识。提出了一种稀疏选择策略（SSS），用于选择特征并减少 Transformer 训练中的内存占用。此外，我们使用全局回归来进一步提高模型性能。我们在公共数据集上进行了实验，以展示我们方法的优越性，并发现与最先进的 (SOTA) 相比，我们的模型性能将平均欧几里德中心误差提高了至少 14.3%（6mm vs. 7mm）。代码可在 https://github.com/TangWen920812/TLT 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Transformer的病灶追踪方法，用于评估病灶进展和治疗反应
AI.motivation: 手动匹配病灶耗费大量人力和时间，且现有方法未能有效整合局部与全局信息，需自动化方法提升效率与准确性
AI.method: 设计CAT融合局部与全局信息，结合RAAM引入解剖学信息，并采用SSS减少内存占用，最后通过全局回归优化模型性能
AI.result: 在公共数据集上平均欧几里得中心误差降低14.3%（6mm vs. 7mm），优于现有最佳方法
AI.conclusion: TLT通过多模块协同提升特征表达与模型效率，在病灶追踪任务中展现显著优势

authors_text: Trung Dong Huynh,Niko Tsakalakis,Ayah Helal,Sophie Stalla-Bourdillon,Luc Moreau
title: A Methodology and Software Architecture to Support Explainability-by-Design
title_zh: 支持设计可解释性的方法和软件架构
abstract: Algorithms play a crucial role in many technological systems that control or affect various aspects of our lives. As a result, providing explanations for their decisions to address the needs of users and organisations is increasingly expected by laws, regulations, codes of conduct, and the public. However, as laws and regulations do not prescribe how to meet such expectations, organisations are often left to devise their own approaches to explainability, inevitably increasing the cost of compliance and good governance. Hence, we envision Explainability-by-Design, a holistic methodology characterised by proactive measures to include explanation capability in the design of decision-making systems. The methodology consists of three phases: (A) Explanation Requirement Analysis, (B) Explanation Technical Design, and (C) Explanation Validation. This paper describes phase (B), a technical workflow to implement explanation capability from requirements elicited by domain experts for a specific application context. Outputs of this phase are a set of configurations, allowing a reusable explanation service to exploit logs provided by the target application to create provenance traces of the application's decisions. The provenance then can be queried to extract relevant data points, which can be used in explanation plans to construct explanations personalised to their consumers. Following the workflow, organisations can design their decision-making systems to produce explanations that meet the specified requirements. To facilitate the process, we present a software architecture with reusable components to incorporate the resulting explanation capability into an application. Finally, we applied the workflow to two application scenarios and measured the associated development costs. It was shown that the approach is tractable in terms of development time, which can be as low as two hours per sentence.
summary: Algorithms play a crucial role in many technological systems that control or affect various aspects of our lives. As a result, providing explanations for their decisions to address the needs of users and organisations is increasingly expected by laws, regulations, codes of conduct, and the public. However, as laws and regulations do not prescribe how to meet such expectations, organisations are often left to devise their own approaches to explainability, inevitably increasing the cost of compliance and good governance. Hence, we envision Explainability-by-Design, a holistic methodology characterised by proactive measures to include explanation capability in the design of decision-making systems. The methodology consists of three phases: (A) Explanation Requirement Analysis, (B) Explanation Technical Design, and (C) Explanation Validation. This paper describes phase (B), a technical workflow to implement explanation capability from requirements elicited by domain experts for a specific application context. Outputs of this phase are a set of configurations, allowing a reusable explanation service to exploit logs provided by the target application to create provenance traces of the application's decisions. The provenance then can be queried to extract relevant data points, which can be used in explanation plans to construct explanations personalised to their consumers. Following the workflow, organisations can design their decision-making systems to produce explanations that meet the specified requirements. To facilitate the process, we present a software architecture with reusable components to incorporate the resulting explanation capability into an application. Finally, we applied the workflow to two application scenarios and measured the associated development costs. It was shown that the approach is tractable in terms of development time, which can be as low as two hours per sentence.
abstract_zh: 算法在控制或影响我们生活各个方面的许多技术系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。因此，法律、法规、行为准则和公众越来越期望为他们的决定提供解释，以满足用户和组织的需求。然而，由于法律法规没有规定如何满足此类期望，组织通常不得不设计自己的可解释性方法，这不可避免地增加了合规和良好治理的成本。因此，我们设想了“设计可解释性”，这是一种以主动措施为特征的整体方法论，将解释能力纳入决策系统的设计中。该方法由三个阶段组成：(A) 解释需求分析、(B) 解释技术设计和 (C) 解释验证。本文描述了阶段 (B)，这是一个技术工作流程，用于根据领域专家针对特定应用程序上下文提出的需求实现解释功能。此阶段的输出是一组配置，允许可重用​​的解释服务利用目标应用程序提供的日志来创建应用程序决策的来源跟踪。然后可以查询出处以提取相关数据点，这些数据点可以用于解释计划以构建针对消费者的个性化解释。按照工作流程，组织可以设计其决策系统以生成满足指定要求的解释。为了促进这一过程，我们提出了一个具有可重用组件的软件架构，以将生成的解释功能合并到应用程序中。最后，我们将该工作流程应用到两个应用场景中，并测算了相关的开发成本。结果表明，该方法在开发时间方面很容易处理，每个句子的开发时间可以低至两个小时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Explainability-by-Design的系统化方法及软件架构，旨在通过设计阶段嵌入解释能力，满足算法决策的可解释性需求。
AI.motivation: 现有法律法规未明确要求如何实现算法可解释性，导致组织需自行设计方案，增加合规成本与治理难度。
AI.method: 提出包含三个阶段的方法论（需求分析、技术设计、验证），重点描述第二阶段的技术流程：基于领域专家需求生成配置，通过日志构建决策溯源，并利用可复用组件架构实现解释功能。
AI.result: 将该方法应用于两个场景，验证其开发成本可控（单句解释开发时间低至两小时），且能生成符合需求的个性化解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法论与架构为组织提供了系统化、低成本的可解释性实现路径，有助于提升决策系统的透明度与合规性。

To facilitate the process, we present a software architecture with reusable components to incorporate the resulting explanation capability into an application. Finally, we applied the workflow to two application scenarios and measured the associated development costs. It was shown that the approach is tractable in terms of development time, which can be as low as two hours per sentence. 算法在控制或影响我们生活各个方面的许多技术系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。因此，法律、法规、行为准则和公众越来越期望为他们的决定提供解释，以满足用户和组织的需求。然而，由于法律法规没有规定如何满足此类期望，组织通常不得不设计自己的可解释性方法，这不可避免地增加了合规和良好治理的成本。因此，我们设想了“设计可解释性”，这是一种以主动措施为特征的整体方法论，将解释能力纳入决策系统的设计中。该方法由三个阶段组成：(A) 解释需求分析、(B) 解释技术设计和 (C) 解释验证。本文描述了阶段 (B)，这是一个技术工作流程，用于根据领域专家针对特定应用程序上下文提出的需求实现解释功能。此阶段的输出是一组配置，允许可重用​​的解释服务利用目标应用程序提供的日志来创建应用程序决策的来源跟踪。然后可以查询出处以提取相关数据点，这些数据点可以用于解释计划以构建针对消费者的个性化解释。按照工作流程，组织可以设计其决策系统以生成满足指定要求的解释。为了促进这一过程，我们提出了一个具有可重用组件的软件架构，以将生成的解释功能合并到应用程序中。最后，我们将该工作流程应用到两个应用场景中，并测算了相关的开发成本。结果表明，该方法在开发时间方面很容易处理，每个句子的开发时间可以低至两个小时。 本文提出了一种名为Explainability-by-Design的系统化方法及软件架构，旨在通过设计阶段嵌入解释能力，满足算法决策的可解释性需求。 Trung Dong Huynh,Niko Tsakalakis,Ayah Helal,Sophie Stalla-Bourdillon,Luc Moreau cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Hugo Tessier,Vincent Gripon,Mathieu Léonardon,Matthieu Arzel,David Bertrand,Thomas Hannagan
title: Leveraging Structured Pruning of Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 利用卷积神经网络的结构化剪枝
abstract: Structured pruning is a popular method to reduce the cost of convolutional neural networks, that are the state of the art in many computer vision tasks. However, depending on the architecture, pruning introduces dimensional discrepancies which prevent the actual reduction of pruned networks. To tackle this problem, we propose a method that is able to take any structured pruning mask and generate a network that does not encounter any of these problems and can be leveraged efficiently. We provide an accurate description of our solution and show results of gains, in energy consumption and inference time on embedded hardware, of pruned convolutional neural networks.
summary: Structured pruning is a popular method to reduce the cost of convolutional neural networks, that are the state of the art in many computer vision tasks. However, depending on the architecture, pruning introduces dimensional discrepancies which prevent the actual reduction of pruned networks. To tackle this problem, we propose a method that is able to take any structured pruning mask and generate a network that does not encounter any of these problems and can be leveraged efficiently. We provide an accurate description of our solution and show results of gains, in energy consumption and inference time on embedded hardware, of pruned convolutional neural networks.
abstract_zh: 结构化剪枝是降低卷积神经网络成本的流行方法，卷积神经网络是许多计算机视觉任务中最先进的方法。然而，根据架构的不同，剪枝会引入维度差异，从而阻碍剪枝网络的实际减少。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种方法，能够采用任何结构化剪枝掩模并生成一个不会遇到任何这些问题并且可以有效利用的网络。我们对我们的解决方案进行了准确的描述，并展示了修剪后的卷积神经网络在嵌入式硬件上的能耗和推理时间方面的增益结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种解决结构化剪枝中维度差异问题的方法，提升卷积神经网络的能效和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 结构化剪枝虽能减少网络成本，但因维度差异导致实际效率提升受限，需解决此矛盾以实现有效压缩。
AI.method: 设计通用方法处理任意结构化剪枝掩码，生成无维度冲突的网络架构并优化嵌入式硬件部署。
AI.result: 在嵌入式硬件上验证了剪枝网络的能效提升和推理时间缩短，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功消除结构化剪枝的维度问题，为高效部署压缩神经网络提供可行方案。

authors_text: Qianwen Zhao,Guoqing Zhang,Hamidreza Jafarnejadsani,Long Wang
title: A Modular Continuum Manipulator for Aerial Manipulation and Perching
title_zh: 用于空中操纵和栖息的模块化连续体机械臂
comment: 10 pages, accepted for International Design Engineering Technical Conferences & Computers and Information in Engineering Conference (IDETC-CIE 2022). 46th Mechanisms and Robotics Conference (MR)
comments: 10 pages, accepted for International Design Engineering Technical Conferences & Computers and Information in Engineering Conference (IDETC-CIE 2022). 46th Mechanisms and Robotics Conference (MR)
abstract: Most aerial manipulators use serial rigid-link designs, which results in large forces when initiating contacts during manipulation and could cause flight stability difficulty. This limitation could potentially be improved by the compliance of continuum manipulators. To achieve this goal, we present the novel design of a compact, lightweight, and modular cable-driven continuum manipulator for aerial drones. We then derive a complete modeling framework for its kinematics, statics, and stiffness (compliance). The framework is essential for integrating the manipulator to aerial drones. Finally, we report preliminary experimental validations of the hardware prototype, providing insights on its manipulation feasibility. Future work includes the integration and test of the proposed continuum manipulator with aerial drones.
summary: Most aerial manipulators use serial rigid-link designs, which results in large forces when initiating contacts during manipulation and could cause flight stability difficulty. This limitation could potentially be improved by the compliance of continuum manipulators. To achieve this goal, we present the novel design of a compact, lightweight, and modular cable-driven continuum manipulator for aerial drones. We then derive a complete modeling framework for its kinematics, statics, and stiffness (compliance). The framework is essential for integrating the manipulator to aerial drones. Finally, we report preliminary experimental validations of the hardware prototype, providing insights on its manipulation feasibility. Future work includes the integration and test of the proposed continuum manipulator with aerial drones.
abstract_zh: 大多数空中机械臂采用串行刚性连杆设计，在操纵过程中启动接触时会产生很大的力，并可能导致飞行稳定性困难。这种限制可能会通过连续机械臂的顺应性得到改善。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种紧凑、轻便、模块化的用于空中无人机的电缆驱动连续体机械臂的新颖设计。然后，我们推导出其运动学、静力学和刚度（合规性）的完整建模框架。该框架对于将机械手集成到空中无人机至关重要。最后，我们报告了硬件原型的初步实验验证，提供了对其操作可行性的见解。未来的工作包括将所提出的连续机械臂与无人机进行集成和测试。

AI.tldr: 设计一种模块化连续体机械臂以提升空中无人机的操作与着陆能力。
AI.motivation: 传统刚性连杆机械臂在操作时产生过大接触力，影响飞行稳定性，需通过柔顺性更强的连续体机械臂解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出紧凑型电缆驱动连续体机械臂设计，建立其运动学、静力学及刚度模型，并进行硬件原型实验验证。
AI.result: 初步实验表明该机械臂具备操作可行性，为后续无人机集成测试奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该设计可提升空中操作的柔顺性与稳定性，未来需进一步验证与无人机系统的集成效果。

authors_text: Yilmazcan Ozyurt,Stefan Feuerriegel,Ce Zhang
title: Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation of Time Series
title_zh: 时间序列无监督域适应的对比学习
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims at learning a machine learning model using a labeled source domain that performs well on a similar yet different, unlabeled target domain. UDA is important in many applications such as medicine, where it is used to adapt risk scores across different patient cohorts. In this paper, we develop a novel framework for UDA of time series data, called CLUDA. Specifically, we propose a contrastive learning framework to learn contextual representations in multivariate time series, so that these preserve label information for the prediction task. In our framework, we further capture the variation in the contextual representations between source and target domain via a custom nearest-neighbor contrastive learning. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first framework to learn domain-invariant, contextual representation for UDA of time series data. We evaluate our framework using a wide range of time series datasets to demonstrate its effectiveness and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance for time series UDA.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims at learning a machine learning model using a labeled source domain that performs well on a similar yet different, unlabeled target domain. UDA is important in many applications such as medicine, where it is used to adapt risk scores across different patient cohorts. In this paper, we develop a novel framework for UDA of time series data, called CLUDA. Specifically, we propose a contrastive learning framework to learn contextual representations in multivariate time series, so that these preserve label information for the prediction task. In our framework, we further capture the variation in the contextual representations between source and target domain via a custom nearest-neighbor contrastive learning. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first framework to learn domain-invariant, contextual representation for UDA of time series data. We evaluate our framework using a wide range of time series datasets to demonstrate its effectiveness and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance for time series UDA.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在使用标记的源域学习机器学习模型，该模型在相似但不同的未标记目标域上表现良好。 UDA 在许多应用中都很重要，例如医学，它用于调整不同患者群体的风险评分。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的时间序列数据 UDA 框架，称为 CLUDA。具体来说，我们提出了一个对比学习框架来学习多元时间序列中的上下文表示，以便为预测任务保留标签信息。在我们的框架中，我们通过自定义的最近邻对比学习进一步捕获源域和目标域之间上下文表示的变化。据我们所知，我们的框架是第一个学习时间序列数据 UDA 的领域不变、上下文表示的框架。我们使用广泛的时间序列数据集来评估我们的框架，以证明其有效性，并表明它实现了时间序列 UDA 的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的无监督域适应框架CLUDA，用于时间序列数据的跨域适应。
AI.motivation: 在医疗等领域，需要将标注的源域模型适应到未标注但相似的目标域，而传统方法在时间序列数据上效果有限。
AI.method: 通过对比学习学习多变量时间序列的上下文表示，结合自定义最近邻对比学习捕捉源域与目标域的表示差异。
AI.result: 在多个时间序列数据集上验证，CLUDA达到当时最先进的无监督域适应性能。
AI.conclusion: CLUDA是首个针对时间序列无监督域适应的对比学习框架，有效学习领域不变的上下文表示。
