search_text: Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation of Time Series 时间序列无监督域适应的对比学习 Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims at learning a machine learning model using a labeled source domain that performs well on a similar yet different, unlabeled target domain. UDA is important in many applications such as medicine, where it is used to adapt risk scores across different patient cohorts. In this paper, we develop a novel framework for UDA of time series data, called CLUDA. Specifically, we propose a contrastive learning framework to learn contextual representations in multivariate time series, so that these preserve label information for the prediction task. In our framework, we further capture the variation in the contextual representations between source and target domain via a custom nearest-neighbor contrastive learning. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first framework to learn domain-invariant, contextual representation for UDA of time series data. We evaluate our framework using a wide range of time series datasets to demonstrate its effectiveness and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance for time series UDA. 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在使用标记的源域学习机器学习模型，该模型在相似但不同的未标记目标域上表现良好。 UDA 在许多应用中都很重要，例如医学，它用于调整不同患者群体的风险评分。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的时间序列数据 UDA 框架，称为 CLUDA。具体来说，我们提出了一个对比学习框架来学习多元时间序列中的上下文表示，以便为预测任务保留标签信息。在我们的框架中，我们通过自定义的最近邻对比学习进一步捕获源域和目标域之间上下文表示的变化。据我们所知，我们的框架是第一个学习时间序列数据 UDA 的领域不变、上下文表示的框架。我们使用广泛的时间序列数据集来评估我们的框架，以证明其有效性，并表明它实现了时间序列 UDA 的最先进性能。 本文提出了一种基于对比学习的无监督域适应框架CLUDA，用于时间序列数据的跨域适应。 Yilmazcan Ozyurt,Stefan Feuerriegel,Ce Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Amir Molaei,Amir G. Aghdam,Javad Dargahi
title: A Versatile Pseudo-Rigid Body Modeling Method
title_zh: 一种通用的伪刚体建模方法
abstract: A novel semi-analytical method is proposed to develop the pseudo-rigid-body~(PRB) model of robots made of highly flexible members (HFM), such as flexures and continuum robots, with no limit on the degrees of freedom of the PRB model. The proposed method has a simple formulation yet high precision. Furthermore, it can describe HFMs with variable curvature and stiffness along their length. The method offers a semi-analytical solution for the highly coupled nonlinear constrained optimization problem of PRB modeling and can be extended to variable-length robots comprised of HFM, such as catheter and concentric tube robots. We also show that this method can obtain a PRB model of uniformly stiff HFMs, with only three parameters. The versatility of the method is investigated in various applications of HFM in continuum robots. Simulations demonstrate substantial improvement in the precision of the PRB model in general and a reduction in the complexity of the formulation.
summary: A novel semi-analytical method is proposed to develop the pseudo-rigid-body~(PRB) model of robots made of highly flexible members (HFM), such as flexures and continuum robots, with no limit on the degrees of freedom of the PRB model. The proposed method has a simple formulation yet high precision. Furthermore, it can describe HFMs with variable curvature and stiffness along their length. The method offers a semi-analytical solution for the highly coupled nonlinear constrained optimization problem of PRB modeling and can be extended to variable-length robots comprised of HFM, such as catheter and concentric tube robots. We also show that this method can obtain a PRB model of uniformly stiff HFMs, with only three parameters. The versatility of the method is investigated in various applications of HFM in continuum robots. Simulations demonstrate substantial improvement in the precision of the PRB model in general and a reduction in the complexity of the formulation.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种新颖的半解析方法来开发由高柔性构件（HFM）制成的机器人（例如弯曲机器人和连续体机器人）的伪刚体（PRB）模型，且PRB模型的自由度不受限制。该方法公式简单，精度高。此外，它可以描述沿其长度具有可变曲率和刚度的 HFM。该方法为PRB建模的高耦合非线性约束优化问题提供了半解析解，并且可以扩展到由HFM组成的变长机器人，例如导管机器人和同心管机器人。我们还表明，该方法只需三个参数即可获得均匀刚性 HFM 的 PRB 模型。该方法的多功能性在 HFM 在连续机器人中的各种应用中得到了研究。模拟结果表明，PRB 模型的精度总体上得到了显着提高，并且公式的复杂性也降低了。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型半解析方法，用于建立高柔性机器人（如柔性铰链和连续体机器人）的伪刚体模型（PRB），无需限制模型自由度。
AI.motivation: 现有PRB模型难以精确描述高柔性成员的复杂变形特性，且无法处理变曲率和变刚度问题，限制了其在柔性机器人领域的应用。
AI.method: 通过半解析方法求解高度耦合的非线性约束优化问题，结合变量曲率和刚度的建模能力，仅需三个参数即可描述均匀刚度的高柔性成员。
AI.result: 仿真表明该方法显著提升了PRB模型精度，同时简化了模型公式复杂度，并成功扩展至可变长度柔性机器人（如导管机器人）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高柔性连续体机器人提供了通用且高效的建模框架，验证了其在多种应用场景下的有效性和灵活性。

authors_text: Weiwei Zong,Eric Carver,Simeng Zhu,Eric Schaff,Daniel Chapman,Joon Lee,Hassan Bagher Ebadian,Indrin Chetty,Benjamin Movsas,Winston Wen,Tarik Alafif,Xiangyun Zong
title: Prostate Cancer Malignancy Detection and localization from mpMRI using auto-Deep Learning: One Step Closer to Clinical Utilization
title_zh: 使用自动深度学习通过 mpMRI 检测和定位前列腺癌恶性肿瘤：距离临床应用又近了一步
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1903.12331
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1903.12331
abstract: Automatic diagnosis of malignant prostate cancer patients from mpMRI has been studied heavily in the past years. Model interpretation and domain drift have been the main road blocks for clinical utilization. As an extension from our previous work where we trained a customized convolutional neural network on a public cohort with 201 patients and the cropped 2D patches around the region of interest were used as the input, the cropped 2.5D slices of the prostate glands were used as the input, and the optimal model were searched in the model space using autoKeras. Something different was peripheral zone (PZ) and central gland (CG) were trained and tested separately, the PZ detector and CG detector were demonstrated effectively in highlighting the most suspicious slices out of a sequence, hopefully to greatly ease the workload for the physicians.
summary: Automatic diagnosis of malignant prostate cancer patients from mpMRI has been studied heavily in the past years. Model interpretation and domain drift have been the main road blocks for clinical utilization. As an extension from our previous work where we trained a customized convolutional neural network on a public cohort with 201 patients and the cropped 2D patches around the region of interest were used as the input, the cropped 2.5D slices of the prostate glands were used as the input, and the optimal model were searched in the model space using autoKeras. Something different was peripheral zone (PZ) and central gland (CG) were trained and tested separately, the PZ detector and CG detector were demonstrated effectively in highlighting the most suspicious slices out of a sequence, hopefully to greatly ease the workload for the physicians.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，人们对通过 mpMRI 自动诊断恶性前列腺癌患者进行了大量研究。模型解释和域漂移一直是临床应用的主要障碍。作为我们之前工作的延伸，我们在一个有 201 名患者的公共队列上训练了一个定制的卷积神经网络，并将感兴趣区域周围裁剪的 2D 斑块用作输入，裁剪的前列腺 2.5D 切片用作输入，并使用 autoKeras 在模型空间中搜索最佳模型。不同的是，外围区 (PZ) 和中央腺体 (CG) 分别进行了训练和测试，PZ 探测器和 CG 探测器在突出显示序列中最可疑的切片方面得到了有效证明，希望能大大减轻医生的工作量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自动深度学习的前列腺癌恶性程度检测与定位方法，旨在通过改进模型可解释性和减少领域漂移，推动临床应用。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在临床应用中面临可解释性差和领域漂移问题，需通过优化输入数据和模型结构提升检测效果。
AI.method: 使用前列腺腺体的裁剪2.5D切片作为输入，结合autoKeras搜索最优模型，并分别训练外周区（PZ）和中央腺区（CG）检测器以突出可疑切片。
AI.result: PZ和CG检测器能有效识别序列中的可疑切片，显著减轻医生工作负担。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进模型可解释性和领域适应性，为前列腺癌的临床自动诊断提供了更可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Yichao Liang
title: Transition-based Abstract Meaning Representation Parsing with Contextual Embeddings
title_zh: 具有上下文嵌入的基于转换的抽象意义表示解析
abstract: The ability to understand and generate languages sets human cognition apart from other known life forms'. We study a way of combing two of the most successful routes to meaning of language--statistical language models and symbolic semantics formalisms--in the task of semantic parsing. Building on a transition-based, Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) parser, AmrEager, we explore the utility of incorporating pretrained context-aware word embeddings--such as BERT and RoBERTa--in the problem of AMR parsing, contributing a new parser we dub as AmrBerger. Experiments find these rich lexical features alone are not particularly helpful in improving the parser's overall performance as measured by the SMATCH score when compared to the non-contextual counterpart, while additional concept information empowers the system to outperform the baselines. Through lesion study, we found the use of contextual embeddings helps to make the system more robust against the removal of explicit syntactical features. These findings expose the strength and weakness of the contextual embeddings and the language models in the current form, and motivate deeper understanding thereof.
summary: The ability to understand and generate languages sets human cognition apart from other known life forms'. We study a way of combing two of the most successful routes to meaning of language--statistical language models and symbolic semantics formalisms--in the task of semantic parsing. Building on a transition-based, Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) parser, AmrEager, we explore the utility of incorporating pretrained context-aware word embeddings--such as BERT and RoBERTa--in the problem of AMR parsing, contributing a new parser we dub as AmrBerger. Experiments find these rich lexical features alone are not particularly helpful in improving the parser's overall performance as measured by the SMATCH score when compared to the non-contextual counterpart, while additional concept information empowers the system to outperform the baselines. Through lesion study, we found the use of contextual embeddings helps to make the system more robust against the removal of explicit syntactical features. These findings expose the strength and weakness of the contextual embeddings and the language models in the current form, and motivate deeper understanding thereof.
abstract_zh: 理解和生成语言的能力使人类认知有别于其他已知的生命形式。我们研究了一种在语义解析任务中结合两种最成功的语言含义途径（统计语言模型和符号语义形式主义）的方法。在基于转换的抽象含义表示 (AMR) 解析器 AmrEager 的基础上，我们探索了在 AMR 解析问题中合并预训练的上下文感知词嵌入（例如 BERT 和 RoBERTa）的实用性，并贡献了一个我们称为 AmrBerger 的新解析器。实验发现，与非上下文对应物相比，这些丰富的词汇特征本身并不能特别有助于提高解析器的整体性能（通过 SMATCH 分数来衡量），而额外的概念信息使系统能够超越基线。通过损伤研究，我们发现上下文嵌入的使用有助于使系统对于删除显式句法特征更加鲁棒。这些发现揭示了当前形式的上下文嵌入和语言模型的优点和缺点，并激发了对其更深入的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过结合预训练上下文感知词嵌入（如BERT和RoBERTa）改进基于转移的抽象意义表示（AMR）解析器的性能。
AI.motivation: 将统计语言模型与符号语义形式结合，以提升语义解析的准确性，探索上下文嵌入在AMR解析中的潜在价值。
AI.method: 基于AmrEager解析器，引入BERT和RoBERTa等预训练上下文嵌入，构建新解析器AmrBerger，并通过消融实验分析其效果。
AI.result: 上下文嵌入单独使用时未显著提升SMATCH分数，但结合额外概念信息后优于基线模型；同时增强了系统对语法特征缺失的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 上下文嵌入在当前形式下既有优势也有局限，需进一步研究其与语言模型的有效整合方式。

search_text: Transition-based Abstract Meaning Representation Parsing with Contextual Embeddings 具有上下文嵌入的基于转换的抽象意义表示解析 The ability to understand and generate languages sets human cognition apart from other known life forms'. We study a way of combing two of the most successful routes to meaning of language--statistical language models and symbolic semantics formalisms--in the task of semantic parsing. Building on a transition-based, Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) parser, AmrEager, we explore the utility of incorporating pretrained context-aware word embeddings--such as BERT and RoBERTa--in the problem of AMR parsing, contributing a new parser we dub as AmrBerger. Experiments find these rich lexical features alone are not particularly helpful in improving the parser's overall performance as measured by the SMATCH score when compared to the non-contextual counterpart, while additional concept information empowers the system to outperform the baselines. Through lesion study, we found the use of contextual embeddings helps to make the system more robust against the removal of explicit syntactical features. These findings expose the strength and weakness of the contextual embeddings and the language models in the current form, and motivate deeper understanding thereof. 理解和生成语言的能力使人类认知有别于其他已知的生命形式。我们研究了一种在语义解析任务中结合两种最成功的语言含义途径（统计语言模型和符号语义形式主义）的方法。在基于转换的抽象含义表示 (AMR) 解析器 AmrEager 的基础上，我们探索了在 AMR 解析问题中合并预训练的上下文感知词嵌入（例如 BERT 和 RoBERTa）的实用性，并贡献了一个我们称为 AmrBerger 的新解析器。实验发现，与非上下文对应物相比，这些丰富的词汇特征本身并不能特别有助于提高解析器的整体性能（通过 SMATCH 分数来衡量），而额外的概念信息使系统能够超越基线。通过损伤研究，我们发现上下文嵌入的使用有助于使系统对于删除显式句法特征更加鲁棒。这些发现揭示了当前形式的上下文嵌入和语言模型的优点和缺点，并激发了对其更深入的理解。 本文研究如何通过结合预训练上下文感知词嵌入（如BERT和RoBERTa）改进基于转移的抽象意义表示（AMR）解析器的性能。 Yichao Liang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhiqiang Liu,Wenjian Yu
title: Pursuing More Effective Graph Spectral Sparsifiers via Approximate Trace Reduction
title_zh: 通过近似痕量减少追求更有效的图谱稀疏器
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. to appear at DAC'2022
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures. to appear at DAC'2022
abstract: Spectral graph sparsification aims to find ultra-sparse subgraphs which can preserve spectral properties of original graphs. In this paper, a new spectral criticality metric based on trace reduction is first introduced for identifying spectrally important off-subgraph edges. Then, a physics-inspired truncation strategy and an approach using approximate inverse of Cholesky factor are proposed to compute the approximate trace reduction efficiently. Combining them with the iterative densification scheme in \cite{feng2019grass} and the strategy of excluding spectrally similar off-subgraph edges in \cite{fegrass}, we develop a highly effective graph sparsification algorithm. The proposed method has been validated with various kinds of graphs. Experimental results show that it always produces sparsifiers with remarkably better quality than the state-of-the-art GRASS \cite{feng2019grass} in same computational cost, enabling more than 40% time reduction for preconditioned iterative equation solver on average. In the applications of power grid transient analysis and spectral graph partitioning, the derived iterative solver shows 3.3X or more advantages on runtime and memory cost, over the approach based on direct sparse solver.
summary: Spectral graph sparsification aims to find ultra-sparse subgraphs which can preserve spectral properties of original graphs. In this paper, a new spectral criticality metric based on trace reduction is first introduced for identifying spectrally important off-subgraph edges. Then, a physics-inspired truncation strategy and an approach using approximate inverse of Cholesky factor are proposed to compute the approximate trace reduction efficiently. Combining them with the iterative densification scheme in \cite{feng2019grass} and the strategy of excluding spectrally similar off-subgraph edges in \cite{fegrass}, we develop a highly effective graph sparsification algorithm. The proposed method has been validated with various kinds of graphs. Experimental results show that it always produces sparsifiers with remarkably better quality than the state-of-the-art GRASS \cite{feng2019grass} in same computational cost, enabling more than 40% time reduction for preconditioned iterative equation solver on average. In the applications of power grid transient analysis and spectral graph partitioning, the derived iterative solver shows 3.3X or more advantages on runtime and memory cost, over the approach based on direct sparse solver.
abstract_zh: Spectral graph sparsification aims to find ultra-sparse subgraphs which can preserve spectral properties of original graphs.在本文中，首先引入了一种基于迹缩减的新光谱关键性度量，用于识别光谱上重要的子图外边缘。然后，提出了一种受物理启发的截断策略和一种使用 Cholesky 因子的近似逆的方法来有效地计算近似迹缩减。将它们与 \cite{feng2019grass} 中的迭代致密化方案和 \cite{fegrass} 中排除光谱相似的非子图边缘的策略相结合，我们开发了一种高效的图稀疏化算法。 The proposed method has been validated with various kinds of graphs.实验结果表明，在相同的计算成本下，它总是能产生比最先进的 GRASS \cite{feng2019grass} 质量明显更好的稀疏器，使预处理迭代方程求解器的时间平均减少 40% 以上。在电网瞬态分析和频谱图划分的应用中，与基于直接稀疏求解器的方法相比，派生的迭代求解器在运行时间和内存成本方面显示出 3.3 倍或更多的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于近似迹缩减的图谱稀疏化方法，通过改进关键边选择策略提升稀疏化效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图谱稀疏化方法在保持图谱性质与计算效率间存在矛盾，需更有效的关键边识别机制以提升稀疏化质量。
AI.method: 引入基于迹缩减的谱关键性度量，结合物理启发式截断策略与Cholesky因子近似逆算法，融合迭代加密方案与相似边排除策略构建稀疏化算法。
AI.result: 在相同计算成本下稀疏化质量优于GRASS方法，平均减少预处理迭代求解器40%时间，在电力系统暂态分析等场景实现3.3倍以上运行时长与内存消耗优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过创新性迹缩减机制与高效计算策略，在稀疏化质量与应用性能上均超越现有最佳方法。

In this paper, a new spectral criticality metric based on trace reduction is first introduced for identifying spectrally important off-subgraph edges. Then, a physics-inspired truncation strategy and an approach using approximate inverse of Cholesky factor are proposed to compute the approximate trace reduction efficiently. Combining them with the iterative densification scheme in \cite{feng2019grass} and the strategy of excluding spectrally similar off-subgraph edges in \cite{fegrass}, we develop a highly effective graph sparsification algorithm. The proposed method has been validated with various kinds of graphs. Experimental results show that it always produces sparsifiers with remarkably better quality than the state-of-the-art GRASS \cite{feng2019grass} in same computational cost, enabling more than 40% time reduction for preconditioned iterative equation solver on average. In the applications of power grid transient analysis and spectral graph partitioning, the derived iterative solver shows 3.3X or more advantages on runtime and memory cost, over the approach based on direct sparse solver. authors_text: Paul Novello,Thomas Fel,David Vigouroux
title: Making Sense of Dependence: Efficient Black-box Explanations Using Dependence Measure
title_zh: 理解依赖性：使用依赖性测量进行有效的黑盒解释
abstract: This paper presents a new efficient black-box attribution method based on Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC), a dependence measure based on Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHS). HSIC measures the dependence between regions of an input image and the output of a model based on kernel embeddings of distributions. It thus provides explanations enriched by RKHS representation capabilities. HSIC can be estimated very efficiently, significantly reducing the computational cost compared to other black-box attribution methods. Our experiments show that HSIC is up to 8 times faster than the previous best black-box attribution methods while being as faithful. Indeed, we improve or match the state-of-the-art of both black-box and white-box attribution methods for several fidelity metrics on Imagenet with various recent model architectures. Importantly, we show that these advances can be transposed to efficiently and faithfully explain object detection models such as YOLOv4. Finally, we extend the traditional attribution methods by proposing a new kernel enabling an ANOVA-like orthogonal decomposition of importance scores based on HSIC, allowing us to evaluate not only the importance of each image patch but also the importance of their pairwise interactions. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/paulnovello/HSIC-Attribution-Method.
summary: This paper presents a new efficient black-box attribution method based on Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC), a dependence measure based on Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHS). HSIC measures the dependence between regions of an input image and the output of a model based on kernel embeddings of distributions. It thus provides explanations enriched by RKHS representation capabilities. HSIC can be estimated very efficiently, significantly reducing the computational cost compared to other black-box attribution methods. Our experiments show that HSIC is up to 8 times faster than the previous best black-box attribution methods while being as faithful. Indeed, we improve or match the state-of-the-art of both black-box and white-box attribution methods for several fidelity metrics on Imagenet with various recent model architectures. Importantly, we show that these advances can be transposed to efficiently and faithfully explain object detection models such as YOLOv4. Finally, we extend the traditional attribution methods by proposing a new kernel enabling an ANOVA-like orthogonal decomposition of importance scores based on HSIC, allowing us to evaluate not only the importance of each image patch but also the importance of their pairwise interactions. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/paulnovello/HSIC-Attribution-Method.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于希尔伯特-施密特独立准则（HSIC）的新型高效黑盒归因方法，这是一种基于再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）的依赖性度量。 HSIC 基于分布的核嵌入来测量输入图像区域与模型输出之间的依赖性。因此，它提供了通过 RKHS 表示功能丰富的解释。 HSIC 可以非常有效地估计，与其他黑盒归因方法相比，显着降低了计算成本。我们的实验表明，HSIC 比以前最好的黑盒归因方法快 8 倍，同时保持同样的可靠性。事实上，我们通过各种最新的模型架构改进或匹配了 Imagenet 上几个保真度指标的最先进的黑盒和白盒归因方法。重要的是，我们证明这些进步可以有效地、忠实地解释 YOLOv4 等对象检测模型。最后，我们通过提出一个新的内核来扩展传统的归因方法，该内核能够基于 HSIC 对重要性分数进行类似 ANOVA 的正交分解，使我们不仅可以评估每个图像块的重要性，还可以评估它们成对相互作用的重要性。我们的实现可在 https://github.com/paulnovello/HSIC-Attribution-Method 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Hilbert-Schmidt独立性准则（HSIC）的高效黑盒归因方法，用于图像解释。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒归因方法计算成本高，难以兼顾效率与解释准确性，需开发更高效的依赖度量方法。
AI.method: 利用RKHS核嵌入分布特性，通过HSIC衡量输入图像区域与模型输出的依赖关系，并提出ANOVA-like分解方法分析区域交互作用。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，HSIC方法比现有最佳黑盒方法快8倍且保持同等准确性，同时成功应用于YOLOv4目标检测模型。
AI.conclusion: HSIC方法在保持解释准确性的同时显著提升计算效率，并扩展了传统归因方法的交互分析能力。

conclusion: HSIC方法在保持解释准确性的同时显著提升计算效率，并扩展了传统归因方法的交互分析能力。
search_text: Making Sense of Dependence: Efficient Black-box Explanations Using Dependence Measure 理解依赖性：使用依赖性测量进行有效的黑盒解释 This paper presents a new efficient black-box attribution method based on Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC), a dependence measure based on Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces (RKHS). HSIC measures the dependence between regions of an input image and the output of a model based on kernel embeddings of distributions. It thus provides explanations enriched by RKHS representation capabilities. HSIC can be estimated very efficiently, significantly reducing the computational cost compared to other black-box attribution methods. Our experiments show that HSIC is up to 8 times faster than the previous best black-box attribution methods while being as faithful. Indeed, we improve or match the state-of-the-art of both black-box and white-box attribution methods for several fidelity metrics on Imagenet with various recent model architectures. Importantly, we show that these advances can be transposed to efficiently and faithfully explain object detection models such as YOLOv4. Finally, we extend the traditional attribution methods by proposing a new kernel enabling an ANOVA-like orthogonal decomposition of importance scores based on HSIC, allowing us to evaluate not only the importance of each image patch but also the importance of their pairwise interactions. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/paulnovello/HSIC-Attribution-Method. 本文提出了一种基于希尔伯特-施密特独立准则（HSIC）的新型高效黑盒归因方法，这是一种基于再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）的依赖性度量。 HSIC 基于分布的核嵌入来测量输入图像区域与模型输出之间的依赖性。因此，它提供了通过 RKHS 表示功能丰富的解释。 HSIC 可以非常有效地估计，与其他黑盒归因方法相比，显着降低了计算成本。我们的实验表明，HSIC 比以前最好的黑盒归因方法快 8 倍，同时保持同样的可靠性。事实上，我们通过各种最新的模型架构改进或匹配了 Imagenet 上几个保真度指标的最先进的黑盒和白盒归因方法。重要的是，我们证明这些进步可以有效地、忠实地解释 YOLOv4 等对象检测模型。最后，我们通过提出一个新的内核来扩展传统的归因方法，该内核能够基于 HSIC 对重要性分数进行类似 ANOVA 的正交分解，使我们不仅可以评估每个图像块的重要性，还可以评估它们成对相互作用的重要性。我们的实现可在 https://github.com/paulnovello/HSIC-Attribution-Method 上找到。 本文提出一种基于Hilbert-Schmidt独立性准则（HSIC）的高效黑盒归因方法，用于图像解释。 Paul Novello,Thomas Fel,David Vigouroux cs.CV,stat.ML,stat.OT

authors_text: Yingqian Wang,Zhengyu Liang,Longguang Wang,Jungang Yang,Wei An,Yulan Guo
title: Real-World Light Field Image Super-Resolution via Degradation Modulation
title_zh: 通过退化调制实现真实世界光场图像超分辨率
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the great advances of deep neural networks (DNNs) in light field (LF) image super-resolution (SR). However, existing DNN-based LF image SR methods are developed on a single fixed degradation (e.g., bicubic downsampling), and thus cannot be applied to super-resolve real LF images with diverse degradation. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method for real-world LF image SR. In our method, a practical LF degradation model is developed to formulate the degradation process of real LF images. Then, a convolutional neural network is designed to incorporate the degradation prior into the SR process. By training on LF images using our formulated degradation, our network can learn to modulate different degradation while incorporating both spatial and angular information in LF images. Extensive experiments on both synthetically degraded and real-world LF images demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Compared with existing state-of-the-art single and LF image SR methods, our method achieves superior SR performance under a wide range of degradation, and generalizes better to real LF images. Codes and models are available at https://yingqianwang.github.io/LF-DMnet/.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the great advances of deep neural networks (DNNs) in light field (LF) image super-resolution (SR). However, existing DNN-based LF image SR methods are developed on a single fixed degradation (e.g., bicubic downsampling), and thus cannot be applied to super-resolve real LF images with diverse degradation. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method for real-world LF image SR. In our method, a practical LF degradation model is developed to formulate the degradation process of real LF images. Then, a convolutional neural network is designed to incorporate the degradation prior into the SR process. By training on LF images using our formulated degradation, our network can learn to modulate different degradation while incorporating both spatial and angular information in LF images. Extensive experiments on both synthetically degraded and real-world LF images demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Compared with existing state-of-the-art single and LF image SR methods, our method achieves superior SR performance under a wide range of degradation, and generalizes better to real LF images. Codes and models are available at https://yingqianwang.github.io/LF-DMnet/.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络（DNN）在光场（LF）图像超分辨率（SR）方面取得了巨大进步。 However, existing DNN-based LF image SR methods are developed on a single fixed degradation (e.g., bicubic downsampling), and thus cannot be applied to super-resolve real LF images with diverse degradation.在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的现实世界 LF 图像 SR 方法。在我们的方法中，开发了一个实用的 LF 退化模型来制定真实 LF 图像的退化过程。然后，设计了一个卷积神经网络，将退化先验纳入 SR 过程中。 By training on LF images using our formulated degradation, our network can learn to modulate different degradation while incorporating both spatial and angular information in LF images.对综合降解图像和真实世界低频图像的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 Compared with existing state-of-the-art single and LF image SR methods, our method achieves superior SR performance under a wide range of degradation, and generalizes better to real LF images.代码和模型可在 https://yingqianwang.github.io/LF-DMnet/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过退化调制实现真实世界光场图像超分辨率的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有光场图像超分辨率方法基于单一固定退化模型（如双三次下采样），无法处理真实世界中多样的退化情况。
AI.method: 构建光场退化模型并设计卷积神经网络，将退化先验信息融入超分辨率过程，通过联合学习空间与角度信息实现多退化调制。
AI.result: 在合成退化与真实光场图像上均优于现有方法，广泛退化场景下性能更优且泛化能力更强。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过建模真实退化过程，有效提升了光场图像超分辨率的质量与适应性。

authors_text: Marcus Märtens,Dario Izzo
title: Symbolic Regression for Space Applications: Differentiable Cartesian Genetic Programming Powered by Multi-objective Memetic Algorithms
title_zh: 空间应用的符号回归：多目标模因算法支持的可微笛卡尔遗传编程
abstract: Interpretable regression models are important for many application domains, as they allow experts to understand relations between variables from sparse data. Symbolic regression addresses this issue by searching the space of all possible free form equations that can be constructed from elementary algebraic functions. While explicit mathematical functions can be rediscovered this way, the determination of unknown numerical constants during search has been an often neglected issue. We propose a new multi-objective memetic algorithm that exploits a differentiable Cartesian Genetic Programming encoding to learn constants during evolutionary loops. We show that this approach is competitive or outperforms machine learned black box regression models or hand-engineered fits for two applications from space: the Mars express thermal power estimation and the determination of the age of stars by gyrochronology.
summary: Interpretable regression models are important for many application domains, as they allow experts to understand relations between variables from sparse data. Symbolic regression addresses this issue by searching the space of all possible free form equations that can be constructed from elementary algebraic functions. While explicit mathematical functions can be rediscovered this way, the determination of unknown numerical constants during search has been an often neglected issue. We propose a new multi-objective memetic algorithm that exploits a differentiable Cartesian Genetic Programming encoding to learn constants during evolutionary loops. We show that this approach is competitive or outperforms machine learned black box regression models or hand-engineered fits for two applications from space: the Mars express thermal power estimation and the determination of the age of stars by gyrochronology.
abstract_zh: 可解释的回归模型对于许多应用领域都很重要，因为它们允许专家从稀疏数据中理解变量之间的关系。符号回归通过搜索可以从初等代数函数构造的所有可能的自由形式方程的空间来解决这个问题。虽然可以通过这种方式重新发现显式数学函数，但搜索过程中未知数值常数的确定一直是一个经常被忽视的问题。我们提出了一种新的多目标模因算法，该算法利用可微分的笛卡尔遗传编程编码来学习进化循环期间的常数。我们证明，这种方法具有竞争力，或者优于机器学习的黑盒回归模型或手工设计的适合两种太空应用的方法：火星表达热功率估计和通过陀螺年代学确定恒星年龄。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多目标基因算法与可微分卡迪尔遗传编程的符号回归方法，用于航天领域中稀疏数据下的数值常数学习与模型构建。
AI.motivation: 传统符号回归在稀疏数据中难以准确确定数值常数，而航天工程需要高精度且可解释的模型，现有黑箱模型和人工拟合方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计多目标基因算法驱动的可微分卡迪尔遗传编程框架，在进化过程中同步优化数学表达式结构与数值常数，通过多目标函数平衡模型复杂度与拟合精度。
AI.result: 在火星热功率估算和恒星年龄测定两个航天任务中，该方法性能优于传统机器学习模型和人工拟合方法，且生成的模型具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为航天领域复杂系统的建模提供了新的符号回归范式，通过进化计算与微分编程的结合，有效解决了稀疏数据下常数学习难题。

authors_text: Qin Hu,Minghui Xu,Shengling Wang,Shaoyong Guo
title: Sync or Fork: Node-Level Synchronization Analysis of Blockchain
title_zh: 同步还是分叉：区块链节点级同步分析
comment: published on International Conference on Wireless Algorithms, Systems, and Applications (WASA 2020)
comments: published on International Conference on Wireless Algorithms, Systems, and Applications (WASA 2020)
abstract: As the cornerstone of blockchain, block synchronization plays a vital role in maintaining the security. Without full blockchain synchronization, unexpected forks will emerge and thus providing a breeding ground for various malicious attacks. The state-of-the-art works mainly study the relationship between the propagation time and blockchain security at the systematic level, neglecting the fine-grained impact of peering nodes in blockchain networks. To conduct a node-level synchronization analysis, we take advantage of the large deviation theory and game theory to study the pull-based propagation from a microscopic perspective. We examine the blockchain synchronization in a bidirectional manner via investigating the impact of full nodes as responders and that of partial nodes as requesters. Based on that, we further reveal the most efficient path to speed up synchronization from full nodes and design the best synchronization request scheme based on the concept of correlated equilibrium for partial nodes. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our analysis.
summary: As the cornerstone of blockchain, block synchronization plays a vital role in maintaining the security. Without full blockchain synchronization, unexpected forks will emerge and thus providing a breeding ground for various malicious attacks. The state-of-the-art works mainly study the relationship between the propagation time and blockchain security at the systematic level, neglecting the fine-grained impact of peering nodes in blockchain networks. To conduct a node-level synchronization analysis, we take advantage of the large deviation theory and game theory to study the pull-based propagation from a microscopic perspective. We examine the blockchain synchronization in a bidirectional manner via investigating the impact of full nodes as responders and that of partial nodes as requesters. Based on that, we further reveal the most efficient path to speed up synchronization from full nodes and design the best synchronization request scheme based on the concept of correlated equilibrium for partial nodes. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our analysis.
abstract_zh: 区块同步作为区块链的基石，对于维护安全性起着至关重要的作用。如果没有完全的区块链同步，就会出现意想不到的分叉，从而为各种恶意攻击提供滋生地。最先进的工作主要在系统层面研究传播时间与区块链安全性之间的关系，忽略了区块链网络中对等节点的细粒度影响。为了进行节点级同步分析，我们利用大偏差理论和博弈论从微观角度研究基于拉动的传播。我们通过调查全节点作为响应者和部分节点作为请求者的影响，以双向方式检查区块链同步。在此基础上，我们进一步揭示了全节点加速同步的最有效路径，并基于部分节点相关均衡的概念设计了最佳同步请求方案。大量的实验结果证明了我们分析的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文从节点层面分析区块链同步机制，研究节点间同步对防止分叉及提升安全性的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注系统级传播时间与区块链安全性的关系，忽视了对节点层面交互细节的分析，而节点行为直接影响同步效率与分叉风险。
AI.method: 结合大偏差理论与博弈论，从微观视角双向分析全节点（响应者）与部分节点（请求者）的同步行为，设计基于相关均衡的同步请求方案。
AI.result: 实验验证了节点层面优化策略的有效性，证明所提方法能显著提升同步效率并降低分叉概率。
AI.conclusion: 通过节点级同步分析与优化，可为区块链网络提供更高效、安全的同步机制设计思路。

search_text: Sync or Fork: Node-Level Synchronization Analysis of Blockchain 同步还是分叉：区块链节点级同步分析 As the cornerstone of blockchain, block synchronization plays a vital role in maintaining the security. Without full blockchain synchronization, unexpected forks will emerge and thus providing a breeding ground for various malicious attacks. The state-of-the-art works mainly study the relationship between the propagation time and blockchain security at the systematic level, neglecting the fine-grained impact of peering nodes in blockchain networks. To conduct a node-level synchronization analysis, we take advantage of the large deviation theory and game theory to study the pull-based propagation from a microscopic perspective. We examine the blockchain synchronization in a bidirectional manner via investigating the impact of full nodes as responders and that of partial nodes as requesters. Based on that, we further reveal the most efficient path to speed up synchronization from full nodes and design the best synchronization request scheme based on the concept of correlated equilibrium for partial nodes. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our analysis. 区块同步作为区块链的基石，对于维护安全性起着至关重要的作用。如果没有完全的区块链同步，就会出现意想不到的分叉，从而为各种恶意攻击提供滋生地。最先进的工作主要在系统层面研究传播时间与区块链安全性之间的关系，忽略了区块链网络中对等节点的细粒度影响。为了进行节点级同步分析，我们利用大偏差理论和博弈论从微观角度研究基于拉动的传播。我们通过调查全节点作为响应者和部分节点作为请求者的影响，以双向方式检查区块链同步。在此基础上，我们进一步揭示了全节点加速同步的最有效路径，并基于部分节点相关均衡的概念设计了最佳同步请求方案。大量的实验结果证明了我们分析的有效性。 本文从节点层面分析区块链同步机制，研究节点间同步对防止分叉及提升安全性的关键作用。 Qin Hu,Minghui Xu,Shengling Wang,Shaoyong Guo cs.ET

authors_text: Franziska Braun,Markus Förstel,Bastian Oppermann,Andreas Erzigkeit,Thomas Hillemacher,Hartmut Lehfeld,Korbinian Riedhammer
title: Automated Evaluation of Standardized Dementia Screening Tests
title_zh: 标准化痴呆症筛查测试的自动评估
comment: Submitted to Interspeech 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.05018
comments: Submitted to Interspeech 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.05018
abstract: For dementia screening and monitoring, standardized tests play a key role in clinical routine since they aim at minimizing subjectivity by measuring performance on a variety of cognitive tasks. In this paper, we report on a study that consists of a semi-standardized history taking followed by two standardized neuropsychological tests, namely the SKT and the CERAD-NB. The tests include basic tasks such as naming objects, learning word lists, but also widely used tools such as the MMSE. Most of the tasks are performed verbally and should thus be suitable for automated scoring based on transcripts. For the first batch of 30 patients, we analyze the correlation between expert manual evaluations and automatic evaluations based on manual and automatic transcriptions. For both SKT and CERAD-NB, we observe high to perfect correlations using manual transcripts; for certain tasks with lower correlation, the automatic scoring is stricter than the human reference since it is limited to the audio. Using automatic transcriptions, correlations drop as expected and are related to recognition accuracy; however, we still observe high correlations of up to 0.98 (SKT) and 0.85 (CERAD-NB). We show that using word alternatives helps to mitigate recognition errors and subsequently improves correlation with expert scores.
summary: For dementia screening and monitoring, standardized tests play a key role in clinical routine since they aim at minimizing subjectivity by measuring performance on a variety of cognitive tasks. In this paper, we report on a study that consists of a semi-standardized history taking followed by two standardized neuropsychological tests, namely the SKT and the CERAD-NB. The tests include basic tasks such as naming objects, learning word lists, but also widely used tools such as the MMSE. Most of the tasks are performed verbally and should thus be suitable for automated scoring based on transcripts. For the first batch of 30 patients, we analyze the correlation between expert manual evaluations and automatic evaluations based on manual and automatic transcriptions. For both SKT and CERAD-NB, we observe high to perfect correlations using manual transcripts; for certain tasks with lower correlation, the automatic scoring is stricter than the human reference since it is limited to the audio. Using automatic transcriptions, correlations drop as expected and are related to recognition accuracy; however, we still observe high correlations of up to 0.98 (SKT) and 0.85 (CERAD-NB). We show that using word alternatives helps to mitigate recognition errors and subsequently improves correlation with expert scores.
abstract_zh: 对于痴呆症筛查和监测，标准化测试在临床常规中发挥着关键作用，因为它们旨在通过测量各种认知任务的表现来最大限度地减少主观性。在本文中，我们报告了一项研究，该研究包括半标准化病史采集和两项标准化神经心理学测试，即 SKT 和 CERAD-NB。这些测试包括命名对象、学习单词列表等基本任务，还包括 MMSE 等广泛使用的工具。大多数任务都是口头执行的，因此应该适合基于成绩单的自动评分。对于第一批30名患者，我们基于手动和自动转录分析了专家手动评估和自动评估之间的相关性。对于 SKT 和 CERAD-NB，我们使用手动转录观察到高度到完美的相关性；对于某些相关性较低的任务，自动评分比人类参考更严格，因为它仅限于音频。使用自动转录，相关性如预期下降，并且与识别准确性相关；然而，我们仍然观察到高达 0.98 (SKT) 和 0.85 (CERAD-NB) 的高相关性。我们表明，使用替代词有助于减少识别错误，并随后提高与专家分数的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过自动转录和评分技术评估标准化痴呆筛查测试（SKT和CERAD-NB）的可行性。
AI.motivation: 标准化痴呆筛查测试在临床中至关重要，但人工评分存在主观性。自动评分可提高效率并减少偏差，但需验证其准确性。
AI.method: 对30名患者进行半标准化病史采集及两项标准化测试，对比专家人工评分与基于手动/自动转录的自动评分结果，分析相关性并测试词替代对识别误差的修正效果。
AI.result: 使用手动转录时，SKT和CERAD-NB的相关性高达0.98和0.85；自动转录相关性略低，但通过词替代可显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 自动评分技术具备高可行性，尤其在引入词替代优化后，可有效辅助临床痴呆筛查。

search_text: Automated Evaluation of Standardized Dementia Screening Tests 标准化痴呆症筛查测试的自动评估 For dementia screening and monitoring, standardized tests play a key role in clinical routine since they aim at minimizing subjectivity by measuring performance on a variety of cognitive tasks. In this paper, we report on a study that consists of a semi-standardized history taking followed by two standardized neuropsychological tests, namely the SKT and the CERAD-NB. The tests include basic tasks such as naming objects, learning word lists, but also widely used tools such as the MMSE. Most of the tasks are performed verbally and should thus be suitable for automated scoring based on transcripts. For the first batch of 30 patients, we analyze the correlation between expert manual evaluations and automatic evaluations based on manual and automatic transcriptions. For both SKT and CERAD-NB, we observe high to perfect correlations using manual transcripts; for certain tasks with lower correlation, the automatic scoring is stricter than the human reference since it is limited to the audio. Using automatic transcriptions, correlations drop as expected and are related to recognition accuracy; however, we still observe high correlations of up to 0.98 (SKT) and 0.85 (CERAD-NB). authors_text: Quinten Van Baelen,Peter Karsmakers
title: Constraint Guided Gradient Descent: Guided Training with Inequality Constraints
title_zh: 约束引导梯度下降：具有不等式约束的引导训练
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 1 table Comments: corrected typo in author list
comments: 9 pages, 1 figure, 1 table Comments: corrected typo in author list
abstract: Deep learning is typically performed by learning a neural network solely from data in the form of input-output pairs ignoring available domain knowledge. In this work, the Constraint Guided Gradient Descent (CGGD) framework is proposed that enables the injection of domain knowledge into the training procedure. The domain knowledge is assumed to be described as a conjunction of hard inequality constraints which appears to be a natural choice for several applications. Compared to other neuro-symbolic approaches, the proposed method converges to a model that satisfies any inequality constraint on the training data and does not require to first transform the constraints into some ad-hoc term that is added to the learning (optimisation) objective. Under certain conditions, it is shown that CGGD can converges to a model that satisfies the constraints on the training set, while prior work does not necessarily converge to such a model. It is empirically shown on two independent and small data sets that CGGD makes training less dependent on the initialisation of the network and improves the constraint satisfiability on all data.
summary: Deep learning is typically performed by learning a neural network solely from data in the form of input-output pairs ignoring available domain knowledge. In this work, the Constraint Guided Gradient Descent (CGGD) framework is proposed that enables the injection of domain knowledge into the training procedure. The domain knowledge is assumed to be described as a conjunction of hard inequality constraints which appears to be a natural choice for several applications. Compared to other neuro-symbolic approaches, the proposed method converges to a model that satisfies any inequality constraint on the training data and does not require to first transform the constraints into some ad-hoc term that is added to the learning (optimisation) objective. Under certain conditions, it is shown that CGGD can converges to a model that satisfies the constraints on the training set, while prior work does not necessarily converge to such a model. It is empirically shown on two independent and small data sets that CGGD makes training less dependent on the initialisation of the network and improves the constraint satisfiability on all data.
abstract_zh: 深度学习通常是通过仅从输入输出对形式的数据学习神经网络来执行的，忽略可用的领域知识。在这项工作中，提出了约束引导梯度下降（CGGD）框架，可以将领域知识注入到训练过程中。假设领域知识被描述为硬不等式约束的结合，这似乎是多个应用程序的自然选择。与其他神经符号方法相比，所提出的方法收敛到一个模型，该模型满足训练数据上的任何不等式约束，并且不需要首先将约束转换为添加到学习（优化）目标中的一些临时项。在某些条件下，CGGD 可以收敛到满足训练集约束的模型，而先前的工作不一定收敛到这样的模型。在两个独立的小数据集上的经验表明，CGGD 使训练更少地依赖于网络的初始化，并提高了所有数据的约束可满足性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Constraint Guided Gradient Descent（CGGD）的框架，通过将不等式约束直接整合到梯度下降训练过程中，提升深度学习模型对领域知识的利用能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习忽视领域知识中的约束条件，导致模型可能违反实际应用中的硬性限制，而现有神经符号方法需将约束转化为损失函数项，存在转化复杂性和收敛性不足的问题。
AI.method: CGGD框架直接在梯度下降过程中注入硬性不等式约束，无需将约束转化为优化目标的额外项，通过约束条件引导参数更新方向，确保模型在训练数据上满足约束。
AI.result: 在两个独立小数据集上的实验表明，CGGD减少对网络初始化的依赖，提升约束满足度，且在特定条件下能收敛到满足训练集约束的模型。
AI.conclusion: CGGD通过直接整合不等式约束改进了神经符号方法的约束满足能力与收敛性，为结合领域知识的深度学习提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多约束类型和应用场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Constraint Guided Gradient Descent（CGGD）的框架，通过将不等式约束直接整合到梯度下降训练过程中，提升深度学习模型对领域知识的利用能力。
ai_content.motivation: 传统深度学习忽视领域知识中的约束条件，导致模型可能违反实际应用中的硬性限制，而现有神经符号方法需将约束转化为损失函数项，存在转化复杂性和收敛性不足的问题。
ai_content.method: CGGD框架直接在梯度下降过程中注入硬性不等式约束，无需将约束转化为优化目标的额外项，通过约束条件引导参数更新方向，确保模型在训练数据上满足约束。
ai_content.result: 在两个独立小数据集上的实验表明，CGGD减少对网络初始化的依赖，提升约束满足度，且在特定条件下能收敛到满足训练集约束的模型。
ai_content.conclusion: CGGD通过直接整合不等式约束改进了神经符号方法的约束满足能力与收敛性，为结合领域知识的深度学习提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多约束类型和应用场景。

search_text: Constraint Guided Gradient Descent: Guided Training with Inequality Constraints 约束引导梯度下降：具有不等式约束的引导训练 Deep learning is typically performed by learning a neural network solely from data in the form of input-output pairs ignoring available domain knowledge. In this work, the Constraint Guided Gradient Descent (CGGD) framework is proposed that enables the injection of domain knowledge into the training procedure. The domain knowledge is assumed to be described as a conjunction of hard inequality constraints which appears to be a natural choice for several applications. Compared to other neuro-symbolic approaches, the proposed method converges to a model that satisfies any inequality constraint on the training data and does not require to first transform the constraints into some ad-hoc term that is added to the learning (optimisation) objective. Under certain conditions, it is shown that CGGD can converges to a model that satisfies the constraints on the training set, while prior work does not necessarily converge to such a model. It is empirically shown on two independent and small data sets that CGGD makes training less dependent on the initialisation of the network and improves the constraint satisfiability on all data. 深度学习通常是通过仅从输入输出对形式的数据学习神经网络来执行的，忽略可用的领域知识。在这项工作中，提出了约束引导梯度下降（CGGD）框架，可以将领域知识注入到训练过程中。假设领域知识被描述为硬不等式约束的结合，这似乎是多个应用程序的自然选择。与其他神经符号方法相比，所提出的方法收敛到一个模型，该模型满足训练数据上的任何不等式约束，并且不需要首先将约束转换为添加到学习（优化）目标中的一些临时项。在某些条件下，CGGD 可以收敛到满足训练集约束的模型，而先前的工作不一定收敛到这样的模型。在两个独立的小数据集上的经验表明，CGGD 使训练更少地依赖于网络的初始化，并提高了所有数据的约束可满足性。 本文提出一种名为Constraint Guided Gradient Descent（CGGD）的框架，通过将不等式约束直接整合到梯度下降训练过程中，提升深度学习模型对领域知识的利用能力。 Quinten Van Baelen,Peter Karsmakers cs.AI

authors_text: Vladimir Ivanov,Valery Solovyev
title: Automatic generation of a large dictionary with concreteness/abstractness ratings based on a small human dictionary
title_zh: 基于人类小词典自动生成具有具体/抽象等级的大词典
abstract: Concrete/abstract words are used in a growing number of psychological and neurophysiological research. For a few languages, large dictionaries have been created manually. This is a very time-consuming and costly process. To generate large high-quality dictionaries of concrete/abstract words automatically one needs extrapolating the expert assessments obtained on smaller samples. The research question that arises is how small such samples should be to do a good enough extrapolation. In this paper, we present a method for automatic ranking concreteness of words and propose an approach to significantly decrease amount of expert assessment. The method has been evaluated on a large test set for English. The quality of the constructed dictionaries is comparable to the expert ones. The correlation between predicted and expert ratings is higher comparing to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Concrete/abstract words are used in a growing number of psychological and neurophysiological research. For a few languages, large dictionaries have been created manually. This is a very time-consuming and costly process. To generate large high-quality dictionaries of concrete/abstract words automatically one needs extrapolating the expert assessments obtained on smaller samples. The research question that arises is how small such samples should be to do a good enough extrapolation. In this paper, we present a method for automatic ranking concreteness of words and propose an approach to significantly decrease amount of expert assessment. The method has been evaluated on a large test set for English. The quality of the constructed dictionaries is comparable to the expert ones. The correlation between predicted and expert ratings is higher comparing to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 具体/抽象词被用于越来越多的心理学和神经生理学研究中。对于一些语言，大型词典是手动创建的。这是一个非常耗时且成本高昂的过程。为了自动生成大型高质量具体/抽象词词典，需要推断在较小样本上获得的专家评估。出现的研究问题是这样的样本应该有多小才能进行足够好的外推。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动对单词的具体性进行排名的方法，并提出了一种显着减少专家评估量的方法。该方法已在大型英语测试集上进行了评估。构建的词典质量可与专家词典相媲美。与最先进的方法相比，预测评分和专家评分之间的相关性更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于小规模人工词典自动生成大规模具体性/抽象性词汇词典的方法。
AI.motivation: 手动构建大规模具体/抽象词汇词典耗时费力，而现有方法依赖大量专家评估数据，需探索更高效的小样本外推方案。
AI.method: 通过自动排名算法对词汇具体性进行评估，并在英语大规模测试集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 生成词典质量与专家评估相当，预测评分与专家评分相关性优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能显著减少专家评估工作量，同时保持词典质量，为多语言研究提供可行方案。

authors_text: Arlo Faria,Adam Janin,Korbinian Riedhammer,Sidhi Adkoli
title: Toward Zero Oracle Word Error Rate on the Switchboard Benchmark
title_zh: Switchboard 基准上的 Oracle 字错误率趋向于零
abstract: The "Switchboard benchmark" is a very well-known test set in automatic speech recognition (ASR) research, establishing record-setting performance for systems that claim human-level transcription accuracy. This work highlights lesser-known practical considerations of this evaluation, demonstrating major improvements in word error rate (WER) by correcting the reference transcriptions and deviating from the official scoring methodology. In this more detailed and reproducible scheme, even commercial ASR systems can score below 5% WER and the established record for a research system is lowered to 2.3%. An alternative metric of transcript precision is proposed, which does not penalize deletions and appears to be more discriminating for human vs. machine performance. While commercial ASR systems are still below this threshold, a research system is shown to clearly surpass the accuracy of commercial human speech recognition. This work also explores using standardized scoring tools to compute oracle WER by selecting the best among a list of alternatives. A phrase alternatives representation is compared to utterance-level N-best lists and word-level data structures; using dense lattices and adding out-of-vocabulary words, this achieves an oracle WER of 0.18%.
summary: The "Switchboard benchmark" is a very well-known test set in automatic speech recognition (ASR) research, establishing record-setting performance for systems that claim human-level transcription accuracy. This work highlights lesser-known practical considerations of this evaluation, demonstrating major improvements in word error rate (WER) by correcting the reference transcriptions and deviating from the official scoring methodology. In this more detailed and reproducible scheme, even commercial ASR systems can score below 5% WER and the established record for a research system is lowered to 2.3%. An alternative metric of transcript precision is proposed, which does not penalize deletions and appears to be more discriminating for human vs. machine performance. While commercial ASR systems are still below this threshold, a research system is shown to clearly surpass the accuracy of commercial human speech recognition. This work also explores using standardized scoring tools to compute oracle WER by selecting the best among a list of alternatives. A phrase alternatives representation is compared to utterance-level N-best lists and word-level data structures; using dense lattices and adding out-of-vocabulary words, this achieves an oracle WER of 0.18%.
abstract_zh: “Switchboard 基准测试”是自动语音识别 (ASR) 研究中非常著名的测试集，为声称达到人类水平转录准确性的系统创造了创纪录的性能。这项工作强调了该评估鲜为人知的实际考虑因素，通过纠正参考转录和偏离官方评分方法，展示了单词错误率 (WER) 的重大改进。在这个更详细和可重复的方案中，即使是商业 ASR 系统的 WER 得分也可以低于 5%，而研究系统的既定记录则降至 2.3%。提出了一种转录精度的替代指标，它不会惩罚删除，并且似乎对人类与机器的性能更具区分性。虽然商业 ASR 系统仍低于此阈值，但研究系统已显示明显超过商业人类语音识别的准确性。这项工作还探索了使用标准化评分工具通过从一系列替代方案中选择最佳方案来计算预言机 WER。将短语替代表示与话语级 N 最佳列表和单词级数据结构进行比较；使用密集格子并添加词汇表外的单词，可以实现 0.18% 的预言机 WER。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进参考转录和评分方法，在Switchboard基准测试中实现接近零的Oracle词错误率（WER）。
AI.motivation: 现有Switchboard基准测试存在未被充分重视的实践问题，导致词错误率评估不够准确，需通过修正参考转录和优化评分方法提升评估可靠性。
AI.method: 修正参考转录，采用更精细的评分方案；提出不惩罚删除操作的转录精确度指标；利用标准化工具计算Oracle WER，结合密集格子和词库外词汇优化替代方案。
AI.result: 商业ASR系统WER低于5%，研究系统降至2.3%；通过密集格子和词库外词汇优化，实现0.18%的Oracle WER。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的评估方法显著提升Switchboard基准的准确性，证明研究系统可超越商业ASR的转录精度。

While commercial ASR systems are still below this threshold, a research system is shown to clearly surpass the accuracy of commercial human speech recognition. This work also explores using standardized scoring tools to compute oracle WER by selecting the best among a list of alternatives. A phrase alternatives representation is compared to utterance-level N-best lists and word-level data structures; using dense lattices and adding out-of-vocabulary words, this achieves an oracle WER of 0.18%. “Switchboard 基准测试”是自动语音识别 (ASR) 研究中非常著名的测试集，为声称达到人类水平转录准确性的系统创造了创纪录的性能。这项工作强调了该评估鲜为人知的实际考虑因素，通过纠正参考转录和偏离官方评分方法，展示了单词错误率 (WER) 的重大改进。在这个更详细和可重复的方案中，即使是商业 ASR 系统的 WER 得分也可以低于 5%，而研究系统的既定记录则降至 2.3%。提出了一种转录精度的替代指标，它不会惩罚删除，并且似乎对人类与机器的性能更具区分性。虽然商业 ASR 系统仍低于此阈值，但研究系统已显示明显超过商业人类语音识别的准确性。这项工作还探索了使用标准化评分工具通过从一系列替代方案中选择最佳方案来计算预言机 WER。将短语替代表示与话语级 N 最佳列表和单词级数据结构进行比较；使用密集格子并添加词汇表外的单词，可以实现 0.18% 的预言机 WER。 本文旨在通过改进参考转录和评分方法，在Switchboard基准测试中实现接近零的Oracle词错误率（WER）。 Arlo Faria,Adam Janin,Korbinian Riedhammer,Sidhi Adkoli eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Anand Subramoney,Khaleelulla Khan Nazeer,Mark Schöne,Christian Mayr,David Kappel
title: Efficient recurrent architectures through activity sparsity and sparse back-propagation through time
title_zh: 通过活动稀疏性和随时间的稀疏反向传播实现高效的循环架构
comment: Published as notable-top-25% paper in ICLR 2023
comments: Published as notable-top-25% paper in ICLR 2023
abstract: Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) are well suited for solving sequence tasks in resource-constrained systems due to their expressivity and low computational requirements. However, there is still a need to bridge the gap between what RNNs are capable of in terms of efficiency and performance and real-world application requirements. The memory and computational requirements arising from propagating the activations of all the neurons at every time step to every connected neuron, together with the sequential dependence of activations, contribute to the inefficiency of training and using RNNs. We propose a solution inspired by biological neuron dynamics that makes the communication between RNN units sparse and discrete. This makes the backward pass with backpropagation through time (BPTT) computationally sparse and efficient as well. We base our model on the gated recurrent unit (GRU), extending it with units that emit discrete events for communication triggered by a threshold so that no information is communicated to other units in the absence of events. We show theoretically that the communication between units, and hence the computation required for both the forward and backward passes, scales with the number of events in the network. Our model achieves efficiency without compromising task performance, demonstrating competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art recurrent network models in real-world tasks, including language modeling. The dynamic activity sparsity mechanism also makes our model well suited for novel energy-efficient neuromorphic hardware. Code is available at https://github.com/KhaleelKhan/EvNN/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过活动稀疏性和稀疏反向传播时间（BPTT）提升循环神经网络（RNN）效率的架构，旨在解决传统RNN在计算和内存需求上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN在处理序列任务时因全连接激活传播和时序依赖导致计算与内存开销大，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 受生物神经元动态启发，扩展门控循环单元（GRU），引入基于阈值触发的离散事件通信机制，使神经元间通信稀疏化，从而降低BPTT计算复杂度。
AI.result: 模型在保持任务性能的同时显著提升效率，在语言建模等实际任务中表现与前沿模型相当，并适配新型节能类脑硬件。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态活动稀疏性机制，为高效RNN设计提供了新思路，适用于资源受限场景与下一代神经形态计算硬件。

authors_text: Junchu Huang,Weijie Chen,Shicai Yang,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu,Yueting Zhuang
title: Transductive CLIP with Class-Conditional Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 具有类条件对比学习的转导式 CLIP
abstract: Inspired by the remarkable zero-shot generalization capacity of vision-language pre-trained model, we seek to leverage the supervision from CLIP model to alleviate the burden of data labeling. However, such supervision inevitably contains the label noise, which significantly degrades the discriminative power of the classification model. In this work, we propose Transductive CLIP, a novel framework for learning a classification network with noisy labels from scratch. Firstly, a class-conditional contrastive learning mechanism is proposed to mitigate the reliance on pseudo labels and boost the tolerance to noisy labels. Secondly, ensemble labels is adopted as a pseudo label updating strategy to stabilize the training of deep neural networks with noisy labels. This framework can reduce the impact of noisy labels from CLIP model effectively by combining both techniques. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the substantial improvements over other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Inspired by the remarkable zero-shot generalization capacity of vision-language pre-trained model, we seek to leverage the supervision from CLIP model to alleviate the burden of data labeling. However, such supervision inevitably contains the label noise, which significantly degrades the discriminative power of the classification model. In this work, we propose Transductive CLIP, a novel framework for learning a classification network with noisy labels from scratch. Firstly, a class-conditional contrastive learning mechanism is proposed to mitigate the reliance on pseudo labels and boost the tolerance to noisy labels. Secondly, ensemble labels is adopted as a pseudo label updating strategy to stabilize the training of deep neural networks with noisy labels. This framework can reduce the impact of noisy labels from CLIP model effectively by combining both techniques. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the substantial improvements over other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 受到视觉语言预训练模型卓越的零样本泛化能力的启发，我们寻求利用 CLIP 模型的监督来减轻数据标记的负担。然而，这种监督不可避免地包含标签噪声，这显着降低了分类模型的判别能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Transitive CLIP，这是一种新的框架，用于从头开始学习带有噪声标签的分类网络。首先，提出了一种类条件对比学习机制，以减轻对伪标签的依赖并提高对噪声标签的容忍度。其次，采用集成标签作为伪标签更新策略，以稳定带有噪声标签的深度神经网络的训练。该框架可以通过结合这两种技术来有效地减少来自 CLIP 模型的噪声标签的影响。对多个基准数据集的实验表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，有显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Transductive CLIP的新框架，旨在利用CLIP模型的监督信息来训练分类网络，同时有效应对标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管CLIP模型具有强大的零样本泛化能力，但其提供的监督信息包含标签噪声，这会显著降低分类模型的判别能力，因此需要一种新方法来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 提出类条件对比学习机制以减少对伪标签的依赖，并采用集成标签策略更新伪标签，从而稳定带有噪声标签的深度网络训练过程。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该框架在现有最先进方法的基础上实现了显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合类条件对比学习和集成标签策略，本文提出的框架能有效降低CLIP模型标签噪声的影响，提升分类性能。

authors_text: Yunxin Sang,Yang Bao
title: Predicting Corporate Risk by Jointly Modeling Company Networks and Dialogues in Earnings Conference Calls
title_zh: 通过对公司网络和收益电话会议中的对话进行联合建模来预测公司风险
abstract: Earnings conference calls are significant information events for volatility forecasting, which is essential for financial risk management and asset pricing. Although some recent volatility forecasting models have utilized the textual content of conference calls, the dialogue structures of conference calls and company relationships are almost ignored in extant literature. To bridge this gap, we propose a new model called Temporal Virtual Graph Neural Network (TVGNN) for volatility forecasting by jointly modeling conference call dialogues and company networks. Our model differs from existing models in several important ways. First, we propose to exploit more dialogue structures by encoding position, utterance, speaker role, and Q\&A segments. Second, we propose to encode the market states for volatility forecasting by extending the Gated Recurrent Units (GRU). Third, we propose a new method for constructing temporal company networks in which the messages can only flow from temporally preceding to successive nodes, and extend the Graph Attention Networks (GAT) for modeling company relationships. We collect conference call transcripts of S\&P500 companies from 2008 to 2019, and construct a dataset of conference call dialogues with additional information on dialogue structures and company networks. Empirical results on our dataset demonstrate the superiority of our model over competitive baselines for volatility forecasting. We also conduct supplementary analyses to examine the effectiveness of our model's key components and interpretability.
summary: Earnings conference calls are significant information events for volatility forecasting, which is essential for financial risk management and asset pricing. Although some recent volatility forecasting models have utilized the textual content of conference calls, the dialogue structures of conference calls and company relationships are almost ignored in extant literature. Second, we propose to encode the market states for volatility forecasting by extending the Gated Recurrent Units (GRU). Third, we propose a new method for constructing temporal company networks in which the messages can only flow from temporally preceding to successive nodes, and extend the Graph Attention Networks (GAT) for modeling company relationships. We collect conference call transcripts of S\&P500 companies from 2008 to 2019, and construct a dataset of conference call dialogues with additional information on dialogue structures and company networks. Empirical results on our dataset demonstrate the superiority of our model over competitive baselines for volatility forecasting. We also conduct supplementary analyses to examine the effectiveness of our model's key components and interpretability.
abstract_zh: 收益电话会议是波动性预测的重要信息事件，这对于金融风险管理和资产定价至关重要。尽管最近的一些波动性预测模型已经利用了电话会议的文本内容，但现有文献中几乎忽略了电话会议的对话结构和公司关系。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种称为时态虚拟图神经网络（TVGNN）的新模型，通过对电话会议对话和公司网络进行联合建模来预测波动性。 Our model differs from existing models in several important ways. First, we propose to exploit more dialogue structures by encoding position, utterance, speaker role, and Q\&A segments.其次，我们建议通过扩展门控循环单元（GRU）来对市场状态进行编码以进行波动率预测。第三，我们提出了一种构建时间公司网络的新方法，其中消息只能从时间上的前一个节点流到后继节点，并扩展图注意力网络（GAT）来建模公司关系。我们收集了 2008 年至 2019 年标准普尔 500 强公司的电话会议记录，并构建了电话会议对话数据集，其中包含有关对话结构和公司网络的附加信息。我们数据集的实证结果证明了我们的模型相对于波动性预测的竞争基线的优越性。我们还进行补充分析，以检查模型关键组成部分的有效性和可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合公司网络和财报电话会议对话结构的模型，用于预测企业风险和波动率。
AI.motivation: 现有波动率预测模型忽视了财报电话会议的对话结构和公司间关系，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 设计时序虚拟图神经网络（TVGNN），融合对话位置、发言角色、问答结构编码，扩展GRU处理市场状态，并构建时序公司网络以捕捉动态关系。
AI.result: 在S&P500公司2008-2019数据集上，该模型在波动率预测任务中优于现有基准模型，且关键组件有效性得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模对话结构与公司网络能显著提升波动率预测性能，为金融风险管理提供新方法。

search_text: Predicting Corporate Risk by Jointly Modeling Company Networks and Dialogues in Earnings Conference Calls 通过对公司网络和收益电话会议中的对话进行联合建模来预测公司风险 Earnings conference calls are significant information events for volatility forecasting, which is essential for financial risk management and asset pricing. Although some recent volatility forecasting models have utilized the textual content of conference calls, the dialogue structures of conference calls and company relationships are almost ignored in extant literature. To bridge this gap, we propose a new model called Temporal Virtual Graph Neural Network (TVGNN) for volatility forecasting by jointly modeling conference call dialogues and company networks. Our model differs from existing models in several important ways. First, we propose to exploit more dialogue structures by encoding position, utterance, speaker role, and Q\&A segments. Second, we propose to encode the market states for volatility forecasting by extending the Gated Recurrent Units (GRU). Third, we propose a new method for constructing temporal company networks in which the messages can only flow from temporally preceding to successive nodes, and extend the Graph Attention Networks (GAT) for modeling company relationships. We collect conference call transcripts of S\&P500 companies from 2008 to 2019, and construct a dataset of conference call dialogues with additional information on dialogue structures and company networks. Empirical results on our dataset demonstrate the superiority of our model over competitive baselines for volatility forecasting. We also conduct supplementary analyses to examine the effectiveness of our model's key components and interpretability. 收益电话会议是波动性预测的重要信息事件，这对于金融风险管理和资产定价至关重要。尽管最近的一些波动性预测模型已经利用了电话会议的文本内容，但现有文献中几乎忽略了电话会议的对话结构和公司关系。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种称为时态虚拟图神经网络（TVGNN）的新模型，通过对电话会议对话和公司网络进行联合建模来预测波动性。 Our model differs from existing models in several important ways. First, we propose to exploit more dialogue structures by encoding position, utterance, speaker role, and Q\&A segments.其次，我们建议通过扩展门控循环单元（GRU）来对市场状态进行编码以进行波动率预测。第三，我们提出了一种构建时间公司网络的新方法，其中消息只能从时间上的前一个节点流到后继节点，并扩展图注意力网络（GAT）来建模公司关系。我们收集了 2008 年至 2019 年标准普尔 500 强公司的电话会议记录，并构建了电话会议对话数据集，其中包含有关对话结构和公司网络的附加信息。我们数据集的实证结果证明了我们的模型相对于波动性预测的竞争基线的优越性。我们还进行补充分析，以检查模型关键组成部分的有效性和可解释性。 本文提出一种结合公司网络和财报电话会议对话结构的模型，用于预测企业风险和波动率。 Yunxin Sang,Yang Bao cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CE,cs.LG

authors_text: Chandra Shekhar,Jagnyashini Debadarshini,Sudipta Saha
title: LiVeR: Lightweight Vehicle Detection and Classification in Real-Time
title_zh: LiVer：实时轻型车辆检测和分类
abstract: Detection and classification of vehicles are very significant components in an Intelligent-Transportation System. Existing solutions not only use heavy-weight and costly equipment, but also largely depend on constant cloud (Internet) connectivity, as well as adequate uninterrupted power-supply. Such dependencies make these solutions fundamentally impractical considering the possible adversities of outdoor environment as well as requirement of correlated wide-area operation. For practical use, apart from being technically sound and accurate, a solution has to be lightweight, cost-effective, easy-to-install, flexible as well as supporting efficient time-correlated coverage over large area. In this work we propose an IoT-assisted strategy to fulfil all these goals together. We adopt a top-down approach where we first introduce a lightweight framework for time-correlated low-cost wide-area measurement and then reuse the concept for developing the individual measurement units. Our extensive outdoor measurement studies and trace-based simulation on the empirical data show about 98% accuracy in vehicle detection and upto 93% of accuracy in classification of the vehicles over moderately busy urban roads.
summary: Detection and classification of vehicles are very significant components in an Intelligent-Transportation System. Existing solutions not only use heavy-weight and costly equipment, but also largely depend on constant cloud (Internet) connectivity, as well as adequate uninterrupted power-supply. Such dependencies make these solutions fundamentally impractical considering the possible adversities of outdoor environment as well as requirement of correlated wide-area operation. For practical use, apart from being technically sound and accurate, a solution has to be lightweight, cost-effective, easy-to-install, flexible as well as supporting efficient time-correlated coverage over large area. In this work we propose an IoT-assisted strategy to fulfil all these goals together. We adopt a top-down approach where we first introduce a lightweight framework for time-correlated low-cost wide-area measurement and then reuse the concept for developing the individual measurement units. Our extensive outdoor measurement studies and trace-based simulation on the empirical data show about 98% accuracy in vehicle detection and upto 93% of accuracy in classification of the vehicles over moderately busy urban roads.
abstract_zh: 车辆的检测和分类是智能交通系统中非常重要的组成部分。现有的解决方案不仅使用笨重且昂贵的设备，而且在很大程度上依赖于持续的云（互联网）连接以及充足的不间断电源。考虑到室外环境可能存在的不利条件以及相关广域操作的要求，这种依赖性使得这些解决方案根本不切实际。对于实际使用，除了技术上合理和准确之外，解决方案还必须轻便、经济高效、易于安装、灵活，并支持大面积的高效时间相关覆盖。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种物联网辅助策略来共同实现所有这些目标。我们采用自上而下的方法，首先引入用于时间相关的低成本广域测量的轻量级框架，然后重用该概念来开发各个测量单元。我们广泛的户外测量研究和基于轨迹的经验数据模拟表明，在中等繁忙的城市道路上，车辆检测的准确度约为 98%，车辆分类的准确度高达 93%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级实时车辆检测与分类系统LiVeR，用于智能交通场景下的低成本广域部署。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆检测方案依赖昂贵设备、持续云连接和稳定供电，难以适应户外复杂环境及大规模区域覆盖需求。
AI.method: 采用物联网辅助的自上而下架构，设计轻量级广域测量框架并复用至单个检测单元，实现低功耗实时处理。
AI.result: 户外实测与仿真数据显示，系统在中等繁忙城市道路的车辆检测准确率达98%，分类准确率高达93%。
AI.conclusion: 该方案通过轻量化设计和物联网协同，在保证检测精度的同时满足实际部署的经济性、灵活性和广域覆盖需求。

authors_text: Peng Chen,Zhimin Chen,Pu Miao,Yun Chen
title: RIS-ADMM: A RIS and ADMM-Based Passive and Sparse Sensing Method With Interference Removal
title_zh: RIS-ADMM：一种基于 RIS 和 ADMM 的无源稀疏传感方法，具有干扰消除功能
abstract: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) emerge as promising technologies in future radar and wireless communication domains. This letter addresses the passive sensing issue utilizing wireless communication signals and RIS amidst interference from wireless access points (APs). We introduce an atomic norm minimization (ANM) approach to leverage spatial domain target sparsity and estimate the direction of arrival (DOA). However, the conventional semidefinite programming (SDP)-based solutions for the ANM problem are complex and lack efficient realization. Consequently, we propose a RIS-ADMM method, an innovative alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM)-based iterative approach. This method yields closed-form expressions and effectively suppresses interference signals. Simulation outcomes affirm that our RIS-ADMM method surpasses existing techniques in DOA estimation accuracy while maintaining low computational complexity. The code for the proposed method is available online \url{https://github.com/chenpengseu/RIS-ADMM.git}.
summary: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) emerge as promising technologies in future radar and wireless communication domains. This letter addresses the passive sensing issue utilizing wireless communication signals and RIS amidst interference from wireless access points (APs). We introduce an atomic norm minimization (ANM) approach to leverage spatial domain target sparsity and estimate the direction of arrival (DOA). However, the conventional semidefinite programming (SDP)-based solutions for the ANM problem are complex and lack efficient realization. Consequently, we propose a RIS-ADMM method, an innovative alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM)-based iterative approach. This method yields closed-form expressions and effectively suppresses interference signals. Simulation outcomes affirm that our RIS-ADMM method surpasses existing techniques in DOA estimation accuracy while maintaining low computational complexity. The code for the proposed method is available online \url{https://github.com/chenpengseu/RIS-ADMM.git}.
abstract_zh: 可重构智能表面（RIS）成为未来雷达和无线通信领域有前景的技术。这封信解决了在无线接入点 (AP) 干扰中利用无线通信信号和 RIS 的被动传感问题。我们引入了原子范数最小化（ANM）方法来利用空间域目标稀疏性并估计到达方向（DOA）。然而，传统的基于半定规划（SDP）的ANM问题解决方案非常复杂并且缺乏有效的实现。因此，我们提出了 RIS-ADMM 方法，这是一种创新的基于交替方向乘法器 (ADMM) 的迭代方法。该方法产生闭式表达式并有效抑制干扰信号。仿真结果证实，我们的 RIS-ADMM 方法在 DOA 估计精度方面超越了现有技术，同时保持了较低的计算复杂性。所提出方法的代码可在线获取\url{https://github.com/chenpengseu/RIS-ADMM.git}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RIS和ADMM的被动稀疏感知方法，用于在无线接入点干扰下利用通信信号进行方向到达（DOA）估计。
AI.motivation: 传统基于半定规划（SDP）的原子范数最小化（ANM）方法计算复杂度高且实现效率低，难以有效应对无线接入点干扰下的稀疏目标感知问题。
AI.method: 提出RIS-ADMM方法，结合可重构智能表面（RIS）与交替方向乘子法（ADMM）迭代算法，通过闭式表达式实现干扰抑制与DOA估计。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在保持低计算复杂度的同时，DOA估计精度优于现有技术，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: RIS-ADMM方法有效解决了干扰环境下稀疏目标感知问题，为未来雷达与通信融合系统提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在保持低计算复杂度的同时，DOA估计精度优于现有技术，且代码已开源。

search_text: RIS-ADMM: A RIS and ADMM-Based Passive and Sparse Sensing Method With Interference Removal RIS-ADMM：一种基于 RIS 和 ADMM 的无源稀疏传感方法，具有干扰消除功能 Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) emerge as promising technologies in future radar and wireless communication domains. This letter addresses the passive sensing issue utilizing wireless communication signals and RIS amidst interference from wireless access points (APs). We introduce an atomic norm minimization (ANM) approach to leverage spatial domain target sparsity and estimate the direction of arrival (DOA). However, the conventional semidefinite programming (SDP)-based solutions for the ANM problem are complex and lack efficient realization. Consequently, we propose a RIS-ADMM method, an innovative alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM)-based iterative approach. This method yields closed-form expressions and effectively suppresses interference signals. Simulation outcomes affirm that our RIS-ADMM method surpasses existing techniques in DOA estimation accuracy while maintaining low computational complexity. The code for the proposed method is available online \url{https://github.com/chenpengseu/RIS-ADMM.git}. 可重构智能表面（RIS）成为未来雷达和无线通信领域有前景的技术。这封信解决了在无线接入点 (AP) 干扰中利用无线通信信号和 RIS 的被动传感问题。我们引入了原子范数最小化（ANM）方法来利用空间域目标稀疏性并估计到达方向（DOA）。然而，传统的基于半定规划（SDP）的ANM问题解决方案非常复杂并且缺乏有效的实现。因此，我们提出了 RIS-ADMM 方法，这是一种创新的基于交替方向乘法器 (ADMM) 的迭代方法。该方法产生闭式表达式并有效抑制干扰信号。仿真结果证实，我们的 RIS-ADMM 方法在 DOA 估计精度方面超越了现有技术，同时保持了较低的计算复杂性。所提出方法的代码可在线获取\url{https://github.com/chenpengseu/RIS-ADMM.git}。 本文提出一种基于RIS和ADMM的被动稀疏感知方法，用于在无线接入点干扰下利用通信信号进行方向到达（DOA）估计。 Peng Chen,Zhimin Chen,Pu Miao,Yun Chen eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.IT

authors_text: Phillip Lippe,Sara Magliacane,Sindy Löwe,Yuki M. Asano,Taco Cohen,Efstratios Gavves
title: Causal Representation Learning for Instantaneous and Temporal Effects in Interactive Systems
title_zh: 交互式系统中瞬时和时间效应的因果表示学习
comment: Published at International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2023
comments: Published at International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2023
abstract: Causal representation learning is the task of identifying the underlying causal variables and their relations from high-dimensional observations, such as images. Recent work has shown that one can reconstruct the causal variables from temporal sequences of observations under the assumption that there are no instantaneous causal relations between them. In practical applications, however, our measurement or frame rate might be slower than many of the causal effects. This effectively creates "instantaneous" effects and invalidates previous identifiability results. To address this issue, we propose iCITRIS, a causal representation learning method that allows for instantaneous effects in intervened temporal sequences when intervention targets can be observed, e.g., as actions of an agent. iCITRIS identifies the potentially multidimensional causal variables from temporal observations, while simultaneously using a differentiable causal discovery method to learn their causal graph. In experiments on three datasets of interactive systems, iCITRIS accurately identifies the causal variables and their causal graph.
summary: Causal representation learning is the task of identifying the underlying causal variables and their relations from high-dimensional observations, such as images. Recent work has shown that one can reconstruct the causal variables from temporal sequences of observations under the assumption that there are no instantaneous causal relations between them. In practical applications, however, our measurement or frame rate might be slower than many of the causal effects. This effectively creates "instantaneous" effects and invalidates previous identifiability results. To address this issue, we propose iCITRIS, a causal representation learning method that allows for instantaneous effects in intervened temporal sequences when intervention targets can be observed, e.g., as actions of an agent. iCITRIS identifies the potentially multidimensional causal variables from temporal observations, while simultaneously using a differentiable causal discovery method to learn their causal graph. In experiments on three datasets of interactive systems, iCITRIS accurately identifies the causal variables and their causal graph.
abstract_zh: 因果表示学习是从高维观察（例如图像）中识别潜在因果变量及其关系的任务。最近的工作表明，在假设因果变量之间不存在瞬时因果关系的情况下，人们可以从观察的时间序列中重建因果变量。 In practical applications, however, our measurement or frame rate might be slower than many of the causal effects. This effectively creates "instantaneous" effects and invalidates previous identifiability results.为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 iCITRIS，这是一种因果表示学习方法，当可以观察到干预目标时（例如，作为代理的动作），可以在干预时间序列中产生瞬时效果。 iCITRIS 从时间观察中识别潜在的多维因果变量，同时使用可微的因果发现方法来学习其因果图。 In experiments on three datasets of interactive systems, iCITRIS accurately identifies the causal variables and their causal graph.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为iCITRIS的因果表示学习方法，用于处理交互系统中存在瞬时效应和时序效应的因果变量识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有因果表示学习方法假设观测数据中不存在瞬时因果关系，但实际应用中由于采样率限制可能导致瞬时效应被误判，从而破坏模型的可识别性。
AI.method: iCITRIS通过结合干预目标观测（如智能体动作）和可微分因果发现方法，在时序观测中同时识别多维因果变量及其因果图结构，支持瞬时效应建模。
AI.result: 在三个交互系统数据集上的实验表明，iCITRIS能准确识别因果变量及因果图，验证了方法对瞬时效应的有效性。
AI.conclusion: iCITRIS为存在瞬时效应的因果表示学习提供了新思路，拓展了因果发现方法在实际交互系统的应用范围。

authors_text: Yilu Guo,Shicai Yang,Weijie Chen,Liang Ma,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu
title: 2nd Place Solution for ICCV 2021 VIPriors Image Classification Challenge: An Attract-and-Repulse Learning Approach
title_zh: ICCV 2021 VIPriors 图像分类挑战赛第二名解决方案：吸引与排斥学习方法
comment: 2nd Place Solution for ICCV 2021 VIPriors Image Classification Challenge
comments: 2nd Place Solution for ICCV 2021 VIPriors Image Classification Challenge
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved significant success in image classification by utilizing large-scale datasets. However, it is still of great challenge to learn from scratch on small-scale datasets efficiently and effectively. With limited training datasets, the concepts of categories will be ambiguous since the over-parameterized CNNs tend to simply memorize the dataset, leading to poor generalization capacity. Therefore, it is crucial to study how to learn more discriminative representations while avoiding over-fitting. Since the concepts of categories tend to be ambiguous, it is important to catch more individual-wise information. Thus, we propose a new framework, termed Attract-and-Repulse, which consists of Contrastive Regularization (CR) to enrich the feature representations, Symmetric Cross Entropy (SCE) to balance the fitting for different classes and Mean Teacher to calibrate label information. Specifically, SCE and CR learn discriminative representations while alleviating over-fitting by the adaptive trade-off between the information of classes (attract) and instances (repulse). After that, Mean Teacher is used to further improve the performance via calibrating more accurate soft pseudo labels. Sufficient experiments validate the effectiveness of the Attract-and-Repulse framework. Together with other strategies, such as aggressive data augmentation, TenCrop inference, and models ensembling, we achieve the second place in ICCV 2021 VIPriors Image Classification Challenge.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved significant success in image classification by utilizing large-scale datasets. However, it is still of great challenge to learn from scratch on small-scale datasets efficiently and effectively. With limited training datasets, the concepts of categories will be ambiguous since the over-parameterized CNNs tend to simply memorize the dataset, leading to poor generalization capacity. Therefore, it is crucial to study how to learn more discriminative representations while avoiding over-fitting. Since the concepts of categories tend to be ambiguous, it is important to catch more individual-wise information. Thus, we propose a new framework, termed Attract-and-Repulse, which consists of Contrastive Regularization (CR) to enrich the feature representations, Symmetric Cross Entropy (SCE) to balance the fitting for different classes and Mean Teacher to calibrate label information. Specifically, SCE and CR learn discriminative representations while alleviating over-fitting by the adaptive trade-off between the information of classes (attract) and instances (repulse). After that, Mean Teacher is used to further improve the performance via calibrating more accurate soft pseudo labels. Sufficient experiments validate the effectiveness of the Attract-and-Repulse framework. Together with other strategies, such as aggressive data augmentation, TenCrop inference, and models ensembling, we achieve the second place in ICCV 2021 VIPriors Image Classification Challenge.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）利用大规模数据集在图像分类方面取得了巨大成功。然而，在小规模数据集上高效、有效地从头开始学习仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在训练数据集有限的情况下，过度参数化的 CNN 往往会简单地记住数据集，从而导致类别的概念变得模糊，从而导致泛化能力较差。因此，研究如何学习更具区分性的表示，同时避免过度拟合至关重要。由于类别的概念往往含糊不清，因此捕获更多个人信息非常重要。因此，我们提出了一个新的框架，称为吸引与排斥，它由对比正则化（CR）来丰富特征表示、对称交叉熵（SCE）来平衡不同类别的拟合以及平均教师来校准标签信息组成。具体来说，SCE 和 CR 学习判别性表示，同时通过类（吸引）和实例（排斥）信息之间的自适应权衡来减轻过度拟合。之后，使用 Mean Teacher 通过校准更准确的软伪标签来进一步提高性能。足够的实验验证了吸引与排斥框架的有效性。与其他策略（例如积极的数据增强、TenCrop 推理和模型集成）一起，我们在 ICCV 2021 VIPriors 图像分类挑战赛中获得了第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Attract-and-Repulse的框架，在小规模数据集上提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络在小规模数据集上易过拟合，导致泛化能力差，需学习更具判别性的特征表示。
AI.method: 结合对比正则化（CR）、对称交叉熵（SCE）和均值教师模块，通过类间吸引与实例间排斥的平衡优化表示，并采用数据增强和模型集成策略。
AI.result: 在ICCV 2021 VIPriors图像分类挑战赛中获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: Attract-and-Repulse框架有效提升了小数据集下的分类性能，验证了其在避免过拟合和增强表示方面的优势。
