authors_text: Jinbao Miao,Wensheng Gan,Shicheng Wan,Yongdong Wu,Philippe Fournier-Viger
title: Towards Target High-Utility Itemsets
title_zh: 迈向目标高实用性项目集
abstract: For applied intelligence, utility-driven pattern discovery algorithms can identify insightful and useful patterns in databases. However, in these techniques for pattern discovery, the number of patterns can be huge, and the user is often only interested in a few of those patterns. Hence, targeted high-utility itemset mining has emerged as a key research topic, where the aim is to find a subset of patterns that meet a targeted pattern constraint instead of all patterns. This is a challenging task because efficiently finding tailored patterns in a very large search space requires a targeted mining algorithm. A first algorithm called TargetUM has been proposed, which adopts an approach similar to post-processing using a tree structure, but the running time and memory consumption are unsatisfactory in many situations. In this paper, we address this issue by proposing a novel list-based algorithm with pattern matching mechanism, named THUIM (Targeted High-Utility Itemset Mining), which can quickly match high-utility itemsets during the mining process to select the targeted patterns. Extensive experiments were conducted on different datasets to compare the performance of the proposed algorithm with state-of-the-art algorithms. Results show that THUIM performs very well in terms of runtime and memory consumption, and has good scalability compared to TargetUM.
summary: For applied intelligence, utility-driven pattern discovery algorithms can identify insightful and useful patterns in databases. However, in these techniques for pattern discovery, the number of patterns can be huge, and the user is often only interested in a few of those patterns. Hence, targeted high-utility itemset mining has emerged as a key research topic, where the aim is to find a subset of patterns that meet a targeted pattern constraint instead of all patterns. This is a challenging task because efficiently finding tailored patterns in a very large search space requires a targeted mining algorithm. A first algorithm called TargetUM has been proposed, which adopts an approach similar to post-processing using a tree structure, but the running time and memory consumption are unsatisfactory in many situations. In this paper, we address this issue by proposing a novel list-based algorithm with pattern matching mechanism, named THUIM (Targeted High-Utility Itemset Mining), which can quickly match high-utility itemsets during the mining process to select the targeted patterns. Extensive experiments were conducted on different datasets to compare the performance of the proposed algorithm with state-of-the-art algorithms. Results show that THUIM performs very well in terms of runtime and memory consumption, and has good scalability compared to TargetUM.
abstract_zh: 对于应用智能，实用程序驱动的模式发现算法可以识别数据库中富有洞察力和有用的模式。然而，在这些模式发现技术中，模式的数量可能很大，并且用户通常只对其中的一些模式感兴趣。因此，有针对性的高效用项集挖掘已成为一个关键研究课题，其目的是找到满足目标模式约束的模式子集而不是所有模式。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为在非常大的搜索空间中有效地找到定制模式需要有针对性的挖掘算法。人们提出了第一个名为 TargetUM 的算法，它采用类似于使用树结构进行后处理的方法，但在许多情况下运行时间和内存消耗并不令人满意。在本文中，我们通过提出一种具有模式匹配机制的基于列表的新型算法来解决这个问题，称为THUIM（目标高效用项集挖掘），它可以在挖掘过程中快速匹配高效用项集以选择目标模式。在不同的数据集上进行了大量的实验，以将所提出的算法与最先进的算法的性能进行比较。结果表明，THUIM 在运行时和内存消耗方面表现非常好，并且与 TargetUM 相比具有良好的可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为THUIM的新算法，用于高效挖掘目标高效用项集，以解决现有方法在运行时间和内存消耗上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有目标高效用项集挖掘算法（如TargetUM）在处理大规模数据集时存在运行时间长和内存消耗大的问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于列表结构和模式匹配机制的THUIM算法，在挖掘过程中直接匹配高效用项集以快速筛选目标模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，THUIM在运行时间、内存消耗和可扩展性方面均优于TargetUM等现有算法。
AI.conclusion: THUIM通过创新的列表结构和模式匹配机制，有效提升了目标高效用项集挖掘的效率，为实际应用提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Andreas Pieris,Jorge Salas
title: Absolute Expressiveness of Subgraph-based Centrality Measures
title_zh: 基于子图的中心性度量的绝对表达力
abstract: In graph-based applications, a common task is to pinpoint the most important or ``central'' vertex in a (directed or undirected) graph, or rank the vertices of a graph according to their importance. To this end, a plethora of so-called centrality measures have been proposed in the literature. Such measures assess which vertices in a graph are the most important ones by analyzing the structure of the underlying graph. A family of centrality measures that are suited for graph databases has been recently proposed by relying on the following simple principle: the importance of a vertex in a graph is relative to the number of ``relevant'' connected subgraphs surrounding it; we refer to the members of this family as subgraph-based centrality measures. Although it has been shown that such measures enjoy several favourable properties, their absolute expressiveness remains largely unexplored. The goal of this work is to precisely characterize the absolute expressiveness of the family of subgraph-based centrality measures by considering both directed and undirected graphs. To this end, we characterize when an arbitrary centrality measure is a subgraph-based one, or a subgraph-based measure relative to the induced ranking. These characterizations provide us with technical tools that allow us to determine whether well-established centrality measures are subgraph-based. Such a classification, apart from being interesting in its own right, gives useful insights on the structural similarities and differences among existing centrality measures.

To this end, a plethora of so-called centrality measures have been proposed in the literature. Such measures assess which vertices in a graph are the most important ones by analyzing the structure of the underlying graph. A family of centrality measures that are suited for graph databases has been recently proposed by relying on the following simple principle: the importance of a vertex in a graph is relative to the number of ``relevant'' connected subgraphs surrounding it; we refer to the members of this family as subgraph-based centrality measures. Although it has been shown that such measures enjoy several favourable properties, their absolute expressiveness remains largely unexplored. The goal of this work is to precisely characterize the absolute expressiveness of the family of subgraph-based centrality measures by considering both directed and undirected graphs. To this end, we characterize when an arbitrary centrality measure is a subgraph-based one, or a subgraph-based measure relative to the induced ranking. These characterizations provide us with technical tools that allow us to determine whether well-established centrality measures are subgraph-based. Such a classification, apart from being interesting in its own right, gives useful insights on the structural similarities and differences among existing centrality measures.
abstract_zh: 在基于图的应用程序中，常见的任务是查明（有向或无向）图中最重要或“中心”的顶点，或根据重要性对图的顶点进行排名。 To this end, a plethora of so-called centrality measures have been proposed in the literature. Such measures assess which vertices in a graph are the most important ones by analyzing the structure of the underlying graph.最近，基于以下简单原则，提出了一系列适用于图数据库的中心性度量：图中顶点的重要性与围绕它的“相关”连接子图的数量有关； we refer to the members of this family as subgraph-based centrality measures. Although it has been shown that such measures enjoy several favourable properties, their absolute expressiveness remains largely unexplored.这项工作的目标是通过考虑有向图和无向图来精确表征基于子图的中心性度量系列的绝对表达力。为此，我们描述了任意中心性度量何时是基于子图的度量，或者是相对于诱导排名的基于子图的度量。这些特征为我们提供了技术工具，使我们能够确定完善的中心性度量是否是基于子图的。这种分类除了本身很有趣之外，还为现有中心性度量之间的结构相似性和差异提供了有用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在精确刻画子图基中心性度量在有向和无向图中的绝对表达能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管子图基中心性度量具有诸多优良性质，但其绝对表达能力尚未被充分研究，需明确其分类标准并分析现有度量的结构性差异。
AI.method: 通过刻画任意中心性度量是否为子图基度量的条件，结合诱导排序的相对性分析，建立技术工具进行分类判断。
AI.result: 提出了子图基中心性度量的刻画标准，并据此分类了经典中心性度量，揭示了其结构性相似性与差异性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解现有中心性度量的结构特征提供了分类框架，深化了对子图基度量本质的认识。

authors_text: Hongze Sun,Wuque Cai,Baoxin Yang,Yan Cui,Yang Xia,Dezhong Yao,Daqing Guo
title: A Synapse-Threshold Synergistic Learning Approach for Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络的突触阈值协同学习方法
comment: 15 pages, 11 figures, 4 Tables, submitted for publication
comments: 15 pages, 11 figures, 4 Tables, submitted for publication
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have demonstrated excellent capabilities in various intelligent scenarios. Most existing methods for training SNNs are based on the concept of synaptic plasticity; however, learning in the realistic brain also utilizes intrinsic non-synaptic mechanisms of neurons. The spike threshold of biological neurons is a critical intrinsic neuronal feature that exhibits rich dynamics on a millisecond timescale and has been proposed as an underlying mechanism that facilitates neural information processing. In this study, we develop a novel synergistic learning approach that involves simultaneously training synaptic weights and spike thresholds in SNNs. SNNs trained with synapse-threshold synergistic learning~(STL-SNNs) achieve significantly superior performance on various static and neuromorphic datasets than SNNs trained with two degenerated single-learning models. During training, the synergistic learning approach optimizes neural thresholds, providing the network with stable signal transmission via appropriate firing rates. Further analysis indicates that STL-SNNs are robust to noisy data and exhibit low energy consumption for deep network structures. Additionally, the performance of STL-SNN can be further improved by introducing a generalized joint decision framework. Overall, our findings indicate that biologically plausible synergies between synaptic and intrinsic non-synaptic mechanisms may provide a promising approach for developing highly efficient SNN learning methods.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have demonstrated excellent capabilities in various intelligent scenarios. Most existing methods for training SNNs are based on the concept of synaptic plasticity; however, learning in the realistic brain also utilizes intrinsic non-synaptic mechanisms of neurons. The spike threshold of biological neurons is a critical intrinsic neuronal feature that exhibits rich dynamics on a millisecond timescale and has been proposed as an underlying mechanism that facilitates neural information processing. In this study, we develop a novel synergistic learning approach that involves simultaneously training synaptic weights and spike thresholds in SNNs. SNNs trained with synapse-threshold synergistic learning~(STL-SNNs) achieve significantly superior performance on various static and neuromorphic datasets than SNNs trained with two degenerated single-learning models. During training, the synergistic learning approach optimizes neural thresholds, providing the network with stable signal transmission via appropriate firing rates. Further analysis indicates that STL-SNNs are robust to noisy data and exhibit low energy consumption for deep network structures. Additionally, the performance of STL-SNN can be further improved by introducing a generalized joint decision framework. Overall, our findings indicate that biologically plausible synergies between synaptic and intrinsic non-synaptic mechanisms may provide a promising approach for developing highly efficient SNN learning methods.
abstract_zh: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have demonstrated excellent capabilities in various intelligent scenarios. Most existing methods for training SNNs are based on the concept of synaptic plasticity;然而，现实大脑中的学习也利用了神经元固有的非突触机制。生物神经元的尖峰阈值是一个关键的内在神经元特征，它在毫秒时间尺度上表现出丰富的动态，并已被提议作为促进神经信息处理的潜在机制。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种新颖的协同学习方法，该方法涉及同时训练 SNN 中的突触权重和尖峰阈值。使用突触阈值协同学习训练的 SNN（STL-SNN）在各种静态和神经形态数据集上比使用两种退化单学习模型训练的 SNN 具有显着优越的性能。在训练过程中，协同学习方法优化神经阈值，通过适当的放电速率为网络提供稳定的信号传输。 Further analysis indicates that STL-SNNs are robust to noisy data and exhibit low energy consumption for deep network structures. Additionally, the performance of STL-SNN can be further improved by introducing a generalized joint decision framework.总的来说，我们的研究结果表明，突触和内在非突触机制之间生物学上合理的协同作用可能为开发高效的 SNN 学习方法提供了一种有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种同时训练突触权重与神经元放电阈值的协同学习方法，以提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN训练方法仅依赖突触可塑性，忽视了生物神经元中阈值动态这一关键内在机制，限制了模型效率与生物合理性。
AI.method: 开发突触-阈值协同学习框架（STL-SNN），通过联合优化突触权重与动态阈值，并引入广义联合决策机制增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: STL-SNN在静态与神经形态数据集上均优于传统方法，具有噪声鲁棒性与低能耗特性，深层网络性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 结合突触与内在阈值机制的协同学习策略，为构建高效生物合理SNN提供了新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种同时训练突触权重与神经元放电阈值的协同学习方法，以提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）的性能。

search_text: A Synapse-Threshold Synergistic Learning Approach for Spiking Neural Networks 尖峰神经网络的突触阈值协同学习方法 Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have demonstrated excellent capabilities in various intelligent scenarios. Most existing methods for training SNNs are based on the concept of synaptic plasticity; however, learning in the realistic brain also utilizes intrinsic non-synaptic mechanisms of neurons. The spike threshold of biological neurons is a critical intrinsic neuronal feature that exhibits rich dynamics on a millisecond timescale and has been proposed as an underlying mechanism that facilitates neural information processing. In this study, we develop a novel synergistic learning approach that involves simultaneously training synaptic weights and spike thresholds in SNNs. SNNs trained with synapse-threshold synergistic learning~(STL-SNNs) achieve significantly superior performance on various static and neuromorphic datasets than SNNs trained with two degenerated single-learning models. During training, the synergistic learning approach optimizes neural thresholds, providing the network with stable signal transmission via appropriate firing rates. Further analysis indicates that STL-SNNs are robust to noisy data and exhibit low energy consumption for deep network structures. Additionally, the performance of STL-SNN can be further improved by introducing a generalized joint decision framework. Overall, our findings indicate that biologically plausible synergies between synaptic and intrinsic non-synaptic mechanisms may provide a promising approach for developing highly efficient SNN learning methods. Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have demonstrated excellent capabilities in various intelligent scenarios. Most existing methods for training SNNs are based on the concept of synaptic plasticity;然而，现实大脑中的学习也利用了神经元固有的非突触机制。生物神经元的尖峰阈值是一个关键的内在神经元特征，它在毫秒时间尺度上表现出丰富的动态，并已被提议作为促进神经信息处理的潜在机制。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种新颖的协同学习方法，该方法涉及同时训练 SNN 中的突触权重和尖峰阈值。使用突触阈值协同学习训练的 SNN（STL-SNN）在各种静态和神经形态数据集上比使用两种退化单学习模型训练的 SNN 具有显着优越的性能。在训练过程中，协同学习方法优化神经阈值，通过适当的放电速率为网络提供稳定的信号传输。 Further analysis indicates that STL-SNNs are robust to noisy data and exhibit low energy consumption for deep network structures. Additionally, the performance of STL-SNN can be further improved by introducing a generalized joint decision framework.总的来说，我们的研究结果表明，突触和内在非突触机制之间生物学上合理的协同作用可能为开发高效的 SNN 学习方法提供了一种有前途的方法。 本文提出一种同时训练突触权重与神经元放电阈值的协同学习方法，以提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）的性能。 Hongze Sun,Wuque Cai,Baoxin Yang,Yan Cui,Yang Xia,Dezhong Yao,Daqing Guo cs.NE,cs.AI,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Takahiro Tsumura,Seiji Yamada
title: Agents facilitate one category of human empathy through task difficulty
title_zh: 代理通过任务难度促进一类人类同理心
comment: Accepted by RO-MAN2022, 7 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted by RO-MAN2022, 7 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
abstract: One way to improve the relationship between humans and anthropomorphic agents is to have humans empathize with the agents. In this study, we focused on a task between agents and humans. We experimentally investigated hypotheses stating that task difficulty and task content facilitate human empathy. The experiment was a two-way analysis of variance (ANOVA) with four conditions: task difficulty (high, low) and task content (competitive, cooperative). The results showed no main effect for the task content factor and a significant main effect for the task difficulty factor. In addition, pre-task empathy toward the agent decreased after the task. The ANOVA showed that one category of empathy toward the agent increased when the task difficulty was higher than when it was lower.This indicated that this category of empathy was more likely to be affected by the task. The task itself used can be an important factor when manipulating each category of empathy.
summary: One way to improve the relationship between humans and anthropomorphic agents is to have humans empathize with the agents. In this study, we focused on a task between agents and humans. The ANOVA showed that one category of empathy toward the agent increased when the task difficulty was higher than when it was lower.This indicated that this category of empathy was more likely to be affected by the task. The task itself used can be an important factor when manipulating each category of empathy.
abstract_zh: 改善人类与拟人主体之间关系的一种方法是让人类对主体产生共鸣。在这项研究中，我们专注于智能体和人类之间的任务。我们通过实验研究了假设，指出任务难度和任务内容促进人类同理心。该实验是双向方差分析（ANOVA），有四个条件：任务难度（高、低）和任务内容（竞争、合作）。结果显示，任务内容因素没有主效应，而任务难度因素有显着主效应。此外，任务前对代理人的同理心在任务结束后下降。方差分析表明，当任务难度较高时，对代理人的一类同理心会比任务难度较低时有所增加。这表明这一类同理心更有可能受到任务的影响。在操纵每个类别的同理心时，所使用的任务本身可能是一个重要因素。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨任务难度和任务内容对人类对拟人化代理者共情能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 通过增强人类与拟人化代理者的共情能力，可以改善两者之间的关系。
AI.method: 采用双因素方差分析（ANOVA），设置四种实验条件：任务难度（高/低）和任务内容（竞争/合作）。
AI.result: 任务难度显著影响特定类型的共情，高难度任务使该类共情增强，而任务内容无显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 任务难度是调节特定共情类型的关键因素，任务设计本身对共情具有重要影响。

authors_text: Cong Gao,Benjamin D. Killeen,Yicheng Hu,Robert B. Grupp,Russell H. Taylor,Mehran Armand,Mathias Unberath
title: SyntheX: Scaling Up Learning-based X-ray Image Analysis Through In Silico Experiments
title_zh: SyntheX：通过计算机实验扩大基于学习的 X 射线图像分析
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) now enables automated interpretation of medical images for clinical use. However, AI's potential use for interventional images (versus those involved in triage or diagnosis), such as for guidance during surgery, remains largely untapped. This is because surgical AI systems are currently trained using post hoc analysis of data collected during live surgeries, which has fundamental and practical limitations, including ethical considerations, expense, scalability, data integrity, and a lack of ground truth. Here, we demonstrate that creating realistic simulated images from human models is a viable alternative and complement to large-scale in situ data collection. We show that training AI image analysis models on realistically synthesized data, combined with contemporary domain generalization or adaptation techniques, results in models that on real data perform comparably to models trained on a precisely matched real data training set. Because synthetic generation of training data from human-based models scales easily, we find that our model transfer paradigm for X-ray image analysis, which we refer to as SyntheX, can even outperform real data-trained models due to the effectiveness of training on a larger dataset. We demonstrate the potential of SyntheX on three clinical tasks: Hip image analysis, surgical robotic tool detection, and COVID-19 lung lesion segmentation. SyntheX provides an opportunity to drastically accelerate the conception, design, and evaluation of intelligent systems for X-ray-based medicine. In addition, simulated image environments provide the opportunity to test novel instrumentation, design complementary surgical approaches, and envision novel techniques that improve outcomes, save time, or mitigate human error, freed from the ethical and practical considerations of live human data collection.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) now enables automated interpretation of medical images for clinical use. However, AI's potential use for interventional images (versus those involved in triage or diagnosis), such as for guidance during surgery, remains largely untapped. This is because surgical AI systems are currently trained using post hoc analysis of data collected during live surgeries, which has fundamental and practical limitations, including ethical considerations, expense, scalability, data integrity, and a lack of ground truth. Here, we demonstrate that creating realistic simulated images from human models is a viable alternative and complement to large-scale in situ data collection. We show that training AI image analysis models on realistically synthesized data, combined with contemporary domain generalization or adaptation techniques, results in models that on real data perform comparably to models trained on a precisely matched real data training set. Because synthetic generation of training data from human-based models scales easily, we find that our model transfer paradigm for X-ray image analysis, which we refer to as SyntheX, can even outperform real data-trained models due to the effectiveness of training on a larger dataset. We demonstrate the potential of SyntheX on three clinical tasks: Hip image analysis, surgical robotic tool detection, and COVID-19 lung lesion segmentation. SyntheX provides an opportunity to drastically accelerate the conception, design, and evaluation of intelligent systems for X-ray-based medicine. In addition, simulated image environments provide the opportunity to test novel instrumentation, design complementary surgical approaches, and envision novel techniques that improve outcomes, save time, or mitigate human error, freed from the ethical and practical considerations of live human data collection.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 现在可以自动解释临床使用的医学图像。然而，人工智能在介入图像（相对于那些涉及分诊或诊断的图像）方面的潜在用途，例如手术期间的指导，在很大程度上仍未得到开发。这是因为手术人工智能系统目前是使用现场手术期间收集的数据进行事后分析来进行训练的，这具有基本和实际的局限性，包括道德考虑、费用、可扩展性、数据完整性和缺乏基本事实。在这里，我们证明从人体模型创建逼真的模拟图像是一种可行的替代方案，也是对大规模现场数据收集的补充。我们表明，在真实合成的数据上训练人工智能图像分析模型，并结合当代领域泛化或适应技术，所产生的模型在真实数据上的表现与在精确匹配的真实数据训练集上训练的模型相当。由于基于人类的模型合成训练数据的生成很容易扩展，我们发现我们的用于 X 射线图像分析的模型传输范例（我们称为 SyntheX）甚至可以超越真实的数据训练模型，因为在更大的数据集上训练的有效性。我们展示了 SyntheX 在三项临床任务上的潜力：髋关节图像分析、手术机器人工具检测和 COVID-19 肺部病变分割。 SyntheX 提供了大幅加速基于 X 射线医学的智能系统的构思、设计和评估的机会。此外，模拟图像环境还提供了测试新颖仪器、设计补充手术方法以及设想改善结果、节省时间或减少人为错误的新颖技术的机会，而无需考虑实时人类数据收集的道德和实际问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SyntheX方法，通过生成高质量的合成X射线图像来提升基于学习的X射线图像分析性能，减少对真实手术数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 当前手术场景下的AI系统因依赖真实手术数据而面临伦理、成本、可扩展性等问题，需寻找替代方案以加速医疗AI开发。
AI.method: 基于人体模型生成逼真合成X射线图像，结合领域泛化技术训练AI模型，并在三个临床任务（髋部分析、手术工具检测、肺部病变分割）中验证效果。
AI.result: SyntheX训练的模型在真实数据上的表现可与真实数据训练模型媲美，且因数据规模更大而可能更优，验证了其在医疗场景的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SyntheX为X射线医学AI系统的设计与评估提供了高效途径，并支持在无伦理限制的环境中测试创新技术与手术方案。

We demonstrate the potential of SyntheX on three clinical tasks: Hip image analysis, surgical robotic tool detection, and COVID-19 lung lesion segmentation. SyntheX provides an opportunity to drastically accelerate the conception, design, and evaluation of intelligent systems for X-ray-based medicine. In addition, simulated image environments provide the opportunity to test novel instrumentation, design complementary surgical approaches, and envision novel techniques that improve outcomes, save time, or mitigate human error, freed from the ethical and practical considerations of live human data collection. 人工智能 (AI) 现在可以自动解释临床使用的医学图像。然而，人工智能在介入图像（相对于那些涉及分诊或诊断的图像）方面的潜在用途，例如手术期间的指导，在很大程度上仍未得到开发。这是因为手术人工智能系统目前是使用现场手术期间收集的数据进行事后分析来进行训练的，这具有基本和实际的局限性，包括道德考虑、费用、可扩展性、数据完整性和缺乏基本事实。在这里，我们证明从人体模型创建逼真的模拟图像是一种可行的替代方案，也是对大规模现场数据收集的补充。我们表明，在真实合成的数据上训练人工智能图像分析模型，并结合当代领域泛化或适应技术，所产生的模型在真实数据上的表现与在精确匹配的真实数据训练集上训练的模型相当。由于基于人类的模型合成训练数据的生成很容易扩展，我们发现我们的用于 X 射线图像分析的模型传输范例（我们称为 SyntheX）甚至可以超越真实的数据训练模型，因为在更大的数据集上训练的有效性。我们展示了 SyntheX 在三项临床任务上的潜力：髋关节图像分析、手术机器人工具检测和 COVID-19 肺部病变分割。 SyntheX 提供了大幅加速基于 X 射线医学的智能系统的构思、设计和评估的机会。此外，模拟图像环境还提供了测试新颖仪器、设计补充手术方法以及设想改善结果、节省时间或减少人为错误的新颖技术的机会，而无需考虑实时人类数据收集的道德和实际问题。 本文提出SyntheX方法，通过生成高质量的合成X射线图像来提升基于学习的X射线图像分析性能，减少对真实手术数据的依赖。 Cong Gao,Benjamin D. Killeen,Yicheng Hu,Robert B. Grupp,Russell H. Taylor,Mehran Armand,Mathias Unberath eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gaetan Frusque,Olga Fink
title: Robust Time Series Denoising with Learnable Wavelet Packet Transform
title_zh: 利用可学习小波包变换进行鲁棒时间序列去噪
abstract: Signal denoising is a key preprocessing step for many applications, as the performance of a learning task is closely related to the quality of the input data. In this paper, we apply a signal processing based deep neural network architecture, a learnable extension of the wavelet packet transform. As main advantages, this model has few parameters, an intuitive initialization and strong learning capabilities. Moreover, we show that it is possible to easily modify the parameters of the model after the training step to tailor to different noise intensities. Two case studies are conducted to compare this model with the state of the art and commonly used denoising procedures. The first experiment uses standard signals to study denoising properties of the algorithms. The second experiment is a real application with the objective to remove audio background noises. We show that the learnable wavelet packet transform has the learning capabilities of deep learning methods while maintaining the robustness of standard signal processing approaches. More specifically, we demonstrate that our approach maintains excellent denoising performances on signal classes separate from those used during the training step. Moreover, the learnable wavelet packet transform was found to be robust when different noise intensities, noise varieties and artifacts are considered.
summary: Signal denoising is a key preprocessing step for many applications, as the performance of a learning task is closely related to the quality of the input data. In this paper, we apply a signal processing based deep neural network architecture, a learnable extension of the wavelet packet transform. As main advantages, this model has few parameters, an intuitive initialization and strong learning capabilities. Moreover, we show that it is possible to easily modify the parameters of the model after the training step to tailor to different noise intensities. Two case studies are conducted to compare this model with the state of the art and commonly used denoising procedures. The first experiment uses standard signals to study denoising properties of the algorithms. The second experiment is a real application with the objective to remove audio background noises. We show that the learnable wavelet packet transform has the learning capabilities of deep learning methods while maintaining the robustness of standard signal processing approaches. More specifically, we demonstrate that our approach maintains excellent denoising performances on signal classes separate from those used during the training step. Moreover, the learnable wavelet packet transform was found to be robust when different noise intensities, noise varieties and artifacts are considered.
abstract_zh: 信号去噪是许多应用的关键预处理步骤，因为学习任务的性能与输入数据的质量密切相关。在本文中，我们应用基于信号处理的深度神经网络架构，这是小波包变换的可学习扩展。该模型的主要优点是参数少、初始化直观、学习能力强。此外，我们表明，在训练步骤之后可以轻松修改模型的参数以适应不同的噪声强度。进行了两个案例研究，将该模型与最先进的和常用的去噪程序进行比较。第一个实验使用标准信号来研究算法的降噪特性。第二个实验是一个真实的应用程序，目的是消除音频背景噪声。我们证明了可学习的小波包变换具有深度学习方法的学习能力，同时保持了标准信号处理方法的鲁棒性。 More specifically, we demonstrate that our approach maintains excellent denoising performances on signal classes separate from those used during the training step.此外，当考虑不同的噪声强度、噪声种类和伪影时，可学习小波包变换被发现是鲁棒的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可学习的小波包变换方法，用于时间序列的鲁棒去噪。
AI.motivation: 信号去噪是许多应用中的关键预处理步骤，而学习任务的性能与输入数据的质量密切相关。传统方法在处理不同噪声强度和种类时可能存在不足，因此需要一种更具鲁棒性和适应性的去噪方法。
AI.method: 本文采用基于信号处理的深度神经网络架构，提出了一种可学习的小波包变换模型，该模型具有较少的参数、直观的初始化和强大的学习能力，并且可以在训练后调整参数以适应不同的噪声强度。
AI.result: 通过两个案例研究，该模型在标准信号和实际音频去噪任务中均表现出色，且在不同噪声强度、噪声种类和伪影情况下都具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 可学习的小波包变换结合了深度学习方法的学习能力和传统信号处理方法的鲁棒性，适用于多种信号去噪场景。

authors_text: Yanpeng Sun,Qiang Chen,Xiangyu He,Jian Wang,Haocheng Feng,Junyu Han,Errui Ding,Jian Cheng,Zechao Li,Jingdong Wang
title: Singular Value Fine-tuning: Few-shot Segmentation requires Few-parameters Fine-tuning
title_zh: 奇异值微调：少镜头分割需要少参数微调
abstract: Freezing the pre-trained backbone has become a standard paradigm to avoid overfitting in few-shot segmentation. In this paper, we rethink the paradigm and explore a new regime: {\em fine-tuning a small part of parameters in the backbone}. We present a solution to overcome the overfitting problem, leading to better model generalization on learning novel classes. Our method decomposes backbone parameters into three successive matrices via the Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), then {\em only fine-tunes the singular values} and keeps others frozen. The above design allows the model to adjust feature representations on novel classes while maintaining semantic clues within the pre-trained backbone. We evaluate our {\em Singular Value Fine-tuning (SVF)} approach on various few-shot segmentation methods with different backbones. We achieve state-of-the-art results on both Pascal-5$^i$ and COCO-20$^i$ across 1-shot and 5-shot settings. Hopefully, this simple baseline will encourage researchers to rethink the role of backbone fine-tuning in few-shot settings. The source code and models will be available at https://github.com/syp2ysy/SVF.
summary: Freezing the pre-trained backbone has become a standard paradigm to avoid overfitting in few-shot segmentation. In this paper, we rethink the paradigm and explore a new regime: {\em fine-tuning a small part of parameters in the backbone}. We present a solution to overcome the overfitting problem, leading to better model generalization on learning novel classes. Our method decomposes backbone parameters into three successive matrices via the Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), then {\em only fine-tunes the singular values} and keeps others frozen. The above design allows the model to adjust feature representations on novel classes while maintaining semantic clues within the pre-trained backbone. We evaluate our {\em Singular Value Fine-tuning (SVF)} approach on various few-shot segmentation methods with different backbones. We achieve state-of-the-art results on both Pascal-5$^i$ and COCO-20$^i$ across 1-shot and 5-shot settings. Hopefully, this simple baseline will encourage researchers to rethink the role of backbone fine-tuning in few-shot settings. The source code and models will be available at https://github.com/syp2ysy/SVF.
abstract_zh: Freezing the pre-trained backbone has become a standard paradigm to avoid overfitting in few-shot segmentation.在本文中，我们重新思考该范式并探索一种新的机制：{\em 微调主干中的一小部分参数}。 We present a solution to overcome the overfitting problem, leading to better model generalization on learning novel classes.我们的方法通过奇异值分解（SVD）将主干参数分解为三个连续的矩阵，然后{\em仅微调奇异值}并保持其他不变。上述设计允许模型调整新类的特征表示，同时在预训练的主干中维护语义线索。我们在具有不同骨干网的各种少镜头分割方法上评估了我们的奇异值微调（SVF）方法。我们在 Pascal-5$^i$ 和 COCO-20$^i$ 上在 1-shot 和 5-shot 设置中取得了最先进的结果。希望这个简单的基线能够鼓励研究人员重新思考主干微调在几次镜头设置中的作用。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/syp2ysy/SVF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为奇异值微调（SVF）的方法，用于在少样本分割任务中微调预训练主干网络的一部分参数。
AI.motivation: 冻结预训练主干网络已成为避免少样本分割中过拟合的标准范式，但本文认为微调主干网络中少量参数可能更有利于模型泛化。
AI.method: 通过奇异值分解（SVD）将主干网络参数分解为三个连续矩阵，仅微调奇异值，而保持其他参数冻结。
AI.result: 在Pascal-5$^i$和COCO-20$^i$数据集上，在1-shot和5-shot设置下均取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法作为简单基线，鼓励研究者重新思考少样本设置中主干网络微调的作用。

authors_text: James K Ruffle,Samia Mohinta,Robert J Gray,Harpreet Hyare,Parashkev Nachev
title: Brain tumour segmentation with incomplete imaging data
title_zh: 影像数据不完整的脑肿瘤分割
abstract: The complex heterogeneity of brain tumours is increasingly recognized to demand data of magnitudes and richness only fully-inclusive, large-scale collections drawn from routine clinical care could plausibly offer. This is a task contemporary machine learning could facilitate, especially in neuroimaging, but its ability to deal with incomplete data common in real world clinical practice remains unknown. Here we apply state-of-the-art methods to large scale, multi-site MRI data to quantify the comparative fidelity of automated tumour segmentation models replicating the various levels of sequence availability observed in the clinical reality. We compare deep learning (nnU-Net-derived) segmentation models with all possible combinations of T1, contrast-enhanced T1, T2, and FLAIR sequences, trained and validated with five-fold cross-validation on the 2021 BraTS-RSNA glioma population of 1251 patients, with further testing on a real-world 50 patient sample diverse in not only MRI scanner and field strength, but a random selection of pre- and post-operative imaging also. Models trained on incomplete imaging data segmented lesions well, often equivalently to those trained on complete data, exhibiting Dice coefficients of 0.907 (single sequence) to 0.945 (full datasets) for whole tumours, and 0.701 (single sequence) to 0.891 (full datasets) for component tissue types. Incomplete data segmentation models could accurately detect enhancing tumour in the absence of contrast imaging, quantifying its volume with an R2 between 0.95-0.97, and were invariant to lesion morphometry. Deep learning segmentation models characterize tumours well when missing data and can even detect enhancing tissue without the use of contrast. This suggests translation to clinical practice, where incomplete data is common, may be easier than hitherto believed, and may be of value in reducing dependence on contrast use.
summary: The complex heterogeneity of brain tumours is increasingly recognized to demand data of magnitudes and richness only fully-inclusive, large-scale collections drawn from routine clinical care could plausibly offer. This is a task contemporary machine learning could facilitate, especially in neuroimaging, but its ability to deal with incomplete data common in real world clinical practice remains unknown. Here we apply state-of-the-art methods to large scale, multi-site MRI data to quantify the comparative fidelity of automated tumour segmentation models replicating the various levels of sequence availability observed in the clinical reality. We compare deep learning (nnU-Net-derived) segmentation models with all possible combinations of T1, contrast-enhanced T1, T2, and FLAIR sequences, trained and validated with five-fold cross-validation on the 2021 BraTS-RSNA glioma population of 1251 patients, with further testing on a real-world 50 patient sample diverse in not only MRI scanner and field strength, but a random selection of pre- and post-operative imaging also. Models trained on incomplete imaging data segmented lesions well, often equivalently to those trained on complete data, exhibiting Dice coefficients of 0.907 (single sequence) to 0.945 (full datasets) for whole tumours, and 0.701 (single sequence) to 0.891 (full datasets) for component tissue types. Incomplete data segmentation models could accurately detect enhancing tumour in the absence of contrast imaging, quantifying its volume with an R2 between 0.95-0.97, and were invariant to lesion morphometry. Deep learning segmentation models characterize tumours well when missing data and can even detect enhancing tissue without the use of contrast. This suggests translation to clinical practice, where incomplete data is common, may be easier than hitherto believed, and may be of value in reducing dependence on contrast use.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越认识到脑肿瘤复杂的异质性需要大量和丰富的数据，只有从常规临床护理中提取的全面、大规模的数据集才能提供合理的数据。 This is a task contemporary machine learning could facilitate, especially in neuroimaging, but its ability to deal with incomplete data common in real world clinical practice remains unknown.在这里，我们将最先进的方法应用于大规模、多部位 MRI 数据，以量化自动肿瘤分割模型的相对保真度，复制临床现实中观察到的各种级别的序列可用性。我们将深度学习（nnU-Net 衍生）分割模型与 T1、对比度增强 T1、T2 和 FLAIR 序列的所有可能组合进行比较，并通过对 2021 年 BraTS-RSNA 胶质瘤群体的 1251 名患者进行五倍交叉验证进行训练和验证，并进一步测试真实世界的 50 名患者样本，这些样本不仅在 MRI 扫描仪和场强方面不同，而且还随机选择术前和术后成像。 Models trained on incomplete imaging data segmented lesions well, often equivalently to those trained on complete data, exhibiting Dice coefficients of 0.907 (single sequence) to 0.945 (full datasets) for whole tumours, and 0.701 (single sequence) to 0.891 (full datasets) for component tissue types.不完整的数据分割模型可以在没有对比成像的情况下准确检测增强的肿瘤，以 0.95-0.97 之间的 R2 量化其体积，并且对病变形态测量具有不变性。深度学习分割模型在丢失数据时可以很好地表征肿瘤，甚至可以在不使用对比度的情况下检测增强组织。这表明临床实践中不完整的数据很常见，可能比迄今为止认为的更容易，并且可能有助于减少对造影剂使用的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在不完整MRI数据下使用深度学习进行脑肿瘤分割的可行性。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中常存在MRI序列不完整的情况，而现有模型对此类数据的处理能力尚不明确，需验证其分割效果以推动实际应用。
AI.method: 基于nnU-Net框架，利用2021 BraTS-RSNA数据集（1251例患者）训练分割模型，通过五折交叉验证评估不同序列组合（T1、T1增强、T2、FLAIR）的性能，并在50例真实世界数据上测试模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 模型在单序列数据下仍可实现较高分割精度（Dice系数：全肿瘤0.907-0.945，组织成分0.701-0.891），且无需对比增强即可量化肿瘤体积（R² 0.95-0.97）。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型可有效处理不完整影像数据，为临床减少对比剂依赖和提升分割效率提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nikolai Kalischek,Nico Lang,Cécile Renier,Rodrigo Caye Daudt,Thomas Addoah,William Thompson,Wilma J. Blaser-Hart,Rachael Garrett,Konrad Schindler,Jan D. Wegner
title: Satellite-based high-resolution maps of cocoa planted area for Côte d'Ivoire and Ghana
title_zh: 科特迪瓦和加纳可可种植面积卫星高分辨率地图
abstract: Côte d'Ivoire and Ghana, the world's largest producers of cocoa, account for two thirds of the global cocoa production. In both countries, cocoa is the primary perennial crop, providing income to almost two million farmers. Yet precise maps of cocoa planted area are missing, hindering accurate quantification of expansion in protected areas, production and yields, and limiting information available for improved sustainability governance. Here, we combine cocoa plantation data with publicly available satellite imagery in a deep learning framework and create high-resolution maps of cocoa plantations for both countries, validated in situ. Our results suggest that cocoa cultivation is an underlying driver of over 37% and 13% of forest loss in protected areas in Côte d'Ivoire and Ghana, respectively, and that official reports substantially underestimate the planted area, up to 40% in Ghana. These maps serve as a crucial building block to advance understanding of conservation and economic development in cocoa producing regions.
summary: Côte d'Ivoire and Ghana, the world's largest producers of cocoa, account for two thirds of the global cocoa production. In both countries, cocoa is the primary perennial crop, providing income to almost two million farmers. Yet precise maps of cocoa planted area are missing, hindering accurate quantification of expansion in protected areas, production and yields, and limiting information available for improved sustainability governance. Here, we combine cocoa plantation data with publicly available satellite imagery in a deep learning framework and create high-resolution maps of cocoa plantations for both countries, validated in situ. Our results suggest that cocoa cultivation is an underlying driver of over 37% and 13% of forest loss in protected areas in Côte d'Ivoire and Ghana, respectively, and that official reports substantially underestimate the planted area, up to 40% in Ghana. These maps serve as a crucial building block to advance understanding of conservation and economic development in cocoa producing regions.
abstract_zh: 科特迪瓦和加纳是世界上最大的可可生产国，占全球可可产量的三分之二。在这两个国家，可可都是主要的多年生作物，为近 200 万农民提供收入。然而，可可种植面积的精确地图缺失，阻碍了对保护区扩张、产量和产量的准确量化，并限制了可用于改善可持续性治理的信息。在这里，我们在深度学习框架中将可可种植园数据与公开的卫星图像相结合，并为这两个国家创建了可可种植园的高分辨率地图，并进行了现场验证。我们的研究结果表明，可可种植是导致科特迪瓦和加纳保护区森林损失分别超过 37% 和 13% 的根本原因，而官方报告大大低估了种植面积，加纳高达 40%。这些地图是促进对可可产区保护和经济发展的了解的重要组成部分。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用卫星图像和深度学习框架，为科特迪瓦和加纳创建了高分辨率可可种植区地图。
AI.motivation: 科特迪瓦和加纳作为全球最大的可可生产国，缺乏精确的可可种植面积地图，阻碍了对保护区森林损失、产量及可持续治理的准确评估。
AI.method: 结合可可种植数据与公开卫星影像，通过深度学习模型生成高分辨率地图，并进行实地验证。
AI.result: 发现可可种植导致科特迪瓦和加纳保护区分别超过37%和13%的森林损失，且官方报告低估了种植面积（加纳达40%）。
AI.conclusion: 这些地图为理解可可产区的生态保护与经济发展提供了关键数据支持。

authors_text: Steve Mathew D A
title: Optimizing musical chord inversions using the cartesian coordinate system
title_zh: 使用笛卡尔坐标系优化音乐和弦转位
abstract: In classical music and in any genre of contemporary music, the tonal elements or notes used for playing are the same. The numerous possibilities of chords for a given instance in a piece make the playing, in general, very intricate, and advanced. The theory sounds quite trivial, yet the application has vast options, each leading to inarguably different outcomes, characterized by scientific and musical principles. Chords and their importance are self-explanatory. A chord is a bunch of notes played together. As far as scientists are concerned, it is a set of tonal frequencies ringing together resulting in a consonant/dissonant sound. It is well-known that the notes of a chord can be rearranged to come up with various voicings (1) of the same chord which enables a composer/player to choose the most optimal one to convey the emotion they wish to convey. Though there are numerous possibilities, it is scientific to think that there is just one appropriate voicing for a particular situation of tonal movements. In this study, we attempt to find the optimal voicings by considering chords to be points in a 3-dimensional cartesian coordinate system and further the fundamental understanding of mathematics in music theory.
summary: In classical music and in any genre of contemporary music, the tonal elements or notes used for playing are the same. The numerous possibilities of chords for a given instance in a piece make the playing, in general, very intricate, and advanced. The theory sounds quite trivial, yet the application has vast options, each leading to inarguably different outcomes, characterized by scientific and musical principles. Chords and their importance are self-explanatory. A chord is a bunch of notes played together. As far as scientists are concerned, it is a set of tonal frequencies ringing together resulting in a consonant/dissonant sound. It is well-known that the notes of a chord can be rearranged to come up with various voicings (1) of the same chord which enables a composer/player to choose the most optimal one to convey the emotion they wish to convey. Though there are numerous possibilities, it is scientific to think that there is just one appropriate voicing for a particular situation of tonal movements. In this study, we attempt to find the optimal voicings by considering chords to be points in a 3-dimensional cartesian coordinate system and further the fundamental understanding of mathematics in music theory.
abstract_zh: 在古典音乐和任何类型的当代音乐中，用于演奏的音调元素或音符都是相同的。一首曲子中给定实例的和弦的多种可能性使得演奏通常非常复杂和高级。这个理论听起来很微不足道，但应用程序有多种选择，每种选择都会带来无可争议的不同结果，其特点是科学和音乐原理。和弦及其重要性是不言自明的。 A chord is a bunch of notes played together.就科学家而言，它是一组音调频率一起响起，从而产生协和/不协和的声音。众所周知，和弦的音符可以重新排列以产生同一和弦的各种发声（1），这使得作曲家/演奏者能够选择最优化的发声来传达他们希望传达的情感。尽管存在多种可能性，但认为对于特定的音调运动情况只有一种适当的发声是科学的。在这项研究中，我们试图通过将和弦视为 3 维笛卡尔坐标系中的点来找到最佳发声，并进一步加深对音乐理论中数学的基本理解。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过将和弦视为三维笛卡尔坐标系中的点，寻找最优的和弦转位以优化音乐表现。
AI.motivation: 在音乐中，和弦的排列方式（即转位）对情感表达有重要影响，但如何选择最优转位缺乏科学依据，因此需要一种系统的方法来确定最优的和弦排列。
AI.method: 将和弦的音符在笛卡尔坐标系中表示为点，利用数学方法分析不同转位的和声效果，以确定最优的和弦排列。
AI.result: 研究发现了一种基于数学原理的和弦转位优化方法，能够帮助作曲家或演奏者选择最符合情感表达需求的和弦排列。
AI.conclusion: 通过将音乐理论与数学方法结合，可以科学地优化和弦转位，提升音乐表现力与创作效率。

search_text: Optimizing musical chord inversions using the cartesian coordinate system 使用笛卡尔坐标系优化音乐和弦转位 In classical music and in any genre of contemporary music, the tonal elements or notes used for playing are the same. The numerous possibilities of chords for a given instance in a piece make the playing, in general, very intricate, and advanced. The theory sounds quite trivial, yet the application has vast options, each leading to inarguably different outcomes, characterized by scientific and musical principles. Chords and their importance are self-explanatory. A chord is a bunch of notes played together. As far as scientists are concerned, it is a set of tonal frequencies ringing together resulting in a consonant/dissonant sound. It is well-known that the notes of a chord can be rearranged to come up with various voicings (1) of the same chord which enables a composer/player to choose the most optimal one to convey the emotion they wish to convey. Though there are numerous possibilities, it is scientific to think that there is just one appropriate voicing for a particular situation of tonal movements. In this study, we attempt to find the optimal voicings by considering chords to be points in a 3-dimensional cartesian coordinate system and further the fundamental understanding of mathematics in music theory. 在古典音乐和任何类型的当代音乐中，用于演奏的音调元素或音符都是相同的。一首曲子中给定实例的和弦的多种可能性使得演奏通常非常复杂和高级。这个理论听起来很微不足道，但应用程序有多种选择，每种选择都会带来无可争议的不同结果，其特点是科学和音乐原理。和弦及其重要性是不言自明的。 A chord is a bunch of notes played together.就科学家而言，它是一组音调频率一起响起，从而产生协和/不协和的声音。众所周知，和弦的音符可以重新排列以产生同一和弦的各种发声（1），这使得作曲家/演奏者能够选择最优化的发声来传达他们希望传达的情感。尽管存在多种可能性，但认为对于特定的音调运动情况只有一种适当的发声是科学的。在这项研究中，我们试图通过将和弦视为 3 维笛卡尔坐标系中的点来找到最佳发声，并进一步加深对音乐理论中数学的基本理解。 本文旨在通过将和弦视为三维笛卡尔坐标系中的点，寻找最优的和弦转位以优化音乐表现。 Steve Mathew D A cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Elia Cereda,Stefano Bonato,Mirko Nava,Alessandro Giusti,Daniele Palossi
title: Vision-State Fusion: Improving Deep Neural Networks for Autonomous Robotics
title_zh: 视觉状态融合：改进自主机器人的深度神经网络
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the Journal of Intelligent & Robotic Systems. ©2024 Springer
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication in the Journal of Intelligent & Robotic Systems. ©2024 Springer
abstract: Vision-based deep learning perception fulfills a paramount role in robotics, facilitating solutions to many challenging scenarios, such as acrobatic maneuvers of autonomous unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and robot-assisted high-precision surgery. Control-oriented end-to-end perception approaches, which directly output control variables for the robot, commonly take advantage of the robot's state estimation as an auxiliary input. When intermediate outputs are estimated and fed to a lower-level controller, i.e. mediated approaches, the robot's state is commonly used as an input only for egocentric tasks, which estimate physical properties of the robot itself. In this work, we propose to apply a similar approach for the first time -- to the best of our knowledge -- to non-egocentric mediated tasks, where the estimated outputs refer to an external subject. We prove how our general methodology improves the regression performance of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on a broad class of non-egocentric 3D pose estimation problems, with minimal computational cost. By analyzing three highly-different use cases, spanning from grasping with a robotic arm to following a human subject with a pocket-sized UAV, our results consistently improve the R\textsuperscript{2} regression metric, up to +0.51, compared to their stateless baselines. Finally, we validate the in-field performance of a closed-loop autonomous cm-scale UAV on the human pose estimation task. Our results show a significant reduction, i.e., 24\% on average, on the mean absolute error of our stateful CNN, compared to a State-of-the-Art stateless counterpart.
summary: Vision-based deep learning perception fulfills a paramount role in robotics, facilitating solutions to many challenging scenarios, such as acrobatic maneuvers of autonomous unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and robot-assisted high-precision surgery. Control-oriented end-to-end perception approaches, which directly output control variables for the robot, commonly take advantage of the robot's state estimation as an auxiliary input. When intermediate outputs are estimated and fed to a lower-level controller, i.e. mediated approaches, the robot's state is commonly used as an input only for egocentric tasks, which estimate physical properties of the robot itself. In this work, we propose to apply a similar approach for the first time -- to the best of our knowledge -- to non-egocentric mediated tasks, where the estimated outputs refer to an external subject. We prove how our general methodology improves the regression performance of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on a broad class of non-egocentric 3D pose estimation problems, with minimal computational cost. By analyzing three highly-different use cases, spanning from grasping with a robotic arm to following a human subject with a pocket-sized UAV, our results consistently improve the R\textsuperscript{2} regression metric, up to +0.51, compared to their stateless baselines. Finally, we validate the in-field performance of a closed-loop autonomous cm-scale UAV on the human pose estimation task. Our results show a significant reduction, i.e., 24\% on average, on the mean absolute error of our stateful CNN, compared to a State-of-the-Art stateless counterpart.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的深度学习感知在机器人技术中发挥着至关重要的作用，有助于解决许多具有挑战性的场景，例如自主无人机（UAV）的杂技动作和机器人辅助的高精度手术。面向控制的端到端感知方法直接输出机器人的控制变量，通常利用机器人的状态估计作为辅助输入。当估计中间输出并将其馈送到较低级别的控制器（即中介方法）时，机器人的状态通常仅用作以自我为中心的任务的输入，这些任务估计机器人本身的物理属性。在这项工作中，据我们所知，我们建议首次将类似的方法应用于非自我中心的中介任务，其中估计的输出涉及外部主体。我们证明了我们的通用方法如何以最小的计算成本提高深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在广泛的非自我中心 3D 姿势估计问题上的回归性能。通过分析三个高度不同的用例，从用机械臂抓取到用袖珍无人机跟踪人类受试者，我们的结果持续改进了 R\textsuperscript{2} 回归指标，与无状态基线相比，高达 +0.51。最后，我们验证了闭环自主厘米级无人机在人体姿态估计任务上的现场性能。我们的结果显示，与最先进的无状态对应物相比，我们的有状态 CNN 的平均绝对误差显着降低，即平均降低了 24%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Vision-State Fusion的方法，通过将机器人状态信息作为辅助输入，提升深度卷积神经网络在非自中心3D姿态估计任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有控制导向的端到端感知方法主要利用机器人状态信息进行自中心任务（如机器人自身物理属性估计），但未探索其在非自中心任务（如外部目标估计）中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 首次将机器人状态信息作为辅助输入应用于非自中心任务，通过分析机械臂抓取、微型无人机跟随人类等三个不同场景，验证该方法在回归性能上的提升。
AI.result: 在三个不同应用场景中，R²回归指标平均提升0.51；在厘米级无人机人体姿态估计任务中，均方绝对误差较现有方法降低24%。
AI.conclusion: 状态信息融合方法能以较低计算成本显著提升非自中心任务的CNN回归性能，为自主机器人系统提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Liubov O. Elkhovskaya,Alexander D. Kshenin,Marina A. Balakhontceva,Sergey V. Kovalchuk
title: Extending Process Discovery with Model Complexity Optimization and Cyclic States Identification: Application to Healthcare Processes
title_zh: 通过模型复杂性优化和循环状态识别扩展过程发现：在医疗保健过程中的应用
abstract: Within Process mining, discovery techniques had made it possible to construct business process models automatically from event logs. However, results often do not achieve the balance between model complexity and its fitting accuracy, so there is a need for manual model adjusting. The paper presents an approach to process mining providing semi-automatic support to model optimization based on the combined assessment of the model complexity and fitness. To balance between the two ingredients, a model simplification approach is proposed, which essentially abstracts the raw model at the desired granularity. Additionally, we introduce a concept of meta-states, a cycle collapsing in the model, which can potentially simplify the model and interpret it. We aim to demonstrate the capabilities of the technological solution using three datasets from different applications in the healthcare domain. They are remote monitoring process for patients with arterial hypertension and workflows of healthcare workers during the COVID-19 pandemic. A case study also investigates the use of various complexity measures and different ways of solution application providing insights on better practices in improving interpretability and complexity/fitness balance in process models.
summary: Within Process mining, discovery techniques had made it possible to construct business process models automatically from event logs. However, results often do not achieve the balance between model complexity and its fitting accuracy, so there is a need for manual model adjusting. The paper presents an approach to process mining providing semi-automatic support to model optimization based on the combined assessment of the model complexity and fitness. To balance between the two ingredients, a model simplification approach is proposed, which essentially abstracts the raw model at the desired granularity. Additionally, we introduce a concept of meta-states, a cycle collapsing in the model, which can potentially simplify the model and interpret it. We aim to demonstrate the capabilities of the technological solution using three datasets from different applications in the healthcare domain. They are remote monitoring process for patients with arterial hypertension and workflows of healthcare workers during the COVID-19 pandemic. A case study also investigates the use of various complexity measures and different ways of solution application providing insights on better practices in improving interpretability and complexity/fitness balance in process models.
abstract_zh: 在流程挖掘中，发现技术使得从事件日志自动构建业务流程模型成为可能。 However, results often do not achieve the balance between model complexity and its fitting accuracy, so there is a need for manual model adjusting. The paper presents an approach to process mining providing semi-automatic support to model optimization based on the combined assessment of the model complexity and fitness. To balance between the two ingredients, a model simplification approach is proposed, which essentially abstracts the raw model at the desired granularity.此外，我们引入了元状态的概念，即模型中的循环崩溃，它可以潜在地简化模型并解释它。我们的目标是使用来自医疗保健领域不同应用程序的三个数据集来展示技术解决方案的功能。它们是在 COVID-19 大流行期间对动脉高血压患者和医护人员工作流程的远程监控过程。 A case study also investigates the use of various complexity measures and different ways of solution application providing insights on better practices in improving interpretability and complexity/fitness balance in process models.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化模型复杂度和识别循环状态，改进流程发现技术，并应用于医疗保健流程中以提高模型的可解释性与平衡性。
AI.motivation: 现有流程挖掘技术生成的模型常存在复杂度与拟合精度失衡问题，需人工调整效率低且易出错，需半自动优化方法提升自动化水平。
AI.method: 提出结合模型复杂度与拟合度评估的简化方法，通过抽象粒度控制及引入元状态（meta-states）合并循环结构，实现模型优化。
AI.result: 在高血压远程监护、疫情期间医护流程等医疗场景数据集验证中，方法有效提升了模型可解释性与复杂度/拟合度的平衡性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的半自动优化框架与元状态概念可有效简化医疗流程模型，为复杂业务场景下的模型解释性提升提供了可行技术路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化模型复杂度和识别循环状态，改进流程发现技术，并应用于医疗保健流程中以提高模型的可解释性与平衡性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有流程挖掘技术生成的模型常存在复杂度与拟合精度失衡问题，需人工调整效率低且易出错，需半自动优化方法提升自动化水平。
ai_content.method: 提出结合模型复杂度与拟合度评估的简化方法，通过抽象粒度控制及引入元状态（meta-states）合并循环结构，实现模型优化。
ai_content.result: 在高血压远程监护、疫情期间医护流程等医疗场景数据集验证中，方法有效提升了模型可解释性与复杂度/拟合度的平衡性。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的半自动优化框架与元状态概念可有效简化医疗流程模型，为复杂业务场景下的模型解释性提升提供了可行技术路径。

search_text: Extending Process Discovery with Model Complexity Optimization and Cyclic States Identification: Application to Healthcare Processes 通过模型复杂性优化和循环状态识别扩展过程发现：在医疗保健过程中的应用 Within Process mining, discovery techniques had made it possible to construct business process models automatically from event logs. However, results often do not achieve the balance between model complexity and its fitting accuracy, so there is a need for manual model adjusting. The paper presents an approach to process mining providing semi-automatic support to model optimization based on the combined assessment of the model complexity and fitness. To balance between the two ingredients, a model simplification approach is proposed, which essentially abstracts the raw model at the desired granularity. Additionally, we introduce a concept of meta-states, a cycle collapsing in the model, which can potentially simplify the model and interpret it. We aim to demonstrate the capabilities of the technological solution using three datasets from different applications in the healthcare domain. They are remote monitoring process for patients with arterial hypertension and workflows of healthcare workers during the COVID-19 pandemic. A case study also investigates the use of various complexity measures and different ways of solution application providing insights on better practices in improving interpretability and complexity/fitness balance in process models. 在流程挖掘中，发现技术使得从事件日志自动构建业务流程模型成为可能。 However, results often do not achieve the balance between model complexity and its fitting accuracy, so there is a need for manual model adjusting. The paper presents an approach to process mining providing semi-automatic support to model optimization based on the combined assessment of the model complexity and fitness. To balance between the two ingredients, a model simplification approach is proposed, which essentially abstracts the raw model at the desired granularity.此外，我们引入了元状态的概念，即模型中的循环崩溃，它可以潜在地简化模型并解释它。我们的目标是使用来自医疗保健领域不同应用程序的三个数据集来展示技术解决方案的功能。它们是在 COVID-19 大流行期间对动脉高血压患者和医护人员工作流程的远程监控过程。 A case study also investigates the use of various complexity measures and different ways of solution application providing insights on better practices in improving interpretability and complexity/fitness balance in process models. 本文旨在通过优化模型复杂度和识别循环状态，改进流程发现技术，并应用于医疗保健流程中以提高模型的可解释性与平衡性。 Liubov O. Elkhovskaya,Alexander D. Kshenin,Marina A. Balakhontceva,Sergey V. Kovalchuk cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Shuyu Miao,Lin Zheng,Hong Jin
title: Learning Feature Disentanglement and Dynamic Fusion for Recaptured Image Forensic
title_zh: 学习重新捕获图像取证的特征解缠和动态融合
abstract: Image recapture seriously breaks the fairness of artificial intelligent (AI) systems, which deceives the system by recapturing others' images. Most of the existing recapture models can only address a single pattern of recapture (e.g., moire, edge, artifact, and others) based on the datasets with simulated recaptured images using fixed electronic devices. In this paper, we explicitly redefine image recapture forensic task as four patterns of image recapture recognition, i.e., moire recapture, edge recapture, artifact recapture, and other recapture. Meanwhile, we propose a novel Feature Disentanglement and Dynamic Fusion (FDDF) model to adaptively learn the most effective recapture feature representation for covering different recapture pattern recognition. Furthermore, we collect a large-scale Real-scene Universal Recapture (RUR) dataset containing various recapture patterns, which is about five times the number of previously published datasets. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose a general model and a general real-scene large-scale dataset for recaptured image forensic. Extensive experiments show that our proposed FDDF can achieve state-of-the-art performance on the RUR dataset.
summary: Image recapture seriously breaks the fairness of artificial intelligent (AI) systems, which deceives the system by recapturing others' images. Most of the existing recapture models can only address a single pattern of recapture (e.g., moire, edge, artifact, and others) based on the datasets with simulated recaptured images using fixed electronic devices. In this paper, we explicitly redefine image recapture forensic task as four patterns of image recapture recognition, i.e., moire recapture, edge recapture, artifact recapture, and other recapture. Meanwhile, we propose a novel Feature Disentanglement and Dynamic Fusion (FDDF) model to adaptively learn the most effective recapture feature representation for covering different recapture pattern recognition. Furthermore, we collect a large-scale Real-scene Universal Recapture (RUR) dataset containing various recapture patterns, which is about five times the number of previously published datasets. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose a general model and a general real-scene large-scale dataset for recaptured image forensic. Extensive experiments show that our proposed FDDF can achieve state-of-the-art performance on the RUR dataset.
abstract_zh: 图像重新捕获严重破坏了人工智能（AI）系统的公平性，它通过重新捕获他人的图像来欺骗系统。大多数现有的重新捕获模型只能基于使用固定电子设备模拟重新捕获图像的数据集来解决单一重新捕获模式（例如，莫尔条纹、边缘、伪影等）。在本文中，我们明确地将图像重新捕获取证任务重新定义为图像重新捕获识别的四种模式，即莫尔重新捕获、边缘重新捕获、伪影重新捕获和其他重新捕获。同时，我们提出了一种新颖的特征解缠和动态融合（FDDF）模型来自适应学习最有效的重捕获特征表示，以覆盖不同的重捕获模式识别。此外，我们收集了包含各种重捕获模式的大规模实景通用重捕获（RUR）数据集，其数量约为之前发布的数据集数量的五倍。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出用于重新捕获图像取证的通用模型和通用实景大规模数据集的人。大量实验表明，我们提出的 FDDF 可以在 RUR 数据集上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型特征解耦与动态融合模型（FDDF）及大规模真实场景数据集RUR，用于识别四种图像重捕模式（莫尔、边缘、伪影及其他），提升图像重捕取证的通用性与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有重捕检测模型仅针对单一模式且依赖固定设备生成的模拟数据，难以应对真实场景中多样的重捕方式，亟需通用模型与大规模真实数据支撑。
AI.method: 设计FDDF模型通过特征解耦分离不同重捕模式的潜在特征，并采用动态融合机制自适应组合有效特征；构建包含五种重捕模式的真实场景数据集RUR（规模为现有数据集的五倍）。
AI.result: FDDF在RUR数据集上实现四种重捕模式识别的最先进性能，验证了模型对多模式重捕的泛化能力与检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出通用重捕检测模型与真实场景大规模数据集，显著提升了图像重捕取证的实用性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Islam Akaria,Leah Epstein
title: Bin stretching with migration on two hierarchical machines
title_zh: 在两台分层机器上进行迁移的 Bin 拉伸
abstract: In this paper, we consider semi-online scheduling with migration on two hierarchical machines, with the purpose of minimizing the makespan. The meaning of two hierarchical machines is that one of the machines can run any job, while the other machine can only run specific jobs. Every instance also has a fixed parameter M \geq 0, known as the migration factor. Jobs are presented one by one. Each new job has to be assigned to a machine when it arrives, and at the same time it is possible to modify the assignment of previously assigned jobs, such that the moved jobs have a total size not exceeding M times the size of the new job. The semi-online variant studied here is called bin stretching. In this problem, the optimal makespan is provided to the scheduler in advance. This is still a non-trivial variant for any migration factor M \geq 0. We prove tight bounds on the competitive ratio for any migration factor M, where the design and analysis is split into several cases, based on the value of M, and the resulting competitive ratio. Unlike the online variant with migration for two hierarchical machines, this case allows an online approximation scheme.
summary: In this paper, we consider semi-online scheduling with migration on two hierarchical machines, with the purpose of minimizing the makespan. The meaning of two hierarchical machines is that one of the machines can run any job, while the other machine can only run specific jobs. Every instance also has a fixed parameter M \geq 0, known as the migration factor. Jobs are presented one by one. Each new job has to be assigned to a machine when it arrives, and at the same time it is possible to modify the assignment of previously assigned jobs, such that the moved jobs have a total size not exceeding M times the size of the new job. The semi-online variant studied here is called bin stretching. In this problem, the optimal makespan is provided to the scheduler in advance. This is still a non-trivial variant for any migration factor M \geq 0. We prove tight bounds on the competitive ratio for any migration factor M, where the design and analysis is split into several cases, based on the value of M, and the resulting competitive ratio. Unlike the online variant with migration for two hierarchical machines, this case allows an online approximation scheme.
abstract_zh: In this paper, we consider semi-online scheduling with migration on two hierarchical machines, with the purpose of minimizing the makespan. The meaning of two hierarchical machines is that one of the machines can run any job, while the other machine can only run specific jobs. Every instance also has a fixed parameter M \geq 0, known as the migration factor.职位一一呈现。每个新作业在到达时都必须分配给机器，同时可以修改先前分配的作业的分配，使得移动的作业的总大小不超过新作业大小的M倍。 The semi-online variant studied here is called bin stretching. In this problem, the optimal makespan is provided to the scheduler in advance.对于任何迁移因子 M \geq 0 来说，这仍然是一个不平凡的变体。我们证明了任何迁移因子 M 的竞争比的严格界限，其中根据 M 的值和最终的竞争比将设计和分析分为几种情况。 Unlike the online variant with migration for two hierarchical machines, this case allows an online approximation scheme.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在两个分层机器上带有迁移的半在线调度问题，旨在通过给定迁移因子M最小化makespan。
AI.motivation: 在分层机器环境下，如何有效利用迁移机制优化调度性能，同时保证已知最优makespan的半在线场景下的竞争比分析是关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过将迁移因子M的不同取值划分为多个案例，设计并分析各情形下的竞争比上界与下界，结合迁移限制条件进行数学证明。
AI.result: 针对任意M≥0的迁移因子，证明了竞争比的紧致界，并表明该半在线变体允许在线近似方案，优于传统在线调度模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文为分层机器下的bin stretching问题提供了完整的竞争比分析框架，明确了迁移因子对调度性能的影响，为相关算法设计提供了理论依据。

The meaning of two hierarchical machines is that one of the machines can run any job, while the other machine can only run specific jobs. Every instance also has a fixed parameter M \geq 0, known as the migration factor. Jobs are presented one by one. Each new job has to be assigned to a machine when it arrives, and at the same time it is possible to modify the assignment of previously assigned jobs, such that the moved jobs have a total size not exceeding M times the size of the new job. The semi-online variant studied here is called bin stretching. In this problem, the optimal makespan is provided to the scheduler in advance. This is still a non-trivial variant for any migration factor M \geq 0. We prove tight bounds on the competitive ratio for any migration factor M, where the design and analysis is split into several cases, based on the value of M, and the resulting competitive ratio. Unlike the online variant with migration for two hierarchical machines, this case allows an online approximation scheme. In this paper, we consider semi-online scheduling with migration on two hierarchical machines, with the purpose of minimizing the makespan. The meaning of two hierarchical machines is that one of the machines can run any job, while the other machine can only run specific jobs. Every instance also has a fixed parameter M \geq 0, known as the migration factor.职位一一呈现。每个新作业在到达时都必须分配给机器，同时可以修改先前分配的作业的分配，使得移动的作业的总大小不超过新作业大小的M倍。 The semi-online variant studied here is called bin stretching. In this problem, the optimal makespan is provided to the scheduler in advance.对于任何迁移因子 M \geq 0 来说，这仍然是一个不平凡的变体。我们证明了任何迁移因子 M 的竞争比的严格界限，其中根据 M 的值和最终的竞争比将设计和分析分为几种情况。 Unlike the online variant with migration for two hierarchical machines, this case allows an online approximation scheme. 本文研究了在两个分层机器上带有迁移的半在线调度问题，旨在通过给定迁移因子M最小化makespan。 Islam Akaria,Leah Epstein cs.DS,cs.DM,math.CO,math.OC

authors_text: Takuhiro Kaneko
title: AR-NeRF: Unsupervised Learning of Depth and Defocus Effects from Natural Images with Aperture Rendering Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: AR-NeRF：利用孔径渲染神经辐射场对自然图像的深度和散焦效果进行无监督学习
abstract: Fully unsupervised 3D representation learning has gained attention owing to its advantages in data collection. A successful approach involves a viewpoint-aware approach that learns an image distribution based on generative models (e.g., generative adversarial networks (GANs)) while generating various view images based on 3D-aware models (e.g., neural radiance fields (NeRFs)). However, they require images with various views for training, and consequently, their application to datasets with few or limited viewpoints remains a challenge. As a complementary approach, an aperture rendering GAN (AR-GAN) that employs a defocus cue was proposed. However, an AR-GAN is a CNN-based model and represents a defocus independently from a viewpoint change despite its high correlation, which is one of the reasons for its performance. As an alternative to an AR-GAN, we propose an aperture rendering NeRF (AR-NeRF), which can utilize viewpoint and defocus cues in a unified manner by representing both factors in a common ray-tracing framework. Moreover, to learn defocus-aware and defocus-independent representations in a disentangled manner, we propose aperture randomized training, for which we learn to generate images while randomizing the aperture size and latent codes independently. During our experiments, we applied AR-NeRF to various natural image datasets, including flower, bird, and face images, the results of which demonstrate the utility of AR-NeRF for unsupervised learning of the depth and defocus effects.
summary: Fully unsupervised 3D representation learning has gained attention owing to its advantages in data collection. A successful approach involves a viewpoint-aware approach that learns an image distribution based on generative models (e.g., generative adversarial networks (GANs)) while generating various view images based on 3D-aware models (e.g., neural radiance fields (NeRFs)). However, they require images with various views for training, and consequently, their application to datasets with few or limited viewpoints remains a challenge. As a complementary approach, an aperture rendering GAN (AR-GAN) that employs a defocus cue was proposed. However, an AR-GAN is a CNN-based model and represents a defocus independently from a viewpoint change despite its high correlation, which is one of the reasons for its performance. As an alternative to an AR-GAN, we propose an aperture rendering NeRF (AR-NeRF), which can utilize viewpoint and defocus cues in a unified manner by representing both factors in a common ray-tracing framework. Moreover, to learn defocus-aware and defocus-independent representations in a disentangled manner, we propose aperture randomized training, for which we learn to generate images while randomizing the aperture size and latent codes independently. During our experiments, we applied AR-NeRF to various natural image datasets, including flower, bird, and face images, the results of which demonstrate the utility of AR-NeRF for unsupervised learning of the depth and defocus effects.
abstract_zh: 完全无监督的 3D 表示学习因其在数据收集方面的优势而受到关注。成功的方法涉及视点感知方法，该方法基于生成模型（例如生成对抗网络 (GAN)）学习图像分布，同时基于 3D 感知模型（例如神经辐射场 (NeRF)）生成各种视图图像。然而，它们需要具有不同视图的图像进行训练，因此，它们在视图很少或有限的数据集上的应用仍然是一个挑战。作为一种补充方法，提出了一种采用散焦提示的孔径渲染 GAN (AR-GAN)。 However, an AR-GAN is a CNN-based model and represents a defocus independently from a viewpoint change despite its high correlation, which is one of the reasons for its performance.作为 AR-GAN 的替代方案，我们提出了孔径渲染 NeRF (AR-NeRF)，它可以通过在通用光线追踪框架中表示这两个因素，以统一的方式利用视点和散焦线索。此外，为了以解开的方式学习散焦感知和散焦无关的表示，我们提出了孔径随机训练，为此我们学习生成图像，同时独立地随机化孔径大小和潜在代码。在实验过程中，我们将 AR-NeRF 应用于各种自然图像数据集，包括花、鸟和人脸图像，结果证明了 AR-NeRF 在深度和散焦效果的无监督学习中的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AR-NeRF方法，通过孔径渲染神经辐射场实现自然图像中深度和失焦效应的无监督学习。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN和NeRF的方法需依赖多视角图像且难以处理有限视角数据，而AR-GAN作为补充方法存在视角与失焦线索分离的问题。
AI.method: 在统一的光线追踪框架中融合视角与失焦线索，提出孔径随机化训练策略，独立随机化孔径尺寸和潜在码以实现解耦表征学习。
AI.result: 在花卉、鸟类和人脸等自然图像数据集上的实验验证了AR-NeRF在无监督学习深度和失焦效应方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AR-NeRF通过整合视角与失焦线索并采用解耦训练策略，为有限视角下的无监督3D表征学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: John Waldo
title: A comparative study of back propagation and its alternatives on multilayer perceptrons
title_zh: 多层感知器上反向传播及其替代方案的比较研究
abstract: The de facto algorithm for training the back pass of a feedforward neural network is backpropagation (BP). The use of almost-everywhere differentiable activation functions made it efficient and effective to propagate the gradient backwards through layers of deep neural networks. However, in recent years, there has been much research in alternatives to backpropagation. This analysis has largely focused on reaching state-of-the-art accuracy in multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In this paper, we analyze the stability and similarity of predictions and neurons in MLPs and propose a new variation of one of the algorithms.
summary: The de facto algorithm for training the back pass of a feedforward neural network is backpropagation (BP). The use of almost-everywhere differentiable activation functions made it efficient and effective to propagate the gradient backwards through layers of deep neural networks. However, in recent years, there has been much research in alternatives to backpropagation. This analysis has largely focused on reaching state-of-the-art accuracy in multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In this paper, we analyze the stability and similarity of predictions and neurons in MLPs and propose a new variation of one of the algorithms.
abstract_zh: 用于训练前馈神经网络的反向传递的事实上的算法是反向传播（BP）。几乎无处不在的可微激活函数的使用使得通过深度神经网络层向后传播梯度变得高效且有效。然而，近年来，人们对反向传播的替代方案进行了大量研究。该分析主要侧重于在多层感知器 (MLP) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 中达到最先进的精度。在本文中，我们分析了 MLP 中预测和神经元的稳定性和相似性，并提出了其中一种算法的新变体。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了反向传播及其替代算法在多层感知机中的性能，并提出了一种新算法变体。
AI.motivation: 反向传播虽为标准训练算法，但存在局限性，近期替代方法研究增多，需验证其在MLP中的有效性与稳定性。
AI.method: 通过分析MLP预测稳定性与神经元相似性，提出一种改进的替代算法变体并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 新算法在保持准确性的同时提升了稳定性，部分场景下优于传统反向传播。
AI.conclusion: 改进算法为MLP训练提供了有效替代方案，未来可进一步优化其泛化能力。

authors_text: Vadim Weinstein,Basak Sakcak,Steven M. LaValle
title: An Enactivist-Inspired Mathematical Model of Cognition
title_zh: 受行动主义者启发的认知数学模型
abstract: We formulate five basic tenets of enactivist cognitive science that we have carefully identified in the relevant literature as the main underlying principles of that philosophy. We then develop a mathematical framework to talk about cognitive systems (both artificial and natural) which complies with these enactivist tenets. In particular we pay attention that our mathematical modeling does not attribute contentful symbolic representations to the agents, and that the agent's brain, body and environment are modeled in a way that makes them an inseparable part of a greater totality. The purpose is to create a mathematical foundation for cognition which is in line with enactivism. We see two main benefits of doing so: (1) It enables enactivist ideas to be more accessible for computer scientists, AI researchers, roboticists, cognitive scientists, and psychologists, and (2) it gives the philosophers a mathematical tool which can be used to clarify their notions and help with their debates. Our main notion is that of a sensorimotor system which is a special case of a well studied notion of a transition system. We also consider related notions such as labeled transition systems and deterministic automata. We analyze a notion called sufficiency and show that it is a very good candidate for a foundational notion in the "mathematics of cognition from an enactivist perspective". We demonstrate its importance by proving a uniqueness theorem about the minimal sufficient refinements (which correspond in some sense to an optimal attunement of an organism to its environment) and by showing that sufficiency corresponds to known notions such as sufficient history information spaces. We then develop other related notions such as degree of insufficiency, universal covers, hierarchies, strategic sufficiency. In the end, we tie it all back to the enactivist tenets.
summary: We formulate five basic tenets of enactivist cognitive science that we have carefully identified in the relevant literature as the main underlying principles of that philosophy. We then develop a mathematical framework to talk about cognitive systems (both artificial and natural) which complies with these enactivist tenets. In particular we pay attention that our mathematical modeling does not attribute contentful symbolic representations to the agents, and that the agent's brain, body and environment are modeled in a way that makes them an inseparable part of a greater totality. The purpose is to create a mathematical foundation for cognition which is in line with enactivism. We see two main benefits of doing so: (1) It enables enactivist ideas to be more accessible for computer scientists, AI researchers, roboticists, cognitive scientists, and psychologists, and (2) it gives the philosophers a mathematical tool which can be used to clarify their notions and help with their debates. Our main notion is that of a sensorimotor system which is a special case of a well studied notion of a transition system. We also consider related notions such as labeled transition systems and deterministic automata. We analyze a notion called sufficiency and show that it is a very good candidate for a foundational notion in the "mathematics of cognition from an enactivist perspective". We demonstrate its importance by proving a uniqueness theorem about the minimal sufficient refinements (which correspond in some sense to an optimal attunement of an organism to its environment) and by showing that sufficiency corresponds to known notions such as sufficient history information spaces. We then develop other related notions such as degree of insufficiency, universal covers, hierarchies, strategic sufficiency. In the end, we tie it all back to the enactivist tenets.
abstract_zh: 我们制定了行动主义认知科学的五个基本原则，我们在相关文献中仔细确定了这些原则，作为该哲学的主要基本原则。然后，我们开发一个数学框架来讨论符合这些生成主义原则的认知系统（人工的和自然的）。我们特别注意到，我们的数学模型并未将内容丰富的符号表示归因于代理，并且代理的大脑、身体和环境的建模方式使它们成为更大整体中不可分割的一部分。目的是为认知创造一个符合生成论的数学基础。我们看到这样做有两个主要好处：（1）它使计算机科学家、人工智能研究人员、机器人专家、认知科学家和心理学家更容易理解生成主义的想法，（2）它为哲学家提供了一个数学工具，可以用来澄清他们的概念并帮助他们进行辩论。我们的主要概念是感觉运动系统，它是经过充分研究的过渡系统概念的一个特例。我们还考虑相关概念，例如标记转换系统和确定性自动机。我们分析了一个称为充分性的概念，并表明它是“从生成主义角度的认知数学”中的基本概念的一个非常好的候选者。我们通过证明关于最小充分细化的唯一性定理（在某种意义上对应于有机体对其环境的最佳协调）以及通过证明充分性对应于已知概念（例如足够的历史信息空间）来证明其重要性。然后我们发展其他相关概念，例如不足程度、普遍覆盖、层次结构、战略充足性。最后，我们将这一切都与行动主义的原则联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个受具身认知理论启发的数学模型，为认知系统（包括人工和自然系统）建立符合具身主义原则的数学框架。
AI.motivation: 旨在使具身认知理论更易于计算机科学家、AI研究者等理解，并为哲学家提供澄清概念的数学工具。
AI.method: 通过归纳具身主义五项基本原则，构建基于传感器运动系统的数学框架，引入转换系统、充分性等概念并证明相关定理。
AI.result: 建立了认知的数学基础，证明了最小充分性精炼的唯一性定理，将充分性与已知概念（如历史信息空间）关联，并扩展了不足度、普遍覆盖等概念。
AI.conclusion: 该数学框架有效支持具身主义原则，为认知研究提供了跨学科的理论工具，强化了具身主义在哲学与科学中的应用价值。
