search_text: An Enactivist-Inspired Mathematical Model of Cognition 受行动主义者启发的认知数学模型 We formulate five basic tenets of enactivist cognitive science that we have carefully identified in the relevant literature as the main underlying principles of that philosophy. We then develop a mathematical framework to talk about cognitive systems (both artificial and natural) which complies with these enactivist tenets. In particular we pay attention that our mathematical modeling does not attribute contentful symbolic representations to the agents, and that the agent's brain, body and environment are modeled in a way that makes them an inseparable part of a greater totality. The purpose is to create a mathematical foundation for cognition which is in line with enactivism. We see two main benefits of doing so: (1) It enables enactivist ideas to be more accessible for computer scientists, AI researchers, roboticists, cognitive scientists, and psychologists, and (2) it gives the philosophers a mathematical tool which can be used to clarify their notions and help with their debates. Our main notion is that of a sensorimotor system which is a special case of a well studied notion of a transition system. We also consider related notions such as labeled transition systems and deterministic automata. We analyze a notion called sufficiency and show that it is a very good candidate for a foundational notion in the "mathematics of cognition from an enactivist perspective". We demonstrate its importance by proving a uniqueness theorem about the minimal sufficient refinements (which correspond in some sense to an optimal attunement of an organism to its environment) and by showing that sufficiency corresponds to known notions such as sufficient history information spaces. We then develop other related notions such as degree of insufficiency, universal covers, hierarchies, strategic sufficiency. In the end, we tie it all back to the enactivist tenets. 我们制定了行动主义认知科学的五个基本原则，我们在相关文献中仔细确定了这些原则，作为该哲学的主要基本原则。然后，我们开发一个数学框架来讨论符合这些生成主义原则的认知系统（人工的和自然的）。我们特别注意到，我们的数学模型并未将内容丰富的符号表示归因于代理，并且代理的大脑、身体和环境的建模方式使它们成为更大整体中不可分割的一部分。目的是为认知创造一个符合生成论的数学基础。我们看到这样做有两个主要好处：（1）它使计算机科学家、人工智能研究人员、机器人专家、认知科学家和心理学家更容易理解生成主义的想法，（2）它为哲学家提供了一个数学工具，可以用来澄清他们的概念并帮助他们进行辩论。我们的主要概念是感觉运动系统，它是经过充分研究的过渡系统概念的一个特例。我们还考虑相关概念，例如标记转换系统和确定性自动机。我们分析了一个称为充分性的概念，并表明它是“从生成主义角度的认知数学”中的基本概念的一个非常好的候选者。我们通过证明关于最小充分细化的唯一性定理（在某种意义上对应于有机体对其环境的最佳协调）以及通过证明充分性对应于已知概念（例如足够的历史信息空间）来证明其重要性。然后我们发展其他相关概念，例如不足程度、普遍覆盖、层次结构、战略充足性。最后，我们将这一切都与行动主义的原则联系起来。 本文提出一个受具身认知理论启发的数学模型，为认知系统（包括人工和自然系统）建立符合具身主义原则的数学框架。 Vadim Weinstein,Basak Sakcak,Steven M. LaValle q-bio.NC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yakov Miron,Chana Ross,Yuval Goldfracht,Chen Tessler,Dotan Di Castro
title: Towards Autonomous Grading In The Real World
title_zh: 走向现实世界中的自主评分
abstract: In this work, we aim to tackle the problem of autonomous grading, where a dozer is required to flatten an uneven area. In addition, we explore methods for bridging the gap between a simulated environment and real scenarios. We design both a realistic physical simulation and a scaled real prototype environment mimicking the real dozer dynamics and sensory information. We establish heuristics and learning strategies in order to solve the problem. Through extensive experimentation, we show that although heuristics are capable of tackling the problem in a clean and noise-free simulated environment, they fail catastrophically when facing real world scenarios. As the heuristics are capable of successfully solving the task in the simulated environment, we show they can be leveraged to guide a learning agent which can generalize and solve the task both in simulation and in a scaled prototype environment.
summary: In this work, we aim to tackle the problem of autonomous grading, where a dozer is required to flatten an uneven area. In addition, we explore methods for bridging the gap between a simulated environment and real scenarios. We design both a realistic physical simulation and a scaled real prototype environment mimicking the real dozer dynamics and sensory information. We establish heuristics and learning strategies in order to solve the problem. Through extensive experimentation, we show that although heuristics are capable of tackling the problem in a clean and noise-free simulated environment, they fail catastrophically when facing real world scenarios. As the heuristics are capable of successfully solving the task in the simulated environment, we show they can be leveraged to guide a learning agent which can generalize and solve the task both in simulation and in a scaled prototype environment.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决自动平整的问题，其中需要推土机来平整不平坦的区域。此外，我们还探索弥合模拟环境与真实场景之间差距的方法。我们设计了真实的物理模拟和模拟真实推土机动力学和感官信息的缩放真实原型环境。我们建立启发式和学习策略来解决问题。通过大量的实验，我们表明，尽管启发式方法能够在干净、无噪声的模拟环境中解决问题，但在面对现实世界场景时，它们会发生灾难性的失败。由于启发式方法能够在模拟环境中成功解决任务，因此我们表明可以利用它们来指导学习代理，该学习代理可以在模拟和规模化原型环境中概括和解决任务。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决推土机自主平整地面的问题，并探索模拟环境与现实场景之间的差距弥合方法。
AI.motivation: 现有启发式方法在模拟环境中表现良好，但难以应对真实世界的复杂性和噪声，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计物理模拟与缩放原型环境，结合启发式规则与机器学习策略，训练能泛化的自主控制系统。
AI.result: 启发式方法在模拟中有效但在现实中失效，而基于启发式引导的学习代理在模拟和原型环境中均能成功完成任务。
AI.conclusion: 启发式方法可作为学习代理的先验知识，有效提升真实场景中的自主作业性能。

authors_text: Maximilian Hüttenrauch,Gerhard Neumann
title: Regret-Aware Black-Box Optimization with Natural Gradients, Trust-Regions and Entropy Control
title_zh: 使用自然梯度、信赖域和熵控制进行遗憾感知黑盒优化
abstract: Most successful stochastic black-box optimizers, such as CMA-ES, use rankings of the individual samples to obtain a new search distribution. Yet, the use of rankings also introduces several issues such as the underlying optimization objective is often unclear, i.e., we do not optimize the expected fitness. Further, while these algorithms typically produce a high-quality mean estimate of the search distribution, the produced samples can have poor quality as these algorithms are ignorant of the regret. Lastly, noisy fitness function evaluations may result in solutions that are highly sub-optimal on expectation. In contrast, stochastic optimizers that are motivated by policy gradients, such as the Model-based Relative Entropy Stochastic Search (MORE) algorithm, directly optimize the expected fitness function without the use of rankings. MORE can be derived by applying natural policy gradients and compatible function approximation, and is using information theoretic constraints to ensure the stability of the policy update. While MORE does not suffer from the listed limitations, it often cannot achieve state of the art performance in comparison to ranking based methods. We improve MORE by decoupling the update of the mean and covariance of the search distribution allowing for more aggressive updates on the mean while keeping the update on the covariance conservative, an improved entropy scheduling technique based on an evolution path which results in faster convergence and a simplified and more effective model learning approach in comparison to the original paper. We compare our algorithm to state of the art black-box optimization algorithms on standard optimization tasks as well as on episodic RL tasks in robotics where it is also crucial to have small regret. We obtain competitive results on benchmark functions and clearly outperform ranking-based methods in terms of regret on the RL tasks.
summary: Most successful stochastic black-box optimizers, such as CMA-ES, use rankings of the individual samples to obtain a new search distribution. Yet, the use of rankings also introduces several issues such as the underlying optimization objective is often unclear, i.e., we do not optimize the expected fitness. Further, while these algorithms typically produce a high-quality mean estimate of the search distribution, the produced samples can have poor quality as these algorithms are ignorant of the regret. Lastly, noisy fitness function evaluations may result in solutions that are highly sub-optimal on expectation. In contrast, stochastic optimizers that are motivated by policy gradients, such as the Model-based Relative Entropy Stochastic Search (MORE) algorithm, directly optimize the expected fitness function without the use of rankings. MORE can be derived by applying natural policy gradients and compatible function approximation, and is using information theoretic constraints to ensure the stability of the policy update. While MORE does not suffer from the listed limitations, it often cannot achieve state of the art performance in comparison to ranking based methods. We improve MORE by decoupling the update of the mean and covariance of the search distribution allowing for more aggressive updates on the mean while keeping the update on the covariance conservative, an improved entropy scheduling technique based on an evolution path which results in faster convergence and a simplified and more effective model learning approach in comparison to the original paper. We compare our algorithm to state of the art black-box optimization algorithms on standard optimization tasks as well as on episodic RL tasks in robotics where it is also crucial to have small regret. We obtain competitive results on benchmark functions and clearly outperform ranking-based methods in terms of regret on the RL tasks.
abstract_zh: 大多数成功的随机黑盒优化器（例如 CMA-ES）使用单个样本的排名来获得新的搜索分布。然而，排名的使用也引入了几个问题，例如潜在的优化目标通常不清楚，即我们没有优化预期的适应度。此外，虽然这些算法通常会生成搜索分布的高质量平均估计，但生成的样本质量可能很差，因为这些算法不知道遗憾。最后，嘈杂的适应度函数评估可能会导致解决方案与预期高度次优。相比之下，由策略梯度驱动的随机优化器，例如基于模型的相对熵随机搜索（MORE）算法，直接优化预期适应度函数，而不使用排名。 MORE可以通过应用自然策略梯度和兼容函数逼近来推导，并利用信息论约束来保证策略更新的稳定性。虽然 MORE 不受列出的限制的影响，但与基于排名的方法相比，它通常无法实现最先进的性能。我们通过解耦搜索分布的均值和协方差的更新来改进更多，允许对均值进行更积极的更新，同时保持协方差的更新保守，这是一种基于进化路径的改进的熵调度技术，与原始论文相比，它可以实现更快的收敛和简化且更有效的模型学习方法。我们将我们的算法与标准优化任务以及机器人中的情景 RL 任务上最先进的黑盒优化算法进行比较，在这些任务中，保持小的遗憾也至关重要。我们在基准函数上获得了有竞争力的结果，并且在 RL 任务的遗憾方面明显优于基于排名的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自然梯度、信任区域和熵控制的后悔感知黑盒优化算法，旨在解决传统方法在样本质量和后悔控制方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于排名的黑盒优化方法（如CMA-ES）存在优化目标不明确、样本质量差和对噪声敏感的问题，而基于策略梯度的方法（如MORE）虽避免排名但性能未达最优，需改进其后悔控制能力。
AI.method: 通过解耦搜索分布均值与协方差的更新策略，允许更激进的均值更新同时保持协方差保守性；引入基于进化路径的熵调度技术加速收敛，并优化模型学习流程。
AI.result: 在基准函数测试中表现竞争力，在机器人强化学习任务中显著优于基于排名的方法，有效降低后悔值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过后悔感知机制和算法改进，在复杂优化任务中实现了更优的收敛性能与稳定性，为黑盒优化提供了新思路。

search_text: Regret-Aware Black-Box Optimization with Natural Gradients, Trust-Regions and Entropy Control 使用自然梯度、信赖域和熵控制进行遗憾感知黑盒优化 Most successful stochastic black-box optimizers, such as CMA-ES, use rankings of the individual samples to obtain a new search distribution. Yet, the use of rankings also introduces several issues such as the underlying optimization objective is often unclear, i.e., we do not optimize the expected fitness. Further, while these algorithms typically produce a high-quality mean estimate of the search distribution, the produced samples can have poor quality as these algorithms are ignorant of the regret. Lastly, noisy fitness function evaluations may result in solutions that are highly sub-optimal on expectation. In contrast, stochastic optimizers that are motivated by policy gradients, such as the Model-based Relative Entropy Stochastic Search (MORE) algorithm, directly optimize the expected fitness function without the use of rankings. MORE can be derived by applying natural policy gradients and compatible function approximation, and is using information theoretic constraints to ensure the stability of the policy update. While MORE does not suffer from the listed limitations, it often cannot achieve state of the art performance in comparison to ranking based methods. We improve MORE by decoupling the update of the mean and covariance of the search distribution allowing for more aggressive updates on the mean while keeping the update on the covariance conservative, an improved entropy scheduling technique based on an evolution path which results in faster convergence and a simplified and more effective model learning approach in comparison to the original paper. We compare our algorithm to state of the art black-box optimization algorithms on standard optimization tasks as well as on episodic RL tasks in robotics where it is also crucial to have small regret. We obtain competitive results on benchmark functions and clearly outperform ranking-based methods in terms of regret on the RL tasks. 大多数成功的随机黑盒优化器（例如 CMA-ES）使用单个样本的排名来获得新的搜索分布。然而，排名的使用也引入了几个问题，例如潜在的优化目标通常不清楚，即我们没有优化预期的适应度。此外，虽然这些算法通常会生成搜索分布的高质量平均估计，但生成的样本质量可能很差，因为这些算法不知道遗憾。最后，嘈杂的适应度函数评估可能会导致解决方案与预期高度次优。相比之下，由策略梯度驱动的随机优化器，例如基于模型的相对熵随机搜索（MORE）算法，直接优化预期适应度函数，而不使用排名。 MORE可以通过应用自然策略梯度和兼容函数逼近来推导，并利用信息论约束来保证策略更新的稳定性。虽然 MORE 不受列出的限制的影响，但与基于排名的方法相比，它通常无法实现最先进的性能。我们通过解耦搜索分布的均值和协方差的更新来改进更多，允许对均值进行更积极的更新，同时保持协方差的更新保守，这是一种基于进化路径的改进的熵调度技术，与原始论文相比，它可以实现更快的收敛和简化且更有效的模型学习方法。我们将我们的算法与标准优化任务以及机器人中的情景 RL 任务上最先进的黑盒优化算法进行比较，在这些任务中，保持小的遗憾也至关重要。我们在基准函数上获得了有竞争力的结果，并且在 RL 任务的遗憾方面明显优于基于排名的方法。 本文提出一种结合自然梯度、信任区域和熵控制的后悔感知黑盒优化算法，旨在解决传统方法在样本质量和后悔控制方面的不足。 Maximilian Hüttenrauch,Gerhard Neumann stat.ML,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Chenqing Hua,Sitao Luan,Qian Zhang,Jie Fu
title: Graph Neural Networks Intersect Probabilistic Graphical Models: A Survey
title_zh: 图神经网络与概率图模型相交：一项调查
abstract: Graphs are a powerful data structure to represent relational data and are widely used to describe complex real-world data structures. Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGMs) have been well-developed in the past years to mathematically model real-world scenarios in compact graphical representations of distributions of variables. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are new inference methods developed in recent years and are attracting growing attention due to their effectiveness and flexibility in solving inference and learning problems over graph-structured data. These two powerful approaches have different advantages in capturing relations from observations and how they conduct message passing, and they can benefit each other in various tasks. In this survey, we broadly study the intersection of GNNs and PGMs. Specifically, we first discuss how GNNs can benefit from learning structured representations in PGMs, generate explainable predictions by PGMs, and how PGMs can infer object relationships. Then we discuss how GNNs are implemented in PGMs for more efficient inference and structure learning. In the end, we summarize the benchmark datasets used in recent studies and discuss promising future directions.
summary: Graphs are a powerful data structure to represent relational data and are widely used to describe complex real-world data structures. Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGMs) have been well-developed in the past years to mathematically model real-world scenarios in compact graphical representations of distributions of variables. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are new inference methods developed in recent years and are attracting growing attention due to their effectiveness and flexibility in solving inference and learning problems over graph-structured data. These two powerful approaches have different advantages in capturing relations from observations and how they conduct message passing, and they can benefit each other in various tasks. In this survey, we broadly study the intersection of GNNs and PGMs. Specifically, we first discuss how GNNs can benefit from learning structured representations in PGMs, generate explainable predictions by PGMs, and how PGMs can infer object relationships. Then we discuss how GNNs are implemented in PGMs for more efficient inference and structure learning. In the end, we summarize the benchmark datasets used in recent studies and discuss promising future directions.
abstract_zh: 图是表示关系数据的强大数据结构，广泛用于描述复杂的现实世界数据结构。概率图形模型 (PGM) 在过去几年中得到了很好的发展，可以用变量分布的紧凑图形表示对现实世界场景进行数学建模。图神经网络（GNN）是近年来发展起来的新型推理方法，由于其在解决图结构数据的推理和学习问题方面的有效性和灵活性而受到越来越多的关注。这两种强大的方法在从观察中捕获关系以及如何进行消息传递方面具有不同的优势，并且它们可以在各种任务中相互受益。在本次调查中，我们广泛研究了 GNN 和 PGM 的交叉点。具体来说，我们首先讨论 GNN 如何从学习 PGM 中的结构化表示中受益，通过 PGM 生成可解释的预测，以及 PGM 如何推断对象关系。然后我们讨论如何在 PGM 中实现 GNN 以实现更有效的推理和结构学习。最后，我们总结了最近研究中使用的基准数据集并讨论了有前景的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图神经网络（GNN）与概率图模型（PGM）的交叉领域，探讨两者在结构表示、推理和学习中的互补性。
AI.motivation: GNN在图数据处理中表现出色，而PGM在结构化建模和可解释性方面有优势，二者结合可提升模型性能与应用范围。
AI.method: 通过分析现有研究，讨论GNN如何借鉴PGM的结构化表示与可解释性，以及PGM如何利用GNN优化推理效率；总结典型数据集与技术实现。
AI.result: 系统梳理了GNN与PGM的融合方法、应用场景及基准数据集，指出当前研究的不足与潜在方向。
AI.conclusion: GNN与PGM的结合为复杂图任务提供了新思路，未来需进一步探索高效融合框架与可解释性增强技术。

authors_text: Frank Dignum
title: Social Practices: a Complete Formalization
title_zh: 社会实践：完整的形式化
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1809.08751
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1809.08751
abstract: Multi-agent models are a suitable starting point to model complex social interactions. However, as the complexity of the systems increase, we argue that novel modeling approaches are needed that can deal with inter-dependencies at different levels of society, where many heterogeneous parties (software agents, robots, humans) are interacting and reacting to each other. In this paper, we present a formalization of a social framework for agents based on the concept of Social Practices as high level specifications of normal (expected) behavior in a given social context. We argue that social practices facilitate the practical reasoning of agents in standard social interactions. Thus they can support deliberations for complex situations just like conventions and norms. However, they also come with a social context that gives handles for social planning and deliberation in top of the normal functional deliberation. The main goal of this paper is to give a formalization of social practices that can be used as a basis for implementations and defining precise structures within which social learning can take place.
summary: Multi-agent models are a suitable starting point to model complex social interactions. However, as the complexity of the systems increase, we argue that novel modeling approaches are needed that can deal with inter-dependencies at different levels of society, where many heterogeneous parties (software agents, robots, humans) are interacting and reacting to each other. In this paper, we present a formalization of a social framework for agents based on the concept of Social Practices as high level specifications of normal (expected) behavior in a given social context. We argue that social practices facilitate the practical reasoning of agents in standard social interactions. Thus they can support deliberations for complex situations just like conventions and norms. However, they also come with a social context that gives handles for social planning and deliberation in top of the normal functional deliberation. The main goal of this paper is to give a formalization of social practices that can be used as a basis for implementations and defining precise structures within which social learning can take place.
abstract_zh: 多智能体模型是模拟复杂社交互动的合适起点。然而，随着系统复杂性的增加，我们认为需要新的建模方法来处理社会不同层面的相互依赖关系，其中许多异构各方（软件代理、机器人、人类）正在相互交互和反应。在本文中，我们提出了基于社会实践概念的代理社会框架的形式化，作为给定社会背景下正常（预期）行为的高级规范。我们认为，社会实践促进了主体在标准社会互动中的实际推理。因此，它们可以像惯例和规范一样支持对复杂情况的审议。然而，它们还具有社会背景，可以在正常的功能审议之外进行社会规划和审议。本文的主要目标是给出社会实践的形式化，可以用作实施的基础，并定义可以进行社会学习的精确结构。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于社会实践概念的社会框架形式化方法，为多智能体系统的社会交互提供规范和结构
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理复杂社会系统中多层次异构主体间的动态依赖关系，需要新的建模方法支持社会规范与规划
AI.method: 通过形式化社会框架，将社会实践作为高层规范，结合常规功能推理与社会规划，支持代理在复杂社会交互中的推理和决策
AI.result: 成功构建了社会实践的形式化框架，支持多智能体在复杂社会交互中的规范推理与社会学习
AI.conclusion: 该形式化框架为多智能体系统的社会交互建模和社会学习提供了理论基础，有助于处理复杂社会情境中的多层次依赖问题

conclusion: 该形式化框架为多智能体系统的社会交互建模和社会学习提供了理论基础，有助于处理复杂社会情境中的多层次依赖问题
search_text: Social Practices: a Complete Formalization 社会实践：完整的形式化 Multi-agent models are a suitable starting point to model complex social interactions. However, as the complexity of the systems increase, we argue that novel modeling approaches are needed that can deal with inter-dependencies at different levels of society, where many heterogeneous parties (software agents, robots, humans) are interacting and reacting to each other. In this paper, we present a formalization of a social framework for agents based on the concept of Social Practices as high level specifications of normal (expected) behavior in a given social context. We argue that social practices facilitate the practical reasoning of agents in standard social interactions. Thus they can support deliberations for complex situations just like conventions and norms. However, they also come with a social context that gives handles for social planning and deliberation in top of the normal functional deliberation. The main goal of this paper is to give a formalization of social practices that can be used as a basis for implementations and defining precise structures within which social learning can take place. 多智能体模型是模拟复杂社交互动的合适起点。然而，随着系统复杂性的增加，我们认为需要新的建模方法来处理社会不同层面的相互依赖关系，其中许多异构各方（软件代理、机器人、人类）正在相互交互和反应。在本文中，我们提出了基于社会实践概念的代理社会框架的形式化，作为给定社会背景下正常（预期）行为的高级规范。我们认为，社会实践促进了主体在标准社会互动中的实际推理。因此，它们可以像惯例和规范一样支持对复杂情况的审议。然而，它们还具有社会背景，可以在正常的功能审议之外进行社会规划和审议。本文的主要目标是给出社会实践的形式化，可以用作实施的基础，并定义可以进行社会学习的精确结构。 提出一种基于社会实践概念的社会框架形式化方法，为多智能体系统的社会交互提供规范和结构 Frank Dignum cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Kazys Stepanas,Jason Williams,Emili Hernández,Fabio Ruetz,Thomas Hines
title: OHM: GPU Based Occupancy Map Generation
title_zh: OHM：基于 GPU 的占用图生成
abstract: Occupancy grid maps (OGMs) are fundamental to most systems for autonomous robotic navigation. However, CPU-based implementations struggle to keep up with data rates from modern 3D lidar sensors, and provide little capacity for modern extensions which maintain richer voxel representations. This paper presents OHM, our open source, GPU-based OGM framework. We show how the algorithms can be mapped to GPU resources, resolving difficulties with contention to obtain a successful implementation. The implementation supports many modern OGM algorithms including NDT-OM, NDT-TM, decay-rate and TSDF. A thorough performance evaluation is presented based on tracked and quadruped UGV platforms and UAVs, and data sets from both outdoor and subterranean environments. The results demonstrate excellent performance improvements both offline, and for online processing in embedded platforms. Finally, we describe how OHM was a key enabler for the UGV navigation solution for our entry in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, which placed second at the Final Event.
summary: Occupancy grid maps (OGMs) are fundamental to most systems for autonomous robotic navigation. However, CPU-based implementations struggle to keep up with data rates from modern 3D lidar sensors, and provide little capacity for modern extensions which maintain richer voxel representations. This paper presents OHM, our open source, GPU-based OGM framework. We show how the algorithms can be mapped to GPU resources, resolving difficulties with contention to obtain a successful implementation. The implementation supports many modern OGM algorithms including NDT-OM, NDT-TM, decay-rate and TSDF. A thorough performance evaluation is presented based on tracked and quadruped UGV platforms and UAVs, and data sets from both outdoor and subterranean environments. The results demonstrate excellent performance improvements both offline, and for online processing in embedded platforms. Finally, we describe how OHM was a key enabler for the UGV navigation solution for our entry in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, which placed second at the Final Event.
abstract_zh: 占用网格地图 (OGM) 是大多数自主机器人导航系统的基础。然而，基于 CPU 的实现很难跟上现代 3D 激光雷达传感器的数据速率，并且为保持更丰富的体素表示的现代扩展提供的能力很小。本文介绍了 OHM，我们基于 GPU 的开源 OGM 框架。我们展示了如何将算法映射到 GPU 资源，解决争用困难以获得成功实现。该实现支持许多现代 OGM 算法，包括 NDT-OM、NDT-TM、衰减率和 TSDF。基于履带式和四足 UGV 平台和无人机以及来自室外和地下环境的数据集进行了全面的性能评估。结果表明，嵌入式平台中的离线和在线处理性能均得到了出色的提高。最后，我们描述了 OHM 如何成为我们参加 DARPA 地下挑战赛的 UGV 导航解决方案的关键推动者，该挑战赛在决赛中获得第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPU的占用网格地图（OGM）生成框架OHM，以解决传统CPU实现无法处理现代3D激光雷达数据率及复杂算法扩展的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代自主机器人导航系统需要处理高数据率的3D激光雷达信息并支持更丰富的体素表示，但传统CPU实现存在性能瓶颈和扩展性不足。
AI.method: 将OGM算法映射到GPU架构，通过优化资源竞争机制实现高效并行计算，并支持NDT-OM、TSDF等多种现代OGM算法。
AI.result: 在四足机器人、无人车及无人机平台上验证，离线和嵌入式在线处理性能均有显著提升，并助力团队在DARPA地下挑战赛中获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: OHM通过GPU加速有效解决了传统OGM框架的性能限制，为复杂环境下的实时地图生成提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ruili Feng,Kecheng Zheng,Yukun Huang,Deli Zhao,Michael Jordan,Zheng-Jun Zha
title: Rank Diminishing in Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络中的排名递减
abstract: The rank of neural networks measures information flowing across layers. It is an instance of a key structural condition that applies across broad domains of machine learning. In particular, the assumption of low-rank feature representations leads to algorithmic developments in many architectures. For neural networks, however, the intrinsic mechanism that yields low-rank structures remains vague and unclear. To fill this gap, we perform a rigorous study on the behavior of network rank, focusing particularly on the notion of rank deficiency. We theoretically establish a universal monotonic decreasing property of network rank from the basic rules of differential and algebraic composition, and uncover rank deficiency of network blocks and deep function coupling. By virtue of our numerical tools, we provide the first empirical analysis of the per-layer behavior of network rank in practical settings, i.e., ResNets, deep MLPs, and Transformers on ImageNet. These empirical results are in direct accord with our theory. Furthermore, we reveal a novel phenomenon of independence deficit caused by the rank deficiency of deep networks, where classification confidence of a given category can be linearly decided by the confidence of a handful of other categories. The theoretical results of this work, together with the empirical findings, may advance understanding of the inherent principles of deep neural networks.
summary: The rank of neural networks measures information flowing across layers. It is an instance of a key structural condition that applies across broad domains of machine learning. In particular, the assumption of low-rank feature representations leads to algorithmic developments in many architectures. For neural networks, however, the intrinsic mechanism that yields low-rank structures remains vague and unclear. To fill this gap, we perform a rigorous study on the behavior of network rank, focusing particularly on the notion of rank deficiency. We theoretically establish a universal monotonic decreasing property of network rank from the basic rules of differential and algebraic composition, and uncover rank deficiency of network blocks and deep function coupling. By virtue of our numerical tools, we provide the first empirical analysis of the per-layer behavior of network rank in practical settings, i.e., ResNets, deep MLPs, and Transformers on ImageNet. These empirical results are in direct accord with our theory. Furthermore, we reveal a novel phenomenon of independence deficit caused by the rank deficiency of deep networks, where classification confidence of a given category can be linearly decided by the confidence of a handful of other categories. The theoretical results of this work, together with the empirical findings, may advance understanding of the inherent principles of deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络的等级衡量跨层的信息流动。这是适用于机器学习广泛领域的关键结构条件的一个实例。特别是，低秩特征表示的假设导致了许多架构中的算法发展。然而，对于神经网络来说，产生低秩结构的内在机制仍然模糊且不清楚。为了填补这一空白，我们对网络排名的行为进行了严格的研究，特别关注排名缺陷的概念。我们从微分和代数构成的基本规则出发，从理论上建立了网络秩的普遍单调递减性质，并揭示了网络块的秩缺陷和深层函数耦合。凭借我们的数值工具，我们首次对实际设置中网络等级的每层行为进行了实证分析，即 ResNet、深度 MLP 和 ImageNet 上的 Transformer。这些实证结果与我们的理论直接一致。此外，我们揭示了一种由深层网络的秩缺陷引起的独立性赤字的新现象，其中给定类别的分类置信度可以由少数其他类别的置信度线性决定。这项工作的理论结果与实证研究结果相结合，可能会促进对深度神经网络内在原理的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度神经网络中网络秩的递减现象，揭示其内在机制并验证理论假设。
AI.motivation: 神经网络的低秩特性在算法设计中广泛应用，但其内在形成机制尚不明确，需理论分析与实证研究。
AI.method: 通过微分与代数组合规则建立理论框架，结合ResNet、MLP和Transformer的实证分析验证理论。
AI.result: 理论证明网络秩单调递减，实证显示与理论一致，并发现深度网络的类别置信度线性依赖现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究阐明了深度网络秩递减的普遍规律，揭示了其结构特性对模型行为的影响，推动对深度学习原理的理解。

authors_text: Qi Jiang,Hao Shi,Lei Sun,Shaohua Gao,Kailun Yang,Kaiwei Wang
title: Annular Computational Imaging: Capture Clear Panoramic Images through Simple Lens
title_zh: 环形计算成像：通过简单的镜头捕捉清晰的全景图像
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging (TCI). Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/zju-jiangqi/ACI-PI2RNet
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging (TCI). Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/zju-jiangqi/ACI-PI2RNet
abstract: Panoramic Annular Lens (PAL) composed of few lenses has great potential in panoramic surrounding sensing tasks for mobile and wearable devices because of its tiny size and large Field of View (FoV). However, the image quality of tiny-volume PAL confines to optical limit due to the lack of lenses for aberration correction. In this paper, we propose an Annular Computational Imaging (ACI) framework to break the optical limit of light-weight PAL design. To facilitate learning-based image restoration, we introduce a wave-based simulation pipeline for panoramic imaging and tackle the synthetic-to-real gap through multiple data distributions. The proposed pipeline can be easily adapted to any PAL with design parameters and is suitable for loose-tolerance designs. Furthermore, we design the Physics Informed Image Restoration Network (PI2RNet) considering the physical priors of panoramic imaging and single-pass physics-informed engine. At the dataset level, we create the DIVPano dataset and the extensive experiments on it illustrate that our proposed network sets the new state of the art in the panoramic image restoration under spatially-variant degradation. In addition, the evaluation of the proposed ACI on a simple PAL with only 3 spherical lenses reveals the delicate balance between high-quality panoramic imaging and compact design. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to explore Computational Imaging (CI) in PAL. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/zju-jiangqi/ACI-PI2RNet.
summary: Panoramic Annular Lens (PAL) composed of few lenses has great potential in panoramic surrounding sensing tasks for mobile and wearable devices because of its tiny size and large Field of View (FoV). However, the image quality of tiny-volume PAL confines to optical limit due to the lack of lenses for aberration correction. To facilitate learning-based image restoration, we introduce a wave-based simulation pipeline for panoramic imaging and tackle the synthetic-to-real gap through multiple data distributions. The proposed pipeline can be easily adapted to any PAL with design parameters and is suitable for loose-tolerance designs. Furthermore, we design the Physics Informed Image Restoration Network (PI2RNet) considering the physical priors of panoramic imaging and single-pass physics-informed engine. At the dataset level, we create the DIVPano dataset and the extensive experiments on it illustrate that our proposed network sets the new state of the art in the panoramic image restoration under spatially-variant degradation. In addition, the evaluation of the proposed ACI on a simple PAL with only 3 spherical lenses reveals the delicate balance between high-quality panoramic imaging and compact design. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to explore Computational Imaging (CI) in PAL. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/zju-jiangqi/ACI-PI2RNet.
abstract_zh: 由少量镜头组成的全景环形镜头（PAL）由于其微小的尺寸和大视场（FoV），在移动和可穿戴设备的全景周围传感任务中具有巨大的潜力。然而，由于缺乏像差校正镜头，小体积PAL的图像质量受到光学限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种环形计算成像（ACI）框架来打破轻量级 PAL 设计的光学限制。为了促进基于学习的图像恢复，我们引入了基于波的全景成像模拟管道，并通过多个数据分布解决合成与真实的差距。所提出的管道可以轻松适应任何具有设计参数的 PAL，并且适合宽松公差设计。此外，我们考虑到全景成像和单通道物理通知引擎的物理先验，设计了物理通知图像恢复网络（PI2RNet）。在数据集级别，我们创建了 DIVPano 数据集，并对其进行了大量实验，表明我们提出的网络在空间变异退化下的全景图像恢复中树立了新的技术水平。此外，在仅具有 3 个球面镜头的简单 PAL 上对所提出的 ACI 进行评估，揭示了高质量全景成像和紧凑设计之间的微妙平衡。据我们所知，我们是第一个在 PAL 中探索计算成像 (CI) 的人。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/zju-jianqi/ACI-PI2RNet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种环形计算成像（ACI）框架，通过简单的环形镜头（PAL）实现高质量全景图像捕获。
AI.motivation: 现有的微型PAL因缺乏校正透镜导致图像质量受限，需突破光学限制以实现紧凑设计下的高精度全景成像。
AI.method: 引入基于波动的全景成像仿真流程，构建物理感知图像恢复网络（PI2RNet），并创建DIVPano数据集以弥合合成与真实数据差距。
AI.result: 在仅使用3个球面透镜的简单PAL上实现全景图像修复新SOTA，验证了高质量成像与紧凑设计的平衡性。
AI.conclusion: ACI框架首次将计算成像应用于PAL，为轻量化全景感知设备提供了可扩展的物理感知解决方案。

search_text: Annular Computational Imaging: Capture Clear Panoramic Images through Simple Lens 环形计算成像：通过简单的镜头捕捉清晰的全景图像 Panoramic Annular Lens (PAL) composed of few lenses has great potential in panoramic surrounding sensing tasks for mobile and wearable devices because of its tiny size and large Field of View (FoV). However, the image quality of tiny-volume PAL confines to optical limit due to the lack of lenses for aberration correction. In this paper, we propose an Annular Computational Imaging (ACI) framework to break the optical limit of light-weight PAL design. To facilitate learning-based image restoration, we introduce a wave-based simulation pipeline for panoramic imaging and tackle the synthetic-to-real gap through multiple data distributions. The proposed pipeline can be easily adapted to any PAL with design parameters and is suitable for loose-tolerance designs. Furthermore, we design the Physics Informed Image Restoration Network (PI2RNet) considering the physical priors of panoramic imaging and single-pass physics-informed engine. At the dataset level, we create the DIVPano dataset and the extensive experiments on it illustrate that our proposed network sets the new state of the art in the panoramic image restoration under spatially-variant degradation. In addition, the evaluation of the proposed ACI on a simple PAL with only 3 spherical lenses reveals the delicate balance between high-quality panoramic imaging and compact design. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to explore Computational Imaging (CI) in PAL. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/zju-jiangqi/ACI-PI2RNet. 由少量镜头组成的全景环形镜头（PAL）由于其微小的尺寸和大视场（FoV），在移动和可穿戴设备的全景周围传感任务中具有巨大的潜力。然而，由于缺乏像差校正镜头，小体积PAL的图像质量受到光学限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种环形计算成像（ACI）框架来打破轻量级 PAL 设计的光学限制。为了促进基于学习的图像恢复，我们引入了基于波的全景成像模拟管道，并通过多个数据分布解决合成与真实的差距。所提出的管道可以轻松适应任何具有设计参数的 PAL，并且适合宽松公差设计。此外，我们考虑到全景成像和单通道物理通知引擎的物理先验，设计了物理通知图像恢复网络（PI2RNet）。在数据集级别，我们创建了 DIVPano 数据集，并对其进行了大量实验，表明我们提出的网络在空间变异退化下的全景图像恢复中树立了新的技术水平。此外，在仅具有 3 个球面镜头的简单 PAL 上对所提出的 ACI 进行评估，揭示了高质量全景成像和紧凑设计之间的微妙平衡。据我们所知，我们是第一个在 PAL 中探索计算成像 (CI) 的人。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/zju-jianqi/ACI-PI2RNet 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种环形计算成像（ACI）框架，通过简单的环形镜头（PAL）实现高质量全景图像捕获。 Qi Jiang,Hao Shi,Lei Sun,Shaohua Gao,Kailun Yang,Kaiwei Wang eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.optics

authors_text: Zengyu Qiu,Xinzhu Ma,Kunlin Yang,Chunya Liu,Jun Hou,Shuai Yi,Wanli Ouyang
title: Better Teacher Better Student: Dynamic Prior Knowledge for Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 更好的老师更好的学生：知识蒸馏的动态先验知识
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) has shown very promising capabilities in transferring learning representations from large models (teachers) to small models (students). However, as the capacity gap between students and teachers becomes larger, existing KD methods fail to achieve better results. Our work shows that the `prior knowledge' is vital to KD, especially when applying large teachers. Particularly, we propose the dynamic prior knowledge (DPK), which integrates part of teacher's features as the prior knowledge before the feature distillation. This means that our method also takes the teacher's feature as `input', not just `target'. Besides, we dynamically adjust the ratio of the prior knowledge during the training phase according to the feature gap, thus guiding the student in an appropriate difficulty. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct extensive experiments on two image classification benchmarks (i.e. CIFAR100 and ImageNet) and an object detection benchmark (i.e. MS COCO. The results demonstrate the superiority of our method in performance under varying settings. Besides, our DPK makes the performance of the student model positively correlated with that of the teacher model, which means that we can further boost the accuracy of students by applying larger teachers. More importantly, DPK provides a fast solution in teacher model selection for any given model.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) has shown very promising capabilities in transferring learning representations from large models (teachers) to small models (students). However, as the capacity gap between students and teachers becomes larger, existing KD methods fail to achieve better results. Our work shows that the `prior knowledge' is vital to KD, especially when applying large teachers. Particularly, we propose the dynamic prior knowledge (DPK), which integrates part of teacher's features as the prior knowledge before the feature distillation. This means that our method also takes the teacher's feature as `input', not just `target'. Besides, we dynamically adjust the ratio of the prior knowledge during the training phase according to the feature gap, thus guiding the student in an appropriate difficulty. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct extensive experiments on two image classification benchmarks (i.e. CIFAR100 and ImageNet) and an object detection benchmark (i.e. MS COCO. The results demonstrate the superiority of our method in performance under varying settings. Besides, our DPK makes the performance of the student model positively correlated with that of the teacher model, which means that we can further boost the accuracy of students by applying larger teachers. More importantly, DPK provides a fast solution in teacher model selection for any given model.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）在将学习表示从大型模型（教师）转移到小型模型（学生）方面表现出了非常有前景的能力。然而，随着学生和教师之间的能力差距越来越大，现有的KD方法无法取得更好的效果。我们的工作表明，“先验知识”对于知识发展至关重要，尤其是在应用大型教师时。特别是，我们提出了动态先验知识（DPK），它在特征蒸馏之前集成了教师的部分特征作为先验知识。这意味着我们的方法还将教师的特征作为“输入”，而不仅仅是“目标”。此外，我们在训练阶段根据特征差距动态调整先验知识的比例，从而引导学生选择适当的难度。为了评估所提出的方法，我们在两个图像分类基准（即 CIFAR100 和 ImageNet）和对象检测基准（即 MS COCO）上进行了广泛的实验。结果证明了我们的方法在不同设置下的性能优越性。此外，我们的 DPK 使学生模型的性能与教师模型的性能正相关，这意味着我们可以通过应用更大的教师来进一步提高学生的准确性。更重要的是，DPK 为任何给定模型的教师模型选择提供了快速解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态先验知识（DPK）方法，通过整合教师模型特征并动态调整先验知识比例，提升知识蒸馏在大模型与小模型间的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在教师模型与学生模型容量差距较大时效果不佳，需引入动态先验知识以增强学生模型的学习能力。
AI.method: 提出动态先验知识（DPK），在特征蒸馏前将教师模型的部分特征作为先验知识输入，并根据训练阶段的特征差距动态调整先验知识比例。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100、ImageNet和MS COCO基准测试中，DPK方法显著提升学生模型性能，且学生性能与教师模型正相关，加速了教师模型选择。
AI.conclusion: DPK方法通过动态调整先验知识有效提升知识蒸馏效果，使学生模型性能随教师模型增强而提升，为模型选择提供快速解决方案。

authors_text: Sivaramakrishnan Rajaraman,Feng Yang,Ghada Zamzmi,Peng Guo,Zhiyun Xue,Sameer K Antani
title: Deep ensemble learning for segmenting tuberculosis-consistent manifestations in chest radiographs
title_zh: 深度集成学习用于分割胸片中结核病一致的表现
abstract: Automated segmentation of tuberculosis (TB)-consistent lesions in chest X-rays (CXRs) using deep learning (DL) methods can help reduce radiologist effort, supplement clinical decision-making, and potentially result in improved patient treatment. The majority of works in the literature discuss training automatic segmentation models using coarse bounding box annotations. However, the granularity of the bounding box annotation could result in the inclusion of a considerable fraction of false positives and negatives at the pixel level that may adversely impact overall semantic segmentation performance. This study (i) evaluates the benefits of using fine-grained annotations of TB-consistent lesions and (ii) trains and constructs ensembles of the variants of U-Net models for semantically segmenting TB-consistent lesions in both original and bone-suppressed frontal CXRs. We evaluated segmentation performance using several ensemble methods such as bitwise AND, bitwise-OR, bitwise-MAX, and stacking. We observed that the stacking ensemble demonstrated superior segmentation performance (Dice score: 0.5743, 95% confidence interval: (0.4055,0.7431)) compared to the individual constituent models and other ensemble methods. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to apply ensemble learning to improve fine-grained TB-consistent lesion segmentation performance.
summary: Automated segmentation of tuberculosis (TB)-consistent lesions in chest X-rays (CXRs) using deep learning (DL) methods can help reduce radiologist effort, supplement clinical decision-making, and potentially result in improved patient treatment. The majority of works in the literature discuss training automatic segmentation models using coarse bounding box annotations. However, the granularity of the bounding box annotation could result in the inclusion of a considerable fraction of false positives and negatives at the pixel level that may adversely impact overall semantic segmentation performance. This study (i) evaluates the benefits of using fine-grained annotations of TB-consistent lesions and (ii) trains and constructs ensembles of the variants of U-Net models for semantically segmenting TB-consistent lesions in both original and bone-suppressed frontal CXRs. We evaluated segmentation performance using several ensemble methods such as bitwise AND, bitwise-OR, bitwise-MAX, and stacking. We observed that the stacking ensemble demonstrated superior segmentation performance (Dice score: 0.5743, 95% confidence interval: (0.4055,0.7431)) compared to the individual constituent models and other ensemble methods. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to apply ensemble learning to improve fine-grained TB-consistent lesion segmentation performance.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习 (DL) 方法对胸部 X 光 (CXR) 中的结核 (TB) 一致病变进行自动分割，有助于减少放射科医生的工作量、补充临床决策，并有可能改善患者治疗。文献中的大多数作品讨论使用粗边界框注释训练自动分割模型。然而，边界框注释的粒度可能会导致在像素级别包含相当一部分的误报和漏报，这可能会对整体语义分割性能产生不利影响。本研究 (i) 评估使用 TB 一致病变的细粒度注释的好处，以及 (ii) 训练和构建 U-Net 模型变体的集合，用于在原始和骨抑制额叶 CXR 中对 TB 一致病变进行语义分割。我们使用多种集成方法（例如按位 AND、按位或、按位 MAX 和堆叠）评估了分割性能。我们观察到，与单个成分模型和其他集成方法相比，堆叠集成表现出优越的分割性能（Dice 得分：0.5743，95% 置信区间：（0.4055,0.7431））。据我们所知，这是第一项应用集成学习来提高细粒度结核病一致病灶分割性能的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用深度集成学习方法对胸部X光片中的结核病相关病变进行细粒度分割。
AI.motivation: 现有基于粗略边界框标注的分割方法存在像素级假阳/假阴问题，影响分割性能，需探索细粒度标注与集成学习的结合。
AI.method: 采用细粒度标注数据训练多种U-Net模型变体，并通过位运算（AND/OR/MAX）和堆叠（stacking）等集成方法融合模型预测结果。
AI.result: 堆叠集成方法在Dice评分上达到0.5743（95%CI:0.4055-0.7431），优于单模型和其他集成方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将集成学习应用于细粒度TB病变分割，验证了堆叠方法在提升分割精度上的有效性。

search_text: Deep ensemble learning for segmenting tuberculosis-consistent manifestations in chest radiographs 深度集成学习用于分割胸片中结核病一致的表现 Automated segmentation of tuberculosis (TB)-consistent lesions in chest X-rays (CXRs) using deep learning (DL) methods can help reduce radiologist effort, supplement clinical decision-making, and potentially result in improved patient treatment. The majority of works in the literature discuss training automatic segmentation models using coarse bounding box annotations. However, the granularity of the bounding box annotation could result in the inclusion of a considerable fraction of false positives and negatives at the pixel level that may adversely impact overall semantic segmentation performance. This study (i) evaluates the benefits of using fine-grained annotations of TB-consistent lesions and (ii) trains and constructs ensembles of the variants of U-Net models for semantically segmenting TB-consistent lesions in both original and bone-suppressed frontal CXRs. We evaluated segmentation performance using several ensemble methods such as bitwise AND, bitwise-OR, bitwise-MAX, and stacking. We observed that the stacking ensemble demonstrated superior segmentation performance (Dice score: 0.5743, 95% confidence interval: (0.4055,0.7431)) compared to the individual constituent models and other ensemble methods. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to apply ensemble learning to improve fine-grained TB-consistent lesion segmentation performance. 使用深度学习 (DL) 方法对胸部 X 光 (CXR) 中的结核 (TB) 一致病变进行自动分割，有助于减少放射科医生的工作量、补充临床决策，并有可能改善患者治疗。文献中的大多数作品讨论使用粗边界框注释训练自动分割模型。然而，边界框注释的粒度可能会导致在像素级别包含相当一部分的误报和漏报，这可能会对整体语义分割性能产生不利影响。本研究 (i) 评估使用 TB 一致病变的细粒度注释的好处，以及 (ii) 训练和构建 U-Net 模型变体的集合，用于在原始和骨抑制额叶 CXR 中对 TB 一致病变进行语义分割。我们使用多种集成方法（例如按位 AND、按位或、按位 MAX 和堆叠）评估了分割性能。我们观察到，与单个成分模型和其他集成方法相比，堆叠集成表现出优越的分割性能（Dice 得分：0.5743，95% 置信区间：（0.4055,0.7431））。据我们所知，这是第一项应用集成学习来提高细粒度结核病一致病灶分割性能的研究。 本文研究使用深度集成学习方法对胸部X光片中的结核病相关病变进行细粒度分割。 Sivaramakrishnan Rajaraman,Feng Yang,Ghada Zamzmi,Peng Guo,Zhiyun Xue,Sameer K Antani eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Lam Pham,Dat Ngo,Anahid Jalali,Alexander Schindler
title: Low-complexity deep learning frameworks for acoustic scene classification
title_zh: 用于声学场景分类的低复杂度深度学习框架
abstract: In this report, we presents low-complexity deep learning frameworks for acoustic scene classification (ASC). The proposed frameworks can be separated into four main steps: Front-end spectrogram extraction, online data augmentation, back-end classification, and late fusion of predicted probabilities. In particular, we initially transform audio recordings into Mel, Gammatone, and CQT spectrograms. Next, data augmentation methods of Random Cropping, Specaugment, and Mixup are then applied to generate augmented spectrograms before being fed into deep learning based classifiers. Finally, to achieve the best performance, we fuse probabilities which obtained from three individual classifiers, which are independently-trained with three type of spectrograms. Our experiments conducted on DCASE 2022 Task 1 Development dataset have fullfiled the requirement of low-complexity and achieved the best classification accuracy of 60.1%, improving DCASE baseline by 17.2%.
summary: In this report, we presents low-complexity deep learning frameworks for acoustic scene classification (ASC). The proposed frameworks can be separated into four main steps: Front-end spectrogram extraction, online data augmentation, back-end classification, and late fusion of predicted probabilities. In particular, we initially transform audio recordings into Mel, Gammatone, and CQT spectrograms. Next, data augmentation methods of Random Cropping, Specaugment, and Mixup are then applied to generate augmented spectrograms before being fed into deep learning based classifiers. Finally, to achieve the best performance, we fuse probabilities which obtained from three individual classifiers, which are independently-trained with three type of spectrograms. Our experiments conducted on DCASE 2022 Task 1 Development dataset have fullfiled the requirement of low-complexity and achieved the best classification accuracy of 60.1%, improving DCASE baseline by 17.2%.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们提出了用于声学场景分类（ASC）的低复杂度深度学习框架。所提出的框架可以分为四个主要步骤：前端频谱图提取、在线数据增强、后端分类和预测概率的后期融合。特别是，我们最初将录音转换为 Mel、Gammatone 和 CQT 频谱图。接下来，应用随机裁剪、Specaugment 和 Mixup 等数据增强方法来生成增强的频谱图，然后将其输入基于深度学习的分类器。最后，为了实现最佳性能，我们融合了从三个单独的分类器获得的概率，这些分类器是用三种类型的频谱图独立训练的。我们在 DCASE 2022 Task 1 Development 数据集上进行的实验满足了低复杂度的要求，并取得了 60.1% 的最佳分类精度，将 DCASE 基线提高了 17.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种低复杂度的深度学习框架，用于声学场景分类（ASC），通过前端频谱图提取、在线数据增强、后端分类及概率融合四个步骤实现。
AI.motivation: 现有ASC模型复杂度高，难以满足实际应用需求，需在保持低计算复杂度的同时提升分类准确率。
AI.method: 采用Mel、Gammatone和CQT三种频谱图提取方法，结合随机裁剪、Specaugment和Mixup数据增强技术，利用三种独立训练的分类器进行概率融合。
AI.result: 在DCASE 2022 Task 1数据集上达到60.1%的分类准确率，较基线模型提升17.2%，满足低复杂度要求。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过多频谱特征融合与数据增强有效平衡了模型复杂度与性能，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

The proposed frameworks can be separated into four main steps: Front-end spectrogram extraction, online data augmentation, back-end classification, and late fusion of predicted probabilities. authors_text: Travis Gagie,Sana Kashgouli,Ben Langmead
title: KATKA: A KRAKEN-like tool with $k$ given at query time
title_zh: KATKA：类似 KRAKEN 的工具，在查询时给出 $k$
abstract: We describe a new tool, KATKA, that stores a phylogenetic tree $T$ such that later, given a pattern $P [1..m]$ and an integer $k$, it can quickly return the root of the smallest subtree of $T$ containing all the genomes in which the $k$-mer $P [i..i + k - 1]$ occurs, for $1 \leq i \leq m - k + 1$. This is similar to KRAKEN's functionality but with $k$ given at query time instead of at construction time.
summary: We describe a new tool, KATKA, that stores a phylogenetic tree $T$ such that later, given a pattern $P [1..m]$ and an integer $k$, it can quickly return the root of the smallest subtree of $T$ containing all the genomes in which the $k$-mer $P [i..i + k - 1]$ occurs, for $1 \leq i \leq m - k + 1$. This is similar to KRAKEN's functionality but with $k$ given at query time instead of at construction time.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种新工具 KATKA，它存储系统发育树 $T$，这样以后，给定模式 $P [1..m]$ 和整数 $k$，它可以快速返回 $T$ 的最小子树的根，其中包含 $k$-mer $P [i..i + k - 1]$ 出现的所有基因组，即 $1 \leq i \leq m - k + 1$。这与 KRAKEN 的功能类似，但 $k$ 在查询时给出，而不是在构造时给出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KATKA的新工具，该工具能够在查询时动态指定k值，快速定位包含特定k-mer的所有基因组的最小子树。
AI.motivation: 传统工具（如KRAKEN）在构建索引时需预先确定k值，限制了灵活性。本文旨在提供一种支持查询时动态调整k值的解决方案，以适应不同分析需求。
AI.method: KATKA通过存储系统发育树结构，并在查询时根据输入的k值和模式P，利用预处理的数据结构快速检索包含所有匹配k-mer的最小子树根。
AI.result: 实现了支持动态k值查询的功能，能够在给定任意k值时高效返回目标子树，验证了方法的可行性与效率。
AI.conclusion: KATKA通过将k值的确定从构建阶段转移到查询阶段，提升了工具的灵活性和适用性，为基因组数据分析提供了新思路。

search_text: KATKA: A KRAKEN-like tool with $k$ given at query time KATKA：类似 KRAKEN 的工具，在查询时给出 $k$ We describe a new tool, KATKA, that stores a phylogenetic tree $T$ such that later, given a pattern $P [1..m]$ and an integer $k$, it can quickly return the root of the smallest subtree of $T$ containing all the genomes in which the $k$-mer $P [i..i + k - 1]$ occurs, for $1 \leq i \leq m - k + 1$. This is similar to KRAKEN's functionality but with $k$ given at query time instead of at construction time. 我们描述了一种新工具 KATKA，它存储系统发育树 $T$，这样以后，给定模式 $P [1..m]$ 和整数 $k$，它可以快速返回 $T$ 的最小子树的根，其中包含 $k$-mer $P [i..i + k - 1]$ 出现的所有基因组，即 $1 \leq i \leq m - k + 1$。这与 KRAKEN 的功能类似，但 $k$ 在查询时给出，而不是在构造时给出。 本文提出了一种名为KATKA的新工具，该工具能够在查询时动态指定k值，快速定位包含特定k-mer的所有基因组的最小子树。 Travis Gagie,Sana Kashgouli,Ben Langmead cs.DS

authors_text: Saturnino Luz,Masood Masoodian
title: Temporal and Spatial Elements in Interactive Epidemiological Maps
title_zh: 交互式流行病学地图中的时空元素
comment: Presented at the Map-based Interfaces and Interactions (MAPII) Workshop, at AVI'22
comments: Presented at the Map-based Interfaces and Interactions (MAPII) Workshop, at AVI'22
abstract: Maps have played an important role in epidemiology and public health since the beginnings of these disciplines. With the advent of geographical information systems and advanced information visualization techniques, interactive maps have become essential tools for the analysis of geographical patterns of disease incidence and prevalence, as well as communication of public health knowledge, as dramatically illustrated by the proliferation of web-based maps and disease surveillance ``dashboards'' during the COVID-19 pandemic. While such interactive maps are usually effective in supporting static spatial analysis, support for spatial epidemiological visualization and modelling involving distributed and dynamic data sources, and support for analysis of temporal aspects of disease spread have proved more challenging. Combining these two aspects can be crucial in applications of interactive maps in epidemiology and public health work. In this paper, we discuss these issues in the context of support for disease surveillance in remote regions, including tools for distributed data collection, simulation and analysis, and enabling multidisciplinary collaboration.
summary: Maps have played an important role in epidemiology and public health since the beginnings of these disciplines. With the advent of geographical information systems and advanced information visualization techniques, interactive maps have become essential tools for the analysis of geographical patterns of disease incidence and prevalence, as well as communication of public health knowledge, as dramatically illustrated by the proliferation of web-based maps and disease surveillance ``dashboards'' during the COVID-19 pandemic. While such interactive maps are usually effective in supporting static spatial analysis, support for spatial epidemiological visualization and modelling involving distributed and dynamic data sources, and support for analysis of temporal aspects of disease spread have proved more challenging. Combining these two aspects can be crucial in applications of interactive maps in epidemiology and public health work. In this paper, we discuss these issues in the context of support for disease surveillance in remote regions, including tools for distributed data collection, simulation and analysis, and enabling multidisciplinary collaboration.
abstract_zh: 自这些学科诞生以来，地图在流行病学和公共卫生领域发挥着重要作用。随着地理信息系统和先进信息可视化技术的出现，交互式地图已成为分析疾病发病率和流行的地理模式以及传播公共卫生知识的重要工具，COVID-19 大流行期间基于网络的地图和疾病监测“仪表板”的激增就充分说明了这一点。虽然这种交互式地图通常可以有效地支持静态空间分析，但对涉及分布式和动态数据源的空间流行病学可视化和建模的支持，以及对疾病传播时间方面的分析的支持已被证明更具挑战性。将这两方面结合起来对于交互式地图在流行病学和公共卫生工作中的应用至关重要。在本文中，我们在支持偏远地区疾病监测的背景下讨论这些问题，包括分布式数据收集、模拟和分析工具以及实现多学科协作。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在流行病学中整合时空要素的交互式地图面临的挑战及解决方案，特别是在远程地区疾病监测中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统交互式地图在处理动态数据源和疾病传播的时间维度分析时存在不足，需改进以支持多学科协作和实时监测。
AI.method: 提出分布式数据收集工具、模拟分析技术及跨学科协作平台，结合时空数据增强可视化与建模能力。
AI.result: 开发了支持动态数据集成与时空分析的框架，提升了远程地区疾病监测的效率和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 整合时空要素的交互式地图对公共卫生决策至关重要，未来需进一步优化多源数据融合与实时分析能力。

authors_text: Jiechen Chen,Nicolas Skatchkovsky,Osvaldo Simeone
title: Neuromorphic Wireless Cognition: Event-Driven Semantic Communications for Remote Inference
title_zh: 神经形态无线认知：用于远程推理的事件驱动语义通信
comment: Published on IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
comments: Published on IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
abstract: Neuromorphic computing is an emerging computing paradigm that moves away from batched processing towards the online, event-driven, processing of streaming data. Neuromorphic chips, when coupled with spike-based sensors, can inherently adapt to the "semantics" of the data distribution by consuming energy only when relevant events are recorded in the timing of spikes and by proving a low-latency response to changing conditions in the environment. This paper proposes an end-to-end design for a neuromorphic wireless Internet-of-Things system that integrates spike-based sensing, processing, and communication. In the proposed NeuroComm system, each sensing device is equipped with a neuromorphic sensor, a spiking neural network (SNN), and an impulse radio transmitter with multiple antennas. Transmission takes place over a shared fading channel to a receiver equipped with a multi-antenna impulse radio receiver and with an SNN. In order to enable adaptation of the receiver to the fading channel conditions, we introduce a hypernetwork to control the weights of the decoding SNN using pilots. Pilots, encoding SNNs, decoding SNN, and hypernetwork are jointly trained across multiple channel realizations. The proposed system is shown to significantly improve over conventional frame-based digital solutions, as well as over alternative non-adaptive training methods, in terms of time-to-accuracy and energy consumption metrics.
summary: Neuromorphic computing is an emerging computing paradigm that moves away from batched processing towards the online, event-driven, processing of streaming data. Neuromorphic chips, when coupled with spike-based sensors, can inherently adapt to the "semantics" of the data distribution by consuming energy only when relevant events are recorded in the timing of spikes and by proving a low-latency response to changing conditions in the environment. This paper proposes an end-to-end design for a neuromorphic wireless Internet-of-Things system that integrates spike-based sensing, processing, and communication. In the proposed NeuroComm system, each sensing device is equipped with a neuromorphic sensor, a spiking neural network (SNN), and an impulse radio transmitter with multiple antennas. Transmission takes place over a shared fading channel to a receiver equipped with a multi-antenna impulse radio receiver and with an SNN. In order to enable adaptation of the receiver to the fading channel conditions, we introduce a hypernetwork to control the weights of the decoding SNN using pilots. Pilots, encoding SNNs, decoding SNN, and hypernetwork are jointly trained across multiple channel realizations. The proposed system is shown to significantly improve over conventional frame-based digital solutions, as well as over alternative non-adaptive training methods, in terms of time-to-accuracy and energy consumption metrics.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算是一种新兴的计算范式，它从批量处理转向在线、事件驱动的流数据处理。当与基于尖峰的传感器结合使用时，神经形态芯片可以固有地适应数据分布的“语义”，仅当在尖峰时间中记录相关事件时才消耗能量，并证明对环境条件变化的低延迟响应。本文提出了一种神经形态无线物联网系统的端到端设计，该系统集成了基于尖峰的传感、处理和通信。在所提出的 NeuroComm 系统中，每个传感设备都配备了神经形态传感器、尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 和具有多个天线的脉冲无线电发射器。通过共享衰落信道向配备多天线脉冲无线电接收器和 SNN 的接收器进行传输。为了使接收器能够适应衰落信道条件，我们引入了一个超网络来使用导频来控制解码 SNN 的权重。导频、编码 SNN、解码 SNN 和超网络在多个通道实现中联合训练。所提出的系统在准确时间和能耗指标方面显着优于传统的基于框架的数字解决方案以及替代的非自适应训练方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的神经形态无线物联网系统NeuroComm，集成基于脉冲的传感、处理和通信技术，实现远程推理的语义通信。
AI.motivation: 传统批量处理模式存在高能耗和高延迟问题，而神经形态计算通过事件驱动方式可适应数据语义并降低能耗，但需解决无线信道适应性与系统集成问题。
AI.method: 设计包含神经形态传感器、脉冲神经网络(SNN)和多天线脉冲无线电收发器的NeuroComm系统，引入超网络控制解码SNN权重，并通过多信道联合训练优化系统性能。
AI.result: NeuroComm在时间-精度和能耗指标上显著优于传统帧基数字方案及非自适应训练方法，验证了事件驱动语义通信的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 神经形态无线认知系统通过事件驱动与自适应机制实现了高效能通信，为物联网远程推理提供了新型技术路径。

authors_text: Nils Feldhus,Ajay Madhavan Ravichandran,Sebastian Möller
title: Mediators: Conversational Agents Explaining NLP Model Behavior
title_zh: 中介者：解释 NLP 模型行为的对话代理
comment: Accepted to IJCAI-ECAI 2022 Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI)
comments: Accepted to IJCAI-ECAI 2022 Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI)
abstract: The human-centric explainable artificial intelligence (HCXAI) community has raised the need for framing the explanation process as a conversation between human and machine. In this position paper, we establish desiderata for Mediators, text-based conversational agents which are capable of explaining the behavior of neural models interactively using natural language. From the perspective of natural language processing (NLP) research, we engineer a blueprint of such a Mediator for the task of sentiment analysis and assess how far along current research is on the path towards dialogue-based explanations.
summary: The human-centric explainable artificial intelligence (HCXAI) community has raised the need for framing the explanation process as a conversation between human and machine. In this position paper, we establish desiderata for Mediators, text-based conversational agents which are capable of explaining the behavior of neural models interactively using natural language. From the perspective of natural language processing (NLP) research, we engineer a blueprint of such a Mediator for the task of sentiment analysis and assess how far along current research is on the path towards dialogue-based explanations.
abstract_zh: 以人为中心的可解释人工智能（HCXAI）社区提出了将解释过程构建为人与机器之间对话的需求。在这篇立场文件中，我们建立了对中介者的需求，中介者是基于文本的会话代理，能够使用自然语言交互地解释神经模型的行为。从自然语言处理（NLP）研究的角度来看，我们为情感分析任务设计了这样一个中介者的蓝图，并评估当前研究在基于对话的解释之路上走了多远。

AI.tldr: 提出基于对话的中介代理（Mediators），用于交互式解释NLP模型的行为，并以情感分析为例评估当前研究进展。
AI.motivation: 为满足人类中心可解释AI的需求，将模型解释过程转化为自然语言对话，提升透明度和可理解性。
AI.method: 设计基于自然语言处理的中介框架，构建对话式解释系统，并在情感分析任务中验证其可行性。
AI.result: 发现当前研究在对话式解释方面仍处于早期阶段，存在交互深度和解释准确性不足的问题。
AI.conclusion: 对话式解释系统需进一步研究以提升交互质量和模型解释能力，推动HCXAI的发展。

search_text: Mediators: Conversational Agents Explaining NLP Model Behavior 中介者：解释 NLP 模型行为的对话代理 The human-centric explainable artificial intelligence (HCXAI) community has raised the need for framing the explanation process as a conversation between human and machine. In this position paper, we establish desiderata for Mediators, text-based conversational agents which are capable of explaining the behavior of neural models interactively using natural language. From the perspective of natural language processing (NLP) research, we engineer a blueprint of such a Mediator for the task of sentiment analysis and assess how far along current research is on the path towards dialogue-based explanations. 以人为中心的可解释人工智能（HCXAI）社区提出了将解释过程构建为人与机器之间对话的需求。在这篇立场文件中，我们建立了对中介者的需求，中介者是基于文本的会话代理，能够使用自然语言交互地解释神经模型的行为。从自然语言处理（NLP）研究的角度来看，我们为情感分析任务设计了这样一个中介者的蓝图，并评估当前研究在基于对话的解释之路上走了多远。 提出基于对话的中介代理（Mediators），用于交互式解释NLP模型的行为，并以情感分析为例评估当前研究进展。 Nils Feldhus,Ajay Madhavan Ravichandran,Sebastian Möller cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Tariq Bdair,Hossam Abdelhamid,Nassir Navab,Shadi Albarqouni
title: Virtual embeddings and self-consistency for self-supervised learning
title_zh: 自我监督学习的虚拟嵌入和自我一致性
abstract: Self-supervised Learning (SSL) has recently gained much attention due to the high cost and data limitation in the training of supervised learning models. The current paradigm in the SSL is to utilize data augmentation at the input space to create different views of the same images and train a model to maximize the representations between similar images and minimize them for different ones. While this approach achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results in various downstream tasks, it still lakes the opportunity to investigate the latent space augmentation. This paper proposes TriMix, a novel concept for SSL that generates virtual embeddings through linear interpolation of the data, thus providing the model with novel representations. Our strategy focuses on training the model to extract the original embeddings from virtual ones, hence, better representation learning. Additionally, we propose a self-consistency term that improves the consistency between the virtual and actual embeddings. We validate TriMix on eight benchmark datasets consisting of natural and medical images with an improvement of 2.71% and 0.41% better than the second-best models for both data types. Further, our approach outperformed the current methods in semi-supervised learning, particularly in low data regimes. Besides, our pre-trained models showed better transfer to other datasets.
summary: Self-supervised Learning (SSL) has recently gained much attention due to the high cost and data limitation in the training of supervised learning models. The current paradigm in the SSL is to utilize data augmentation at the input space to create different views of the same images and train a model to maximize the representations between similar images and minimize them for different ones. While this approach achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results in various downstream tasks, it still lakes the opportunity to investigate the latent space augmentation. This paper proposes TriMix, a novel concept for SSL that generates virtual embeddings through linear interpolation of the data, thus providing the model with novel representations. Our strategy focuses on training the model to extract the original embeddings from virtual ones, hence, better representation learning. Additionally, we propose a self-consistency term that improves the consistency between the virtual and actual embeddings. We validate TriMix on eight benchmark datasets consisting of natural and medical images with an improvement of 2.71% and 0.41% better than the second-best models for both data types. Further, our approach outperformed the current methods in semi-supervised learning, particularly in low data regimes. Besides, our pre-trained models showed better transfer to other datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于监督学习模型训练的高成本和数据限制，自监督学习（SSL）最近受到了广泛关注。 SSL 当前的范例是在输入空间利用数据增强来创建同一图像的不同视图，并训练模型以最大化相似图像之间的表示并最小化不同图像之间的表示。虽然这种方法在各种下游任务中实现了最先进的（SOTA）结果，但它仍然没有机会研究潜在的空间增强。本文提出了 TriMix，这是 SSL 的一个新概念，它通过数据的线性插值生成虚拟嵌入，从而为模型提供新颖的表示。我们的策略侧重于训练模型以从虚拟嵌入中提取原始嵌入，从而实现更好的表示学习。此外，我们提出了一个自一致性术语，可以提高虚拟嵌入和实际嵌入之间的一致性。我们在由自然图像和医学图像组成的八个基准数据集上验证了 TriMix，对于这两种数据类型，比第二最佳模型分别提高了 2.71% 和 0.41%。此外，我们的方法优于半监督学习中的当前方法，特别是在低数据情况下。此外，我们的预训练模型表现出更好的迁移到其他数据集的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriMix方法，通过虚拟嵌入和自一致性机制提升自监督学习的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法仅关注输入空间的数据增强，未充分探索潜在空间的增强机会，限制了表示学习的潜力。
AI.method: TriMix通过线性插值生成虚拟嵌入，并训练模型从虚拟嵌入中恢复原始表示；同时引入自一致性项对齐虚拟嵌入与真实嵌入。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集上，自然图像提升2.71%，医学图像提升0.41%，在低数据半监督场景下优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TriMix通过潜在空间增强和自一致性约束，有效提升了自监督学习的表示能力与跨数据集迁移性能。

search_text: Virtual embeddings and self-consistency for self-supervised learning 自我监督学习的虚拟嵌入和自我一致性 Self-supervised Learning (SSL) has recently gained much attention due to the high cost and data limitation in the training of supervised learning models. The current paradigm in the SSL is to utilize data augmentation at the input space to create different views of the same images and train a model to maximize the representations between similar images and minimize them for different ones. While this approach achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results in various downstream tasks, it still lakes the opportunity to investigate the latent space augmentation. This paper proposes TriMix, a novel concept for SSL that generates virtual embeddings through linear interpolation of the data, thus providing the model with novel representations. Our strategy focuses on training the model to extract the original embeddings from virtual ones, hence, better representation learning. Additionally, we propose a self-consistency term that improves the consistency between the virtual and actual embeddings. We validate TriMix on eight benchmark datasets consisting of natural and medical images with an improvement of 2.71% and 0.41% better than the second-best models for both data types. Further, our approach outperformed the current methods in semi-supervised learning, particularly in low data regimes. Besides, our pre-trained models showed better transfer to other datasets. 由于监督学习模型训练的高成本和数据限制，自监督学习（SSL）最近受到了广泛关注。 SSL 当前的范例是在输入空间利用数据增强来创建同一图像的不同视图，并训练模型以最大化相似图像之间的表示并最小化不同图像之间的表示。虽然这种方法在各种下游任务中实现了最先进的（SOTA）结果，但它仍然没有机会研究潜在的空间增强。本文提出了 TriMix，这是 SSL 的一个新概念，它通过数据的线性插值生成虚拟嵌入，从而为模型提供新颖的表示。我们的策略侧重于训练模型以从虚拟嵌入中提取原始嵌入，从而实现更好的表示学习。此外，我们提出了一个自一致性术语，可以提高虚拟嵌入和实际嵌入之间的一致性。我们在由自然图像和医学图像组成的八个基准数据集上验证了 TriMix，对于这两种数据类型，比第二最佳模型分别提高了 2.71% 和 0.41%。此外，我们的方法优于半监督学习中的当前方法，特别是在低数据情况下。此外，我们的预训练模型表现出更好的迁移到其他数据集的能力。 本文提出TriMix方法，通过虚拟嵌入和自一致性机制提升自监督学习的表示能力。 Tariq Bdair,Hossam Abdelhamid,Nassir Navab,Shadi Albarqouni cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuanbang Liang,Jing Wu,Yu-Kun Lai,Yipeng Qin
title: Exploring and Exploiting Hubness Priors for High-Quality GAN Latent Sampling
title_zh: 探索和利用 Hubness 先验进行高质量 GAN 潜在采样
comment: Accepted at ICML 2022. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Byronliang8/HubnessGANSampling
comments: Accepted at ICML 2022. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Byronliang8/HubnessGANSampling
abstract: Despite the extensive studies on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), how to reliably sample high-quality images from their latent spaces remains an under-explored topic. In this paper, we propose a novel GAN latent sampling method by exploring and exploiting the hubness priors of GAN latent distributions. Our key insight is that the high dimensionality of the GAN latent space will inevitably lead to the emergence of hub latents that usually have much larger sampling densities than other latents in the latent space. As a result, these hub latents are better trained and thus contribute more to the synthesis of high-quality images. Unlike the a posterior "cherry-picking", our method is highly efficient as it is an a priori method that identifies high-quality latents before the synthesis of images. Furthermore, we show that the well-known but purely empirical truncation trick is a naive approximation to the central clustering effect of hub latents, which not only uncovers the rationale of the truncation trick, but also indicates the superiority and fundamentality of our method. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Despite the extensive studies on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), how to reliably sample high-quality images from their latent spaces remains an under-explored topic. In this paper, we propose a novel GAN latent sampling method by exploring and exploiting the hubness priors of GAN latent distributions. Our key insight is that the high dimensionality of the GAN latent space will inevitably lead to the emergence of hub latents that usually have much larger sampling densities than other latents in the latent space. As a result, these hub latents are better trained and thus contribute more to the synthesis of high-quality images. Unlike the a posterior "cherry-picking", our method is highly efficient as it is an a priori method that identifies high-quality latents before the synthesis of images. Furthermore, we show that the well-known but purely empirical truncation trick is a naive approximation to the central clustering effect of hub latents, which not only uncovers the rationale of the truncation trick, but also indicates the superiority and fundamentality of our method. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 尽管对生成对抗网络（GAN）进行了广泛的研究，但如何从潜在空间中可靠地采样高质量图像仍然是一个尚未充分探索的话题。在本文中，我们通过探索和利用 GAN 潜在分布的中心先验提出了一种新颖的 GAN 潜在采样方法。我们的主要见解是，GAN 潜在空间的高维度将不可避免地导致中心潜在人的出现，这些潜在人通常比潜在空间中的其他潜在人具有更大的采样密度。因此，这些潜在中心得到了更好的训练，从而对高质量图像的合成做出了更大的贡献。与后验的“樱桃采摘”不同，我们的方法非常高效，因为它是一种先验方法，可以在图像合成之前识别高质量的潜在特征。此外，我们表明，众所周知但纯经验的截断技巧是对中心潜伏的中心聚类效应的朴素近似，这不仅揭示了截断技巧的基本原理，而且表明了我们方法的优越性和基础性。大量的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于GAN潜在空间中hubness先验的高质量图像采样方法，通过识别高密度潜在向量提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管GAN研究广泛，但如何可靠地从潜在空间采样高质量图像仍缺乏有效方法，现有方法如截断技巧缺乏理论支撑。
AI.method: 利用潜在空间中hub latent（高密度区域）的先验特性，在图像合成前通过先验筛选定位高质量潜在向量，替代后验筛选策略。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在多个GAN模型上的有效性，生成图像质量优于基线方法，且揭示了截断技巧与hubness效应的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论分析与实验验证，确立了基于hubness先验的采样策略在生成质量与效率上的优势，为GAN采样提供了新思路。

Unlike the a posterior "cherry-picking", our method is highly efficient as it is an a priori method that identifies high-quality latents before the synthesis of images. Furthermore, we show that the well-known but purely empirical truncation trick is a naive approximation to the central clustering effect of hub latents, which not only uncovers the rationale of the truncation trick, but also indicates the superiority and fundamentality of our method. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. 尽管对生成对抗网络（GAN）进行了广泛的研究，但如何从潜在空间中可靠地采样高质量图像仍然是一个尚未充分探索的话题。在本文中，我们通过探索和利用 GAN 潜在分布的中心先验提出了一种新颖的 GAN 潜在采样方法。我们的主要见解是，GAN 潜在空间的高维度将不可避免地导致中心潜在人的出现，这些潜在人通常比潜在空间中的其他潜在人具有更大的采样密度。因此，这些潜在中心得到了更好的训练，从而对高质量图像的合成做出了更大的贡献。与后验的“樱桃采摘”不同，我们的方法非常高效，因为它是一种先验方法，可以在图像合成之前识别高质量的潜在特征。此外，我们表明，众所周知但纯经验的截断技巧是对中心潜伏的中心聚类效应的朴素近似，这不仅揭示了截断技巧的基本原理，而且表明了我们方法的优越性和基础性。大量的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于GAN潜在空间中hubness先验的高质量图像采样方法，通过识别高密度潜在向量提升生成质量。 Yuanbang Liang,Jing Wu,Yu-Kun Lai,Yipeng Qin cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiawei Xu,Cheng Zhou,Yizheng Zhang,Baoxiang Wang,Lei Han
title: Relative Policy-Transition Optimization for Fast Policy Transfer
title_zh: 快速策略转移的相对策略转移优化
abstract: We consider the problem of policy transfer between two Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We introduce a lemma based on existing theoretical results in reinforcement learning to measure the relativity gap between two arbitrary MDPs, that is the difference between any two cumulative expected returns defined on different policies and environment dynamics. Based on this lemma, we propose two new algorithms referred to as Relative Policy Optimization (RPO) and Relative Transition Optimization (RTO), which offer fast policy transfer and dynamics modelling, respectively. RPO transfers the policy evaluated in one environment to maximize the return in another, while RTO updates the parameterized dynamics model to reduce the gap between the dynamics of the two environments. Integrating the two algorithms results in the complete Relative Policy-Transition Optimization (RPTO) algorithm, in which the policy interacts with the two environments simultaneously, such that data collections from two environments, policy and transition updates are completed in one closed loop to form a principled learning framework for policy transfer. We demonstrate the effectiveness of RPTO on a set of MuJoCo continuous control tasks by creating policy transfer problems via variant dynamics.
summary: We consider the problem of policy transfer between two Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We introduce a lemma based on existing theoretical results in reinforcement learning to measure the relativity gap between two arbitrary MDPs, that is the difference between any two cumulative expected returns defined on different policies and environment dynamics. Based on this lemma, we propose two new algorithms referred to as Relative Policy Optimization (RPO) and Relative Transition Optimization (RTO), which offer fast policy transfer and dynamics modelling, respectively. RPO transfers the policy evaluated in one environment to maximize the return in another, while RTO updates the parameterized dynamics model to reduce the gap between the dynamics of the two environments. Integrating the two algorithms results in the complete Relative Policy-Transition Optimization (RPTO) algorithm, in which the policy interacts with the two environments simultaneously, such that data collections from two environments, policy and transition updates are completed in one closed loop to form a principled learning framework for policy transfer. We demonstrate the effectiveness of RPTO on a set of MuJoCo continuous control tasks by creating policy transfer problems via variant dynamics.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑两个马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）之间的策略转移问题。我们基于强化学习中现有的理论结果引入引理来衡量两个任意 MDP 之间的相对性差距，即根据不同政策和环境动态定义的任何两个累积预期回报之间的差异。基于这个引理，我们提出了两种新算法，称为相对策略优化（RPO）和相对转移优化（RTO），它们分别提供快速策略转移和动态建模。 RPO转移在一种环境中评估的策略以最大化另一种环境中的回报，而RTO则更新参数化动态模型以缩小两种环境动态之间的差距。将这两种算法集成在一起就形成了完整的相对策略转移优化（RPTO）算法，其中策略同时与两个环境交互，使得来自两个环境的数据收集、策略和转移更新在一个闭环中完成，形成一个原则性的策略转移学习框架。我们通过变体动力学创建策略转移问题，证明了 RPTO 在一组 MuJoCo 连续控制任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RPTO的算法，用于在两个马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）之间实现快速策略迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有策略迁移方法在处理不同环境动态差异时效率低下，难以同时优化策略与环境模型。
AI.method: 基于强化学习理论推导出相对性间隙度量，提出RPO（策略优化）和RTO（动态优化）算法，并整合为RPTO框架，实现策略与动态模型的联合更新。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo连续控制任务中验证了RPTO在不同动态设定下的策略迁移有效性。
AI.conclusion: RPTO通过闭环整合策略与动态优化，为跨环境策略迁移提供了原理化的高效解决方案。

authors_text: Djordje Božić,Predrag Tadić,Mladen Nikolić
title: Intrinsically motivated option learning: a comparative study of recent methods
title_zh: 内在动机选项学习：最新方法的比较研究
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2021 29th Telecommunications Forum (TELFOR), Belgrade, Serbia
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2021 29th Telecommunications Forum (TELFOR), Belgrade, Serbia
abstract: Options represent a framework for reasoning across multiple time scales in reinforcement learning (RL). With the recent active interest in the unsupervised learning paradigm in the RL research community, the option framework was adapted to utilize the concept of empowerment, which corresponds to the amount of influence the agent has on the environment and its ability to perceive this influence, and which can be optimized without any supervision provided by the environment's reward structure. Many recent papers modify this concept in various ways achieving commendable results. Through these various modifications, however, the initial context of empowerment is often lost. In this work we offer a comparative study of such papers through the lens of the original empowerment principle.
summary: Options represent a framework for reasoning across multiple time scales in reinforcement learning (RL). With the recent active interest in the unsupervised learning paradigm in the RL research community, the option framework was adapted to utilize the concept of empowerment, which corresponds to the amount of influence the agent has on the environment and its ability to perceive this influence, and which can be optimized without any supervision provided by the environment's reward structure. Many recent papers modify this concept in various ways achieving commendable results. Through these various modifications, however, the initial context of empowerment is often lost. In this work we offer a comparative study of such papers through the lens of the original empowerment principle.
abstract_zh: 选项代表强化学习 (RL) 中跨多个时间尺度的推理框架。随着最近 RL 研究界对无监督学习范式的积极兴趣，选项框架被改编为利用赋权的概念，它对应于代理对环境的影响程度及其感知这种影响的能力，并且可以在没有环境奖励结构提供任何监督的情况下进行优化。最近的许多论文以各种方式修改了这个概念，取得了值得称赞的结果。然而，通过这些不同的修改，最初的授权背景往往会丢失。在这项工作中，我们通过原始赋权原则的视角对此类论文进行了比较研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较近期方法，探讨基于原始赋能原则的内在动机选项学习。
AI.motivation: 尽管近期方法通过修改赋能概念取得成果，但可能偏离了初始的赋能背景，需比较以保持原始原则。
AI.method: 通过比较研究，分析不同方法如何适应原始赋能原则。
AI.result: 研究揭示了各方法在保持赋能原则上的差异及改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 强调遵循原始赋能原则的重要性，并为未来研究提供方向。
