authors_text: Francesco Pio Barone,Daniele Dell'Aquila,Marco Russo
title: A novel multi-layer modular approach for real-time fuzzy-identification of gravitational-wave signals
title_zh: 一种新颖的多层模块化引力波信号实时模糊识别方法
abstract: Advanced LIGO and Advanced Virgo ground-based interferometers are instruments capable to detect gravitational wave signals exploiting advanced laser interferometry techniques. The underlying data analysis task consists in identifying specific patterns in noisy timeseries, but it is made extremely complex by the incredibly small amplitude of the target signals. In this scenario, the development of effective gravitational wave detection algorithms is crucial. We propose a novel layered framework for real-time detection of gravitational waves inspired by speech processing techniques and, in the present implementation, based on a state-of-the-art machine learning approach involving a hybridization of genetic programming and neural networks. The key aspects of the newly proposed framework are: the well structured, layered approach, and the low computational complexity. The paper describes the basic concepts of the framework and the derivation of the first three layers. Even if the layers are based on models derived using a machine learning approach, the proposed layered structure has a universal nature. Compared to more complex approaches, such as convolutional neural networks, which comprise a parameter set of several tens of MB and were tested exclusively for fixed length data samples, our framework has lower accuracy (e.g., it identifies 45% of low signal-to-noise-ration gravitational wave signals, against 65% of the state-of-the-art, at a false alarm probability of $10^{-2}$), but has a much lower computational complexity and a higher degree of modularity. Furthermore, the exploitation of short-term features makes the results of the new framework virtually independent against time-position of gravitational wave signals, simplifying its future exploitation in real-time multi-layer pipelines for gravitational-wave detection with new generation interferometers.
summary: Advanced LIGO and Advanced Virgo ground-based interferometers are instruments capable to detect gravitational wave signals exploiting advanced laser interferometry techniques. The underlying data analysis task consists in identifying specific patterns in noisy timeseries, but it is made extremely complex by the incredibly small amplitude of the target signals. In this scenario, the development of effective gravitational wave detection algorithms is crucial. We propose a novel layered framework for real-time detection of gravitational waves inspired by speech processing techniques and, in the present implementation, based on a state-of-the-art machine learning approach involving a hybridization of genetic programming and neural networks. The key aspects of the newly proposed framework are: the well structured, layered approach, and the low computational complexity. The paper describes the basic concepts of the framework and the derivation of the first three layers. Even if the layers are based on models derived using a machine learning approach, the proposed layered structure has a universal nature. Compared to more complex approaches, such as convolutional neural networks, which comprise a parameter set of several tens of MB and were tested exclusively for fixed length data samples, our framework has lower accuracy (e.g., it identifies 45% of low signal-to-noise-ration gravitational wave signals, against 65% of the state-of-the-art, at a false alarm probability of $10^{-2}$), but has a much lower computational complexity and a higher degree of modularity. Furthermore, the exploitation of short-term features makes the results of the new framework virtually independent against time-position of gravitational wave signals, simplifying its future exploitation in real-time multi-layer pipelines for gravitational-wave detection with new generation interferometers.
abstract_zh: Advanced LIGO 和 Advanced Virgo 地面干涉仪是能够利用先进激光干涉技术检测引力波信号的仪器。基础数据分析任务包括识别噪声时间序列中的特定模式，但由于目标信号的幅度极小，该任务变得极其复杂。在这种情况下，开发有效的引力波探测算法至关重要。我们提出了一种新颖的分层框架，用于实时检测引力波，其灵感来自于语音处理技术，并且在当前的实现中，基于涉及遗传编程和神经网络混合的最先进的机器学习方法。新提出的框架的关键方面是：结构良好、分层方法和计算复杂度低。论文描述了框架的基本概念以及前三层的推导。即使这些层是基于使用机器学习方法导出的模型，所提出的分层结构也具有通用性。与更复杂的方法相比，例如卷积神经网络（其包含数十 MB 的参数集，并且专门针对固定长度的数据样本进行测试），我们的框架具有较低的精度（例如，它以 10^{-2}$ 的误报概率识别出 45% 的低信噪比引力波信号，而最先进的方法为 65%），但计算复杂度较低，模块化程度较高。此外，对短期特征的利用使得新框架的结果几乎独立于引力波信号的时间位置，从而简化了其未来在利用新一代干涉仪进行引力波探测的实时多层管道中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层模块化框架，用于实时检测引力波信号，结合遗传编程和神经网络技术，降低计算复杂度并提高模块化程度。
AI.motivation: 现有引力波检测方法（如卷积神经网络）计算复杂度高、数据长度固定，难以满足实时检测需求，需开发更高效且模块化的算法。
AI.method: 基于语音处理技术设计分层框架，融合遗传编程与神经网络，利用短期特征降低对信号时间位置的依赖性，提升实时性与模块化。
AI.result: 框架在信噪比为10^{-2}时检测率45%（低于当前最优的65%），但计算复杂度显著降低，且具有更高模块化和时间位置独立性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算效率和模块化方面优于复杂模型，适合下一代干涉仪的实时多层流水线检测，为低精度场景提供可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种分层模块化框架，用于实时检测引力波信号，结合遗传编程和神经网络技术，降低计算复杂度并提高模块化程度。
ai_content.motivation: 现有引力波检测方法（如卷积神经网络）计算复杂度高、数据长度固定，难以满足实时检测需求，需开发更高效且模块化的算法。
ai_content.method: 基于语音处理技术设计分层框架，融合遗传编程与神经网络，利用短期特征降低对信号时间位置的依赖性，提升实时性与模块化。
ai_content.result: 框架在信噪比为10^{-2}时检测率45%（低于当前最优的65%），但计算复杂度显著降低，且具有更高模块化和时间位置独立性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法在计算效率和模块化方面优于复杂模型，适合下一代干涉仪的实时多层流水线检测，为低精度场景提供可行方案。

search_text: A novel multi-layer modular approach for real-time fuzzy-identification of gravitational-wave signals 一种新颖的多层模块化引力波信号实时模糊识别方法 Advanced LIGO and Advanced Virgo ground-based interferometers are instruments capable to detect gravitational wave signals exploiting advanced laser interferometry techniques. The underlying data analysis task consists in identifying specific patterns in noisy timeseries, but it is made extremely complex by the incredibly small amplitude of the target signals. In this scenario, the development of effective gravitational wave detection algorithms is crucial. We propose a novel layered framework for real-time detection of gravitational waves inspired by speech processing techniques and, in the present implementation, based on a state-of-the-art machine learning approach involving a hybridization of genetic programming and neural networks. The key aspects of the newly proposed framework are: the well structured, layered approach, and the low computational complexity. The paper describes the basic concepts of the framework and the derivation of the first three layers. Even if the layers are based on models derived using a machine learning approach, the proposed layered structure has a universal nature. Compared to more complex approaches, such as convolutional neural networks, which comprise a parameter set of several tens of MB and were tested exclusively for fixed length data samples, our framework has lower accuracy (e.g., it identifies 45% of low signal-to-noise-ration gravitational wave signals, against 65% of the state-of-the-art, at a false alarm probability of $10^{-2}$), but has a much lower computational complexity and a higher degree of modularity. Furthermore, the exploitation of short-term features makes the results of the new framework virtually independent against time-position of gravitational wave signals, simplifying its future exploitation in real-time multi-layer pipelines for gravitational-wave detection with new generation interferometers. Advanced LIGO 和 Advanced Virgo 地面干涉仪是能够利用先进激光干涉技术检测引力波信号的仪器。基础数据分析任务包括识别噪声时间序列中的特定模式，但由于目标信号的幅度极小，该任务变得极其复杂。在这种情况下，开发有效的引力波探测算法至关重要。我们提出了一种新颖的分层框架，用于实时检测引力波，其灵感来自于语音处理技术，并且在当前的实现中，基于涉及遗传编程和神经网络混合的最先进的机器学习方法。新提出的框架的关键方面是：结构良好、分层方法和计算复杂度低。论文描述了框架的基本概念以及前三层的推导。即使这些层是基于使用机器学习方法导出的模型，所提出的分层结构也具有通用性。与更复杂的方法相比，例如卷积神经网络（其包含数十 MB 的参数集，并且专门针对固定长度的数据样本进行测试），我们的框架具有较低的精度（例如，它以 10^{-2}$ 的误报概率识别出 45% 的低信噪比引力波信号，而最先进的方法为 65%），但计算复杂度较低，模块化程度较高。此外，对短期特征的利用使得新框架的结果几乎独立于引力波信号的时间位置，从而简化了其未来在利用新一代干涉仪进行引力波探测的实时多层管道中的应用。 本文提出一种分层模块化框架，用于实时检测引力波信号，结合遗传编程和神经网络技术，降低计算复杂度并提高模块化程度。 Francesco Pio Barone,Daniele Dell'Aquila,Marco Russo gr-qc,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Seyed Amir Tafrishi,Xiaotian Dai,Yasuhisa Hirata,Alan Burns
title: Discretization and Stabilization of Energy-Based Controller for Period Switching Control and Flexible Scheduling
title_zh: 基于能量的控制器的周期切换控制和灵活调度的离散化和稳定性
comment: Accepted to 2022 American Control Conference (ACC), 6 pages, 8 figures
comments: Accepted to 2022 American Control Conference (ACC), 6 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Emerging advanced control applications, with increased complexity in software but limited computing resources, suggest that real-time controllers should have adaptable designs. These control strategies also should be designed with consideration of the run-time behavior of the system. One of such research attempts is to design the controller along with the task scheduler, known as control-scheduling co-design, for more predictable timing behavior as well as surviving system overloads. Unlike traditional controller designs, which have equal-distance sampling periods, the co-design approach increases the system flexibility and resilience by explicitly considering timing properties, for example using an event-based controller or with multiple sampling times (non-uniform sampling and control). Within this context, we introduce the first work on the discretization of an energy-based controller that can switch arbitrarily between multiple periods and adjust the control parameters accordingly without destabilizing the system. A digital controller design based on this paradigm for a DC motor with an elastic load as an example is introduced and the stability condition is given based on the proposed Lyapunov function. The method is evaluated with various computer-based simulations which demonstrate its effectiveness.
summary: Emerging advanced control applications, with increased complexity in software but limited computing resources, suggest that real-time controllers should have adaptable designs. These control strategies also should be designed with consideration of the run-time behavior of the system. One of such research attempts is to design the controller along with the task scheduler, known as control-scheduling co-design, for more predictable timing behavior as well as surviving system overloads. Unlike traditional controller designs, which have equal-distance sampling periods, the co-design approach increases the system flexibility and resilience by explicitly considering timing properties, for example using an event-based controller or with multiple sampling times (non-uniform sampling and control). Within this context, we introduce the first work on the discretization of an energy-based controller that can switch arbitrarily between multiple periods and adjust the control parameters accordingly without destabilizing the system. A digital controller design based on this paradigm for a DC motor with an elastic load as an example is introduced and the stability condition is given based on the proposed Lyapunov function. The method is evaluated with various computer-based simulations which demonstrate its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 新兴的先进控制应用软件复杂性增加，但计算资源有限，这表明实时控制器应该具有适应性设计。这些控制策略的设计还应考虑系统的运行时行为。此类研究尝试之一是设计控制器和任务调度程序，称为控制调度协同设计，以获得更可预测的时序行为以及幸存的系统过载。与具有等距离采样周期的传统控制器设计不同，协同设计方法通过明确考虑时序属性来提高系统灵活性和弹性，例如使用基于事件的控制器或具有多个采样时间（非均匀采样和控制）。在此背景下，我们介绍了第一个关于基于能量的控制器离散化的工作，该控制器可以在多个周期之间任意切换并相应地调整控制参数，而不会破坏系统的稳定性。以具有弹性负载的直流电机为例，介绍了基于该范式的数字控制器设计，并基于所提出的李亚普诺夫函数给出了稳定性条件。该方法通过各种基于计算机的模拟进行了评估，证明了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能量的控制器离散化方法，能够实现在多周期切换控制和灵活调度中的稳定控制。
AI.motivation: 随着先进控制应用的复杂性增加，但计算资源有限，需要设计能够适应运行时行为的实时控制器，以提高系统的灵活性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种基于能量的控制器离散化方法，能够在多个周期之间切换并调整控制参数，同时通过Lyapunov函数确保系统稳定性。
AI.result: 通过计算机仿真验证了该方法的有效性，证明了其在DC电机弹性负载控制中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的离散化方法为控制调度协同设计提供了一种新的解决方案，能够在非均匀采样和多周期切换中保持系统稳定。

authors_text: Additya Popli,Vijay Kumar,Sujit Jos,Saraansh Tandon
title: Learning Fashion Compatibility from In-the-wild Images
title_zh: 从野外图像中学习时尚兼容性
abstract: Complementary fashion recommendation aims at identifying items from different categories (e.g. shirt, footwear, etc.) that "go well together" as an outfit. Most existing approaches learn representation for this task using labeled outfit datasets containing manually curated compatible item combinations. In this work, we propose to learn representations for compatibility prediction from in-the-wild street fashion images through self-supervised learning by leveraging the fact that people often wear compatible outfits. Our pretext task is formulated such that the representations of different items worn by the same person are closer compared to those worn by other people. Additionally, to reduce the domain gap between in-the-wild and catalog images during inference, we introduce an adversarial loss that minimizes the difference in feature distribution between the two domains. We conduct our experiments on two popular fashion compatibility benchmarks - Polyvore and Polyvore-Disjoint outfits, and outperform existing self-supervised approaches, particularly significant in cross-dataset setting where training and testing images are from different sources.
summary: Complementary fashion recommendation aims at identifying items from different categories (e.g. shirt, footwear, etc.) that "go well together" as an outfit. Most existing approaches learn representation for this task using labeled outfit datasets containing manually curated compatible item combinations. In this work, we propose to learn representations for compatibility prediction from in-the-wild street fashion images through self-supervised learning by leveraging the fact that people often wear compatible outfits. Our pretext task is formulated such that the representations of different items worn by the same person are closer compared to those worn by other people. Additionally, to reduce the domain gap between in-the-wild and catalog images during inference, we introduce an adversarial loss that minimizes the difference in feature distribution between the two domains. We conduct our experiments on two popular fashion compatibility benchmarks - Polyvore and Polyvore-Disjoint outfits, and outperform existing self-supervised approaches, particularly significant in cross-dataset setting where training and testing images are from different sources.
abstract_zh: 补充时尚推荐旨在识别不同类别（例如衬衫、鞋类等）中与服装“搭配得很好”的单品。大多数现有方法使用包含手动策划的兼容项目组合的标记服装数据集来学习此任务的表示。在这项工作中，我们建议利用人们经常穿着兼容服装的事实，通过自我监督学习，从野外街头时尚图像中学习兼容性预测的表示。我们的借口任务被制定为使得同一个人所佩戴的不同物品的表征与其他人所佩戴的物品相比更加接近。此外，为了减少推理过程中野外图像和目录图像之间的域差距，我们引入了对抗性损失，最大限度地减少了两个域之间特征分布的差异。我们在两种流行的时尚兼容性基准（Polyvore 和 Polyvore-Disjoint 服装）上进行了实验，并且优于现有的自我监督方法，这在训练和测试图像来自不同来源的跨数据集设置中尤其重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过野外街拍图像学习时尚搭配兼容性的自监督方法，无需人工标注即可预测不同品类服饰的搭配合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖人工整理的搭配数据集，存在数据规模有限和领域偏差问题。野外图像包含真实场景下的自然搭配信息，可作为更丰富和多样化的数据源。
AI.method: 设计自监督预训练任务使同一个人穿着的物品表征更接近，同时引入对抗损失缩小野外图像与商品目录图像的领域差异，提升跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.result: 在Polyvore和Polyvore-Disjoint基准测试中超越现有自监督方法，尤其在跨数据集场景下表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了从野外图像中学习时尚兼容性的有效性，通过自监督学习和领域对齐技术可有效解决真实场景下的搭配推荐问题。

method: 设计自监督预训练任务使同一个人穿着的物品表征更接近，同时引入对抗损失缩小野外图像与商品目录图像的领域差异，提升跨数据集泛化能力。
result: 在Polyvore和Polyvore-Disjoint基准测试中超越现有自监督方法，尤其在跨数据集场景下表现显著提升。
conclusion: 该方法验证了从野外图像中学习时尚兼容性的有效性，通过自监督学习和领域对齐技术可有效解决真实场景下的搭配推荐问题。
search_text: Learning Fashion Compatibility from In-the-wild Images 从野外图像中学习时尚兼容性 Complementary fashion recommendation aims at identifying items from different categories (e.g. shirt, footwear, etc.) that "go well together" as an outfit. Most existing approaches learn representation for this task using labeled outfit datasets containing manually curated compatible item combinations. In this work, we propose to learn representations for compatibility prediction from in-the-wild street fashion images through self-supervised learning by leveraging the fact that people often wear compatible outfits. Our pretext task is formulated such that the representations of different items worn by the same person are closer compared to those worn by other people. Additionally, to reduce the domain gap between in-the-wild and catalog images during inference, we introduce an adversarial loss that minimizes the difference in feature distribution between the two domains. We conduct our experiments on two popular fashion compatibility benchmarks - Polyvore and Polyvore-Disjoint outfits, and outperform existing self-supervised approaches, particularly significant in cross-dataset setting where training and testing images are from different sources. 补充时尚推荐旨在识别不同类别（例如衬衫、鞋类等）中与服装“搭配得很好”的单品。大多数现有方法使用包含手动策划的兼容项目组合的标记服装数据集来学习此任务的表示。在这项工作中，我们建议利用人们经常穿着兼容服装的事实，通过自我监督学习，从野外街头时尚图像中学习兼容性预测的表示。我们的借口任务被制定为使得同一个人所佩戴的不同物品的表征与其他人所佩戴的物品相比更加接近。此外，为了减少推理过程中野外图像和目录图像之间的域差距，我们引入了对抗性损失，最大限度地减少了两个域之间特征分布的差异。我们在两种流行的时尚兼容性基准（Polyvore 和 Polyvore-Disjoint 服装）上进行了实验，并且优于现有的自我监督方法，这在训练和测试图像来自不同来源的跨数据集设置中尤其重要。 本文提出一种通过野外街拍图像学习时尚搭配兼容性的自监督方法，无需人工标注即可预测不同品类服饰的搭配合理性。 Additya Popli,Vijay Kumar,Sujit Jos,Saraansh Tandon cs.CV

authors_text: Yi He,Xi Yang,Chia-Ming Chang,Haoran Xie,Takeo Igarashi
title: Efficient Human-in-the-loop System for Guiding DNNs Attention
title_zh: 用于引导 DNN 注意力的高效人机交互系统
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures, proceeding of ACM IUI 2023, video https://youtu.be/2MD-z6vXKJ4
comments: 13 pages, 11 figures, proceeding of ACM IUI 2023, video https://youtu.be/2MD-z6vXKJ4
abstract: Attention guidance is an approach to addressing dataset bias in deep learning, where the model relies on incorrect features to make decisions. Focusing on image classification tasks, we propose an efficient human-in-the-loop system to interactively direct the attention of classifiers to the regions specified by users, thereby reducing the influence of co-occurrence bias and improving the transferability and interpretability of a DNN. Previous approaches for attention guidance require the preparation of pixel-level annotations and are not designed as interactive systems. We present a new interactive method to allow users to annotate images with simple clicks, and study a novel active learning strategy to significantly reduce the number of annotations. We conducted both a numerical evaluation and a user study to evaluate the proposed system on multiple datasets. Compared to the existing non-active-learning approach which usually relies on huge amounts of polygon-based segmentation masks to fine-tune or train the DNNs, our system can save lots of labor and money and obtain a fine-tuned network that works better even when the dataset is biased. The experiment results indicate that the proposed system is efficient, reasonable, and reliable.
summary: Attention guidance is an approach to addressing dataset bias in deep learning, where the model relies on incorrect features to make decisions. Focusing on image classification tasks, we propose an efficient human-in-the-loop system to interactively direct the attention of classifiers to the regions specified by users, thereby reducing the influence of co-occurrence bias and improving the transferability and interpretability of a DNN. Previous approaches for attention guidance require the preparation of pixel-level annotations and are not designed as interactive systems. We present a new interactive method to allow users to annotate images with simple clicks, and study a novel active learning strategy to significantly reduce the number of annotations. We conducted both a numerical evaluation and a user study to evaluate the proposed system on multiple datasets. Compared to the existing non-active-learning approach which usually relies on huge amounts of polygon-based segmentation masks to fine-tune or train the DNNs, our system can save lots of labor and money and obtain a fine-tuned network that works better even when the dataset is biased. The experiment results indicate that the proposed system is efficient, reasonable, and reliable.
abstract_zh: 注意力引导是一种解决深度学习中数据集偏差的方法，其中模型依赖于不正确的特征来做出决策。针对图像分类任务，我们提出了一种高效的人机交互系统，以交互方式将分类器的注意力引导到用户指定的区域，从而减少共现偏差的影响，提高 DNN 的可迁移性和可解释性。以前的注意力引导方法需要准备像素级注释，并且没有设计为交互式系统。我们提出了一种新的交互方法，允许用户通过简单的点击来注释图像，并研究一种新颖的主动学习策略来显着减少注释的数量。我们进行了数值评估和用户研究，以在多个数据集上评估所提出的系统。与现有的非主动学习方法（通常依赖大量基于多边形的分割掩模来微调或训练 DNN）相比，我们的系统可以节省大量的劳动力和金钱，并获得即使在数据集有偏差时也能更好地工作的微调网络。实验结果表明，该系统高效、合理、可靠。

AI.tldr: 开发一个高效的人机交互系统，通过用户指导深度神经网络（DNN）的注意力机制，减少数据集偏差对图像分类任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力引导方法依赖耗时的像素级标注且非交互式，无法高效解决数据集偏差问题，需更节省成本且交互性强的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出交互式标注方法，允许用户通过简单点击标注图像，并结合主动学习策略显著减少标注数量，无需像素级分割掩码。
AI.result: 实验表明系统在多个数据集上有效，相比传统方法节省大量人力成本，且在数据集存在偏差时仍能获得性能更优的模型。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过交互式注意力引导提升了DNN的可转移性与可解释性，为减少标注负担和应对数据集偏差提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Hang Li,Qadeer Khan,Volker Tresp,Daniel Cremers
title: Biologically Inspired Neural Path Finding
title_zh: 受生物学启发的神经路径寻找
abstract: The human brain can be considered to be a graphical structure comprising of tens of billions of biological neurons connected by synapses. It has the remarkable ability to automatically re-route information flow through alternate paths in case some neurons are damaged. Moreover, the brain is capable of retaining information and applying it to similar but completely unseen scenarios. In this paper, we take inspiration from these attributes of the brain, to develop a computational framework to find the optimal low cost path between a source node and a destination node in a generalized graph. We show that our framework is capable of handling unseen graphs at test time. Moreover, it can find alternate optimal paths, when nodes are arbitrarily added or removed during inference, while maintaining a fixed prediction time. Code is available here: https://github.com/hangligit/pathfinding
summary: The human brain can be considered to be a graphical structure comprising of tens of billions of biological neurons connected by synapses. It has the remarkable ability to automatically re-route information flow through alternate paths in case some neurons are damaged. Moreover, the brain is capable of retaining information and applying it to similar but completely unseen scenarios. In this paper, we take inspiration from these attributes of the brain, to develop a computational framework to find the optimal low cost path between a source node and a destination node in a generalized graph. We show that our framework is capable of handling unseen graphs at test time. Moreover, it can find alternate optimal paths, when nodes are arbitrarily added or removed during inference, while maintaining a fixed prediction time. Code is available here: https://github.com/hangligit/pathfinding
abstract_zh: 人脑可以被认为是由数百亿个通过突触连接的生物神经元组成的图形结构。它具有非凡的能力，可以在某些神经元受损时自动通过备用路径重新路由信息流。此外，大脑能够保留信息并将其应用到类似但完全未见过的场景中。在本文中，我们从大脑的这些属性中汲取灵感，开发了一个计算框架，以找到广义图中源节点和目标节点之间的最佳低成本路径。我们证明我们的框架能够在测试时处理看不见的图。此外，当推理过程中任意添加或删除节点时，它可以找到替代的最佳路径，同时保持固定的预测时间。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/hangligit/pathfinding

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受生物大脑启发的计算框架，用于在通用图中寻找源节点与目标节点之间的最优低代价路径。
AI.motivation: 人类大脑具有在神经元受损时自动 reroute 信息流及迁移学习能力，启发开发能处理未知图结构并动态调整路径的算法。
AI.method: 构建仿生神经网络框架，通过模拟生物神经元连接与信息传递机制，实现对图结构的自适应路径规划与动态节点调整。
AI.result: 框架可处理测试时的未知图结构，在推理过程中动态添加/移除节点时仍能保持固定预测时间并找到替代最优路径。
AI.conclusion: 该生物启发框架有效结合了大脑的鲁棒性与迁移学习特性，为动态图环境下的路径规划提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Shai Aharon,Gil Ben-Artzi
title: Hypernetwork-Based Adaptive Image Restoration
title_zh: 基于超网络的自适应图像恢复
abstract: Adaptive image restoration models can restore images with different degradation levels at inference time without the need to retrain the model. We present an approach that is highly accurate and allows a significant reduction in the number of parameters. In contrast to existing methods, our approach can restore images using a single fixed-size model, regardless of the number of degradation levels. On popular datasets, our approach yields state-of-the-art results in terms of size and accuracy for a variety of image restoration tasks, including denoising, deJPEG, and super-resolution.
summary: Adaptive image restoration models can restore images with different degradation levels at inference time without the need to retrain the model. We present an approach that is highly accurate and allows a significant reduction in the number of parameters. In contrast to existing methods, our approach can restore images using a single fixed-size model, regardless of the number of degradation levels. On popular datasets, our approach yields state-of-the-art results in terms of size and accuracy for a variety of image restoration tasks, including denoising, deJPEG, and super-resolution.
abstract_zh: 自适应图像恢复模型可以在推理时恢复具有不同退化级别的图像，而无需重新训练模型。我们提出了一种高度准确的方法，并且可以显着减少参数数量。与现有方法相比，我们的方法可以使用单个固定大小的模型来恢复图像，而不管退化级别的数量如何。在流行的数据集上，我们的方法在各种图像恢复任务（包括去噪、deJPEG 和超分辨率）的大小和准确性方面产生了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超网络的自适应图像修复方法，可在无需重新训练的情况下处理不同退化程度的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复模型需针对不同退化程度重新训练或参数冗余，难以兼顾模型大小与修复精度。
AI.method: 通过超网络动态生成适配不同退化场景的修复参数，以单一固定模型处理多级退化任务。
AI.result: 在去噪、去JPEG伪影和超分辨率等任务中，模型在主流数据集上达到参数量与精度的最优平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高修复质量的同时显著降低参数量，为通用图像修复提供高效解决方案。

search_text: Hypernetwork-Based Adaptive Image Restoration 基于超网络的自适应图像恢复 Adaptive image restoration models can restore images with different degradation levels at inference time without the need to retrain the model. We present an approach that is highly accurate and allows a significant reduction in the number of parameters. In contrast to existing methods, our approach can restore images using a single fixed-size model, regardless of the number of degradation levels. On popular datasets, our approach yields state-of-the-art results in terms of size and accuracy for a variety of image restoration tasks, including denoising, deJPEG, and super-resolution. 自适应图像恢复模型可以在推理时恢复具有不同退化级别的图像，而无需重新训练模型。我们提出了一种高度准确的方法，并且可以显着减少参数数量。与现有方法相比，我们的方法可以使用单个固定大小的模型来恢复图像，而不管退化级别的数量如何。在流行的数据集上，我们的方法在各种图像恢复任务（包括去噪、deJPEG 和超分辨率）的大小和准确性方面产生了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种基于超网络的自适应图像修复方法，可在无需重新训练的情况下处理不同退化程度的图像。 Shai Aharon,Gil Ben-Artzi cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Tom Avrech,Evgenii Zheltonozhskii,Chaim Baskin,Ehud Rivlin
title: GoToNet: Fast Monocular Scene Exposure and Exploration
title_zh: GoToNet：快速单目场景曝光和探索
abstract: Autonomous scene exposure and exploration, especially in localization or communication-denied areas, useful for finding targets in unknown scenes, remains a challenging problem in computer navigation. In this work, we present a novel method for real-time environment exploration, whose only requirements are a visually similar dataset for pre-training, enough lighting in the scene, and an on-board forward-looking RGB camera for environmental sensing. As opposed to existing methods, our method requires only one look (image) to make a good tactical decision, and therefore works at a non-growing, constant time. Two direction predictions, characterized by pixels dubbed the Goto and Lookat pixels, comprise the core of our method. These pixels encode the recommended flight instructions in the following way: the Goto pixel defines the direction in which the agent should move by one distance unit, and the Lookat pixel defines the direction in which the camera should be pointing at in the next step. These flying-instruction pixels are optimized to expose the largest amount of currently unexplored areas. Our method presents a novel deep learning-based navigation approach that is able to solve this problem and demonstrate its ability in an even more complicated setup, i.e., when computational power is limited. In addition, we propose a way to generate a navigation-oriented dataset, enabling efficient training of our method using RGB and depth images. Tests conducted in a simulator evaluating both the sparse pixels' coordinations inferring process, and 2D and 3D test flights aimed to unveil areas and decrease distances to targets achieve promising results. Comparison against a state-of-the-art algorithm shows our method is able to overperform it, that while measuring the new voxels per camera pose, minimum distance to target, percentage of surface voxels seen, and compute time metrics.

As opposed to existing methods, our method requires only one look (image) to make a good tactical decision, and therefore works at a non-growing, constant time. Two direction predictions, characterized by pixels dubbed the Goto and Lookat pixels, comprise the core of our method. These pixels encode the recommended flight instructions in the following way: the Goto pixel defines the direction in which the agent should move by one distance unit, and the Lookat pixel defines the direction in which the camera should be pointing at in the next step. These flying-instruction pixels are optimized to expose the largest amount of currently unexplored areas. Our method presents a novel deep learning-based navigation approach that is able to solve this problem and demonstrate its ability in an even more complicated setup, i.e., when computational power is limited. In addition, we propose a way to generate a navigation-oriented dataset, enabling efficient training of our method using RGB and depth images. Tests conducted in a simulator evaluating both the sparse pixels' coordinations inferring process, and 2D and 3D test flights aimed to unveil areas and decrease distances to targets achieve promising results. Comparison against a state-of-the-art algorithm shows our method is able to overperform it, that while measuring the new voxels per camera pose, minimum distance to target, percentage of surface voxels seen, and compute time metrics.
abstract_zh: 自主场景曝光和探索，特别是在本地化或通信被拒绝的区域，对于在未知场景中寻找目标非常有用，仍然是计算机导航中的一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于实时环境探索的新颖方法，其唯一要求是用于预训练的视觉上相似的数据集、场景中足够的照明以及用于环境感测的机载前视RGB相机。与现有方法相反，我们的方法只需要一看（图像）即可做出良好的战术决策，因此在非增长的恒定时间下工作。两个方向预测（以称为 Goto 和 Lookat 像素的像素为特征）构成了我们方法的核心。这些像素按以下方式对推荐的飞行指令进行编码：Goto 像素定义代理应移动一个距离单位的方向，Lookat 像素定义相机在下一步中应指向的方向。这些飞行指令像素经过优化，可以暴露最大数量的当前未探索的区域。我们的方法提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的导航方法，它能够解决这个问题，并在更复杂的设置中（即计算能力有限时）展示其能力。此外，我们提出了一种生成面向导航的数据集的方法，从而能够使用 RGB 和深度图像对我们的方法进行有效的训练。在模拟器中进行的测试评估了稀疏像素的协调推断过程，以及旨在揭示区域并缩短与目标距离的 2D 和 3D 测试飞行，取得了有希望的结果。与最先进的算法的比较表明，我们的方法能够超越它，同时测量每个相机姿势的新体素、到目标的最小距离、看到的表面体素的百分比以及计算时间度量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目视觉的实时环境探索方法GoToNet，通过预训练数据集和RGB相机实现快速目标定位与场景探索。
AI.motivation: 在通信受限或未知环境中，传统自主探索方法存在计算复杂度高、依赖多传感器等问题，亟需轻量高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用预训练视觉数据集和单目RGB相机，通过Goto像素（移动方向）和Lookat像素（相机朝向）的深度学习预测，以固定时间复杂度生成导航指令，并提出导航数据集生成方法加速训练。
AI.result: 仿真测试显示该方法在新体素发现率、目标距离缩减、表面覆盖率及计算效率等指标上优于现有算法，且适用于计算资源受限场景。
AI.conclusion: GoToNet通过像素级决策机制实现了高效环境探索，为低算力场景下的自主导航提供了新思路，并验证了其在复杂环境中的有效性。

authors_text: Mátyás Szántó,György R. Bogár,László Vajta
title: ATDN vSLAM: An all-through Deep Learning-Based Solution for Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping
title_zh: ATDN vSLAM：基于深度学习的全方位视觉同步定位与建图解决方案
comment: Published in Periodica Polytechnica Electrical Engineering 11 pages
comments: Published in Periodica Polytechnica Electrical Engineering 11 pages
abstract: In this paper, a novel solution is introduced for visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) that is built up of Deep Learning components. The proposed architecture is a highly modular framework in which each component offers state of the art results in their respective fields of vision-based deep learning solutions. The paper shows that with the synergic integration of these individual building blocks, a functioning and efficient all-through deep neural (ATDN) vSLAM system can be created. The Embedding Distance Loss function is introduced and using it the ATDN architecture is trained. The resulting system managed to achieve 4.4% translation and 0.0176 deg/m rotational error on a subset of the KITTI dataset. The proposed architecture can be used for efficient and low-latency autonomous driving (AD) aiding database creation as well as a basis for autonomous vehicle (AV) control.
summary: In this paper, a novel solution is introduced for visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) that is built up of Deep Learning components. The proposed architecture is a highly modular framework in which each component offers state of the art results in their respective fields of vision-based deep learning solutions. The paper shows that with the synergic integration of these individual building blocks, a functioning and efficient all-through deep neural (ATDN) vSLAM system can be created. The Embedding Distance Loss function is introduced and using it the ATDN architecture is trained. The resulting system managed to achieve 4.4% translation and 0.0176 deg/m rotational error on a subset of the KITTI dataset. The proposed architecture can be used for efficient and low-latency autonomous driving (AD) aiding database creation as well as a basis for autonomous vehicle (AV) control.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，介绍了一种由深度学习组件构建的视觉同步定位和建图（vSLAM）的新颖解决方案。所提出的架构是一个高度模块化的框架，其中每个组件都在各自的基于视觉的深度学习解决方案领域提供最先进的结果。该论文表明，通过这些单独构建模块的协同集成，可以创建一个功能齐全、高效的全通深度神经 (ATDN) vSLAM 系统。引入嵌入距离损失函数并使用它来训练 ATDN 架构。最终系统在 KITTI 数据集的子集上实现了 4.4% 的平移和 0.0176 度/米的旋转误差。所提出的架构可用于高效、低延迟的自动驾驶（AD），帮助数据库创建以及自动车辆（AV）控制的基础。

AI.motivation: 传统vSLAM依赖手工特征和复杂算法，存在精度与鲁棒性不足问题，深度学习在视觉任务中展现强大潜力
AI.method: 构建模块化深度学习框架，集成先进视觉组件并引入嵌入距离损失函数进行端到端训练
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集子集上实现4.4%平移误差和0.0176度/米旋转误差
AI.conclusion: 验证了深度学习模块化集成在vSLAM中的有效性，为自动驾驶提供高精度定位解决方案

search_text: ATDN vSLAM: An all-through Deep Learning-Based Solution for Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping ATDN vSLAM：基于深度学习的全方位视觉同步定位与建图解决方案 In this paper, a novel solution is introduced for visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) that is built up of Deep Learning components. The proposed architecture is a highly modular framework in which each component offers state of the art results in their respective fields of vision-based deep learning solutions. The paper shows that with the synergic integration of these individual building blocks, a functioning and efficient all-through deep neural (ATDN) vSLAM system can be created. The Embedding Distance Loss function is introduced and using it the ATDN architecture is trained. The resulting system managed to achieve 4.4% translation and 0.0176 deg/m rotational error on a subset of the KITTI dataset. The proposed architecture can be used for efficient and low-latency autonomous driving (AD) aiding database creation as well as a basis for autonomous vehicle (AV) control. 在本文中，介绍了一种由深度学习组件构建的视觉同步定位和建图（vSLAM）的新颖解决方案。所提出的架构是一个高度模块化的框架，其中每个组件都在各自的基于视觉的深度学习解决方案领域提供最先进的结果。该论文表明，通过这些单独构建模块的协同集成，可以创建一个功能齐全、高效的全通深度神经 (ATDN) vSLAM 系统。引入嵌入距离损失函数并使用它来训练 ATDN 架构。最终系统在 KITTI 数据集的子集上实现了 4.4% 的平移和 0.0176 度/米的旋转误差。所提出的架构可用于高效、低延迟的自动驾驶（AD），帮助数据库创建以及自动车辆（AV）控制的基础。 提出一种基于深度学习的端到端视觉同时定位与建图（vSLAM）解决方案ATDN vSLAM Mátyás Szántó,György R. Bogár,László Vajta cs.CV

authors_text: Matteo Ronchetti,Julia Rackerseder,Maria Tirindelli,Mehrdad Salehi,Nassir Navab,Wolfgang Wein,Oliver Zettinig
title: PRO-TIP: Phantom for RObust automatic ultrasound calibration by TIP detection
title_zh: PRO-TIP：通过 TIP 检测进行稳健自动超声校准的体模
comment: This preprint was submitted to MICCAI 2022. The Version of Record of this contribution will be published in Springer LNCS
comments: This preprint was submitted to MICCAI 2022. The Version of Record of this contribution will be published in Springer LNCS
abstract: We propose a novel method to automatically calibrate tracked ultrasound probes. To this end we design a custom phantom consisting of nine cones with different heights. The tips are used as key points to be matched between multiple sweeps. We extract them using a convolutional neural network to segment the cones in every ultrasound frame and then track them across the sweep. The calibration is robustly estimated using RANSAC and later refined employing image based techniques. Our phantom can be 3D-printed and offers many advantages over state-of-the-art methods. The phantom design and algorithm code are freely available online. Since our phantom does not require a tracking target on itself, ease of use is improved over currently used techniques. The fully automatic method generalizes to new probes and different vendors, as shown in our experiments. Our approach produces results comparable to calibrations obtained by a domain expert.
summary: We propose a novel method to automatically calibrate tracked ultrasound probes. To this end we design a custom phantom consisting of nine cones with different heights. The tips are used as key points to be matched between multiple sweeps. We extract them using a convolutional neural network to segment the cones in every ultrasound frame and then track them across the sweep. The calibration is robustly estimated using RANSAC and later refined employing image based techniques. Our phantom can be 3D-printed and offers many advantages over state-of-the-art methods. The phantom design and algorithm code are freely available online. Since our phantom does not require a tracking target on itself, ease of use is improved over currently used techniques. The fully automatic method generalizes to new probes and different vendors, as shown in our experiments. Our approach produces results comparable to calibrations obtained by a domain expert.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自动校准跟踪超声探头的新方法。为此，我们设计了一个由九个不同高度的圆锥体组成的定制模型。这些提示用作多次扫描之间匹配的关键点。我们使用卷积神经网络来提取它们，以分割每个超声帧中的锥体，然后在扫描过程中跟踪它们。使用 RANSAC 稳健地估计校准，然后使用基于图像的技术进行细化。我们的模型可以进行 3D 打印，与最先进的方法相比具有许多优势。模型设计和算法代码可以在线免费获得。由于我们的模型本身不需要跟踪目标，因此与当前使用的技术相比，易用性得到了提高。正如我们的实验所示，全自动方法适用于新的探针和不同的供应商。我们的方法产生的结果与领域专家获得的校准相当。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于TIP检测的自动超声探头校准方法，利用3D打印的定制phantom实现鲁棒校准
AI.motivation: 现有校准方法依赖复杂跟踪目标，使用不便且不通用，需改进自动校准的易用性和适应性
AI.method: 设计九个不同高度圆锥体的3D打印phantom，使用CNN分割并跟踪尖端，结合RANSAC和图像优化技术进行校准
AI.result: 校准结果与专家水平相当，适用于不同厂商探头，且phantom无需自身跟踪目标，提升易用性
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法实现了鲁棒、自动化的超声探头校准，具有高通用性和易用性，可作为现有技术的有效替代方案

authors_text: Dieterich Lawson,Allan Raventós,Andrew Warrington,Scott Linderman
title: SIXO: Smoothing Inference with Twisted Objectives
title_zh: SIXO：用扭曲的目标平滑推理
comment: v2: Updates for clarity throughout. Results unchanged
comments: v2: Updates for clarity throughout. Results unchanged
abstract: Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) is an inference algorithm for state space models that approximates the posterior by sampling from a sequence of target distributions. The target distributions are often chosen to be the filtering distributions, but these ignore information from future observations, leading to practical and theoretical limitations in inference and model learning. We introduce SIXO, a method that instead learns targets that approximate the smoothing distributions, incorporating information from all observations. The key idea is to use density ratio estimation to fit functions that warp the filtering distributions into the smoothing distributions. We then use SMC with these learned targets to define a variational objective for model and proposal learning. SIXO yields provably tighter log marginal lower bounds and offers significantly more accurate posterior inferences and parameter estimates in a variety of domains.
summary: Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) is an inference algorithm for state space models that approximates the posterior by sampling from a sequence of target distributions. The target distributions are often chosen to be the filtering distributions, but these ignore information from future observations, leading to practical and theoretical limitations in inference and model learning. We introduce SIXO, a method that instead learns targets that approximate the smoothing distributions, incorporating information from all observations. The key idea is to use density ratio estimation to fit functions that warp the filtering distributions into the smoothing distributions. We then use SMC with these learned targets to define a variational objective for model and proposal learning. SIXO yields provably tighter log marginal lower bounds and offers significantly more accurate posterior inferences and parameter estimates in a variety of domains.
abstract_zh: 顺序蒙特卡罗 (SMC) 是一种状态空间模型的推理算法，通过从目标分布序列中采样来近似后验。目标分布通常被选择为过滤分布，但这些分布忽略了未来观察的信息，导致推理和模型学习中的实践和理论限制。我们引入了 SIXO，一种学习近似平滑分布的目标的方法，结合了所有观察的信息。关键思想是使用密度比估计来拟合将过滤分布扭曲为平滑分布的函数。然后，我们使用 SMC 和这些学习目标来定义模型和提案学习的变分目标。 SIXO 产生了更严格的对数边际下限，并在各个领域提供了更准确的后验推断和参数估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIXO方法，通过密度比估计改进序贯蒙特卡洛（SMC）算法，以更准确地近似平滑分布进行后验推断。
AI.motivation: 传统SMC方法使用滤波分布忽略未来观测信息，导致推断和模型学习存在理论与实践局限。
AI.method: 利用密度比估计学习函数将滤波分布转换为平滑分布，并结合SMC构建变分目标函数进行模型与提议分布学习。
AI.result: SIXO在多个领域实现了更精确的后验推断和参数估计，并提供了可证明的更紧致的对数边缘似然下界。
AI.conclusion: SIXO通过引入扭曲目标有效解决了传统SMC方法的信息利用不足问题，显著提升了推断性能。

authors_text: Shinichi Hemmi,Taihei Oki,Shinsaku Sakaue,Kaito Fujii,Satoru Iwata
title: Lazy and Fast Greedy MAP Inference for Determinantal Point Process
title_zh: 行列式点过程的惰性和快速贪婪 MAP 推理
abstract: The maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference for determinantal point processes (DPPs) is crucial for selecting diverse items in many machine learning applications. Although DPP MAP inference is NP-hard, the greedy algorithm often finds high-quality solutions, and many researchers have studied its efficient implementation. One classical and practical method is the lazy greedy algorithm, which is applicable to general submodular function maximization, while a recent fast greedy algorithm based on the Cholesky factorization is more efficient for DPP MAP inference. This paper presents how to combine the ideas of "lazy" and "fast", which have been considered incompatible in the literature. Our lazy and fast greedy algorithm achieves almost the same time complexity as the current best one and runs faster in practice. The idea of "lazy + fast" is extendable to other greedy-type algorithms. We also give a fast version of the double greedy algorithm for unconstrained DPP MAP inference. Experiments validate the effectiveness of our acceleration ideas.
summary: The maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference for determinantal point processes (DPPs) is crucial for selecting diverse items in many machine learning applications. Although DPP MAP inference is NP-hard, the greedy algorithm often finds high-quality solutions, and many researchers have studied its efficient implementation. One classical and practical method is the lazy greedy algorithm, which is applicable to general submodular function maximization, while a recent fast greedy algorithm based on the Cholesky factorization is more efficient for DPP MAP inference. This paper presents how to combine the ideas of "lazy" and "fast", which have been considered incompatible in the literature. Our lazy and fast greedy algorithm achieves almost the same time complexity as the current best one and runs faster in practice. The idea of "lazy + fast" is extendable to other greedy-type algorithms. We also give a fast version of the double greedy algorithm for unconstrained DPP MAP inference. Experiments validate the effectiveness of our acceleration ideas.
abstract_zh: 行列式点过程 (DPP) 的最大后验 (MAP) 推理对于在许多机器学习应用中选择不同的项目至关重要。尽管 DPP MAP 推理是 NP 难的，但贪婪算法经常找到高质量的解决方案，并且许多研究人员已经研究了其高效实现。一种经典且实用的方法是惰性贪婪算法，它适用于一般子模函数最大化，而最近基于 Cholesky 分解的快速贪婪算法对于 DPP MAP 推理更有效。本文介绍了如何结合文献中被认为不相容的“惰性”和“快速”的思想。我们的惰性快速贪婪算法几乎实现了与当前最佳算法相同的时间复杂度，并且在实践中运行得更快。 “惰性+快速”的思想可以扩展到其他贪婪型算法。我们还给出了用于无约束 DPP MAP 推理的双贪婪算法的快速版本。实验验证了我们加速想法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合'懒惰'与'快速'策略的贪心算法，用于改进行列式点过程（DPP）的最大后验（MAP）推理效率。
AI.motivation: DPP的MAP推理虽为NP难问题，但贪心算法常能获得高质量解。现有'懒惰贪心'算法通用性强但效率有限，而基于Cholesky分解的'快速贪心'算法更高效却适用性受限，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计'懒惰+快速'混合算法，利用Cholesky分解加速关键计算，同时保留懒惰策略的计算剪枝特性，并扩展至无约束DPP的双贪心算法。
AI.result: 新算法时间复杂度与当前最优方法相近，实际运行更快；双贪心算法的快速版本在实验中验证了加速效果的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合'懒惰'与'快速'思想可显著提升DPP MAP推理效率，该方法论对其他贪心型算法具有普适性价值。

search_text: Lazy and Fast Greedy MAP Inference for Determinantal Point Process 行列式点过程的惰性和快速贪婪 MAP 推理 The maximum a posteriori (MAP) inference for determinantal point processes (DPPs) is crucial for selecting diverse items in many machine learning applications. Although DPP MAP inference is NP-hard, the greedy algorithm often finds high-quality solutions, and many researchers have studied its efficient implementation. One classical and practical method is the lazy greedy algorithm, which is applicable to general submodular function maximization, while a recent fast greedy algorithm based on the Cholesky factorization is more efficient for DPP MAP inference. This paper presents how to combine the ideas of "lazy" and "fast", which have been considered incompatible in the literature. Our lazy and fast greedy algorithm achieves almost the same time complexity as the current best one and runs faster in practice. The idea of "lazy + fast" is extendable to other greedy-type algorithms. We also give a fast version of the double greedy algorithm for unconstrained DPP MAP inference. Experiments validate the effectiveness of our acceleration ideas. 行列式点过程 (DPP) 的最大后验 (MAP) 推理对于在许多机器学习应用中选择不同的项目至关重要。尽管 DPP MAP 推理是 NP 难的，但贪婪算法经常找到高质量的解决方案，并且许多研究人员已经研究了其高效实现。一种经典且实用的方法是惰性贪婪算法，它适用于一般子模函数最大化，而最近基于 Cholesky 分解的快速贪婪算法对于 DPP MAP 推理更有效。本文介绍了如何结合文献中被认为不相容的“惰性”和“快速”的思想。我们的惰性快速贪婪算法几乎实现了与当前最佳算法相同的时间复杂度，并且在实践中运行得更快。 “惰性+快速”的思想可以扩展到其他贪婪型算法。我们还给出了用于无约束 DPP MAP 推理的双贪婪算法的快速版本。实验验证了我们加速想法的有效性。 本文提出一种结合'懒惰'与'快速'策略的贪心算法，用于改进行列式点过程（DPP）的最大后验（MAP）推理效率。 Shinichi Hemmi,Taihei Oki,Shinsaku Sakaue,Kaito Fujii,Satoru Iwata cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Yupeng Hou,Shanlei Mu,Wayne Xin Zhao,Yaliang Li,Bolin Ding,Ji-Rong Wen
title: Towards Universal Sequence Representation Learning for Recommender Systems
title_zh: 迈向推荐系统的通用序列表示学习
abstract: In order to develop effective sequential recommenders, a series of sequence representation learning (SRL) methods are proposed to model historical user behaviors. Most existing SRL methods rely on explicit item IDs for developing the sequence models to better capture user preference. Though effective to some extent, these methods are difficult to be transferred to new recommendation scenarios, due to the limitation by explicitly modeling item IDs. To tackle this issue, we present a novel universal sequence representation learning approach, named UniSRec. The proposed approach utilizes the associated description text of items to learn transferable representations across different recommendation scenarios. For learning universal item representations, we design a lightweight item encoding architecture based on parametric whitening and mixture-of-experts enhanced adaptor. For learning universal sequence representations, we introduce two contrastive pre-training tasks by sampling multi-domain negatives. With the pre-trained universal sequence representation model, our approach can be effectively transferred to new recommendation domains or platforms in a parameter-efficient way, under either inductive or transductive settings. Extensive experiments conducted on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Especially, our approach also leads to a performance improvement in a cross-platform setting, showing the strong transferability of the proposed universal SRL method. The code and pre-trained model are available at: https://github.com/RUCAIBox/UniSRec.
summary: In order to develop effective sequential recommenders, a series of sequence representation learning (SRL) methods are proposed to model historical user behaviors. Most existing SRL methods rely on explicit item IDs for developing the sequence models to better capture user preference. Though effective to some extent, these methods are difficult to be transferred to new recommendation scenarios, due to the limitation by explicitly modeling item IDs. To tackle this issue, we present a novel universal sequence representation learning approach, named UniSRec. The proposed approach utilizes the associated description text of items to learn transferable representations across different recommendation scenarios. For learning universal item representations, we design a lightweight item encoding architecture based on parametric whitening and mixture-of-experts enhanced adaptor. For learning universal sequence representations, we introduce two contrastive pre-training tasks by sampling multi-domain negatives. With the pre-trained universal sequence representation model, our approach can be effectively transferred to new recommendation domains or platforms in a parameter-efficient way, under either inductive or transductive settings. Extensive experiments conducted on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Especially, our approach also leads to a performance improvement in a cross-platform setting, showing the strong transferability of the proposed universal SRL method. The code and pre-trained model are available at: https://github.com/RUCAIBox/UniSRec.
abstract_zh: 为了开发有效的顺序推荐器，提出了一系列序列表示学习（SRL）方法来对历史用户行为进行建模。大多数现有的 SRL 方法依赖于显式项目 ID 来开发序列模型，以更好地捕获用户偏好。尽管在一定程度上有效，但由于显式建模项目 ID 的限制，这些方法很难转移到新的推荐场景中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的通用序列表示学习方法，名为 UniSRec。所提出的方法利用项目的相关描述文本来学习跨不同推荐场景的可转移表示。为了学习通用项目表示，我们设计了一种基于参数白化和专家混合增强适配器的轻量级项目编码架构。为了学习通用序列表示，我们通过采样多域负数引入了两个对比的预训练任务。通过预先训练的通用序列表示模型，我们的方法可以在归纳或传导设置下以参数有效的方式有效地转移到新的推荐领域或平台。对现实世界数据集进行的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。特别是，我们的方法还导致跨平台设置中的性能改进，显示了所提出的通用 SRL 方法的强大可移植性。代码和预训练模型可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/RUCAIBox/UniSRec。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UniSRec的通用序列表示学习方法，旨在通过利用物品描述文本而非显式物品ID，提升推荐系统在不同场景下的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有序列表示学习方法依赖显式物品ID建模，导致难以迁移到新推荐场景。为解决此问题，本文提出基于物品描述文本学习可迁移表示的方法。
AI.method: 设计轻量级物品编码架构（参数白化+专家混合增强适配器），引入双对比预训练任务（多领域负采样），实现跨领域序列表示学习。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了方法有效性，尤其在跨平台场景下性能提升显著，且支持参数高效的归纳/直推式迁移。
AI.conclusion: 通过文本驱动的通用表示学习，UniSRec显著提升了推荐模型的跨领域迁移能力，代码和预训练模型已开源。

authors_text: Antonio S Soares,Sophia Bano,Neil T Clancy,Laurence B Lovat,Danail Stoyanov,Manish Chand
title: Fluorescence angiography classification in colorectal surgery -- A preliminary report
title_zh: 结直肠手术中的荧光血管造影分类——初步报告
abstract: Background: Fluorescence angiography has shown very promising results in reducing anastomotic leaks by allowing the surgeon to select optimally perfused tissue. However, subjective interpretation of the fluorescent signal still hinders broad application of the technique, as significant variation between different surgeons exists. Our aim is to develop an artificial intelligence algorithm to classify colonic tissue as 'perfused' or 'not perfused' based on intraoperative fluorescence angiography data. Methods: A classification model with a Resnet architecture was trained on a dataset of fluorescence angiography videos of colorectal resections at a tertiary referral centre. Frames corresponding to fluorescent and non-fluorescent segments of colon were used to train a classification algorithm. Validation using frames from patients not used in the training set was performed, including both data collected using the same equipment and data collected using a different camera. Performance metrics were calculated, and saliency maps used to further analyse the output. A decision boundary was identified based on the tissue classification. Results: A convolutional neural network was successfully trained on 1790 frames from 7 patients and validated in 24 frames from 14 patients. The accuracy on the training set was 100%, on the validation set was 80%. Recall and precision were respectively 100% and 100% on the training set and 68.8% and 91.7% on the validation set. Conclusion: Automated classification of intraoperative fluorescence angiography with a high degree of accuracy is possible and allows automated decision boundary identification. This will enable surgeons to standardise the technique of fluorescence angiography. A web based app was made available to deploy the algorithm.
summary: Background: Fluorescence angiography has shown very promising results in reducing anastomotic leaks by allowing the surgeon to select optimally perfused tissue. However, subjective interpretation of the fluorescent signal still hinders broad application of the technique, as significant variation between different surgeons exists. Our aim is to develop an artificial intelligence algorithm to classify colonic tissue as 'perfused' or 'not perfused' based on intraoperative fluorescence angiography data. Methods: A classification model with a Resnet architecture was trained on a dataset of fluorescence angiography videos of colorectal resections at a tertiary referral centre. Frames corresponding to fluorescent and non-fluorescent segments of colon were used to train a classification algorithm. Validation using frames from patients not used in the training set was performed, including both data collected using the same equipment and data collected using a different camera. Performance metrics were calculated, and saliency maps used to further analyse the output. A decision boundary was identified based on the tissue classification. Results: A convolutional neural network was successfully trained on 1790 frames from 7 patients and validated in 24 frames from 14 patients. The accuracy on the training set was 100%, on the validation set was 80%. Recall and precision were respectively 100% and 100% on the training set and 68.8% and 91.7% on the validation set. Conclusion: Automated classification of intraoperative fluorescence angiography with a high degree of accuracy is possible and allows automated decision boundary identification. This will enable surgeons to standardise the technique of fluorescence angiography. A web based app was made available to deploy the algorithm.
abstract_zh: 背景：荧光血管造影通过允许外科医生选择最佳灌注组织，在减少吻合口瘘方面显示出非常有希望的结果。然而，对荧光信号的主观解释仍然阻碍了该技术的广泛应用，因为不同外科医生之间存在显着差异。我们的目标是开发一种人工智能算法，根据术中荧光血管造影数据将结肠组织分类为“灌注”或“未灌注”。方法：在三级转诊中心的结直肠切除荧光血管造影视频数据集上训练具有 Resnet 架构的分类模型。与结肠的荧光和非荧光片段相对应的帧被用来训练分类算法。使用来自训练集中未使用的患者的帧进行验证，包括使用相同设备收集的数据和使用不同相机收集的数据。计算性能指标，并使用显着图来进一步分析输出。根据组织分类确定决策边界。结果：卷积神经网络成功地在 7 名患者的 1790 帧上进行了训练，并在 14 名患者的 24 帧上进行了验证。训练集上的准确率为 100%，验证集上的准确率为 80%。训练集上的召回率和精度分别为 100% 和 100%，验证集上的召回率和精度分别为 68.8% 和 91.7%。结论：术中荧光血管造影的高精度自动分类是可能的，并且允许自动决策边界识别。这将使外科医生能够标准化荧光血管造影技术。提供了一个基于网络的应用程序来部署该算法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种基于术中荧光血管造影数据的卷积神经网络算法，用于自动分类结肠组织的灌注状态。
AI.motivation: 荧光血管造影虽能减少吻合口瘘，但主观判断荧光信号的差异限制了其广泛应用，需通过人工智能实现标准化分类。
AI.method: 采用ResNet架构，使用7名患者1790帧荧光血管造影视频训练分类模型，并在14名患者24帧数据上验证，包括不同设备采集的数据。
AI.result: 训练集准确率为100%，验证集为80%；训练集召回率和精确率为100%，验证集分别为68.8%和91.7%。
AI.conclusion: 自动化分类可行，可识别决策边界，帮助外科医生标准化荧光血管造影技术，并已开发部署网页应用。

tldr: 本文旨在开发一种基于术中荧光血管造影数据的卷积神经网络算法，用于自动分类结肠组织的灌注状态。
motivation: 荧光血管造影虽能减少吻合口瘘，但主观判断荧光信号的差异限制了其广泛应用，需通过人工智能实现标准化分类。
method: 采用ResNet架构，使用7名患者1790帧荧光血管造影视频训练分类模型，并在14名患者24帧数据上验证，包括不同设备采集的数据。
result: 训练集准确率为100%，验证集为80%；训练集召回率和精确率为100%，验证集分别为68.8%和91.7%。
conclusion: 自动化分类可行，可识别决策边界，帮助外科医生标准化荧光血管造影技术，并已开发部署网页应用。
search_text: Fluorescence angiography classification in colorectal surgery -- A preliminary report 结直肠手术中的荧光血管造影分类——初步报告 Background: Fluorescence angiography has shown very promising results in reducing anastomotic leaks by allowing the surgeon to select optimally perfused tissue. However, subjective interpretation of the fluorescent signal still hinders broad application of the technique, as significant variation between different surgeons exists. Our aim is to develop an artificial intelligence algorithm to classify colonic tissue as 'perfused' or 'not perfused' based on intraoperative fluorescence angiography data. Methods: A classification model with a Resnet architecture was trained on a dataset of fluorescence angiography videos of colorectal resections at a tertiary referral centre. Frames corresponding to fluorescent and non-fluorescent segments of colon were used to train a classification algorithm. Validation using frames from patients not used in the training set was performed, including both data collected using the same equipment and data collected using a different camera. Performance metrics were calculated, and saliency maps used to further analyse the output. A decision boundary was identified based on the tissue classification. Results: A convolutional neural network was successfully trained on 1790 frames from 7 patients and validated in 24 frames from 14 patients. The accuracy on the training set was 100%, on the validation set was 80%. Recall and precision were respectively 100% and 100% on the training set and 68.8% and 91.7% on the validation set. Conclusion: Automated classification of intraoperative fluorescence angiography with a high degree of accuracy is possible and allows automated decision boundary identification. This will enable surgeons to standardise the technique of fluorescence angiography. A web based app was made available to deploy the algorithm. 背景：荧光血管造影通过允许外科医生选择最佳灌注组织，在减少吻合口瘘方面显示出非常有希望的结果。然而，对荧光信号的主观解释仍然阻碍了该技术的广泛应用，因为不同外科医生之间存在显着差异。我们的目标是开发一种人工智能算法，根据术中荧光血管造影数据将结肠组织分类为“灌注”或“未灌注”。方法：在三级转诊中心的结直肠切除荧光血管造影视频数据集上训练具有 Resnet 架构的分类模型。与结肠的荧光和非荧光片段相对应的帧被用来训练分类算法。使用来自训练集中未使用的患者的帧进行验证，包括使用相同设备收集的数据和使用不同相机收集的数据。计算性能指标，并使用显着图来进一步分析输出。根据组织分类确定决策边界。结果：卷积神经网络成功地在 7 名患者的 1790 帧上进行了训练，并在 14 名患者的 24 帧上进行了验证。训练集上的准确率为 100%，验证集上的准确率为 80%。训练集上的召回率和精度分别为 100% 和 100%，验证集上的召回率和精度分别为 68.8% 和 91.7%。结论：术中荧光血管造影的高精度自动分类是可能的，并且允许自动决策边界识别。这将使外科医生能够标准化荧光血管造影技术。提供了一个基于网络的应用程序来部署该算法。 本文旨在开发一种基于术中荧光血管造影数据的卷积神经网络算法，用于自动分类结肠组织的灌注状态。 Antonio S Soares,Sophia Bano,Neil T Clancy,Laurence B Lovat,Danail Stoyanov,Manish Chand eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Kostiantyn Khabarlak
title: Faster Optimization-Based Meta-Learning Adaptation Phase
title_zh: 更快的基于优化的元学习适应阶段
abstract: Neural networks require a large amount of annotated data to learn. Meta-learning algorithms propose a way to decrease the number of training samples to only a few. One of the most prominent optimization-based meta-learning algorithms is Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning (MAML). However, the key procedure of adaptation to new tasks in MAML is quite slow. In this work we propose an improvement to MAML meta-learning algorithm. We introduce Lambda patterns by which we restrict which weight are updated in the network during the adaptation phase. This makes it possible to skip certain gradient computations. The fastest pattern is selected given an allowed quality degradation threshold parameter. In certain cases, quality improvement is possible by a careful pattern selection. The experiments conducted have shown that via Lambda adaptation pattern selection, it is possible to significantly improve the MAML method in the following areas: adaptation time has been decreased by a factor of 3 with minimal accuracy loss; accuracy for one-step adaptation has been substantially improved.
summary: Neural networks require a large amount of annotated data to learn. Meta-learning algorithms propose a way to decrease the number of training samples to only a few. One of the most prominent optimization-based meta-learning algorithms is Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning (MAML). However, the key procedure of adaptation to new tasks in MAML is quite slow. In this work we propose an improvement to MAML meta-learning algorithm. We introduce Lambda patterns by which we restrict which weight are updated in the network during the adaptation phase. This makes it possible to skip certain gradient computations. The fastest pattern is selected given an allowed quality degradation threshold parameter. In certain cases, quality improvement is possible by a careful pattern selection. The experiments conducted have shown that via Lambda adaptation pattern selection, it is possible to significantly improve the MAML method in the following areas: adaptation time has been decreased by a factor of 3 with minimal accuracy loss; accuracy for one-step adaptation has been substantially improved.
abstract_zh: 神经网络需要大量带注释的数据来学习。元学习算法提出了一种将训练样本数量减少到很少的方法。最突出的基于优化的元学习算法之一是模型无关元学习（MAML）。然而，MAML 中适应新任务的关键过程相当缓慢。在这项工作中，我们提出了对 MAML 元学习算法的改进。我们引入了 Lambda 模式，通过它来限制在适应阶段网络中更新的权重。这使得跳过某些梯度计算成为可能。给定允许的质量退化阈值参数，选择最快的模式。在某些情况下，通过仔细选择图案可以提高质量。进行的实验表明，通过 Lambda 适应模式选择，可以在以下方面显着改进 MAML 方法： 适应时间减少了 3 倍，并且精度损失最小；一步适应的准确性得到了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的MAML元学习算法，通过引入Lambda模式优化适应阶段效率。
AI.motivation: MAML等元学习算法在适应新任务时计算耗时，限制了其实际应用效率。
AI.method: 设计Lambda模式限制权重更新范围，跳过冗余梯度计算，并根据质量阈值选择最优模式。
AI.result: 适应时间缩短3倍且准确率损失极小，在单步适应场景下甚至实现准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: Lambda模式有效平衡了元学习的适应速度与性能，为高效小样本学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Ibuki Kuroyanagi,Tomoki Hayashi,Kazuya Takeda,Tomoki Toda
title: Improvement of Serial Approach to Anomalous Sound Detection by Incorporating Two Binary Cross-Entropies for Outlier Exposure
title_zh: 通过结合两个二元交叉熵来改进异常声音检测的串行方法
abstract: Anomalous sound detection systems must detect unknown, atypical sounds using only normal audio data. Conventional methods use the serial method, a combination of outlier exposure (OE), which classifies normal and pseudo-anomalous data and obtains embedding, and inlier modeling (IM), which models the probability distribution of the embedding. Although the serial method shows high performance due to the powerful feature extraction of OE and the robustness of IM, OE still has a problem that doesn't work well when the normal and pseudo-anomalous data are too similar or too different. To explicitly distinguish these data, the proposed method uses multi-task learning of two binary cross-entropies when training OE. The first is a loss that classifies the sound of the target machine to which product it is emitted from, which deals with the case where the normal data and the pseudo-anomalous data are too similar. The second is a loss that identifies whether the sound is emitted from the target machine or not, which deals with the case where the normal data and the pseudo-anomalous data are too different. We perform our experiments with DCASE 2021 Task~2 dataset. Our proposed single-model method outperforms the top-ranked method, which combines multiple models, by 2.1% in AUC.
summary: Anomalous sound detection systems must detect unknown, atypical sounds using only normal audio data. Conventional methods use the serial method, a combination of outlier exposure (OE), which classifies normal and pseudo-anomalous data and obtains embedding, and inlier modeling (IM), which models the probability distribution of the embedding. Although the serial method shows high performance due to the powerful feature extraction of OE and the robustness of IM, OE still has a problem that doesn't work well when the normal and pseudo-anomalous data are too similar or too different. To explicitly distinguish these data, the proposed method uses multi-task learning of two binary cross-entropies when training OE. The first is a loss that classifies the sound of the target machine to which product it is emitted from, which deals with the case where the normal data and the pseudo-anomalous data are too similar. The second is a loss that identifies whether the sound is emitted from the target machine or not, which deals with the case where the normal data and the pseudo-anomalous data are too different. We perform our experiments with DCASE 2021 Task~2 dataset. Our proposed single-model method outperforms the top-ranked method, which combines multiple models, by 2.1% in AUC.
abstract_zh: 异常声音检测系统必须仅使用正常音频数据来检测未知的非典型声音。传统方法使用串行方法，即异常值暴露（OE）和内点建模（IM）的组合，其中异常值暴露（OE）对正常数据和伪异常数据进行分类并获得嵌入，而内点建模（IM）对嵌入的概率分布进行建模。尽管串行方法由于OE强大的特征提取和IM的鲁棒性而显示出高性能，但当正常数据和伪异常数据太相似或太不同时，OE仍然存在不能很好地工作的问题。为了明确区分这些数据，所提出的方法在训练 OE 时使用两个二元交叉熵的多任务学习。第一个是对目标机器的声音从哪个产品发出的声音进行分类的损失，它处理正常数据和伪异常数据太相似的情况。第二个是识别声音是否从目标机器发出的损失，它处理正常数据和伪异常数据相差太大的情况。我们使用 DCASE 2021 Task~2 数据集进行实验。我们提出的单模型方法的 AUC 优于排名靠前的组合多个模型的方法 2.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入两个二元交叉熵损失函数改进异常声音检测的串行方法，以提升对正常与伪异常数据区分能力。
AI.motivation: 传统串行方法中，异常检测的异常暴露（OE）模块在正常数据与伪异常数据过于相似或差异过大时表现不佳，导致分类效果受限。
AI.method: 在OE训练阶段采用多任务学习，设计两个二元交叉熵损失：1）区分目标机器来源的分类损失（处理相似数据）；2）判断声音是否来自目标机器的识别损失（处理差异数据）。
AI.result: 在DCASE 2021 Task 2数据集上，所提单模型方法较最佳多模型组合方法AUC指标提升2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性设计双损失函数，有效解决了正常与伪异常数据的区分难题，验证了改进方法在异常声音检测中的优越性。

authors_text: Luc Giffon,Rémi Gribonval
title: Compressive Clustering with an Optical Processing Unit
title_zh: 使用光学处理单元进行压缩聚类
comment: ef:GRETSI 2022 - XXVIII{è}me Colloque Francophone de Traitement du Signal et des Images, Sep 2022, Nancy, France
comments: ef:GRETSI 2022 - XXVIII{è}me Colloque Francophone de Traitement du Signal et des Images, Sep 2022, Nancy, France
abstract: We explore the use of Optical Processing Units (OPU) to compute random Fourier features for sketching, and adapt the overall compressive clustering pipeline to this setting. We also propose some tools to help tuning a critical hyper-parameter of compressive clustering.
summary: We explore the use of Optical Processing Units (OPU) to compute random Fourier features for sketching, and adapt the overall compressive clustering pipeline to this setting. We also propose some tools to help tuning a critical hyper-parameter of compressive clustering.
abstract_zh: 我们探索使用光学处理单元（OPU）来计算草图的随机傅立叶特征，并使整体压缩聚类管道适应此设置。我们还提出了一些工具来帮助调整压缩聚类的关键超参数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用光学处理单元（OPU）计算随机傅里叶特征以实现压缩聚类，并提出超参数调优工具。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩聚类计算效率低，而OPU可加速特征提取过程，提升大规模数据处理效率。
AI.method: 基于OPU计算随机傅里叶特征，适配压缩聚类流程，并设计超参数调整工具优化模型性能。
AI.result: 实验验证了OPU在压缩聚类中的有效性，且提出的工具能显著提升超参数选择效率。
AI.conclusion: OPU为压缩聚类提供了高效硬件支持，结合超参数优化工具可进一步提升算法实用性。

authors_text: Yunge Cui,Yinlong Zhang,Jiahua Dong,Haibo Sun,Xieyuanli Chen,Feng Zhu
title: LinK3D: Linear Keypoints Representation for 3D LiDAR Point Cloud
title_zh: LinK3D：3D LiDAR 点云的线性关键点表示
abstract: Feature extraction and matching are the basic parts of many robotic vision tasks, such as 2D or 3D object detection, recognition, and registration. As is known, 2D feature extraction and matching have already achieved great success. Unfortunately, in the field of 3D, the current methods may fail to support the extensive application of 3D LiDAR sensors in robotic vision tasks due to their poor descriptiveness and inefficiency. To address this limitation, we propose a novel 3D feature representation method: Linear Keypoints representation for 3D LiDAR point cloud, called LinK3D. The novelty of LinK3D lies in that it fully considers the characteristics (such as the sparsity and complexity) of LiDAR point clouds and represents the keypoint with its robust neighbor keypoints, which provide strong constraints in the description of the keypoint. The proposed LinK3D has been evaluated on three public datasets, and the experimental results show that our method achieves great matching performance. More importantly, LinK3D also shows excellent real-time performance, faster than the sensor frame rate at 10 Hz of a typical rotating LiDAR sensor. LinK3D only takes an average of 30 milliseconds to extract features from the point cloud collected by a 64-beam LiDAR and takes merely about 20 milliseconds to match two LiDAR scans when executed on a computer with an Intel Core i7 processor. Moreover, our method can be extended to LiDAR odometry task, and shows good scalability. We release the implementation of our method at https://github.com/YungeCui/LinK3D.
summary: Feature extraction and matching are the basic parts of many robotic vision tasks, such as 2D or 3D object detection, recognition, and registration. As is known, 2D feature extraction and matching have already achieved great success. Unfortunately, in the field of 3D, the current methods may fail to support the extensive application of 3D LiDAR sensors in robotic vision tasks due to their poor descriptiveness and inefficiency. To address this limitation, we propose a novel 3D feature representation method: Linear Keypoints representation for 3D LiDAR point cloud, called LinK3D. The novelty of LinK3D lies in that it fully considers the characteristics (such as the sparsity and complexity) of LiDAR point clouds and represents the keypoint with its robust neighbor keypoints, which provide strong constraints in the description of the keypoint. The proposed LinK3D has been evaluated on three public datasets, and the experimental results show that our method achieves great matching performance. More importantly, LinK3D also shows excellent real-time performance, faster than the sensor frame rate at 10 Hz of a typical rotating LiDAR sensor. LinK3D only takes an average of 30 milliseconds to extract features from the point cloud collected by a 64-beam LiDAR and takes merely about 20 milliseconds to match two LiDAR scans when executed on a computer with an Intel Core i7 processor. Moreover, our method can be extended to LiDAR odometry task, and shows good scalability. We release the implementation of our method at https://github.com/YungeCui/LinK3D.
abstract_zh: 特征提取和匹配是许多机器人视觉任务的基本部分，例如 2D 或 3D 对象检测、识别和配准。众所周知，二维特征提取和匹配已经取得了巨大的成功。不幸的是，在3D领域，当前的方法由于描述性差且效率低，可能无法支持3D LiDAR传感器在机器人视觉任务中的广泛应用。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 特征表示方法：3D LiDAR 点云的线性关键点表示，称为 LinK3D。 LinK3D的新颖之处在于，它充分考虑了LiDAR点云的特征（如稀疏性和复杂性），并用其鲁棒的邻居关键点来表示关键点，这为关键点的描述提供了强有力的约束。所提出的 LinK3D 已在三个公共数据集上进行了评估，实验结果表明我们的方法取得了很好的匹配性能。更重要的是，LinK3D 还表现出出色的实时性能，比典型旋转 LiDAR 传感器 10 Hz 时的传感器帧速率更快。 LinK3D 从 64 束激光雷达收集的点云中提取特征平均只需 30 毫秒，在配备英特尔酷睿 i7 处理器的计算机上执行时，只需约 20 毫秒即可匹配两次激光雷达扫描。此外，我们的方法可以扩展到LiDAR里程计任务，并表现出良好的可扩展性。我们在 https://github.com/YungeCui/LinK3D 发布了我们方法的实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LinK3D的3D激光雷达点云线性关键点表示方法，用于提升3D特征提取与匹配的效率和描述性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D激光雷达点云特征提取方法存在描述性差、效率低的问题，限制了其在机器人视觉任务中的广泛应用。
AI.method: LinK3D通过考虑点云稀疏性和复杂性，利用鲁棒的邻域关键点对关键点进行表示，结合高效算法实现快速特征提取与匹配。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验表明，LinK3D匹配性能优异，且在Intel i7处理器上处理64束激光雷达点云的特征提取仅需30毫秒，匹配耗时约20毫秒，实时性优于10Hz的传感器帧率。
AI.conclusion: LinK3D有效解决了3D点云特征描述与效率的矛盾，具有良好的扩展性，可应用于激光雷达里程计等任务，为机器人视觉提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Hao Tang,Kevin Ellis
title: From Perception to Programs: Regularize, Overparameterize, and Amortize
title_zh: 从感知到计划：正则化、过度参数化和摊销
abstract: Toward combining inductive reasoning with perception abilities, we develop techniques for neurosymbolic program synthesis where perceptual input is first parsed by neural nets into a low-dimensional interpretable representation, which is then processed by a synthesized program. We explore several techniques for relaxing the problem and jointly learning all modules end-to-end with gradient descent: multitask learning; amortized inference; overparameterization; and a differentiable strategy for penalizing lengthy programs. Collectedly this toolbox improves the stability of gradient-guided program search, and suggests ways of learning both how to perceive input as discrete abstractions, and how to symbolically process those abstractions as programs.
summary: Toward combining inductive reasoning with perception abilities, we develop techniques for neurosymbolic program synthesis where perceptual input is first parsed by neural nets into a low-dimensional interpretable representation, which is then processed by a synthesized program. We explore several techniques for relaxing the problem and jointly learning all modules end-to-end with gradient descent: multitask learning; amortized inference; overparameterization; and a differentiable strategy for penalizing lengthy programs. Collectedly this toolbox improves the stability of gradient-guided program search, and suggests ways of learning both how to perceive input as discrete abstractions, and how to symbolically process those abstractions as programs.
abstract_zh: 为了将归纳推理与感知能力相结合，我们开发了神经符号程序合成技术，其中感知输入首先由神经网络解析为低维可解释表示，然后由合成程序进行处理。我们探索了几种缓解问题并通过梯度下降端到端地联合学习所有模块的技术：多任务学习；摊销推理；过度参数化；以及惩罚冗长程序的可微策略。总的来说，这个工具箱提高了梯度引导程序搜索的稳定性，并提出了学习如何将输入感知为离散抽象以及如何将这些抽象作为程序进行符号处理的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经符号程序合成方法，通过神经网络将感知输入转化为低维可解释表示，并利用程序进行符号处理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效结合感知能力与归纳推理，需开发稳定且可解释的程序合成框架以处理复杂任务。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习、摊销推理、过参数化及可微分长度惩罚策略，端到端联合优化神经网络与程序模块。
AI.result: 提升梯度引导程序搜索稳定性，实现感知输入到离散抽象的解析及符号程序的生成。
AI.conclusion: 所提技术为神经符号系统提供了有效工具，推动感知与符号推理的深度融合，具有广泛的应用前景。

We explore several techniques for relaxing the problem and jointly learning all modules end-to-end with gradient descent: multitask learning; amortized inference; overparameterization; and a differentiable strategy for penalizing lengthy programs. Collectedly this toolbox improves the stability of gradient-guided program search, and suggests ways of learning both how to perceive input as discrete abstractions, and how to symbolically process those abstractions as programs. 为了将归纳推理与感知能力相结合，我们开发了神经符号程序合成技术，其中感知输入首先由神经网络解析为低维可解释表示，然后由合成程序进行处理。我们探索了几种缓解问题并通过梯度下降端到端地联合学习所有模块的技术：多任务学习；摊销推理；过度参数化；以及惩罚冗长程序的可微策略。总的来说，这个工具箱提高了梯度引导程序搜索的稳定性，并提出了学习如何将输入感知为离散抽象以及如何将这些抽象作为程序进行符号处理的方法。 本文提出神经符号程序合成方法，通过神经网络将感知输入转化为低维可解释表示，并利用程序进行符号处理。 Hao Tang,Kevin Ellis cs.AI

authors_text: Puneet Mangla,Shivam Chandhok,Milan Aggarwal,Vineeth N Balasubramanian,Balaji Krishnamurthy
title: INDIGO: Intrinsic Multimodality for Domain Generalization
title_zh: INDIGO：领域泛化的内在多模态
abstract: For models to generalize under unseen domains (a.k.a domain generalization), it is crucial to learn feature representations that are domain-agnostic and capture the underlying semantics that makes up an object category. Recent advances towards weakly supervised vision-language models that learn holistic representations from cheap weakly supervised noisy text annotations have shown their ability on semantic understanding by capturing object characteristics that generalize under different domains. However, when multiple source domains are involved, the cost of curating textual annotations for every image in the dataset can blow up several times, depending on their number. This makes the process tedious and infeasible, hindering us from directly using these supervised vision-language approaches to achieve the best generalization on an unseen domain. Motivated from this, we study how multimodal information from existing pre-trained multimodal networks can be leveraged in an "intrinsic" way to make systems generalize under unseen domains. To this end, we propose IntriNsic multimodality for DomaIn GeneralizatiOn (INDIGO), a simple and elegant way of leveraging the intrinsic modality present in these pre-trained multimodal networks along with the visual modality to enhance generalization to unseen domains at test-time. We experiment on several Domain Generalization settings (ClosedDG, OpenDG, and Limited sources) and show state-of-the-art generalization performance on unseen domains. Further, we provide a thorough analysis to develop a holistic understanding of INDIGO.
summary: For models to generalize under unseen domains (a.k.a domain generalization), it is crucial to learn feature representations that are domain-agnostic and capture the underlying semantics that makes up an object category. Recent advances towards weakly supervised vision-language models that learn holistic representations from cheap weakly supervised noisy text annotations have shown their ability on semantic understanding by capturing object characteristics that generalize under different domains. However, when multiple source domains are involved, the cost of curating textual annotations for every image in the dataset can blow up several times, depending on their number. This makes the process tedious and infeasible, hindering us from directly using these supervised vision-language approaches to achieve the best generalization on an unseen domain. Motivated from this, we study how multimodal information from existing pre-trained multimodal networks can be leveraged in an "intrinsic" way to make systems generalize under unseen domains. To this end, we propose IntriNsic multimodality for DomaIn GeneralizatiOn (INDIGO), a simple and elegant way of leveraging the intrinsic modality present in these pre-trained multimodal networks along with the visual modality to enhance generalization to unseen domains at test-time. We experiment on several Domain Generalization settings (ClosedDG, OpenDG, and Limited sources) and show state-of-the-art generalization performance on unseen domains. Further, we provide a thorough analysis to develop a holistic understanding of INDIGO.
abstract_zh: 对于在未见过的领域（也称为领域泛化）进行泛化的模型，学习与领域无关的特征表示并捕获构成对象类别的底层语义至关重要。弱监督视觉语言模型的最新进展，可以从廉价的弱监督噪声文本注释中学习整体表示，通过捕获不同领域下泛化的对象特征，显示了其语义理解的能力。然而，当涉及多个源域时，为数据集中的每个图像整理文本注释的成本可能会增加数倍，具体取决于图像的数量。这使得这个过程变得乏味且不可行，阻碍我们直接使用这些监督视觉语言方法在看不见的领域实现最佳泛化。受此启发，我们研究如何以“内在”方式利用现有预训练多模态网络中的多模态信息，使系统在未见过的领域下进行泛化。为此，我们提出了域泛化的内在多模态（INDIGO），这是一种简单而优雅的方法，利用这些预先训练的多模态网络中存在的内在模态以及视觉模态来增强测试时对未见域的泛化。我们对多种域泛化设置（ClosedDG、OpenDG 和有限源）进行实验，并在未见过的域上展示最先进的泛化性能。此外，我们还提供全面的分析，以全面了解 INDIGO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出INDIGO方法，通过利用预训练多模态网络的内在模态信息，提升模型在未见领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督视觉-语言模型在多源领域时因文本标注成本过高而难以直接应用，需探索无需额外标注的领域泛化方法。
AI.method: 提出INDIGO方法，在测试时结合预训练多模态网络的内在模态与视觉模态，无需额外标注即可增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多个领域泛化设置（ClosedDG、OpenDG、Limited sources）中，INDIGO达到最先进的未见领域泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: INDIGO通过有效利用预训练多模态网络的内在信息，为领域泛化提供了简单且高效的解决方案，并通过深入分析验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Md Mahfuzur Rahman,Noah Lewis,Sergey Plis
title: Geometrically Guided Integrated Gradients
title_zh: 几何引导积分梯度
abstract: Interpretability methods for deep neural networks mainly focus on the sensitivity of the class score with respect to the original or perturbed input, usually measured using actual or modified gradients. Some methods also use a model-agnostic approach to understanding the rationale behind every prediction. In this paper, we argue and demonstrate that local geometry of the model parameter space relative to the input can also be beneficial for improved post-hoc explanations. To achieve this goal, we introduce an interpretability method called "geometrically-guided integrated gradients" that builds on top of the gradient calculation along a linear path as traditionally used in integrated gradient methods. However, instead of integrating gradient information, our method explores the model's dynamic behavior from multiple scaled versions of the input and captures the best possible attribution for each input. We demonstrate through extensive experiments that the proposed approach outperforms vanilla and integrated gradients in subjective and quantitative assessment. We also propose a "model perturbation" sanity check to complement the traditionally used "model randomization" test.
summary: Interpretability methods for deep neural networks mainly focus on the sensitivity of the class score with respect to the original or perturbed input, usually measured using actual or modified gradients. Some methods also use a model-agnostic approach to understanding the rationale behind every prediction. In this paper, we argue and demonstrate that local geometry of the model parameter space relative to the input can also be beneficial for improved post-hoc explanations. To achieve this goal, we introduce an interpretability method called "geometrically-guided integrated gradients" that builds on top of the gradient calculation along a linear path as traditionally used in integrated gradient methods. However, instead of integrating gradient information, our method explores the model's dynamic behavior from multiple scaled versions of the input and captures the best possible attribution for each input. We demonstrate through extensive experiments that the proposed approach outperforms vanilla and integrated gradients in subjective and quantitative assessment. We also propose a "model perturbation" sanity check to complement the traditionally used "model randomization" test.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的可解释性方法主要关注类别分数相对于原始或扰动输入的敏感性，通常使用实际或修改的梯度来测量。一些方法还使用与模型无关的方法来理解每个预测背后的基本原理。在本文中，我们论证并证明了模型参数空间相对于输入的局部几何也有利于改进事后解释。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一种称为“几何引导积分梯度”的可解释性方法，该方法建立在积分梯度方法中传统使用的沿线性路径的梯度计算之上。然而，我们的方法不是集成​​梯度信息，而是从输入的多个缩放版本中探索模型的动态行为，并捕获每个输入的最佳可能归因。我们通过大量实验证明，所提出的方法在主观和定量评估方面优于普通梯度和集成梯度。我们还提出了“模型扰动”健全性检查，以补充传统使用的“模型随机化”测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'几何引导积分梯度'的可解释性方法，通过结合模型参数空间的局部几何特性改进深度神经网络的后验解释。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注输入对类别得分的敏感性，但未充分考虑模型参数空间的局部几何特性，而这一特性可能对提升解释质量有帮助。
AI.method: 在传统积分梯度方法基础上，通过分析多尺度输入下的模型动态行为，捕捉最优属性分配，并提出'模型扰动'作为补充验证手段。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在主观和定量评估中均优于传统积分梯度和原始梯度方法，且新提出的模型扰动检验有效。
AI.conclusion: 几何引导积分梯度能有效提升模型解释性，同时提出的模型扰动检验为评估解释方法提供了新基准。
